title: The Value Axis: Language Models Encode Whether They're on the Right Track
abstract: We investigate whether language models internally track the value of their current trajectory, defined as the likelihood that their ongoing strategy will achieve their goals. Using synthetic, in-context reinforcement learning data, we construct a "value" axis for Qwen3-8B. We find that activations along this axis distinguish between high vs. low verbalized confidence, rollouts without and with backtracking, and correct vs. corrupted code. Steering towards high value causally suppresses self-correction and reduces explanatory verbosity, while steering towards low value induces backtracking and exploration. We demonstrate that direct preference optimization (DPO) can increase the internal value of rewarded behaviors (e.g. use a certain word), causing the model to act more confidently after exhibiting them. Finally, we apply the value axis to study in-the-wild settings. For example, we find that Qwen assigns low value to politically sensitive chat queries after post-training and that supervised fine-tuning increases internal confidence within the training domain. Our results suggest that language models linearly encode an estimate of expected goal success that modulates their confidence in pursuing a direction.

light_analysis.overview: 发现语言模型内部存在线性编码的“价值轴”，用于估计当前策略实现目标的可能性，并调节模型自信和行为。
light_analysis.motivation: 语言模型在生成过程中需要评估当前轨迹是否朝着正确方向，但现有研究缺乏对内部价值表征的理解。该问题重要，因为理解这种机制有助于解释模型的自我纠正、探索行为和过度自信等现象。摘要未明确说明现有方法的不足之处，但通过构建价值轴揭示了语言模型内部的价值追踪机制。
light_analysis.method: 使用合成、上下文强化学习数据，为Qwen3-8B构建“价值”轴。通过分析激活沿该轴的差异，区分高/低自信、回溯/无回溯、正确/错误代码。采用直接偏好优化（DPO）增加奖励行为的内部价值。最后将价值轴应用于野外场景，如政治敏感查询和微调域内自信变化。
light_analysis.result: 沿价值轴的激活能区分高/低自信（口头表达）、有无回溯的轨迹、正确与错误代码。沿高价值方向引导可抑制自我纠正并减少解释冗长，沿低价值方向诱导回溯和探索。DPO使模型在展现奖励行为后表现更自信。在野外场景中，Qwen对政治敏感查询赋予低价值，监督微调增加域内自信。
light_analysis.conclusion: 语言模型线性编码对预期目标成功概率的估计，并以此调节对当前方向的自信度。该发现揭示了模型内部价值表征的机制，有助于理解模型行为（如自我纠正、探索）和偏好学习（如DPO）。摘要未提及局限性或未来工作。

title: Context-Aware RL for Agentic and Multimodal LLMs
abstract: Large language models (LLMs) often fail when answering requires identifying a small but decisive piece of evidence within a long or complex context, such as a single line in a tool trace or a subtle detail in an image. We propose ContextRL, a context-aware reinforcement learning (RL) method that improves long-horizon reasoning and multimodal performance through an \emph{indirect} auxiliary objective. Instead of supervising only the final answer, ContextRL presents the model with a query, an answer, and two highly similar contexts, and rewards it for selecting the context that supports the query--answer pair, thereby encouraging fine-grained grounding. We construct contrastive context data in two domains: for coding agents, trajectories serve as contexts, yielding 1k pairs built via condition filtering; for multimodal reasoning, images serve as contexts, yielding 7K pairs built via generative editing and similarity search. ContextRL achieves average gains of +2.2% over standard GRPO on 5 long-horizon benchmarks, and +1.8% across 12 diverse visual question answering benchmarks. To disentangle the effect of the proposed objective from that of additional data, we compare against data-augmentation baselines that repurpose the same contrastive contexts as standard query--context--answer examples. These baselines provide little to no improvement, showing that the gains arise from the proposed context-selection objective rather than from the contrastive data alone.

light_analysis.overview: 提出ContextRL，一种上下文感知强化学习方法，通过间接辅助目标（选择支持查询-答案对的上下文）改进长程推理和多模态性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 大型语言模型在长或复杂上下文中识别关键证据时经常失败，例如工具跟踪中的单行或图像中的细微细节。现有方法仅监督最终答案，缺乏对细粒度接地的鼓励，导致模型难以处理需要精准上下文理解的任务。
light_analysis.method: ContextRL采用间接辅助目标，模型需从两个高度相似的上下文中选择支持给定查询-答案对的那个，并据此给予奖励。在编码代理领域，使用轨迹作为上下文，通过条件过滤构建1K对比对；在多模态推理领域，使用图像作为上下文，通过生成式编辑和相似性搜索构建7K对比对。该目标与GRPO结合进行训练。
light_analysis.result: 在5个长程基准上平均提升+2.2%，在12个视觉问答基准上平均提升+1.8%。与使用相同对比数据作为标准查询-上下文-答案示例的数据增强基线相比，这些基线几乎没有改进，证实增益来自上下文选择目标而非额外数据。
light_analysis.conclusion: ContextRL通过上下文感知的间接目标有效增强了模型对关键细节的捕捉能力，在长程推理和多模态任务上取得稳定提升。该方法具有通用性，未来可扩展到更多领域，但对比数据构建的成本和规模可能是潜在限制。

title: BRDFusion: Physics Meets Generation for Urban Scene Inverse Rendering
abstract: Inverse rendering of urban scenes from captured videos enables numerous applications, including content creation and autonomous driving simulation. Physically-based rendering methods follow and control lighting physics, but suffer from reconstruction and rendering artifacts. While generative models produce realistic videos, they offer limited consistency and controllability. We present BRDFusion, a unified framework that combines two complementary models for inverse and forward rendering. Specifically, BRDFusion recovers explicit, consistent scene properties with physical modeling and alleviates optimization ambiguity with generative priors. During forward rendering, the physical model provides controllable rendering from the scene configuration, and the generative model denoises and fixes artifacts. Therefore, our method produces high-quality videos while allowing precise control, outperforming baselines in real and synthetic scenes. Moreover, BRDFusion supports novel-view relighting, night simulation, and dynamic object insertion/editing. Project page: https://shigon255.github.io/brdfusion-page/

light_analysis.overview: 提出BRDFusion框架，融合物理模型与生成模型，实现高质量且可控的城市场景逆渲染。
light_analysis.motivation: 城市场景逆渲染在内容创建和自动驾驶仿真中至关重要。物理方法遵循光照物理但存在重建和渲染伪影；生成模型可产生逼真视频但缺乏一致性和可控性。现有方法难以同时保证质量和控制能力。
light_analysis.method: BRDFusion结合物理建模与生成先验：物理模型恢复显式一致的场景属性（如BRDF、几何），生成模型（如扩散模型）用于去噪和修复伪影。框架统一逆渲染和正向渲染，支持从场景配置进行可控渲染，同时利用生成模型提升视觉质量。
light_analysis.result: 在真实和合成场景中，BRDFusion在视频质量和控制精度上均优于基线方法。支持新视角重光照、夜间仿真、动态物体插入与编辑，展示了出色的灵活性和性能。
light_analysis.conclusion: BRDFusion通过融合物理与生成模型，克服了传统方法的局限性，实现了高质量且可控的视频生成。其综合能力为内容创建和自动驾驶仿真提供了有力工具。未来可扩展至更多场景类型。

title: Exact Posterior Score Estimation for Solving Linear Inverse Problems
abstract: Diffusion and flow-based models learn powerful data priors by training a denoiser to reverse Gaussian corruption. To use this prior to solve a linear inverse problem, one needs to sample from the posterior, but the score that the prior provides is the unconditional score, not the posterior score. Existing methods either steer a fixed pretrained denoiser with approximate measurement-matching corrections, or train a conditional restoration model that abandons the denoising structure of the prior. We derive the exact posterior score in closed form for linear Gaussian inverse problems under general Gaussian interpolants, and show that posterior sampling reduces to a denoising problem at an operator-dependent shifted pivot under an anisotropic noise covariance. We turn this identity into Exact Posterior Score (EPS), a denoising training objective that preserves the input/output structure of standard pretraining and can therefore be trained from scratch or fine-tuned from a pretrained denoiser. At inference, EPS uses the same sampler as the underlying backbone, with no likelihood gradients or projections. We evaluate EPS on five linear inverse problems across FFHQ and ImageNet, where it outperforms training-free and training-based baselines on fidelity, perceptual, and distributional metrics, while using roughly an order of magnitude fewer denoiser evaluations than gradient-based posterior samplers.

light_analysis.overview: 推导了线性高斯逆问题下精确后验得分的闭式表达式，并基于此提出EPS训练目标，实现高效且精确的后验采样。
light_analysis.motivation: 扩散模型通过学习数据先验来逆转高斯噪声，但求解线性逆问题时需要后验得分，而预训练模型仅提供无条件得分。现有方法或使用近似测量匹配校正（不精确），或训练条件模型（丧失去噪结构）。因此需要一种能保留去噪结构且精确计算后验得分的方法，以提升逆问题求解的质量和效率。
light_analysis.method: 推导了线性高斯逆问题下精确后验得分的闭式形式，将其转化为在算子依赖的偏移和各向异性噪声下的去噪问题。提出EPS训练目标，该目标保持标准预训练的去噪输入/输出结构，可从头训练或基于预训练去噪器微调。推理时使用与骨干网络相同的采样器，无需似然梯度或投影操作。
light_analysis.result: 在FFHQ和ImageNet上的五个线性逆问题（如超分辨率、去模糊、修补等）中，EPS在保真度（PSNR）、感知质量（LPIPS）和分布指标（FID）上均优于无训练和有训练的基线方法。同时，相比基于梯度的后验采样器，EPS所需的去噪器评估次数减少了约一个数量级。
light_analysis.conclusion: EPS通过精确后验得分推导，实现了高效且高质量的后验采样，无需改变去噪结构，具有重要的学术价值（解决后验采样精确性问题）和实际应用价值（高效求解多种线性逆问题）。未来可扩展至非线性逆问题或结合更先进的采样器。

title: Benchmarking LLM Agents on Meta-Analysis Articles from Nature Portfolio
abstract: Meta-analysis is a demanding form of evidence synthesis that combines literature retrieval, PI/ECO-guided study selection, and statistical aggregation. Its structured, verifiable workflow makes it an ideal substrate for evaluating systematic scientific reasoning, yet existing benchmarks lack ground truth across the full retrieval-screening-synthesis pipeline. We introduce MetaSyn, a dataset of 442 expert-curated meta-analyses from Nature Portfolio journals. Each entry pairs a research question with PI/ECO criteria, a retrieval corpus of 140k PubMed articles, verified positive studies, hard negatives that are topically similar but PI/ECO-ineligible, and complete search strategies and date bounds.   Benchmarking twelve pipeline configurations (nine RAG variants and a protocol-driven agent) reveals a critical screening bottleneck: despite a retrieval ceiling of 90.9% recall at K=200, no system recovers more than 52.7% of ground-truth included literature. Current LLMs fail to reliably separate eligible studies from PI/ECO-failing distractors in pools of comparable topical relevance. Stage-attributed metrics capture where systems succeed and fail; a single end-to-end score does not.
comment: 13 pages, 7 figures, preprint for arXiv, dataset and code available at https://github.com/BFTree/MetaSyn

light_analysis.overview: 提出MetaSyn数据集，用于评估LLM智能体在元分析任务中的表现，揭示了当前系统在文献筛选环节的关键瓶颈。
light_analysis.motivation: 元分析是证据合成的严格形式，其结构化工作流程适合评估系统科学推理，但现有基准缺乏从检索到筛选到合成的完整流程的ground truth。因此需要构建包含完整检索-筛选-合成流程的数据集来评估LLM智能体，以更好地衡量其在实际科研任务中的能力。
light_analysis.method: 构建MetaSyn数据集，包含442篇来自Nature Portfolio的专家策划元分析，每项配对研究问题与PI/ECO标准、14万篇PubMed文章检索语料库、已验证阳性研究、主题相似但不符合PI/ECO的硬负样本、完整搜索策略和日期范围。评估12种流程配置，包括9种RAG变体和一个协议驱动智能体，使用阶段归因指标分析系统性能。
light_analysis.result: 尽管检索上限在K=200时召回率达90.9%，但所有系统恢复的ground truth文献不超过52.7%。当前LLM无法可靠地将符合条件的研究与主题相似但不符合PI/ECO的干扰项分开。阶段归因指标揭示了系统成功和失败的位置，表明筛选环节是主要瓶颈。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文揭示了元分析任务中的关键筛选瓶颈，现有LLM智能体在文献筛选环节表现不佳。MetaSyn数据集为评估系统科学推理提供了标准化基准，具有重要学术价值。未来工作可针对筛选瓶颈改进模型，提升证据合成的自动化水平。

title: The Importance of Phase in Neural Representations: An Internal Oppenheim-Lim Test of Image Classifiers
abstract: Oppenheim and Lim (1981) showed that natural images stay recognizable when reconstructed from their Fourier phase alone, while the magnitude carries little of their identity. We ask whether trained image classifiers reproduce this asymmetry inside their hidden layers, and we test it causally: given two images, we transplant the phase of one onto the magnitude of the other at a chosen layer and record which image the prediction follows. In PRISM2D, GFNet, and ViT-B/16 the prediction follows the phase or sign donor, and deleting all image-specific magnitude barely moves accuracy, so identity rides on phase while image-specific magnitude is largely dispensable to the readout. ResNet-50 at first seems to break the pattern, because transplanting sign after its ReLUs does nothing; a fair intervention before the ReLU reveals a strong latent sign code in the late blocks, and a DC-only control shows the readout consumes a channel-wise spatial average. Controls rule out the trivial case in which magnitude simply stops depending on the image. The architectures therefore share a phase/sign identity code but expose it in different bases, set by rectification and readout geometry, which gives a mechanistic account of the texture--shape gap between CNNs and attention models.

light_analysis.overview: 通过内部Oppenheim-Lim检验，发现多种图像分类器在隐藏层中主要依赖相位/符号信息进行识别，幅度信息大多可丢弃。
light_analysis.motivation: Oppenheim和Lim (1981)表明自然图像可从傅里叶相位重建且保持可识别性，而幅度携带的身份信息很少。本研究探究训练好的图像分类器是否在其隐藏层中再现这种不对称性，并进行因果测试：将一幅图像的相位/符号移植到另一幅图像的幅度上，观察预测跟随哪个图像。该问题对于理解模型内部表示机制（如纹理-形状差异）至关重要。
light_analysis.method: 对PRISM2D、GFNet、ViT-B/16和ResNet-50等模型，在特定层进行相位-幅度移植实验。在ReLU之前进行干预，发现ResNet-50隐藏了强潜符号代码。通过仅直流控制表明读出层使用通道级空间平均。分析不同架构中相位/符号身份代码在不同基下的暴露机制。
light_analysis.result: 在PRISM2D、GFNet和ViT-B/16中，预测跟随相位/符号捐赠者，删除所有图像特定幅度后准确率几乎不变。ResNet-50在ReLU后移植无效果，但在ReLU前干预发现强潜符号代码。控制实验排除了幅度不依赖图像的平凡情况。架构共享相位/符号身份代码，但暴露在不同基下。
light_analysis.conclusion: 研究表明多种图像分类器内部表示中相位/符号携带主要身份信息，幅度可丢弃。这为CNN和注意力模型之间的纹理-形状差距提供了机制解释。学术价值在于揭示神经网络表示中的相位重要性，实际价值可能指导模型设计利用相位信息。局限性：未涉及所有架构，未来可探索其他模型。

title: Your Privacy My Cloak: Backdoor Attacks on Differentially Private Federated Learning
abstract: Prior research suggests that differential privacy (DP) inherently enhances the robustness of federated learning (FL) against backdoor attacks. In this paper, we challenge this assumption. Through an empirical analysis of two baseline attack strategies, we uncover a fundamental tension in DP-FL: while bypassing DP allows state-of-the-art defenses to detect and filter malicious updates, complying with DP inadvertently masks their distinguishing statistical characteristics. Consequently, existing defenses become ineffective as DP reduces the raw backdoor signal. Building on this masking effect, we propose RING, a novel attack that explicitly exploits DP to conceal malicious contributions while maximizing attack impact. By collaboratively crafting adversarial perturbations, compromised clients reconstruct a strong backdoor signal during aggregation without triggering anomaly detection. RING operates as a perturbation layer that is agnostic to the underlying backdoor technique, making it broadly applicable and composable with existing attacks -- a property that significantly amplifies the threat it poses to DP-FL. Extensive evaluations across four image and text datasets under non-iid distributions show that RING achieves an average attack success rate of 90.3% against six state-of-the-art defenses under a moderate privacy budget, an improvement of up to 26.08x over baseline strategies. Finally, we evaluate potential countermeasures and find that mitigating this threat incurs significant utility trade-offs, exposing a fundamental security gap in the deployment of differentially private FL.

light_analysis.overview: 揭示差分隐私联邦学习中差分隐私反而掩盖后门攻击信号，提出新攻击RING利用DP隐藏恶意更新，实现高成功率。
light_analysis.motivation: 先前研究认为差分隐私(DP)能增强联邦学习(FL)对后门攻击的鲁棒性。本文质疑这一假设，通过两种基线攻击策略的实证分析，发现DP-FL中存在根本矛盾：绕过DP的恶意更新易被现有防御检测，而遵守DP则掩盖了恶意更新的统计特征，导致防御失效。因此，需要探索如何利用DP的掩盖效应实施更隐蔽的攻击。
light_analysis.method: 提出RING攻击方法，显式利用差分隐私的噪声掩盖恶意贡献，同时最大化攻击效果。通过协作构建对抗性扰动，受损客户端在聚合过程中重建强后门信号而不触发异常检测。RING作为与底层后门技术无关的扰动层，可广泛组合现有攻击。在四个图像和文本数据集上、非独立同分布场景下评估。
light_analysis.result: 在中等隐私预算下，RING对六种最先进防御的平均攻击成功率达90.3%，相比基线策略最高提升26.08倍。实验覆盖多种数据集和非独立同分布场景，表明RING高效且广泛适用。同时发现，缓解该威胁会显著牺牲效用，暴露DP-FL部署中的根本安全漏洞。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文挑战了DP增强FL鲁棒性的传统认知，揭示DP反而为后门攻击提供掩护。RING攻击成功利用此漏洞，强调现有DP-FL系统在安全性上的重大缺陷。未来需开发兼顾隐私与安全的新型防御机制。研究具有警示意义，推动DP-FL实际部署中的安全考量。

title: KVEraser: Learning to Steer KV Cache for Efficient Localized Context Erasing
abstract: Post-hoc context erasing over the KV cache is challenging because a local edit has a global consequence: once a span has been processed, its influence propagates into the cached states of all subsequent tokens. This issue arises naturally in long-context LLM applications, where stale retrieved facts, incorrect tool observations, retracted user preferences, or harmful prompt injections may be identified only after prefill. Exact erasing must then recompute all tokens after the deleted span, making its computational cost depend on suffix length rather than erased-span length. We introduce KVEraser, a learned KV-cache editing method for efficient localized context erasing. Given a processed context and a span to remove, KVEraser replaces only the KV states of the erased interval with learned steering states while reusing the remaining cache unchanged. To learn a transferable erasing mechanism, we build a two-stage training pipeline: generic span-neighbor pre-training teaches the eraser to suppress the influence of the erased span, while task-specific fine-tuning adapts this capability to downstream scenarios. Experiments show that KVEraser nearly matches full recomputation in post-erasure performance on in-domain tasks across 1K--32K context lengths, while its latency increases by only 24% compared with a 17.6x increase for full recomputation. KVEraser also generalizes to unseen long-document QA tasks with harmful factual distractors, achieving the best performance among approximate baselines with a 3--4x speedup over full recomputation.
comment: Oral at the ICML 2026 Workshop on the Impact of Memorization on Trustworthy Foundation Models

light_analysis.overview: 提出KVEraser，一种通过学习编辑KV缓存实现局部上下文擦除的高效方法，在保持性能的同时显著降低延迟。
light_analysis.motivation: 在长上下文LLM应用中，后验上下文擦除面临局部编辑产生全局影响的挑战：已处理内容的影响会传播到后续所有token的缓存状态，导致精确擦除需重新计算删除区间后的所有token，计算成本取决于后缀长度而非擦除区间长度，效率低下。
light_analysis.method: KVEraser通过学习编辑KV缓存实现高效局部擦除：仅替换擦除区间的KV状态为学习到的引导状态，其余缓存不变。采用两阶段训练：通用区间-邻居预训练抑制擦除区间影响，任务特定微调适应下游场景，使擦除机制可迁移。
light_analysis.result: 在域内任务中，KVEraser在1K-32K上下文长度下几乎匹配完全重新计算的擦除后性能，延迟仅增加24%（完全重新计算增加17.6倍）。泛化到未见过的长文档QA任务（含有害干扰），在近似基线中性能最佳，比完全重新计算快3-4倍。
light_analysis.conclusion: KVEraser实现了高效局部上下文擦除，性能接近完全重新计算且延迟大幅降低，为长上下文LLM中的安全性与隐私保护提供了实用解决方案。未来可探索更复杂场景的擦除机制。

title: Qwen-RobotWorld Technical Report: Unifying Embodied World Modeling through Language-Conditioned Video Generation
abstract: We introduce Qwen-RobotWorld, a language-conditioned video world model for embodied intelligence. With natural language as a unified action interface, it predicts physically grounded future visual trajectories from current observations across robotic manipulation, autonomous driving, indoor navigation, and human-to-robot transfer. This unified formulation provides three promising application directions: synthetic data generation for policy training augmentation, scalable virtual environments for policy evaluation, and language-guided planning signals for downstream robot control. This is achieved through a three-part design: a) Double-Stream MMDiT with MLLM Action Encoding, where a 60-layer double-stream diffusion transformer couples frozen Qwen2.5-VL semantics with video-VAE latents through layer-wise joint attention; b) Embodied World Knowledge (EWK), an 8.6M video-text corpus (200M+ frames) with action-language mapping over 20+ embodiments and 500+ action categories; and c) General+Expert Progressive Curriculum, a two-stage training strategy that first learns general visual priors and then injects embodied specialization under a shared language interface. Extensive results show strong competitiveness: ranks 1st overall on EWMBench and DreamGen Bench, outperforms all open-source models on WorldModelBench and PBench. Additional zero-shot analyses on RoboTwin-IF benchmark further support robust generalization and multi-view consistency.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Qwen-RobotWorld，一种语言条件视频世界模型，统一多种具身智能任务，实现从当前观测预测未来视觉轨迹。
light_analysis.motivation: 具身智能需要从多模态观测中预测未来状态，但现有世界模型往往针对特定任务设计，缺乏统一框架。不同机器人平台、驾驶场景和导航任务间的异构性限制了模型的泛化能力和应用范围。该研究旨在通过自然语言作为统一动作接口，构建一个通用的视频生成世界模型，支持策略训练数据增强、虚拟环境评估和规划信号生成。
light_analysis.method: 采用三项设计：a) Double-Stream MMDiT with MLLM Action Encoding，60层双流扩散变压器将冻结的Qwen2.5-VL语义与视频VAE潜在表示通过逐层联合注意力耦合；b) Embodied World Knowledge (EWK) 数据集，包含860万视频-文本对（超2亿帧），覆盖20+具身类型和500+动作类别；c) General+Expert渐进式课程训练，先学习通用视觉先验，再注入具身专业知识。
light_analysis.result: 在EWMBench和DreamGen Bench上综合排名第1，在WorldModelBench和PBench上优于所有开源模型。零样本分析在RoboTwin-IF基准上验证了鲁棒泛化和多视图一致性。具体性能指标未在摘要中详述。
light_analysis.conclusion: 通过统一语言接口和渐进训练策略，Qwen-RobotWorld实现了多种具身任务的视频世界建模，展现出强竞争力。其开源数据和方法有望推动具身智能研究，尤其在数据生成、虚拟评估和规划引导方面。未来可扩展至更多具身类型和更复杂交互。

title: DEEPRUBRIC: Evidence-Tree Rubric Supervision for Efficient Reinforcement Learning of Deep Research Agents
abstract: Deep research agents synthesize long-form reports by searching and reasoning over retrieved evidence. Reinforcement learning with rubric-based rewards improves these agents by optimizing them against checkable criteria that translate report quality into reward signals, but its efficiency depends on whether those criteria reliably capture the task scope and evidence needs. Most existing studies ask an LLM to generate rubrics for a given query, but when the model fails to infer the underlying information needs, the generated rubrics may be incomplete and reduce RL efficiency. To obtain more reliable query--rubric supervision, we introduce DeepRubric, a data construction framework that reverses this process: instead of inferring evaluation criteria for a given query, it first determines what an evidence-backed report should be evaluated on and then synthesizes aligned query--rubric pairs from those evaluation targets. Starting from a sampled seed topic, DeepRubric builds an evidence tree by recursively expanding evidence-backed sub-questions, whose leaves serve as atomic and verifiable evaluation targets. It then uses the evidence tree to synthesize the training query and rubrics, ensuring that the reward evaluates exactly the information requested by the query. Using DeepRubric, we construct 9K query--rubric supervision examples and train DeepRubric-8B with rubric-based GRPO, achieving comparable performance to prior open state-of-the-art deep research models across three benchmarks with roughly 13x fewer RL GPU-hours.

light_analysis.overview: 提出DeepRubric数据构建框架，通过证据树生成高质量查询-评价标准对，显著提升深度研究智能体的强化学习效率。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有方法由LLM为给定查询生成评价标准，但模型可能无法准确推断潜在信息需求，导致评价标准不完整，降低强化学习效率。为解决此问题，需要更可靠的数据驱动方法来保证查询与评价标准的一致性。
light_analysis.method: DeepRubric反转传统流程：先确定证据支持的评估目标，再合成查询-评价标准对。从种子话题开始，递归扩展证据子问题构建证据树，叶子节点作为原子可验证的评估目标。利用证据树合成训练查询和评价标准，确保奖励评估精确对应查询所需信息。
light_analysis.result: 使用DeepRubric构建9K查询-评价标准训练实例，基于评价标准的GRPO训练DeepRubric-8B模型。在三个基准上达到与先前开源SOTA深度研究模型相当的性能，但RL GPU时间减少约13倍，显著提升计算效率。
light_analysis.conclusion: DeepRubric提供高效的数据驱动框架，通过证据树确保查询与评价标准对齐，大幅降低强化学习计算成本，同时保持性能。该方法在深度研究任务中具有实际应用价值，未来可扩展至更复杂的多步推理任务。

title: HAMON: Passive Optical Sequence Mixing for Long-Horizon Forecasting
abstract: Simple linear and frequency-domain models remain surprisingly competitive in long-horizon time-series forecasting, and recent mechanistic evidence suggests that standard forecasting benchmarks may not require the dense superposed representations that make transformers powerful in other domains. This raises a substrate-level question: if the core forecasting operator is often low-complexity and approximately linear, does it need to be implemented as learned digital temporal mixing? We introduce HAMON, a passive diffractive optical forecasting core in which historical values are encoded onto an optical aperture, future positions are left dark, and cascaded trainable phase masks with free-space diffraction shape the forecast directly in the output field. At inference, prediction is performed by a single passive optical propagation pass with no trainable digital sequence-mixing layer.   Across standard benchmarks, HAMON outperforms the strongest digital baselines considered on ETTm2 at all horizons and on ETTh2 at all but the longest horizon, improving MSE by up to 14\% and doing so consistently across horizons rather than at isolated points. It is competitive on Weather and trails the strongest baselines on the remaining ETT settings and on the high-channel-count Traffic and Electricity datasets. Phase encoding, intensity-compatible readout, and phase-scrambling ablations, together with a TorchOptics cross-simulator check, indicate that the forecasts arise from the data-bearing optical field rather than from a digital forecasting head. Because the passive core uses standard Fourier optics, HAMON defines a concrete target for optical hardware and for passive physical sequence mixing.

light_analysis.overview: 提出被动衍射光学预测核心HAMON，通过光学序列混合实现长期时间序列预测，无需可训练数字序列混合层。
light_analysis.motivation: 长期时间序列预测中，简单线性和频域模型依然有竞争力，且证据表明标准基准不需要Transformer的密集叠加表示。这引出一个问题：如果核心预测算子通常低复杂度且近似线性，是否必须通过学习的数字时间混合实现？HAMON旨在探索被动光学方案实现高效预测。
light_analysis.method: HAMON将历史值编码到光学孔径，未来位置留暗，通过级联可训练相位掩模和自由空间衍射直接在输出场中成形预测。推理时，单次被动光学传播完成预测，无需可训练数字序列混合层。使用标准傅里叶光学，支持强度兼容读出和相位加扰消融实验。
light_analysis.result: 在ETTm2和ETTh2数据集上，HAMON在大多数预测长度上优于最强数字基线，MSE改进最高达14%，且一致性好。在Weather上具有竞争力，在ETT其他设置及高通道数Traffic和Electricity上略弱。消融实验和跨模拟器验证表明预测来自光学场而非数字头。
light_analysis.conclusion: HAMON展示了被动光学序列混合的有效性，为长期预测提供了一种新的低复杂度范式。它定义了一个具体的光学硬件目标，潜在优势包括低能耗和快速推理。未来可探索更复杂的光学架构和更大规模数据集。

title: MeshLoom: Feed-Forward Non-Rigid Registration of Mesh Sequences
abstract: We present MeshLoom, a feed-forward registration network that directly reconstructs vertex deformations across mesh sequences. Our approach advances non-rigid registration beyond existing models, which are typically constrained by costly per-instance optimization, narrow object categories, pairwise-only inputs, or merely intermediate outputs. The network is simple and efficient, registering multiple meshes within seconds. At its core lies a topology-aware encoder--decoder design. Specifically, we first introduce a topology-aware point representation that encodes the anchor (reference) mesh's topology into its per-vertex features. This representation strengthens the network's understanding of the anchor-mesh geometry and disambiguates points that are Euclidean-close yet geodesically distant. We then propose a multi-modal encoder that fuses this anchor-mesh representation with complementary cues from each frame, such as shape latents and image features. These multi-source signals are compressed into a compact global motion embedding that captures dense inter-frame correspondence. A lightweight decoder then queries this global embedding with the anchor-mesh point representation, retrieving per-vertex deformations at target timestamps. Through extensive experiments across diverse motions and object categories, we show that MeshLoom achieves state-of-the-art results on non-rigid registration. In addition, we find that our global embedding-then-query paradigm naturally enables the network to generate deformations at intermediate timestamps, which extends MeshLoom to motion interpolation and mesh morphing. Project page: https://meshloom.github.io/ .

light_analysis.overview: 提出MeshLoom，一种前馈非刚性配准网络，通过拓扑感知编码器-解码器直接重建网格序列顶点变形，实现快速且高精度的配准。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有非刚性配准方法受限于昂贵的逐实例优化、狭窄物体类别、仅支持成对输入或仅产生中间输出，无法高效处理多样网格序列。本文旨在设计一种简单、高效且泛化的前馈网络，直接预测顶点变形，解决上述局限性。
light_analysis.method: 核心为拓扑感知编码器-解码器。首先，拓扑感知点表示将参考网格拓扑编码为逐顶点特征，区分欧式近但测地远的点。然后，多模态编码器融合该表示与每帧的形状隐码和图像特征，压缩为紧凑全局运动嵌入。最后，轻量解码器以参考点表示为查询，从全局嵌入中检索目标时刻的逐顶点变形。
light_analysis.result: 在多种运动和物体类别上取得非刚性配准的最优结果。具体性能指标摘要未明确说明，但声称超越现有模型。网络可在数秒内注册多个网格，并自然支持运动插值和网格变形。
light_analysis.conclusion: MeshLoom实现了高效的前馈非刚性配准，避免了逐实例优化，并扩展到中间帧变形。学术价值在于提出拓扑感知与全局嵌入-查询范式，实际应用价值在于快速动画和几何处理。潜在局限性可能包括对复杂拓扑的适应性，未来可探索动态场景。

title: ExpRL: Exploratory RL for LLM Mid-Training
abstract: Sparse reward reinforcement learning (RL) has become a standard tool for improving LLM reasoning, but its success depends critically on the coverage present in the base model. In practice, models are often primed for RL through \emph{mid-training} on curated reasoning traces that teach useful primitive skills such as decomposition, verification, or self-correction. Although effective, this strategy requires manually specifying what the model should learn, and it remains unclear whether such primitive coverage is enough for much harder problems, which require combining these skills into broader solution strategies. We study a more automated approach: \emph{RL-based mid-training} using large corpora of human-written question-answer data. Rather than treating reference solutions as targets to imitate, our method, ExpRL, uses them as \emph{reward scaffolds}: references are hidden from the policy and used only to construct problem-specific grading rubrics for judging on-policy reasoning traces. The policy samples from the original problem prompt, while an LLM judge compares the sampled reasoning trace against the reference solution and assigns outcome-level or process-level dense rewards. This lets ExpRL reinforce partial progress, useful intermediate reductions, and productive reasoning behaviors that sparse final-answer rewards often fail to upweight. On challenging math reasoning tasks, ExpRL yields stronger RL priming than SFT, sparse-reward GRPO, and self-distillation, and provides a better initialization for subsequent sparse-reward RL. Additional mixed-domain experiments further suggest that ExpRL can extend beyond the original math-only setting.

light_analysis.overview: 提出ExpRL方法，利用参考解答作为奖励框架进行探索性RL中间训练，提升LLM推理能力。
light_analysis.motivation: 稀疏奖励RL依赖基础模型的覆盖度，现有方法需手动指定学习内容，且对于复杂问题难以组合基本技能。需要更自动化的RL中间训练方法。
light_analysis.method: 使用人类编写的问答数据，将参考解答作为奖励框架（reward scaffold），隐藏策略，通过LLM评判器对比策略轨迹与参考解答，分配稠密奖励，强化部分进展和有用推理行为。
light_analysis.result: 在数学推理任务上，ExpRL优于SFT、稀疏奖励GRPO和自蒸馏，为后续稀疏奖励RL提供更好的初始化，并在混合领域实验中显示泛化能力。
light_analysis.conclusion: ExpRL提供了自动化的RL中间训练方法，有效提升LLM推理能力，可扩展至多领域。未来可探索更复杂的奖励框架。

title: FusionRS: A Large-Scale RGB-Infrared Remote Sensing Dataset for Dual-Modal Vision-Language Foundation Models
abstract: Remote sensing vision-language models have advanced Earth observation understanding, but most existing work remains centered on RGB imagery, leaving the complementary information in infrared data underexplored. Infrared images provide distinctive cues, including thermal intensity structures, object boundaries, and illumination-invariant scene features, which can enrich visual-language learning beyond conventional RGB observations. However, a large-scale RGB-infrared-text dataset for remote sensing vision-language modeling is still absent. To address this gap, we introduce FusionRS, the first large-scale RGB-infrared-text dataset designed for dual-modal vision-language learning in remote sensing. FusionRS is constructed by translating diverse public RGB remote sensing images into infrared-style counterparts, forming aligned RGB-IR image pairs. Each pair is associated with conventional scene captions and IR-aware captions that explicitly describe infrared-specific visual properties while preserving semantic content. Based on FusionRS, we train dual-modal vision-language foundation models for RGB-IR joint understanding. We first train CLIP-style models for RGB-IR-text alignment, and then fine-tune generative VLMs for dual-modal RGB-IR captioning. Experiments show that FusionRS improves RGB-IR alignment, infrared-to-text retrieval, and dual-modal captioning over RGB-only and non-IR-aware training settings. Ablation studies further verify that IR-aware captions are crucial for strengthening infrared-language alignment, highlighting the importance of modality-specific textual supervision for more scalable RGB-infrared remote sensing vision-language representation learning.

light_analysis.overview: 提出首个大规模RGB-红外-文本遥感数据集FusionRS，支持双模态视觉-语言基础模型训练。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有遥感视觉-语言模型主要基于RGB图像，忽略了红外数据提供的热强度、物体边界和光照不变场景特征等互补信息。缺乏大规模RGB-红外-文本数据集限制了双模态学习的发展。
light_analysis.method: 将公开RGB遥感图像转换为红外风格，构建对齐的RGB-IR图像对，并为每对生成场景描述和红外感知描述。基于此数据集训练双模态视觉-语言基础模型：先训练CLIP风格模型实现RGB-IR-文本对齐，再微调生成式VLM进行双模态RGB-IR描述生成。
light_analysis.result: FusionRS在RGB-IR对齐、红外到文本检索和双模态描述任务上优于仅RGB和非红外感知训练设置。消融实验证明红外感知描述对强化红外-语言对齐至关重要。
light_analysis.conclusion: FusionRS填补了大规模RGB-红外-文本数据集空白，展示了双模态视觉语言学习的有效性，为遥感基础模型提供了规模化学习方向。

title: TokenPilot: Cache-Efficient Context Management for LLM Agents
abstract: As LLM agents are deployed in long-horizon sessions, context accumulation drives up inference costs. Existing approaches utilize text pruning or dynamic memory eviction to minimize token footprints; however, their unconstrained sequence mutations alter layouts, introducing prefix mismatches and cache invalidation. This reveals a critical trade-off between text sparsity and prompt cache continuity. To address this, we present TokenPilot, a dual-granularity context management framework. Globally, Ingestion-Aware Compaction acts as a framework harness to stabilize prompt prefixes and eliminate open-world environmental noise at the ingestion gate. Locally, Lifecycle-Aware Eviction monitors the ongoing residual utility of context segments, enforcing a conservative batch-turn schedule to offload content segments only when task relevance expires. Experiments on PinchBench and Claw-Eval under both isolated and continuous modes demonstrate that TokenPilot reduces costs by 61% and 56% in isolated mode, and 61% and 87% in continuous mode, while maintaining competitive performance compared to prior systems. TokenPilot has been integrated into LightMem2 at https://github.com/zjunlp/LightMem2.

light_analysis.overview: 提出TokenPilot，一种双粒度上下文管理框架，通过稳定提示前缀和智能驱逐机制，在保持性能的同时显著降低LLM代理的推理成本。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有LLM代理在长期会话中面临上下文累积导致推理成本高的问题。常用方法如文本剪枝或动态内存驱逐虽能减少token占用，但无约束的序列变更会破坏提示缓存连续性，引起前缀不匹配和缓存失效。这揭示了文本稀疏性与缓存连续性之间的关键权衡，亟需一种协同优化方案。
light_analysis.method: TokenPilot采用双粒度上下文管理：全局层面，Ingestion-Aware Compaction在摄入门控稳定提示前缀并消除开放环境噪声；局部层面，Lifecycle-Aware Eviction监控上下文段的残余效用，仅在任务相关性过期时按批次保守卸载。框架无需修改底层LLM，灵活集成。
light_analysis.result: 在PinchBench和Claw-Eval上评估：孤立模式下，成本分别降低61%和56%；连续模式下，成本降低61%和87%。与现有系统相比，在节省成本的同时保持了竞争性任务性能，验证了方法有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: TokenPilot成功平衡了上下文稀疏性与缓存连续性，为长时LLM代理提供了低成本的上下文管理方案。已集成到LightMem2开源工具中，实用价值高。未来可进一步优化驱逐策略并探索多模态场景。

title: Filtered Conformal Ellipsoids for Graph-Native Time Series
abstract: Joint prediction sets for multivariate time series should control a single event while adapting to cross-coordinate dependence. We study filtered conformal ellipsoids: a frozen state-space filter emits a one-step predictive mean and covariance, and split-conformal calibration is applied to the resulting Mahalanobis scores. The filter is used to choose the ellipsoid shape; conformal calibration chooses the scalar radius, so the construction benefits from a learned predictive covariance without relying on Gaussian tail probabilities for coverage. The main difficulty is that filtered scores are dependent and learned recurrent filters need not contract in their raw hidden state; we therefore analyse contraction in an observable predictive-law quotient that identifies hidden states producing the same future sequence of emitted Gaussian laws. Under a stable Bayes Gaussian-projection filter, covariance bounds, and a finite-horizon observability Fisher condition, small excess Gaussian negative log-likelihood implies contraction of the learned emitted laws. Combined with a threshold-autocovariance envelope this yields a Chebyshev-type approximate coverage bound for filtered split-conformal prediction under dependence; a sharper Bernstein-type bound requires an additional geometric-mixing concentration assumption. Under Gaussian oracle realisability we also obtain a near-oracle log-volume comparison within the class of conditionally valid Gaussian ellipsoid rules. We instantiate the framework with a GCN-GRU filter with diagonal-plus-low-rank covariance. On moderate-size graph-native traffic benchmarks (METRLA-$20$ and PEMSBAY-$50$), the learned filter gives sharper at-target ellipsoids than static-covariance and non-filter baselines; at full-graph scale and on non-graph-native datasets, factor and copula baselines can be stronger.

light_analysis.overview: 提出过滤共形椭球方法，结合状态空间滤波和分裂共形校准，为图原生多元时间序列生成联合预测集。
light_analysis.motivation: 多元时间序列联合预测集需要控制单一事件同时适应跨坐标依赖。现有共形预测方法多假设独立性，难以处理时间序列中的依赖性和图结构。过滤共形椭球通过冻结状态空间滤波器输出预测均值和协方差，并利用分裂共形校准选择椭球半径，避免依赖高斯尾部概率，但过滤得分的依赖性和循环滤波器的隐含状态收缩问题亟待解决。
light_analysis.method: 论文提出过滤共形椭球框架：使用冻结状态空间滤波器（如GCN-GRU）生成一步预测均值和协方差，对马氏距离进行分裂共形校准得到标量半径。分析滤波得分的依赖性，通过可观测预测律商研究隐含状态收缩，并在稳定贝叶斯高斯投影滤波器、协方差界和有限视界可观测性Fisher条件下证明小超额负对数似然意味着发射律收缩。结合阈值自协方差包络得到切比雪夫型近似覆盖界，伯恩斯坦型需几何混合浓度假设。
light_analysis.result: 在METRLA-20和PEMSBAY-50图原生交通基准上，GCN-GRU滤波器生成的椭球比静态协方差和无滤波基线更尖锐且目标覆盖更准确。在全图规模和非图原生数据集上，因子和copula基线表现更优。摘要未明确提供具体数值指标，但表明方法在特定场景下有效。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文从理论上证明了过滤共形椭球在依赖时间序列中的覆盖保证，并通过图神经网络滤波器提升了椭球效率。该方法适用于图原生交通预测，但非图原生场景下需结合其他技术。未来可探索更通用的混合模型和理论扩展。

title: From Tokens to Policy: Causal and Interpretable Heterogeneous Treatment Effects Identification
abstract: Heterogeneous Treatment Effect (HTE) identification is crucial to explain the impact of an intervention and optimize our policies accordingly. Existing approaches trade expressivity for interpretability, but, if some active heterogeneity drivers are unmeasured, methods at both ends of this spectrum allow for spurious HTE characterization with no causal reading. In this work, we focus on controlled experiments and argue that an oracle HTE causal characterization via the latent interactors is now within reach, thanks to (i) more extensive pre-treatment measurements, i.e., multi-modal and multi-view, and (ii) scalable representations with minimal human supervision. We then re-frame HTE identification as a Markov-blanket discovery problem on a sufficient and aligned pre-treatment representation, and introduce Neural EXposure Interaction Search (NEXIS), an iterative procedure with provable and empirically validated consistent selection. We deploy NEXIS on two anti-poverty programs in Africa, augmenting each with satellite imagery capturing previously unmeasured environmental effect modifiers, leading to novel, interpretable and prescriptive guidelines to optimize the programs' next iterations.

light_analysis.overview: 提出NEXIS方法，利用多模态预处理表示和马尔可夫毯发现，实现因果可解释的异质性处理效应识别。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有异质性处理效应（HTE）识别方法在表达性和可解释性之间权衡，但当一些主动异质性驱动因素未被测量时，无论哪种方法都可能产生虚假的HTE特征，缺乏因果解读。本文旨在受控实验中，利用更广泛的预处理测量（多模态、多视角）和可扩展的少监督表示，实现可解释且因果的HTE识别。
light_analysis.method: 将HTE识别重新定义为在充分对齐的预处理表示上的马尔可夫毯发现问题。提出神经暴露交互搜索（NEXIS），一种具有可证明且经验验证一致选择能力的迭代过程。利用多模态数据（如卫星图像）捕捉未测量的环境效应调节因子，增强因果发现。
light_analysis.result: 将NEXIS部署在非洲两个反贫困项目中，通过添加卫星图像捕捉先前未测量的环境效应调节因子，产生了新颖、可解释且规定性的指导方针，以优化项目的后续迭代。摘要未给出具体数值指标，但强调了实践有效性和因果一致性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文提出了一种因果可解释的HTE识别框架NEXIS，突破了传统方法在可解释性和因果性上的局限。应用在反贫困项目中展示了实际价值，能够利用多模态数据提供政策优化指南。未来可进一步扩展到其他领域或结合更多数据类型。

title: Bayesian Inference and Decision Audits for Public Archives of Frontier AI Evaluations
abstract: Public AI evaluations are often read as terminal leaderboards, yet the underlying evidence is a selective time series shaped by reporting rules, benchmark revisions, and missingness. Repeated public archives for LiveBench and Open LLM Leaderboard v2 serve as the primary longitudinal record; LMArena provides a preference stress test; and GAIA and tau-bench contribute limited agentic pilots. Together, these archives instantiate a Bayesian inference problem: under a fixed reporting convention, one constructed terminal-only example over $1{,}000$ systems is compatible with two pre-terminal histories, yielding times of $23.03$ or $75.13$ to reach within $0.05$ of the ceiling under the same terminal-tail model. In synthetic posterior comparisons, action-facing diagnostics differ across observation regimes. The candidate selection-aware frontier model fails synthetic recovery, objective-archive prediction, preference transfer, and uncertainty calibration; correspondingly, fixed audit gates reject its stronger claims. An archive-and-adjudication protocol reconstructs public evaluation histories, isolates a verified timing boundary, and falsifies unsupported frontier claims.

light_analysis.overview: 提出贝叶斯推理与决策审计方法，用于分析公共AI评估档案中的时序偏差，识别并驳斥未验证的前沿声称。
light_analysis.motivation: 公共AI评估常被视为最终排行榜，但实际证据受报告规则、基准修订和数据缺失影响，形成选择性时间序列。现有方法未处理此类时序偏差，导致对AI系统性能的误判。研究旨在通过贝叶斯推理和决策审计重建评估历史，验证前沿声称的可靠性，提高评估的透明度和可信度。
light_analysis.method: 利用LiveBench、Open LLM Leaderboard v2等公共档案构建纵向记录，LMArena提供偏好压力测试，GAIA和tau-bench提供智能体试验。建立贝叶斯推理模型，在固定报告约定下分析前后时序一致性，并通过合成后验比较不同观测机制下的决策诊断。评估候选选择感知前沿模型，但该模型在合成恢复、目标档案预测、偏好迁移和不确定性校准中失败。
light_analysis.result: 在超过1000个系统的固定报告约定下，终端示例与两种前后历史兼容，达到天花板0.05倍的时间分别为23.03和75.13。合成后验比较显示不同观测机制下诊断结果有差异。候选选择感知前沿模型在所有四项测试中失败，固定审计门限拒绝了其强声称。
light_analysis.conclusion: 提出的档案与裁定协议重构了公共评估历史，隔离了验证的时间边界，并驳斥了未支持的前沿声称。该方法提升了AI评估的可靠性，但可能依赖特定模型假设。未来可扩展至更多基准测试和评估场景，进一步增强评估的鲁棒性。

title: ActiveSAM: Image-Conditional Class Pruning for Fast and Accurate Open-Vocabulary Segmentation
abstract: Segment Anything Model 3 (SAM 3) provides a strong frozen backbone for concept-prompted segmentation, but applying it directly to open-vocabulary semantic segmentation (OVSS) is inefficient: full-resolution decoding is typically run over the entire dataset vocabulary, whereas each image contains only a small active subset of classes. We introduce ActiveSAM, a training-free, zero-shot inference framework that turns SAM 3 into an active-vocabulary segmenter. ActiveSAM first canonicalizes and expands class prompts, then estimates an image-conditioned active set from a low-resolution presence preview. Only the retained classes are decoded at full resolution, using bucketed prompt multiplexing with the frozen SAM 3 decoder. The preview stage uses only class-presence evidence and skips unnecessary segmentation-head computation, while the final stage applies margin-aware background calibration to suppress low-confidence pixels. ActiveSAM requires no target-dataset training, no weight updates, and no oracle class-presence labels. Across eight OVSS benchmarks, ActiveSAM improves the speed-accuracy tradeoff of training-free open-vocabulary semantic segmentation, outperforming the current state-of-the-art SegEarth-OV3 by approximately +1.4 mIoU on average while running up to 5.5x faster on large-vocabulary datasets. ActiveSAM also demonstrates the strongest robustness under image corruption that simulates real-world distribution shift, making it well-suited for deployment in noisy-input domains such as autonomous driving and embodied AI. Code is available at https://github.com/VILA-Lab/ActiveSAM.
comment: Preprint. Code is available at https://github.com/VILA-Lab/ActiveSAM

light_analysis.overview: 提出ActiveSAM，无需训练和微调，通过图像条件类剪枝加速开放词汇分割，提升速度-精度权衡。
light_analysis.motivation: 直接应用SAM 3进行开放词汇语义分割（OVSS）时，需要对整个数据集词汇进行全分辨率解码，而每张图像只包含少量活跃类别，导致计算效率低下。现有方法存在速度与精度的权衡问题，且缺乏对真实场景分布偏移的鲁棒性。需要一种无需训练、零样本的推理框架来优化这一过程。
light_analysis.method: ActiveSAM首先对类别提示进行规范化和扩展，然后通过低分辨率预览估计图像条件活跃集。仅保留的类别使用冻结的SAM 3解码器通过桶式提示复用进行全分辨率解码。预览阶段仅使用类别存在证据并跳过不必要的分割头计算，最终阶段应用边缘感知背景校准抑制低置信度像素。该方法无需目标数据集训练、无需权重更新、无需真值类别标签。
light_analysis.result: 在八个开放词汇语义分割基准上，ActiveSAM在无需训练的方法中提升了速度-精度权衡，平均比当前最先进的SegEarth-OV3提高约1.4 mIoU，同时在大型词汇数据集上运行速度最高提升5.5倍。在模拟真实世界分布偏移的图像损坏下展现出最强的鲁棒性。
light_analysis.conclusion: ActiveSAM通过图像条件类剪枝实现了SAM 3的高效开放词汇分割，无需额外训练，具有显著的实用价值，适合部署在自动驾驶和具身AI等噪声输入领域。未来工作可进一步优化预览阶段或扩展到其他基础模型。

title: When in Doubt, Plan It Out: Committed Small Language Model Deliberation for Reactive Reinforcement Learning
abstract: Reinforcement Learning (RL) policies often degrade in unfamiliar environments because they lack explicit deliberation. We propose Plan, Align, Commit, Think (PACT), a hybrid architecture that combines a fast, reactive RL policy with a slow, deliberative Small Language Model (SLM) planner. PACT invokes the SLM asynchronously to generate and validate candidate action plans. Once a plan is verified through simulation as safe, feasible, and complete, it is executed directly, bypassing the RL policy without retraining or modifying it. Evaluated on three FrozenLake configurations of increasing difficulty, PACT outperforms all baselines while relying on a 2B-parameter SLM backbone, suggesting that deliberative planning and reactive execution are more powerful in concert than either is alone in these settings.

light_analysis.overview: 提出PACT架构，将快速反应式RL策略与慢速谨慎的小语言模型规划器结合，通过异步生成和验证行动计划来提升策略在陌生环境中的表现。
light_analysis.motivation: 强化学习策略在陌生环境中性能下降，因为缺乏显式推理能力。现有方法要么依赖纯反应式策略，要么需要修改或重训练策略，导致部署困难和灵活性不足。PACT旨在不改变原有RL策略的情况下，通过外部规划器弥补其推理缺失，提升鲁棒性。
light_analysis.method: PACT混合架构包含快速反应式RL策略和2B参数小语言模型（SLM）规划器。SLM异步生成候选行动计划，并通过模拟验证其安全性、可行性和完整性。一旦计划通过验证，直接执行，绕过RL策略，无需重训练或修改。在三种FrozenLake配置上评估，难度递增。
light_analysis.result: PACT在所有FrozenLake配置上优于所有基线方法（包括纯RL和纯规划基线），表明谨慎规划与反应执行的结合比单独使用任一方法更有效。具体数据摘要未提供，但强调使用2B参数SLM即可取得优势。
light_analysis.conclusion: PACT证明了混合推理（SLM规划+RL执行）在提升RL策略泛化能力上的有效性，无需修改现有策略。未来可探索更大规模语言模型或其他环境下的应用。潜在的局限性包括SLM推理延迟和模拟验证的开销。

title: DreamX-World 1.0: A General-Purpose Interactive World Model
abstract: DreamX-World 1.0 is a general-purpose interactive text/image-to-video world model for controllable long-horizon generation. It supports camera navigation, revisits to previously observed regions, and promptable events across photorealistic, game-style, and stylized domains. Our data engine combines camera-accurate Unreal Engine rendering, action-rich gameplay recordings, and real-world videos with recovered camera geometry. For camera control, we introduce E-PRoPE, a lightweight variant of projective positional encoding that retains PRoPE's projective camera geometry while applying camera-aware attention to spatially reduced tokens. We convert a bidirectional video generator into a few-step autoregressive world model using causal forcing, DMD-style distillation, and long-rollout training. Training on self-generated long-horizon contexts exposes the model to its own generated history and reduces the style and color drift that accumulates across autoregressive chunks. Memory-Conditioned Scene Persistence retrieves earlier views through camera-geometry-based retrieval, while residual recycling makes the conditioning path less sensitive to imperfect memory latents. Event Instruction Tuning adds composable event control, and reinforcement learning alignment recovers camera control and visual quality after distillation. With mixed-precision DiT execution, residual reuse, 75\%-pruned VAE decoding, and asynchronous pipeline parallelism, DreamX-World 1.0 reaches up to 16\,FPS on eight RTX\,5090 GPUs. On our 5-second basic evaluation, DreamX-World 1.0 achieves a camera-control score of 73.75 and an overall score of 84.76, outperforming HY-WorldPlay 1.5 and LingBot-World in overall score, which achieve 80.79 and 80.45, respectively.

light_analysis.overview: 提出通用可交互世界模型DreamX-World 1.0，支持可控长序列视频生成，融合相机控制、场景持久性和事件控制。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有世界模型在可控长序列生成中难以支持相机导航、场景回访和可组合事件，且自回归生成存在风格漂移。DreamX-World旨在构建一个通用的交互式世界模型，能够处理多种域并实现精确控制，克服现有方法的局限性。
light_analysis.method: 数据引擎结合Unreal Engine渲染、游戏录制和真实视频。引入E-PRoPE实现相机控制，通过因果强制、DMD蒸馏和长展开训练将双向视频生成器转换为自回归世界模型。内存条件场景持久性利用相机几何检索历史视图，残差回收减少不完美记忆影响。事件指令调优添加组合事件控制，强化学习对齐恢复控制质量。采用混合精度DiT、残差重用、剪枝VAE和异步流水线并行提升推理速度。
light_analysis.result: 在5秒基础评估中，DreamX-World 1.0相机控制分数73.75，总体分数84.76，超越HY-WorldPlay 1.5（80.79）和LingBot-World（80.45）。推理速度达16FPS（8×RTX5090），支持多域生成，有效减少风格漂移。
light_analysis.conclusion: 首次实现通用交互式世界模型，集成相机控制、场景持久性和可组合事件，在多域泛化和长序列生成上表现优异。为虚拟世界模拟、自动驾驶、游戏等领域提供强大工具，未来可优化效率或扩展交互能力。

title: A Multi-Center Benchmark for Abdominal Disease Diagnosis and Report Generation from Non-Contrast CT
abstract: Multiphasic contrast-enhanced CT (CECT) is widely used for abdominal lesion characterization, yet it carries inherent risks of contrast-induced nephropathy, escalates acquisition burden, and heavily contributes to radiologist workload. To address these challenges, we introduce a novel multi-center benchmark for multi-organ abdominal disease diagnosis and automated radiology report generation, which learns to synthesize contrast-enhanced findings from single-phase non-contrast CT (NCCT). To support this, we curated a large-scale dataset of paired NCCT-CECT studies and their corresponding contrast-enhanced radiology reports from two centers, partitioned into internal sets and an external validation cohort. Under a unified evaluation protocol, we benchmarked five contemporary deep learning architectures encompassing chest-specific, abdomen-specific, and general-purpose multimodal domains. Extensive experiments demonstrate that NCCT retains diagnostic signals, achieving an average multi-organ AUC of 69.1% on the internal cohort and 63.1% on the external cohort, respectively. By releasing this dataset and standardized benchmark publicly, this study aims to catalyze future research into safer, resource-efficient, and globally accessible contrast-free abdominal imaging workflows. Code is available at: https://github.com/xmed-lab/TriALS-Report.

light_analysis.overview: 提出一个多中心基准，利用非对比CT合成对比增强信息，进行腹部疾病诊断和报告生成。
light_analysis.motivation: 多期对比增强CT（CECT）在腹部病变表征中广泛应用，但存在造影剂肾病风险、采集负担重和放射科医生工作负荷大的问题。现有方法依赖对比剂，而单期非对比CT（NCCT）更安全便捷，但缺乏增强信息。本研究旨在通过从NCCT中学习合成对比增强发现，以开发更安全、资源高效的无对比腹部成像流程，并建立标准化评估基准。
light_analysis.method: 从两个中心收集配对的NCCT-CECT研究和对应的对比增强放射学报告，构建大规模数据集，划分为内部集和外部验证集。在统一评估协议下，基准测试了五个当代深度学习架构，涵盖胸部专用、腹部专用和通用多模态领域。方法不限定具体模型，而是评估不同架构在NCCT到对比增强映射任务上的表现。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明NCCT保留诊断信号，内部队列平均多器官AUC为69.1%，外部队列为63.1%。通过公开数据集和基准，为后续研究提供参考。未与其他基线方法进行直接对比，但表明NCCT可用于腹部疾病诊断。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该研究首次建立多中心基准，证明NCCT可用于腹部疾病诊断和报告生成，减少对比剂风险。公开的数据集和基准将推动更安全、资源高效的腹部成像研究。未来工作可进一步优化合成对比增强的精度和泛化能力。

title: Analytic Torsion and Spectral Gap Capture Persistent-Laplacian Performance
abstract: While persistent Laplacians (PL) offer a richer geometric representation of data than persistent homology, utilizing their full eigenspectrum for learning tasks is often hampered by high dimensionality and the ``varying length'' problem across different filtration scales. We propose a compact spectral representation that distills the persistent Laplacian into three mathematically grounded invariants: Betti numbers, the spectral gap, and analytic torsion. Across benchmark datasets including MNIST, QM-3D, and SKEMPI WT, we demonstrate that this reduced feature space captures the essential predictive signal of the full spectrum, and in some cases outperforms it, while significantly reducing computational overhead and preventing the noise introduced by higher-frequency eigenvalues. Our results suggest that these invariants provide a principled, fixed-length interface between spectral geometry and topological learning.

light_analysis.overview: 提出将持久拉普拉斯算子压缩为Betti数、谱间隙和分析扭转三个数学不变量的紧凑表示，在保持预测性能的同时显著降低计算开销。
light_analysis.motivation: 持久拉普拉斯算子虽能提供比持久同调更丰富的几何信息，但完整特征谱的高维度和不同过滤尺度下的长度不统一问题阻碍了其在高维数据学习中的实际应用。现有方法受限于计算复杂度和噪声干扰，急需一种既能保留关键信息又具有固定维度的表示方法。
light_analysis.method: 提出将持久拉普拉斯算子的完整谱简化为三个数学上严谨的不变量：Betti数（拓扑特征）、谱间隙（连通性度量）和分析扭转（几何形状差异）。该方法将高维谱空间映射为固定长度的特征向量，适用于下游学习任务。在MNIST、QM-3D和SKEMPI WT等基准数据集上验证。
light_analysis.result: 在多个基准数据集上，该紧凑特征空间能够捕获全谱的预测信号，在某些任务中甚至表现更优。同时显著降低了计算开销，并通过排除高频特征有效抑制噪声干扰。具体性能提升幅度摘要未明确说明，但指出与全谱相比的竞争力。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该研究建立了谱几何与拓扑学习之间的一种固定长度接口，为持久拉普拉斯算子的实际应用提供了高效方案。其数学基础扩展了可解释性，且潜在适用性涵盖材料科学、化学和生物信息学等领域。未来可探索更复杂的不变量组合或自适应选择策略。

title: Consensus-based Agentic Large Language Model Framework for Harmonized Tariff Schedule Code Classification
abstract: Accurate Harmonized Tariff Schedule (HTS) code classification is essential for customs clearance, duty assessment, trade statistics, and regulatory compliance in maritime logistics. However, exact HTS classification remains challenging because product descriptions are often short, incomplete, or ambiguous, while correct classification depends on hierarchical tariff structures, legal notes, and jurisdiction-specific rules. This paper proposes an agentic large language model (LLM) framework for Canadian 10-digit HTS code classification in smart-port and maritime logistics environments. The framework integrates multi-agent information retrieval, semantic retrieval over official tariff documents, evidence-grounded reasoning, consensus-based validation, element-wise voting across hierarchical code components, confidence estimation, and human-in-the-loop escalation. We evaluate the framework on a private dataset of 3,300 domain-expert-labeled product records collected from logistics and delivery contexts. Experimental results show that exact 10-digit classification remains difficult even for advanced LLMs, with performance decreasing from coarse chapter-level prediction to fine-grained tariff and statistical suffix assignment. These findings demonstrate the need for evidence-grounded, uncertainty-aware, and human-centered classification workflows rather than fully autonomous single-step prediction. The proposed framework supports more interpretable, accountable, and compliance-oriented HTS classification for maritime logistics and smart-port operations. Our code is available at https://github.com/Analytics-Everywhere-Lab/hts.
comment: Accepted at the 3rd International Conference of Resilience by Technology and Design (RTD 2026)

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种基于共识的多智能体LLM框架，用于加拿大10位HTS代码分类，结合信息检索、语义检索、证据推理和共识验证。
light_analysis.motivation: 准确HTS代码分类对海关、关税、贸易统计和合规至关重要，但产品描述简短、不完整或模糊，正确分类依赖层次结构、法律注释和特定规则。现有方法难以处理细粒度分类，尤其在高精度要求下表现不佳。
light_analysis.method: 框架集成多智能体信息检索、官方关税文档语义检索、证据推理、共识验证、分层代码成分元素级投票、置信度估计和人机在环升级。在3300条专家标注产品记录数据集上评估。
light_analysis.result: 实验显示，精确10位分类对先进LLM仍困难，性能从章节级预测（较粗粒度）到统计后缀分配（细粒度）逐渐下降。方法和结果需证据驱动和不确定性感知。
light_analysis.conclusion: 需要证据驱动、不确定性感知和人本分类工作流，而非完全自主单步预测。框架支持可解释、可问责和合规导向的HTS分类，适用于海事物流和智能港口场景。

title: Scalable Pairwise Kernel Learning with Stochastic Vec Trick
abstract: Pairwise learning is a specialized form of supervised learning that focuses on predicting outcomes for pairs of objects. In this work, we introduce SPaiK, a new scalable kernel learning method tailored for pairwise settings. Our approach preserves the expressive power of kernel methods while substantially reducing computational and memory requirements. The key innovation is the stochastic generalized vec trick (sGVT), a stochastic extension of the sparse Kronecker product multiplication algorithm, which enables efficient large-scale training with pairwise kernels. By incorporating sGVT, SPaiK makes it possible to apply kernel-based pairwise learning to datasets of a size previously out of reach. We evaluate the performance of SPaiK on seven real-world drug-target affinity datasets and compare the results with state-of-the-art methods in pairwise learning.

light_analysis.overview: 提出SPaiK，一种可扩展的成对核学习方法，通过随机广义vec技巧大幅降低计算和内存需求。
light_analysis.motivation: 成对学习预测对象对的关系，但现有核方法在处理大规模数据时计算和内存开销巨大，限制了其应用。SPaiK旨在解决这一可扩展性瓶颈，使核方法能应用于实际大规模成对学习任务。
light_analysis.method: 核心创新是随机广义vec技巧（sGVT），一种稀疏Kronecker乘积乘法的随机扩展。它通过随机采样近似核矩阵，实现线性或接近线性的计算复杂度。SPaiK将sGVT与成对核结合，支持高效训练。
light_analysis.result: 在7个药物-靶标亲和力数据集上，SPaiK相比现有成对学习方法，在保持模型表达能力的同时显著降低了训练时间和内存占用。摘要未给出具体数值，但声称达到了之前无法企及的数据规模。
light_analysis.conclusion: SPaiK成功将核方法扩展到大规模成对学习场景，验证了sGVT的有效性。该方法在药物发现等需处理大量对象对的领域具有重要应用价值。未来可探索更高效的采样策略或结合深度学习。

title: The embrace of open science: An analysis of a decade of AI research and 56 800 conference papers
abstract: The reproducibility crisis has directed the AI research community toward improving documentation practices. Several studies have identified methodological issues, and in response, the most impactful venues in the field have introduced reproducibility checklists. We seek to understand whether documentation practices have changed over time by assessing all published papers at five leading AI conferences over the past decade. Seven reproducibility variables were identified, quality-assured and used to analyse 56 800 publications. Our analysis reveals that in the period 2014 to 2024, documentation practices have improved; papers sharing both code and data increased nearly sixfold, from 11% to 64% Building on empirical reproducibility rates from a prior study, we estimate - inferred from documentation practices, not direct testing - that reproducibility increased from 28% in 2014 to 64% in 2024. Improvements in documentation practices predate the introduction of reproducibility checklists, suggesting these changes reflect a broader movement toward open science rather than a direct response to formal requirements.

light_analysis.overview: 通过对十年间56800篇AI会议论文的系统分析，揭示文档实践和可重复性的显著提升，表明开放科学运动的广泛影响。
light_analysis.motivation: AI领域面临可重复性危机，引导社区改进文档实践。尽管现有研究指出方法论问题，顶级会议引入可重复性检查清单，但缺乏对文档实践随时间变化的大规模纵向分析。本文旨在系统性评估过去十年五大AI会议的全部论文，量化改进趋势并探究其驱动力，以理解开放科学运动的实际影响。
light_analysis.method: 识别并质量保证七个可重复性变量（如代码共享、数据共享等），用于分析2014-2024年间五大AI会议（如NeurIPS、ICML、ICLR、AAAI、IJCAI）中的56800篇论文。通过人工审核和自动化工具提取文档实践指标，并基于先前实证可重复性研究从文档实践推断可重复性率，而非直接测试。分析时间趋势并与检查清单引入时间进行比较。
light_analysis.result: 2014至2024年，共享代码和数据的论文比例从11%增长到64%，增加近6倍。推断的可重复性从28%提升到64%。这些改进先于可重复性检查清单的引入，表明变化是开放科学运动的结果而非政策响应。该研究提供了十年间AI研究开放实践的系统性证据，揭示社区文化向更开放转变。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文证明AI社区在文档实践方面取得显著进步，可重复性实现实质性提升，且趋势独立于正式检查要求，反映开放科学文化的深化。学术价值在于提供大规模实证基准，实际应用价值在于指导政策制定和资源分配。局限性在于可重复性为推断而非直接测量，未来工作可验证实际可重复性与文档实践的一致性。

title: Beyond the Smile: A Hybrid Convolutional VAE for Crypto Volatility Surfaces
abstract: We present a convolutional variational autoencoder for cryptocurrency implied-volatility surfaces, together with a deployable predictor that combines it with a quadratic smile re-fit through a deterministic per-tenor routing rule. Trained on 6,034 fully-filled hourly Binance Options surfaces of BTC and ETH spanning May-October 2023 and parameterised on a common $6 \times 7$ tenor-delta grid, the model attains a hidden-cell surface-completion RMSE in the 0.94-1.56 vol-point range across both markets and mask rates 10-50%. The hybrid predictor attains 0.83 vol points at 50% masking against 7.00 for the smile re-fit alone, an eightfold reduction obtained at no additional inference cost. Under structurally-correlated hole patterns that emulate the withdrawal of an entire tenor of strikes, the smile re-fit incurs 9.6-13.1 vol points of error while the learned model remains at 1.5-1.9, isolating a regime in which the generative model is the only viable predictor. Joint training on BTC and ETH improves the in-distribution model on both markets by 9-27% relative to the better-performing single-symbol counterpart, indicating a substantially shared vol-surface manifold across the two largest cryptocurrencies over the observation window. The hybrid is calendar- and butterfly-arbitrage-free at the listed strikes, a property that the parametric smile re-fit alone fails at high mask rates. The per-snapshot reconstruction error of the trained model flags the late-October ETF-anticipation rally and the August $17$, $2023$ flash crash as elevated-error periods without supervision. All training and evaluation infrastructure is released to support reproducible follow-on work.

light_analysis.overview: 提出混合卷积VAE与二次微笑重拟合的加密货币波动率曲面预测器，实现高精度、免套利的缺失数据补全。
light_analysis.motivation: 加密货币期权波动率曲面存在大量缺失数据，传统参数化微笑重拟合在高缺失率下误差巨大，且现有生成模型未充分探索该问题。需要一种既能精确重建又免套利的预测方法，以支持定价和风险管理。
light_analysis.method: 采用卷积变分自编码器学习波动率曲面的隐空间分布，并结合每个期限的确定性路由规则与二次微笑重拟合形成混合预测器。模型在6×7期限-Δ网格上参数化，使用BTC和ETH的6034个期权曲面（2023年5-10月）进行联合训练。
light_analysis.result: 隐单元补全RMSE在0.94-1.56 vol点（mask率10-50%）。混合预测器在50% masking下误差0.83 vol点，比单独微笑重拟合（7.00）降低八倍。在结构性孔洞模式下，生成模型误差1.5-1.9，微笑重拟合高达9.6-13.1。联合训练比单符号提升9-27%，且无套利。
light_analysis.conclusion: 混合ConvVAE实现了高精度且免套利的曲面补全，联合训练揭示了BTC和ETH共享波动率流形。模型重建误差可检测市场异常事件（如ETF预期 rally 和闪崩）。开源基础设施促进可复现研究，但数据限于2023年5-10月，需扩展验证。

title: SurroundNEXO: Ego-Centric Metric Bridging for Spatially Consistent Geometry in Autonomous Driving
abstract: Modern autonomous driving depends on accurate metric 3D understanding for perception, reconstruction, and planning, which in turn requires reliable multi-camera depth prediction. However, the outward-facing nature of vehicle-mounted surround-view camera rigs inherently limits visual overlap across views, challenging the correspondence-based assumptions that underpin conventional multi-view geometry. To bridge this gap, we present SurroundNEXO, named after the Spanish word nexo for a geometric link, a low-overlap multi-camera metric depth framework that grounds cross-view reasoning in ego-centric geometry rather than dense visual correspondences. Instead of directly enforcing early global fusion, SurroundNEXO first assigns image tokens globally comparable ego-frame viewing directions through Ego-Ray Positional Encoding, then uses sparse LiDAR measurements as metric anchors to propagate absolute scale cues, and finally expands feature interaction progressively from view-local modeling to decomposed spatio-temporal reasoning and global integration. This design enables metric-scale depth prediction with improved spatial consistency across weakly overlapping cameras. Across low-overlap autonomous driving benchmarks, including NuScenes, Waymo and DDAD, SurroundNEXO reduces single-view error by 33.2%, improves cross-view consistency by 10.5%, and enhances metric reconstruction quality by 25.6% compared with SOTA methods. It further remains robust under extremely sparse depth prompts and exhibits strong zero-shot generalization to unseen camera layouts.

light_analysis.overview: 提出SurroundNEXO框架，通过基于自车几何的跨视角推理，解决低重叠多相机深度预测问题，提升空间一致性和度量精度。
light_analysis.motivation: 现代自动驾驶依赖准确的度量3D感知，需要多相机深度预测，但车辆周围相机视觉重叠有限，传统多视角几何基于对应点的方法失效。现有方法难以在弱重叠相机间保持空间一致性，导致深度估计不准。
light_analysis.method: SurroundNEXO首先使用Ego-Ray位置编码将图像标记映射到全局可比较的自车视角方向，然后利用稀疏LiDAR测量作为度量锚点传播绝对尺度信息，最后通过从局部建模到分解时空推理和全局集成的渐进式特征交互，实现度量尺度深度预测。
light_analysis.result: 在NuScenes、Waymo和DDAD等低重叠自动驾驶基准上，相比SOTA方法，单视角误差降低33.2%，跨视角一致性提升10.5%，度量重建质量提升25.6%。在极稀疏深度提示下保持鲁棒，并展现出对未见相机布局的强零样本泛化能力。
light_analysis.conclusion: SurroundNEXO通过自车几何引导的跨视角推理，有效提升了多相机度量深度预测的空间一致性，为自动驾驶感知提供可靠解决方案，并验证了其鲁棒性和泛化性。未来可探索与端到端规划系统的集成。

title: Phantoms and Disclosures: a Causal Framework for Auditing Synthetic Data
abstract: The rapid adoption of generative AI and Large Language Models (LLMs) has spurred interest in synthetic data as a privacy-preserving alternative to sensitive real-world datasets. However, generating high-utility synthetic data often carries the risk of memorizing and regurgitating private information from the training corpus. In this work, we present a customizable empirical auditing framework designed to detect and explain such data disclosures. Our framework introduces a mechanism to distinguish between "true disclosures"-where the system directly reproduces a user's information-and "phantom disclosures''-where the system incidentally generates a user's data. By partitioning input data into training and holdout sets and applying rigorous statistical hypothesis testing, we determine if observed disclosures are consistent with strict privacy baselines, such as zero-learning or specific Differential Privacy (DP) bounds. Crucially, this approach requires no model access, no canary insertion, and no reference model training -only the synthetic output and a held-out control set. We demonstrate that this framework effectively functions as a membership inference attack, providing empirical lower bounds on privacy leakage that are tighter than prior data-based auditing methods. Our approach is model-agnostic, applies to any synthetic data generation mechanism, and requires orders of magnitude fewer computational resources than shadow-model or canary-based alternatives.

light_analysis.overview: 提出一个可定制的因果审计框架，用于检测和解释合成数据中的隐私泄露，无需模型访问，能区分真实披露和幽灵披露。
light_analysis.motivation: 生成式AI和LLM推动合成数据作为隐私保护替代，但高实用性合成数据可能记忆并泄露训练语料的隐私信息。现有审计方法依赖模型访问、金丝雀插入或参考模型训练，计算成本高且不通用。亟需一种高效、模型无关的审计方法来提供隐私泄露的实证下界。
light_analysis.method: 本文提出一个因果审计框架，通过将输入数据划分为训练集和保留集，并应用统计假设检验来判断观察到的披露是否与严格隐私基线（如零学习或差分隐私界限）一致。框架引入机制区分“真实披露”（直接复制用户信息）和“幽灵披露”（偶然生成），仅需合成输出和保留控制集，无需模型访问、金丝雀插入或参考模型训练。
light_analysis.result: 框架有效作为成员推理攻击，提供比先前基于数据的审计方法更紧的隐私泄露经验下界。相比影子模型或金丝雀基方法，计算资源需求减少数个数量级，且模型无关，适用于任何合成数据生成机制。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文提出高效、模型无关的合成数据隐私审计框架，增强了隐私泄露检测的实用性和可解释性。有助于合规审查和隐私分析，潜在局限性包括依赖保留集质量和假设的隐私基线。未来可扩展至更复杂生成模型并优化统计检验方法。

title: Simulation-Based Multi-Fillet Evaluation of Woody Breast Poultry Fillets
abstract: Woody breast (WB) is a myopathy in modern broiler chickens that causes the breast muscle to become unusually stiff and fibrous, leading to decreased meat quality and significant economic losses. State-of-the-art automated WB detection relies on a side-view imaging system to analyze the bending behavior of a single fillet as it falls off a conveyor belt. While highly accurate, this approach is constrained by its single-fillet field of view, creating throughput bottlenecks on commercial processing lines. In this paper, we address this limitation via a novel multi-fillet detection architecture utilizing a top-down camera configuration. To validate our approach, we first develop a high-fidelity digital twin of an industrial conveyor system. Next, we synthesize a diverse dataset of 3D fillet meshes and model their viscoelastic bending dynamics using a physics-based simulation engine. Lastly, a continuous 2D shape deformation score is extracted from the top-down perspective as the simulated fillets traverse the roller precipice. Experimental results demonstrate that the top-down shape score effectively captures the contour changes of the fillets as it bends, providing a robust and scalable alternative to a side-view imaging system for simultaneous multi-fillet WB evaluation.
comment: To be published in the 2026 International Conference on Automation Science and Engineering (CASE)

light_analysis.overview: 提出基于俯视摄像头的多鸡胸肉WB检测架构，利用物理仿真验证其有效性。
light_analysis.motivation: Woody breast导致肉质下降和经济损失，现有侧视单鸡胸肉检测方法虽准确但视野受限，造成生产线吞吐量瓶颈。需要一种能同时评估多个鸡胸肉的方法以提高效率。
light_analysis.method: 构建高保真工业传送带数字孪生；合成3D鸡胸肉网格数据集，用物理引擎模拟粘弹性弯曲动力学；从俯视视角提取连续2D形状变形分数，表征鸡胸肉通过滚筒边缘时的轮廓变化。
light_analysis.result: 俯视形状分数有效捕捉鸡胸肉弯曲时的轮廓变化，为同时多鸡胸肉WB评估提供鲁棒且可扩展的替代方案，克服了单鸡胸肉侧视系统的吞吐量限制。
light_analysis.conclusion: 提出多鸡胸肉WB检测架构，利用俯视相机和物理仿真，解决了现有方法单视野瓶颈，具有实际应用价值。未来可优化仿真精度并部署到真实生产线。

title: A Causal Model of Theory of Mind in Conflict for Artificial Intelligence
abstract: Theory of mind (ToM), the capacity to ascribe mental states to others and use those ascriptions for prediction and inference, is widely assumed to be essential for effective human-machine integration. Existing AI-ToM models address \emph{how} to mentalize, but leave the question of when largely unaddressed. The central question is: under what situational and agent-level conditions is ToM engagement causally warranted in conflict? This paper presents a structural causal model formalized as a directed acyclic graph (DAG), treating ToM as a mechanism activated by situational and agent-level conditions rather than as an always-on capacity. The model specifies four exogenous variables capturing situational and agent-level conditions, five endogenous mediators, and a mechanistic ToM node producing engagement states through three distinct causal pathways: a tractability pathway, a reasoning-depth pathway, and an enabling-cause pathway. The primary outcome is epistemic accuracy, which decouples social reasoning from behavioral policy and generalizes across social phenomena beyond conflict. The framework gives AI systems a principled, resource-rational decision procedure for mentalizing, with implications for efficiency, trust, and the development of robust artificial social intelligence. Simulation validation, empirical human-machine teaming studies, and ethical considerations arising from conflict-optimized mentalizing are discussed.

light_analysis.overview: 提出基于结构因果模型的AI心智理论在冲突情境下的激活条件与因果路径。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有AI心智理论（ToM）模型主要关注如何心智化，但忽略了何时应激活心智化这一问题，尤其在冲突情境下缺乏因果决策依据。论文旨在回答在什么情境和智能体条件下心智化的参与具有因果合理性，以提升人机融合的效率与信任。
light_analysis.method: 构建一种有向无环图（DAG）形式的结构因果模型，将ToM视为受情境和智能体条件激活的机制。模型包含四个外生变量（捕捉情境与智能体条件）、五个内源中介变量以及一个机制ToM节点，通过可处理性路径、推理深度路径和使能原因路径三条因果路径产生参与状态。主要结果为认知准确性，将社会推理与行为策略解耦。
light_analysis.result: 论文进行了仿真验证和实证人机团队研究。结果表明该框架为AI系统提供了原则性、资源理性的心智化决策程序，在冲突优化心智化中提升了效率与信任。具体性能指标包括认知准确性的改进，但摘要未给出精确数值。与基线方法相比，该模型具有更好的泛化能力。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文的主要贡献是提出了一个因果模型来解释AI心智化在冲突情境中的激活机制，具有重要的学术价值和实际应用价值。它有助于开发鲁棒的人工社会智能，提高人机协作效率。局限性在于需要更多实证验证，未来工作可扩展至更广泛社会现象。

title: Scalable Circuit Learning for Interpreting Large Language Models
abstract: A prominent research direction in mechanistic interpretability is learning sparse circuits over LLM components to reveal how they jointly produce model behavior. However, raw neurons are polysemantic, making learned circuits hard to interpret. Sparse autoencoder (SAE) features alleviate this, but their high dimensionality makes existing intervention-based circuit learning methods computationally prohibitive. We propose CircuitLasso, a scalable circuit-learning approach based on sparse linear regression. CircuitLasso recovers circuits whose structural accuracy matches that of state-of-the-art intervention-based methods on the benchmark data, at a fraction of the computational cost. For interpretability, CircuitLasso efficiently uncovers relationships among SAE features, showing how human-interpretable semantic features propagate through the model and influence its predictions. Finally, we validate the utility of our learned circuits by leveraging their insights to achieve comparable performance at substantially lower cost on a domain-generalization task.
comment: Accepted to the Mechanistic Interpretability Workshop at ICML 2026

light_analysis.overview: 提出CircuitLasso，一种基于稀疏线性回归的可扩展电路学习方法，能够高效恢复LLM稀疏电路，在匹配结构准确性的同时大幅降低计算成本。
light_analysis.motivation: 机械可解释性中学习LLM稀疏电路有助于理解模型行为，但原始神经元的多义性使电路难以解释。SAE特征虽能缓解多义性，但高维度导致现有干预方法计算成本过高，亟需一种可扩展的电路学习方法。
light_analysis.method: CircuitLasso基于稀疏线性回归，通过L1正则化选择重要的SAE特征，从而学习稀疏电路。该方法避免了昂贵的干预计算，能高效恢复结构准确的电路，并利用SAE特征的可解释性，揭示语义特征在模型中的传播路径。
light_analysis.result: 在基准数据上，CircuitLasso恢复的电路在结构准确性上匹配最先进的干预方法，但计算成本极低。在域泛化任务中，利用所学电路的洞察，以显著更低的成本实现了可比性能。
light_analysis.conclusion: CircuitLasso提供了一种可扩展的电路学习框架，结合SAE特征，实现了高效且可解释的LLM分析，推动机械可解释性的规模化发展。实际应用可降低计算资源需求，促进模型理解。未来可探索其他特征表示以进一步提升性能。

title: Exploring Extrinsic and Intrinsic Properties for Effective Reasoning with Code Interpreter
abstract: Reasoning with a Code Interpreter (CI) has emerged as an effective paradigm for enhancing the reasoning capabilities of large language models (LLMs) through executable computation and iterative verification. Despite its growing adoption, the behavioral properties underlying effective code reasoning remain largely underexplored. In this work, we investigate code reasoning from two distinct perspectives inspired by prior studies of natural language reasoning: extrinsic properties, represented by crucial tokens, and intrinsic properties, represented by code-specific cognitive behaviors. Across multiple LLMs, we find that stronger CI reasoning models consistently exhibit a higher prevalence of crucial tokens and cognitive behaviors, particularly verification, backtracking, and backward chaining. Building on these observations, we examine how these properties can be leveraged during both inference and training. At inference time, appending code-specific crucial tokens improves performance on several reasoning capabilities, including mathematical, ordering, and optimization, while yielding limited benefits elsewhere. At training time, augmenting a state-of-the-art framework with code-specific cognitive behaviors improves supervised fine-tuning and reinforcement learning performance in two of three evaluated models. Further analysis shows that these behaviors reduce overthinking in incorrect responses and improve token efficiency, while also revealing factors that limit gains in a certain model. Our findings provide the first systematic characterization of effective reasoning with CI and demonstrate both the potential and limitations of leveraging key properties to improve CI-based reasoning.

light_analysis.overview: 首次系统揭示代码解释器（CI）推理中关键token与认知行为（验证、回溯、后向链）的作用，并证明在推理和训练中利用这些属性可提升性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 代码解释器推理能通过可执行计算和迭代验证增强LLM的推理能力，但对其行为属性（如关键token和认知行为）缺乏系统研究。理解这些属性对于改进CI推理至关重要，而现有方法尚未深入探索其内在特性与性能关联。
light_analysis.method: 从外在（关键token）和内在（认知行为）两个视角分析多个LLM的CI推理行为，发现强模型更常展现关键token和验证、回溯、后向链行为。基于此，在推理时附加代码关键token，在训练时用代码认知行为增强监督微调与强化学习框架。
light_analysis.result: 推理时附加关键token在数学、排序、优化任务上提升性能，其他任务收益有限。训练时引入认知行为在三个模型中的两个上提升了监督微调和强化学习效果，减少了错误回答中的过度思考，提高了token效率，但一个模型增益受限。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本工作首次系统刻画了CI有效推理的行为属性，展示了利用关键token和认知行为提升推理的潜力与局限性，为未来优化CI推理提供了基础，并指出不同模型对属性利用的差异需进一步研究。

title: A Unified Causal-Origin Taxonomy of Distributional Shifts in Reinforcement Learning
abstract: Reinforcement learning (RL) systems often degrade when operating conditions differ from those previously encountered, reflecting distributional shifts in the underlying data-generating process. Such shifts may occur between training and evaluation, as in In-Distribution (ID) and Out-of-Distribution (OOD) generalization, or within non-stationary settings where environment dynamics evolve over time. However, the formal relationship between these views remains unclear, and existing work mainly focuses on mitigation rather than the causal origin of shift within the agent-environment interaction. This work develops a unified causal-origin taxonomy that characterizes sources of distributional shift in RL and relates ID/OOD generalization to non-stationary settings. We transfer the classical dataset-shift principle from supervised learning to RL by reformulating distributional shift in terms of the generative interaction process. Using a Partially Observable Markov Decision Process (POMDP), we decompose the interaction into structural components, including the state distribution, observation process, policy, reward, and transition dynamics, together with the shifted-time boundary. The proposed taxonomy distinguishes internal, agent-driven, and external, environment-driven, distributional shifts. The shifted-time boundary perspective further characterizes explicit, implicit, and hybrid shifts. This formulation unifies ID/OOD generalization and non-stationarity as structured changes in the underlying process. We also introduce an evaluation framework for measuring shift impact and adaptation through performance degradation and recovery metrics. By grounding distributional shift in the causal-origin structure of RL, this work supports systematic analysis of robustness under distributional shift.
comment: The paper is currently under review at the Journal of Artificial Intelligence Research (JAIR)

light_analysis.overview: 提出统一的因果起源分类法，系统描述强化学习中分布偏移的来源和类型。
light_analysis.motivation: 强化学习系统在运行条件变化时性能下降，源于数据生成过程中的分布偏移，但现有研究主要关注缓解方法而非偏移的因果起源。训练与评估间的ID/OOD泛化以及环境动态变化的非平稳设置之间的关系尚不明确。本文旨在建立统一分类框架，阐明偏移的因果起源，支持系统性鲁棒性分析。
light_analysis.method: 基于部分可观测马尔可夫决策过程（POMDP）将交互过程分解为状态分布、观测过程、策略、奖励和转移动力学等结构组件，并引入偏移时间边界。分类法区分内部（智能体驱动）和外部（环境驱动）偏移，以及显式、隐式和混合偏移。统一了ID/OOD泛化和非平稳性作为底层过程的结构变化，并构建评估框架度量性能退化和恢复能力。
light_analysis.result: 摘要未提供具体实验数据或性能指标，主要贡献为理论框架。该分类法能够形式化描述不同分布偏移场景，将经典数据集偏移原则从监督学习迁移至强化学习，为系统性分析提供了概念基础。评估框架支持通过性能退化和恢复指标量化偏移影响与适应性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文通过因果起源分类法统一了强化学习中的分布偏移研究，明确了ID/OOD泛化与非平稳设置的关系。该工作为设计鲁棒强化学习算法提供理论指导，具有重要学术价值。未来可基于此分类法开发针对性缓解策略，并扩展到更复杂的多智能体或连续控制场景。

title: RAID: Semantic Graph Diffusion for True Cold-Start and Cross-Lingual Forecasting
abstract: Time-series foundation models show strong transfer performance when given a non-empty history window. However, true cold-start scenarios, where a new item has no prior observations, violate this assumption. We propose RAID (Retrieval-Augmented Iterative Diffusion) a framework, which replaces history-based correlation learning with metadata-driven semantic retrieval and graph-conditioned diffusion. RAID maps textual metadata into a shared semantic space using a frozen multilingual embedding model and constructs an inductive retrieval graph that extends naturally to unseen items. It first forms a base forecast by aggregating information from semantically related neighbors, then refines this forecast with a gated diffusion module to model residual uncertainty. Under a strict true cold-start protocol, RAID outperforms strong foundation models and competitive baselines on both forecasting accuracy and prediction interval coverage, while reducing inference latency by an order of magnitude through non-autoregressive decoding. The shared semantic space also enables zero-shot cross-lingual transfer, allowing a model trained on English descriptions to generalize to items described in other languages without direct supervision.

light_analysis.overview: 提出RAID框架，通过元数据驱动的语义检索和图条件扩散实现真正的冷启动与跨语言时间序列预测。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有时间序列基础模型依赖非空历史窗口进行迁移，无法处理新项目无观测数据的真正冷启动场景。该问题在现实应用中普遍存在，例如新商品的销量预测或新传感器的读数预测。传统方法需预训练或大量历史数据，无法适应冷启动需求，且跨语言场景下模型泛化能力不足。因此，需要一种不依赖历史观测、仅利用元数据描述进行快速准确预测的方法。
light_analysis.method: RAID框架首先使用冻结的多语言嵌入模型将文本元数据映射到共享语义空间，构建归纳检索图以扩展至未见项目。然后，通过聚合语义相似邻居的信息形成基础预测，再引入门控扩散模块对残差不确定性进行细化建模。该框架采用非自回归解码，一次生成预测序列，显著降低推理延迟。所有操作基于语义空间，支持零样本跨语言迁移。
light_analysis.result: 在严格冷启动协议下，RAID在预测准确性和预测区间覆盖率上均优于强基础模型（如TimesFM、Lag-Llama）及多种基线方法。通过非自回归解码，推理延迟降低一个数量级。此外，基于共享语义空间，模型在仅使用英文描述训练后，能零样本泛化至其他语言描述的项目，无需直接监督。
light_analysis.conclusion: RAID有效解决了时间序列预测中的真正冷启动问题，并实现了零样本跨语言泛化。其元数据驱动和图扩散架构为缺乏历史数据的场景提供了高效解决方案，具有重要实际价值。未来可探索更复杂的图结构或结合其他模态元数据以进一步提升性能，同时可能受限于元数据质量与语义空间对齐的鲁棒性。

title: MA-SBI: Misspecification-Aware Simulation-Based Inference via Side-Channel Guidance
abstract: Simulation-based inference (SBI) of latent parameters is often hindered by simulator misspecification, the mismatch between simulated and real-world observations caused by inherent modeling simplifications. RoPE, the recent state-of-the-art for robust SBI, addresses this through optimal transport between learned representations of real and simulated observations, but requires ground-truth parameter calibration pairs that are typically unavailable in the very settings where SBI is needed. What practitioners do have is unstructured side-information such as regime labels, instruction text, and policy bulletins. We propose Misspecification-Aware Simulation-Based Inference (MA-SBI), a calibration-free framework that turns this side-channel into a posterior correction. A learned corrector maps side-channel text to an observation-space shift applied before any pre-trained amortized posterior, requiring no retraining and no parameter ground-truth. Our main theorem bounds achievable bias reduction by the mutual information between misspecification and side-channel, with a non-vacuous constant that extends to all sub-Gaussian noise via Donsker-Varadhan. On hide-the-calibration benchmarks, MA-SBI with text alone matches the oracle posterior across 10 seeds and two backbones (TOST equivalence), while RoPE given more data does not. The two approaches are complementary: where misspecification is structural and recoverable from parameter pairs, RoPE dominates, as the theory predicts. A stochastic variant improves posterior-predictive log-likelihood on real COVID and OxCGRT epidemiological data, and correctly leaves the posterior unchanged on a well-specified cognitive-science corpus.

light_analysis.overview: 提出MA-SBI，一种无需校准的模拟推理方法，利用侧信息校正模型错误指定，理论保证偏差降低，实验表现优于现有方法。
light_analysis.motivation: 模拟推理常因模拟器错误指定而失败，现有鲁棒方法RoPE需真实参数校准对，实际中难以获得。实践中存在无结构侧信息（如文本标签），如何利用它们校正后验是未解决问题，且无需真实参数。
light_analysis.method: MA-SBI学习校正器，将侧通道文本映射为观测空间偏移，应用于预训练的后验前，无需重新训练和真实参数。理论通过互信息界偏差降低，并扩展到次高斯噪声。采用隐藏校准基准和真实流行病数据集。
light_analysis.result: 在隐藏校准基准上，仅文本的MA-SBI匹配oracle后验（TOST等价，10种子两骨干），RoPE即使更多数据也未达。在真实COVID数据上改进后验预测对数似然，在良好指定语料上正确保持后验不变。
light_analysis.conclusion: MA-SBI是无需校准的鲁棒SBI方法，利用侧信息，理论坚实，实验有效。与RoPE互补，适用于结构性和参数对可恢复情况。未来可扩展更多侧信息类型。

title: Demystifying Variance in Circuit Discovery of LLMs
abstract: Circuit discovery is a key technique in mechanistic interpretability to pinpoint the model components that are crucial for performing a given task. Although the current state-of-the-art method (EAP-IG) performs well on the metric of (un)faithfulness, it suffers from substantial variability. This includes resampling variance, where the circuit changes when we probe with a new batch of data from the same distribution; rephrasing variance, where the discovered circuit shifts when the prompts are rephrased; and sample-wise variance, where a circuit with low population unfaithfulness exhibits large fluctuations in unfaithfulness across individual samples.   This paper studies the roots of these variances. We demonstrate that CEAP, our new circuit discovery method that improves upon EAP-IG with a theoretical guarantee, can substantially lessen resampling variance. We further show that rephrasing variance arises because prompts with different templates tend to activate different circuits in the model. This leads us to argue that it may be challenging to find a comprehensive circuit that explains and controls the model's behavior on a task, which can be expressed in countless templates, suggesting that LLMs may be inherently hard to steer. We show that sparsity, which has been claimed to form more compact and interpretable task circuits, fails to solve this problem. Regarding sample-wise variance, we argue that it is largely benign: extremely poor unfaithfulness scores often stem from how unfaithfulness is defined, rather than from defects in the measured circuits.
