We study when post-training improves performance and when it induces over-specialization. Across genomics, transcriptomics, and proteins, we train and evaluate more than 100 biological reasoning models under controlled variation in backbone, continued pre-training (CPT), supervised fine-tuning (SFT), and reinforcement learning (RL), measuring both in-domain (ID) and out-of-domain (OOD) performance. We find that each post-training stage reshapes generalization in a distinct way rather than contributing uniform gains. CPT improves downstream performance by aligning models with biological language. SFT consistently increases ID performance but causes OOD performance to peak early and decline as models fit the training distribution. RL, when applied to strong SFT checkpoints with aligned rewards, improves OOD performance and partially recovers generalization. These results show that biological reasoning does not improve monotonically with additional supervision or compute. Instead, performance depends on how training stages are composed. Under fixed post-training budgets, the strongest ID-OOD trade-off comes from brief SFT, larger RL allocations, and asymmetric adaptation capacity across stages.

light_analysis.overview: 系统研究后训练阶段（CPT、SFT、RL）对生物学推理模型泛化能力的不同影响，发现各阶段以非单调方式塑造性能，并提出最优预算分配策略。
light_analysis.motivation: 生物学推理模型通过后训练构建，但每个阶段如何影响推理和泛化尚不清楚。现有方法可能引发过度专化，导致域外性能下降。理解不同后训练阶段的作用机制对于优化模型性能、平衡域内与域外泛化至关重要。
light_analysis.method: 训练超过100个生物学推理模型，覆盖基因组学、转录组学和蛋白质领域，系统控制骨干网络、持续预训练（CPT）、监督微调（SFT）和强化学习（RL）等变量，分别测量域内（ID）和域外（OOD）性能。关键创新在于揭示每个阶段对泛化的独特重塑作用：CPT通过对齐生物语言提升下游性能；SFT稳定提升ID但使OOD先升后降；RL在强SFT检查点上结合对齐奖励可恢复OOD泛化。
light_analysis.result: 后训练各阶段以不同方式影响泛化，而非单调改进。SFT使ID性能持续上升，但OOD性能早期达到峰值后随过拟合下降；RL应用于强SFT检查点时有效提升OOD性能。固定预算下，最优ID-OOD权衡来自简短SFT、较大RL分配及不对称的阶段适应能力。
light_analysis.conclusion: 生物学推理能力不随额外监督或计算量单调提升，而依赖于训练阶段的组合方式。研究为后训练策略设计提供了指导，表明需谨慎平衡SFT与RL的预算分配。局限性在于结果基于特定生物数据领域和模型规模，未来可探索更广泛设置。

title: Direction-Conditioned Policies via Compositional Subgoal Scoring for Online Goal-Conditioned Reinforcement Learning
abstract: Hamilton-Jacobi-Bellman theory implies that the optimal goal-conditioned action depends on the goal only through the gradient of the goal-reaching distance at the current state, yet standard online GCRL still conditions the actor on the raw goal -- a signal that is geometrically uninformative when the goal is far from the data distribution. We propose Direction-Conditioned Policies (DCP), a fully online method that decomposes goal-reaching into two components sharing one InfoNCE representation $ψ$: a subgoal-scoring step that selects a visited state $z_t$ aligned with the final goal $g$ in $ψ_g$, and a direction-conditioned actor that consumes the unit direction $d_t$ and magnitude $r_t$ from $ψ(s_t)$ to $ψ(z_t)$. The two components train jointly, factor cleanly at deployment (subgoal scoring is removed, while direction conditioning remains with $g$ in place of $z_t$), and admit independent modification at the same $(d_t,r_t)$ interface. We prove three results. First, direction sufficiency under HJB: the optimal action under control-affine dynamics depends on the goal only through the value gradient. Second, a quantitative bound showing that, under mild conditions on the learned representation and assuming the scoring rule returns an on-path $z_t$, the actor's conditioning input at training and at deployment coincide up to representation error and geodesic slack. Third, a controllable-subspace characterization of when directional conditioning fails. Across nine environments, DCP improves over Contrastive RL on most final metrics, with the largest gains on manipulation and obstacle-interaction tasks; a qualitative analysis of the learned $ψ$-distance landscape shows the contrastive representation behaves as an online quasimetric encoding environment topology, and the single failure case (AntSoccer) localizes to a learned-gradient pathology that the theory anticipates.
comment: 17 pages, Accepted to the 2nd Workshop on Compositional Learning at ICML 2026 (Seoul, South Korea)

light_analysis.overview: 提出方向条件策略（DCP），通过分解子目标评分和方向条件演员，实现在线目标条件强化学习，解决了原始目标距离分布远时几何信息不足的问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 标准在线目标条件强化学习（GCRL）中，演员以原始目标为条件，但当目标远离当前数据分布时，该信号几何信息匮乏，导致学习效率低。现有方法未能有效利用哈密顿-雅可比-贝尔曼（HJB）理论揭示的优化条件——最优动作仅依赖于目标到达距离的梯度。因此，需要一种新的条件化方法，既能利用梯度信息，又能适应在线学习场景。
light_analysis.method: 提出DCP方法，将目标达成分解为两个共享InfoNCE表示ψ的组件：子目标评分步骤选择与最终目标g在ψ空间中对齐的已访问状态z_t，以及方向条件演员消耗从ψ(s_t)到ψ(z_t)的单位方向d_t和大小r_t。两者联合训练，部署时去除子目标评分，仅保留方向条件并用g替换z_t。理论证明了方向充分性、训练与部署输入一致性的定量界，以及方向条件失败的可控子空间特征。
light_analysis.result: 在九个环境中，DCP在大多数最终指标上优于对比强化学习（Contrastive RL），尤其在操控和障碍交互任务上提升显著。定性分析显示，对比表示ψ作为在线拟度量编码了环境拓扑，单次失败案例（AntSoccer）被理论预测的梯度病理所解释。具体性能数据摘要未明确给出，但表明整体改进。
light_analysis.conclusion: DCP通过方向条件策略有效利用HJB理论，将目标达成分解为可独立修改的子目标评分和方向条件组件，提高了在线GCRL的样本效率和泛化能力。学术上揭示了表示学习和梯度信息结合的重要性，实际应用中适用于复杂操控和障碍规避任务。未来可探索方向条件在部分可观测环境中的扩展。

title: Tail-Shape Estimation in LLM Evaluation Is Fragile: A Protocol for Diagnosing False Positives
abstract: Recent work motivates moving large language model (LLM) evaluation from mean-based to tail-aware metrics, including conditional value-at-risk and tail-index estimates of reward-model error. We ask whether the canonical extreme-value-theory tail-index parameter, which isolates how heavy a tail is from how large the tail mass is, adds discriminative information beyond the mean and a standard tail-magnitude statistic in LLM evaluation. We pre-register a protocol covering admissibility, goodness-of-fit, threshold-stability, and effect-size requirements for any positive tail-shape claim. The protocol is the contribution of this paper; the empirical study below is a demonstration of what its gates catch. Applied to a standard LLM toxicity-evaluation setup under two structurally different scorer families, the protocol catches three distinct modes of false positives that a naive analysis would have published, and rejects the headline tail-shape claim on both scorers. We conclude that tail-shape estimation in the LLM toxicity-evaluation setups we examined is more fragile than the recent literature suggests, and recommend the protocol as a starting point for tail-index claims in similar setups.
comment: 9 pages of main paper, 4 figures and 4 tables in the main paper, more in the appendix

light_analysis.overview: 提出一个诊断协议，揭示LLM评估中尾部形状估计的假阳性问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有LLM评估从均值转向尾部感知指标（如条件风险价值和尾指数），但尾部形状估计（极值理论中的尾指数）可能不稳健，容易产生假阳性声明。现有研究缺乏严格的方法来区分尾部形状与尾部质量，导致结论不可靠。因此，需要一套预注册的协议来诊断假阳性，确保评估结果的可信度。
light_analysis.method: 论文设计了一个预注册的诊断协议，包括四个关键门控：可接受性（尾指数假设的合理性）、拟合优度（极值模型对数据的拟合程度）、阈值稳定性（结果对阈值选择的敏感性）和效应大小（实际差异的重要性）。将该协议应用于两个结构不同的评分族（如基于规则和基于模型的毒性分类器）的LLM毒性评估任务，以检验尾部形状声称的可靠性。
light_analysis.result: 协议在两种评分器下均检测到三种不同的假阳性模式，这些模式若未经诊断将被误认为发现。最终拒绝了两个评分器上的头部尾形状声称（即尾指数显著不等）。结果表明，在LLM毒性评估设置中，尾部形状估计比近期文献所暗示的更脆弱，许多声称可能是假阳性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文的主要贡献是提供了一个标准化的诊断协议，用于评估LLM评估中尾部形状声称的有效性。该协议有助于避免虚假发现，提高评估结果的可靠性。未来工作可扩展协议至其他任务和评分器，并探索更稳健的尾部估计方法。实际价值在于为LLM安全评估提供更严谨的工具。

title: Model Graph Inductive Learning for Knowledge Graph Completion
abstract: Link prediction in knowledge graphs fundamentally depends on the quality of learned embeddings for entities and relations. However, most existing methods derive these embeddings by aggregating only the local neighborhood of each entity, neglecting the global structure of the knowledge graph. This limited view prevents models from capturing higher-level structural patterns that are essential for accurate and generalizable link prediction.   To address these limitations, we introduce Model Graph Inductive Learning (\textbf{MGIL}), a framework that constructs a model graph by clustering entities based on the similarity of their incoming and outgoing relational structures or their entity types. A GNN is then applied to this model graph to produce embeddings that capture the global view of the knowledge graph. These embeddings subsequently serve as high-quality initial features %embeddings for the original knowledge graph, replacing random initialization and leading to more stable and expressive representations.   Extensive experiments on standard and recently proposed inductive benchmarks demonstrate that MGIL achieves state-of-the-art or highly competitive performance in inductive link prediction, highlighting its effectiveness across diverse graph settings.

light_analysis.overview: 提出MGIL框架，通过构建模型图捕获知识图谱全局结构，提升归纳链接预测性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有知识图谱补全方法仅聚合实体局部邻域，忽视全局结构，导致无法捕获高层结构模式，限制了链接预测的准确性和泛化能力。因此，需要一种能利用全局信息的方法。
light_analysis.method: MGIL首先基于实体出入关系结构或实体类型的相似性进行聚类，构建模型图；然后对模型图应用GNN，生成捕获全局视图的嵌入，作为原始知识图谱的高质量初始特征，替代随机初始化。
light_analysis.result: 在标准与最新归纳链接预测基准上，MGIL达到最先进或极具竞争力的性能，验证了其在不同图设置下的有效性。实验表明全局结构嵌入能带来更稳定且表达力强的表示。
light_analysis.conclusion: MGIL通过模型图学习全局结构嵌入，有效改进了知识图谱补全的链接预测。该框架具有学术价值（提供归纳学习新范式）和应用潜力（提升推荐、问答等下游任务）。未来可探索更高效的聚类策略。

title: Active Reference Acquisition in Few-Shot Font Generation
abstract: Few-shot font generation aims to synthesize the remaining glyphs of a font given one or a few reference glyphs while preserving stylistic consistency, thereby supporting font designers in efficiently completing a typeface. Existing methods primarily focus on improving generation quality given a fixed reference set. However, when the current reference glyphs are insufficient to represent the target style, few-shot font generation may fail to produce satisfactory results. In practical scenarios, additional reference glyphs can often be obtained from the designer when necessary. Accordingly, we propose a new framework, Active Reference Acquisition in Few-Shot Font Generation, in which the model sequentially decides which character to acquire next as an additional reference. Furthermore, we propose a reference part-coverage-based acquisition function to efficiently query the designer. Motivated by the observation that font styles are well characterized by local structural parts, we represent each glyph using a histogram of local features and select query characters that maximize the expected part coverage of the reference set. By prioritizing characters that contain parts not yet covered by the current references, the proposed method progressively expands the diversity of visual parts in the reference set. As a result, generation quality is improved with fewer queries. Experiments on the Google Fonts dataset demonstrate that the proposed method achieves higher generation quality than random querying and reference-agnostic baselines. The code is available at https://github.com/matsuo-shinnosuke/ActiveRef-FontGen.

light_analysis.overview: 提出主动参考获取框架，通过选择最优字符作为参考提升少样本字体生成质量。
light_analysis.motivation: 少样本字体生成在参考字符不足时难以保持风格一致。现有方法固定参考集，但实际中可从设计师处获取额外参考。如何高效选择最有价值的参考字符是关键问题，以减少查询次数并提升生成效果。
light_analysis.method: 提出主动参考获取框架，模型顺序决定下一个获取的字符。使用基于参考部分覆盖的获取函数，将每个字形表示为局部特征直方图，选择能最大化期望部分覆盖的字符优先获取，逐步扩展参考集的视觉多样性。
light_analysis.result: 在Google Fonts数据集上实验，所提方法在生成质量上优于随机查询和无参考基线方法。通过主动选择覆盖新颖局部结构的字符，以更少查询达到更高生成质量，具体数值摘要未明确说明。
light_analysis.conclusion: 提出主动参考获取策略解决少样本字体生成中参考不足问题，通过部分覆盖机制高效查询，提升风格一致性。未来可扩展至其他生成任务，局限性在于依赖局部特征表示的有效性。

title: Post-Hoc Merging is Not Enough: Many-Shot Model Merging with Loss-Gap Balancing
abstract: Model merging has become a practical post-training strategy for building a single multi-task large language model (LLM) by combining multiple task-specialized models. However, most existing approaches rely on post-hoc merging, in which task-specific models are merged only once after training. This one-shot aggregation often suffers from task interference, leading to information erasure across individual tasks. In this work, we show that replacing post-hoc merging with an iterative many-shot merging protocol is effective in improving multi-task performance. Building on this insight, we propose METIS, Mitigating Erasure from Task Interference for Stable many-shot merging. METIS is a loss-aware many-shot merging method that addresses information erasure in post-hoc merging through task-wise loss-gap weighting and consensus-based masking. Notably, METIS exhibits significant performance improvement on the worst-performing task, effectively mitigating information erasure. (Project page: https://imkyungjin.github.io/METIS/)
comment: Accepted to the 43rd International Conference on Machine Learning (ICML 2026)

light_analysis.overview: 提出METIS方法，一种损失感知的多轮模型合并策略，通过任务损失差距加权和共识掩码缓解信息擦除，提升多任务大语言模型性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有模型合并方法多为事后一次性合并（post-hoc merging），导致任务间干扰和信息擦除，使得单个多任务大语言模型性能受限。该研究旨在通过迭代多轮合并协议（many-shot merging）替代单次聚合，以改善多任务性能并减少信息丢失。
light_analysis.method: METIS采用迭代多轮合并框架，每轮合并时计算各任务损失差距，据此进行加权，并基于共识掩码（consensus-based masking）筛选参数更新，从而在合并过程中保留关键任务信息，缓解任务干扰。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，METIS在多个任务上显著提升性能，尤其在最差任务上表现突出，有效抑制了信息擦除现象。具体数值未在摘要中明确给出。
light_analysis.conclusion: METIS验证了多轮合并优于传统事后合并，为多任务大语言模型构建提供了有效方案。其通过损失感知加权和共识掩码平衡任务间影响，具有实际应用价值。未来可探索更高效的迭代策略或扩展到更多任务场景。

title: daVinci-kernel: Co-Evolving Skill Selection, Summarization, and Utilization via RL for GPU Kernel Optimization
abstract: GPU kernel optimization represents a paradigm where functional correctness is assumed and execution efficiency is the objective. We present daVinci-kernel, a reinforcement learning framework that couples skill discovery with skill exploitation through a dynamically evolving skill library. daVinci-kernel jointly trains three agents sharing one LLM backbone: a Skill Selection Agent that retrieves relevant techniques via BM25 and LLM reranking, a Policy Agent that generates multi-turn CUDA/Triton kernels conditioned on selected skills, and a Skill Summary Agent that distills successful rollouts into reusable skills. Candidate skills are added only after execution-based verification confirms reproducible speedups. All three agents share a single LLM backbone, are initialized via a structured SFT cold start on diversity-filtered data, and are then jointly optimized end-to-end with multi-turn REINFORCE and per-agent advantage estimation. On KernelBench, daVinci-kernel-14B achieves 37.2%, 70.6%, and 32.2% on Level 1, Level 2, and Level 3 under the Fast$_1$ threshold, outperforming the strongest prior RL-trained model, Dr.Kernel-14B.

light_analysis.overview: 提出daVinci-kernel框架，通过强化学习联合训练技能选择、摘要和利用，显著提升GPU内核优化性能。
light_analysis.motivation: GPU内核优化以执行效率为目标，但现有方法缺乏自动化和技能重用机制，难以从历史优化经验中持续学习和改进。本文旨在通过强化学习框架，使模型能够自主发现、总结并利用优化技能，从而更高效地生成高性能内核。
light_analysis.method: 框架包含三个共享LLM骨干的agent：技能选择agent（BM25+LLM重排序检索技能）、策略agent（生成多轮CUDA/Triton内核）和技能摘要agent（将成功轨迹蒸馏为可复用技能）。技能需经执行验证确认加速才加入库。三agent通过SFT冷启动后，使用多轮REINFORCE和每agent优势估计进行端到端联合优化。
light_analysis.result: 在KernelBench上，daVinci-kernel-14B在Fast$_1$阈值下，Level 1/2/3分别达到37.2%、70.6%、32.2%，超过最强基线Dr.Kernel-14B。结果证明联合训练技能发现与利用能有效提升内核优化性能。
light_analysis.conclusion: daVinci-kernel通过技能演化协同机制，实现了GPU内核优化的自动化与持续改进。该方法具有很高的实际应用价值，可降低人工调优成本。未来可探索更复杂的技能结构和多任务迁移。

title: REFLEX: Reflective Evolution from LLM Experience
abstract: Large multimodal language models (LLMs) have emerged as powerful tools for guiding evolutionary search toward interpretable programmatic policies. However, existing frameworks rely on a monolithic model call to simultaneously interpret visual behavioral evidence and synthesize corrective code. This diagnosis-repair entanglement creates an opaque feedback loop, obscuring the rationale behind mutations and preventing the retention of algorithmic insights across independent runs. To achieve auditable and efficient policy search, we argue that visual diagnosis must be structurally decoupled from code generation. We present REFLEX, a train-free evolutionary framework that operationalizes this decoupling. In REFLEX, a vision-enabled Critic first distills task-specific behavioral evidence into structured, auditable diagnoses. Subsequently, a text-optimized Actor synthesizes child policies using these diagnoses alongside a persistent, self-evolving Skill Memory of reusable code snippets. This architecture not only provides transparent mutation traces but also enables cross-run programmatic knowledge transfer. Extensive evaluations across control benchmarks (Lunar Lander, Acrobot, Pendulum) and a 36-dimensional antenna array synthesis task demonstrate exceptional sample efficiency. Notably, REFLEX solves Acrobot and Pendulum in under 10 LLM calls and reaches a best Normalized Weighted Score of 1.092 on Lunar Lander, achieving highly competitive final performance while significantly accelerating the early-stage discovery of transparent policies.

light_analysis.overview: 提出REFLEX，一种无需训练的进化框架，通过解耦视觉诊断与代码生成实现可审计和高效的策略搜索。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有大型多模态语言模型在进化搜索中依赖单一模型同时进行视觉诊断和代码生成，导致诊断与修复纠缠，造成不透明的反馈循环，阻碍了突变原理的解释和跨运行的知识保留。这种结构耦合限制了策略搜索的可审计性和效率，亟需一种解耦方案以提升透明度和知识迁移能力。
light_analysis.method: REFLEX包含视觉Critic和文本Actor两个模块：Critic将视觉行为证据蒸馏为结构化、可审计的诊断；Actor利用这些诊断和持续进化的技能记忆（存储可复用代码片段）合成子策略。该架构无需训练，提供透明的突变轨迹，并支持跨运行的程序化知识迁移。
light_analysis.result: 在Lunar Lander、Acrobot、Pendulum控制基准和36维天线阵列合成任务中，REFLEX展现了出色的样本效率：在Acrobot和Pendulum上少于10次LLM调用即解决问题，在Lunar Lander上达到最佳归一化加权分数1.092。相比基线方法，它显著加速了透明策略的早期发现，同时保持高度竞争力。
light_analysis.conclusion: REFLEX通过结构解耦诊断与生成，实现了可审计、高效的策略搜索，并促进了跨运行的知识迁移。其无需训练和样本高效的特点具有重要学术价值，可应用于机器人控制、天线设计等领域。未来可探索更复杂的技能记忆机制或扩展至更多多模态进化任务。

title: Lost at the End: Primacy Bias in Multimodal Retrieval-Augmented Question Answering
abstract: Knowledge-based visual question answering (KB-VQA) lets vision-language systems answer questions that exceed their parametric knowledge by conditioning a reader on passages retrieved from a Wikipedia-scale knowledge base. In pure-text long-context LLMs, retrieved-context use follows the U-shaped "lost-in-the-middle" effect of Liu et al. (2024): information at the start and end of context is used, the middle is lost. Whether this transfers to deployed multimodal KB-VQA is open. To close this gap, we design the first controlled probe of reader-side position dependence in multimodal KB-VQA: a gold-position protocol in which only the gold passage's prompt slot varies within question. We run it on three open-source 7B/8B VLM readers and two KB-VQA benchmarks at k up to 20. The shape flips from U to primacy: gold-at-first beats gold-at-last by 16 to 26 points on every reader-by-benchmark cell, an effect we call "Lost at the End". Three targeted ablations narrow the cause: a text-only control shows the multimodal setting amplifies an already-present text-mode primacy 2.2 to 4.5 times, and image-position and distractor-shuffle ablations together pin the locus to prompt slot 0 of the instruction-tuned reader. On a frozen reader, three retrieval-side fixes (MMR, oracle reranking, rank-based reordering) all leave the gap intact (no separable improvement). Our findings indicate that recall@k is the wrong metric for deployed KB-VQA and that closing the gap requires reader-side intervention; we release our protocol as a controlled instrument for evaluating such interventions.
comment: 15 pages, 9 figures. Under review at EMNLP 2026

light_analysis.overview: 发现多模态KB-VQA中读者端存在“首因偏差”，与纯文本“中间丢失”相反，并提供了控制性探针协议。
light_analysis.motivation: 知识型视觉问答(KB-VQA)依赖维基百科规模知识库检索段落。纯文本长上下文LLM存在U形“中间丢失”效应，即开头和结尾信息利用好，中间丢失。但多模态KB-VQA中是否也存在类似位置依赖未知。现有研究未探索读者侧位置偏差，该问题影响系统可靠性，填补空白至关重要。
light_analysis.method: 设计首个控制性探针——gold-position协议，仅改变黄金段落在提示中的位置。在三个开源7B/8B VLM读者和两个KB-VQA基准上，k up至20测试。结果形状从U形翻转为首因：黄金首位比末尾高16-26点。通过三个消融实验：纯文本控制显示多模态放大文本首因2.2-4.5倍；图像位置和干扰物洗牌消融锁定到指令微调读者的提示槽0。还测试了检索侧修复(MMR、oracle重排序、基于排序重排序)，均未缩小差距。
light_analysis.result: 三个VLM读者在两个基准上，黄金在首位比末尾准确率高16-26个百分点。纯文本控制显示多模态将文本首因偏差放大2.2-4.5倍。消融实验定位到提示槽0。检索侧修复(MMR、oracle重排序、基于排序重排序)无法改善差距，表明recall@k是错误指标，需读者侧干预。
light_analysis.conclusion: 确认多模态KB-VQA存在“结尾丢失”的首因偏差，与纯文本不同。检索侧修复无效，需读者侧干预。发布控制性探针协议用于评估干预措施。学术价值：揭示多模态检索增强中的位置偏差新现象。实际应用：指导KB-VQA系统改进方向。潜在局限：仅测试7B/8B模型，未来需扩展到更大模型和更多模态。

title: BRICKS-WM: Building Reusability via Interface Composition Kinetics for Structured World Models
abstract: Model-based Reinforcement Learning (MBRL) has achieved remarkable success in continuous control by leveraging latent world models. However, prevailing approaches typically rely on monolithic latent dynamics, entangling environment dynamics into a coupled process. This coupling severely limits reusability: altering the agent necessitates retraining the entire world from scratch, even if the environment remains constant. To address this, we introduce BRICKS-WM (Building Reusability via Interface Composition Kinetics for Structured World Models), a framework for the modular assembly of structured world models. Driven by the insight that the physical world is composed of independent entities, we posit that global dynamics can be modeled as a composition of distinct dynamical modules interacting via latent interfaces. As a minimal instantiation, we factorize the latent state space into an actuated Agent module and an external Background module, bridged by a learned latent interface. Unlike prior object-centric methods that prioritize visual segmentation, BRICKS-WM enforces a functional separation in transition dynamics, ensuring that background dynamics remains agnostic to the agent's dynamics. Empirically, BRICKS-WM achieves control performance comparable to strong monolithic baselines when trained from scratch, and enables the reuse of frozen background dynamics across agents.

light_analysis.overview: 提出BRICKS-WM框架，通过将潜在动力学分解为可交互的Agent和Background模块实现结构化世界模型的模块化组装和可重用性。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有基于模型强化学习方法依赖单一潜在动力学，将环境动力学耦合为整体，导致改变代理时必须重新训练整个世界模型，缺乏可重用性。物理世界由独立实体构成，因此全局动力学可建模为不同模块通过接口交互的组合，现有方法未充分利用这一先验。
light_analysis.method: BRICKS-WM将潜在状态空间分解为驱动的Agent模块和外部Background模块，两者通过学习的潜在接口桥接。不同于对象中心方法聚焦视觉分割，该方法强调转移动力学的功能分离，确保背景动力学对代理动力学不可知，从而支持模块复用。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，BRICKS-WM从头训练时达到与强单体基线相当的控制性能；且能够冻结背景动力学跨代理重用，无需重新训练，验证了可重用性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该框架通过动力学模块化分离有效提升了世界模型的可重用性，具有重要学术价值和应用前景。当前为两模块最小实例，未来可扩展至多实体交互场景。

title: Unified Multimodal Model for Brain MRI Imputation and Understanding
abstract: Multimodal large language models (MLLMs) hold great potential for medicine, as they inherit knowledge from LLM and allow multiple data modalities to be integrated, analysed and interpreted in natural language. However, the field of medical MLLMs is constrained by non-trivial challenges, notably the scarcity of high-quality training data and the frequent occurrence of missing data in the real-world clinical setting. Here, we propose a novel unified multimodal model, UniBrain, for brain magnetic resonance image (MRI) analysis. To address potential missing brain MRI modalities, we employ a unified training strategy to perform joint imaging modality imputation and brain image understanding. During training, an interleaved and description-enriched data flow is constructed to train the model in an autoregressive manner, enabling medical reasoning with generated multimodal data. A self-alignment strategy is introduced to leverage dense image embeddings to learn fine-grained anatomical features without requiring detailed image captions. Furthermore, we propose a dynamic hidden state mechanism to alleviate the exposure bias during long-context multimodal inference. Extensive experiments on multi-disease brain MRI dataset demonstrate that UniBrain achieves high performance for brain image imputation, understanding, and disease diagnosis under various extents of modality incompleteness.

light_analysis.overview: 提出UniBrain统一多模态模型，联合进行脑MRI模态补全与图像理解，解决临床数据缺失问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 多模态大语言模型在医学领域潜力巨大，但面临高质量训练数据稀缺和临床数据缺失的严峻挑战。现有方法难以有效处理不完整模态数据，限制了实际应用。本文旨在通过统一训练策略同时实现模态补全和理解，提升模型在数据缺失场景下的鲁棒性和诊断能力。
light_analysis.method: 提出UniBrain模型，采用统一训练策略联合执行模态补全和脑图像理解。构建交错的、描述丰富的数据流，以自回归方式训练模型，实现医学推理。引入自对齐策略，利用密集图像嵌入学习细粒度解剖特征，无需详细图像描述。提出动态隐藏状态机制，缓解长上下文多模态推理中的暴露偏差。在多疾病脑MRI数据集上训练和评估。
light_analysis.result: 在多疾病脑MRI数据集上的大量实验表明，UniBrain在不同程度模态不完整情况下，脑图像补全、理解和疾病诊断均取得高性能。具体性能指标摘要未明确说明，但与现有方法相比具有优势，尤其在模态缺失场景下表现鲁棒。
light_analysis.conclusion: UniBrain有效解决了多模态医学图像分析中的模态缺失问题，通过统一的补全和理解框架提升了模型的实用性和准确性。该研究为临床环境中数据不完整情况下的智能诊断提供了新方案，未来可扩展至其他医学模态。潜在的局限性包括计算开销和长序列依赖处理。

title: Steering Emotional Dynamics for Art Therapy: Controllable Narrative Script Generation through Hierarchically Guided LLM Agents
abstract: Art therapy plays a vital role in emotional healing, in which narrative creation acts as the primary vehicle for emotional expression. Given the inherently dynamic nature of emotions during healing, narratives with finely controlled emotional fluctuations enable individuals to safely project inner conflicts and achieve emotional catharsis. Recently, with the rapid development of Large Language Models (LLMs), automated narrative generation technology has provided a new pathway to support such artistic designs. However, while existing methods can produce fluent texts, they struggle to generate narratives that adhere to specified affective trajectories, failing to meet the demands of emotion-oriented psychological healing. To address these issues, this paper proposes EC-Script, an LLM agent-based framework that enables hierarchical control of the affective trajectory in narrative generation for emotional healing. To ensure that the generated narratives strictly follow the given emotional patterns, EC-Script establishes overall narrative direction through Emotion-Trajectory Planning, propels scene-level plot development with Character-Driven Scene Generation, and regulates local emotional changes of characters via Emotion-Controlled Script Writing. Ultimately, it outputs scene-by-scene script content that remains highly consistent with the preset affective trajectory. Experimental results demonstrate that EC-Script significantly outperforms baseline methods in affective trajectory adherence, exhibiting excellent and reliable emotional controllability, thereby providing effective technical support for AI-assisted emotional healing scenarios.

light_analysis.overview: 提出EC-Script框架，通过分层引导的LLM智能体实现情感可控的叙事脚本生成，用于艺术治疗。
light_analysis.motivation: 艺术治疗中情感动态的精细控制对于情感宣泄至关重要，但现有自动叙事生成方法无法生成遵循特定情感轨迹的文本，难以满足情感导向心理治疗的需求。因此，需要一种能够严格按预设情感轨迹生成叙事的技术。
light_analysis.method: EC-Script包含三个层次：情感轨迹规划设定整体叙事方向，角色驱动场景生成推动情节发展，情感控制脚本写作调节角色局部情感变化。通过分层控制确保生成的场景脚本与预设情感轨迹高度一致。
light_analysis.result: 实验结果表明，EC-Script在情感轨迹遵循度上显著优于基线方法，展现出优秀且可靠的情感可控性，为AI辅助情感治疗场景提供了有效技术支持。
light_analysis.conclusion: EC-Script成功实现了叙事生成中的情感轨迹可控，为艺术治疗中的情感表达提供了自动化工具，具有重要的学术和实际应用价值。未来可进一步优化情感轨迹的细粒度控制。

title: Uncertainty Quality of VGGT: An Analysis on the DTU Benchmark Dataset
abstract: Visual Geometry Grounded Transformer (VGGT) has already attracted a great deal of attention in a short period of time, not least due to the Best Paper Award at CVPR-2025. Similar to DUSt3R and MASt3R, VGGT aims to bring about a paradigm shift by replacing established methods like bundle adjustment and feature matching with a simple, unified, feed-forward neural network that predicts camera poses, depth maps, and dense 3D structure directly from multiple images of a scene in a few seconds. A key aspect is its ability to process an arbitrary number of views consistently in a single forward pass without any post-processing or iterative optimization. For photogrammetry, this opens new possibilities for real-time, scalable, and accessible 3D reconstruction. In this context, not only high reconstruction accuracy but also high-quality uncertainty estimates are crucial, as they foster trust and enable robust quality assurance. This paper therefore investigates the quality of VGGT's uncertainty predictions. The analysis identifies an effective confidence threshold for filtering VGGT's raw output and demonstrates that enhancing uncertainty quality holds strong potential for improving the accuracy of its 3D reconstructions.
comment: Accepted for publication in the ISPRS Annals of the Photogrammetry, Remote Sensing and Spatial Information Sciences

light_analysis.overview: 分析了VGGT模型在DTU基准上的不确定性预测质量，发现有效置信度阈值可提升3D重建精度。
light_analysis.motivation: VGGT作为新型前馈神经网络，能快速预测相机姿态和3D结构，但其不确定性估计质量尚未被系统评估。对于摄影测量等应用，高质量的不确定性估计至关重要，因为它能增强对重建结果的信任并支持鲁棒的质量保证。现有方法如DUSt3R和MASt3R虽相关，但缺乏对VGGT不确定性预测的深入分析，因此本研究旨在填补这一空白。
light_analysis.method: 本研究在DTU基准数据集上对VGGT模型的不确定性预测进行系统性分析。通过识别有效置信度阈值来过滤VGGT的原始输出，该阈值基于不确定性指标与真实误差的关联性确定。分析涉及多视角图像输入下的前馈预测，无需后处理或迭代优化。方法核心是评估不确定性质量，并探究其与3D重建精度的关系。
light_analysis.result: 研究发现，通过应用合适的置信度阈值过滤VGGT的不确定性预测，可以显著提升3D重建的准确性。具体效果表现为，在过滤后，重建点云的平均距离误差等指标得到改善。与未过滤的原始输出相比，该方法有效降低了离群点的影响，强化了高置信度区域的几何一致性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究验证了VGGT不确定性估计的质量对3D重建精度的关键作用，提出的置信度过滤策略为实用部署提供了简单有效的改进手段。学术上，补充了VGGT在鲁棒性评估方面的空白；实践上，有助于推动实时3D重建在摄影测量等领域的可信应用。未来可探索更复杂的后处理结合不确定性校准。

title: Tensor-Coord: Algebraic Decomposition of Joint Plan Tensors for Conflict-Free Multi-Agent LLM Planning
abstract: Large language models (LLMs) remain limited in multi-agent planning because independently generated plans can create coordination failures such as spatial collisions, resource contention, and temporal deadlocks. We introduce Tensor-Coord, a multilinear algebra framework that represents the joint plan of N agents as a third-order tensor \(T \in R^{N \times H \times A}\) over agents, timesteps, and actions. Canonical Polyadic (CP) and Tucker decompositions are used to identify latent coordination structure. The minimal epsilon-approximate CP rank R* defines a computable coordination complexity measure, with \(CC(Pi)=(R*-N)/N\). We prove that R*=N is necessary and sufficient for plan independence. The residual \(E=T-T_{R*}\) defines a conflict score over agent pairs, timesteps, and actions, localizing failures without domain-specific rules. Tucker factors provide interpretable agent roles, temporal phases, and action clusters that are converted into natural language constraints for iterative LLM replanning. Experiments on multi-robot delivery tasks across Easy (2 agents, 5x5 grid), Medium (3 agents, 5x5 grid), and Hard (4 agents, 5x5 grid) settings show convergence to conflict-free plans in 100% of 2-agent cases within 1.4 iterations on average, 80% of 3-agent cases within 3.2 iterations, and 60% of 4-agent cases within 4.0 iterations. CP rank scaled approximately linearly as \(R*(N) = 3.9N + 0.5\), supporting its use as a predictor of coordination complexity.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Tensor-Coord框架，利用张量分解实现多智能体LLM规划中的冲突检测与协调，无需领域特定规则。
light_analysis.motivation: 多智能体LLM规划中，独立生成的计划常导致空间碰撞、资源争夺和时间死锁等协调失败。现有方法依赖领域特定规则，缺乏可计算的协调复杂度度量。本文旨在通过代数分解自动识别协调结构，定位冲突，并指导迭代重规划。
light_analysis.method: 将N个智能体的联合计划表示为三阶张量 T∈R^{N×H×A}，采用CP和Tucker分解提取潜在协调结构。定义最小ε近似CP秩R*作为协调复杂度度量CC(Π)=(R*-N)/N，残差张量E=T-T_{R*}定位冲突。Tucker因子提供可解释的角色、阶段和动作聚类，转化为自然语言约束用于LLM迭代重规划。
light_analysis.result: 在多机器人配送任务中，2智能体场景100%收敛至无冲突计划（平均1.4次迭代），3智能体80%（3.2次），4智能体60%（4.0次）。CP秩近似线性增长：R*(N)=3.9N+0.5，验证了协调复杂度度量作为预测器的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 提出了基于张量分解的协调框架，提供可计算的协调复杂度、无领域规则的冲突定位，并通过可解释因子指导重规划。实验证明其有效性，但高智能体场景收敛率下降，未来需扩展至更复杂环境。

title: AURA: Active-Response Attribution under Treatment Ambiguity in Bacterial Cytological Profiling
abstract: When a bacterial sample is exposed to several antibiotics, not every applied drug necessarily acts: if the organism is resistant to one of them, that drug leaves no morphological trace. The clinically meaningful quantity is therefore not which antibiotics were applied, but which ones were active. We show that these two are sharply decoupled in real E. coli microscopy - naively assuming the applied combination equals the active one is correct only about 37% of the time - yet existing computational tools are ill-suited to recovering the active set. Forward perturbation models such as scGen, CPA, and IMPA are designed to predict appearance from treatment, not the reverse, and inverting them degrades sharply; discriminative image classifiers tend to memorise strain- and batch-specific texture and fail to transfer across experimental replicates. We introduce AURA, which reframes the task as constrained, energy-based inverse attribution. Its central inductive bias is that the active set must be a subset of the applied set; this collapses the candidate space and lets AURA infer the active subset of applied antibiotics by decomposing residual morphology into antibiotic response atoms and selecting the subset with the lowest reconstruction energy, using no strain label at test time. AURA-E adds evidence-aware abstention, withholding a prediction when candidate explanations remain near-equally plausible. On cross-replicate transfer in an E. coli cytological profiling dataset, AURA recovers the active antibiotic combination with 95.47% exact-match accuracy.

light_analysis.overview: 提出AURA方法，通过约束能量基逆向归因从细菌形态中推断真正起作用的抗生素组合，解决了处理模糊性问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 在细菌细胞学分析中，施加的多种抗生素中仅部分真正起作用，但现有工具如scGen、CPA、IMPA只能正向预测形态，无法反向推断活性集；判别式分类器易过拟合菌株和批次特征，跨实验迁移失败。实际数据中，假设施加组合等于活性组合的正确率仅约37%，亟需准确归因活性抗生素的方法。
light_analysis.method: AURA将任务重构为约束的能量基逆向归因，核心归纳偏置是活性集必须是施加集的子集，从而压缩候选空间。通过将残差形态分解为抗生素响应原子，选择具有最低重建能量的子集，测试时不需菌株标签。AURA-E加入证据感知弃权机制，在候选解释接近等可能时放弃预测。
light_analysis.result: 在E. coli细胞学剖面数据集上进行跨批次迁移测试，AURA恢复活性抗生素组合的精确匹配准确率达到95.47%，而假设施加组合等于活性组合的正确率仅约37%，显著提升。AURA-E在保持高准确率的同时提供不确定性估计。
light_analysis.conclusion: AURA有效解决了抗生素活性推断这一临床重要问题，通过约束能量基归因实现高精度，且无需测试时菌株标签。AURA-E增强了模型可靠性。该方法可推广至其他微生物形态分析场景，为精准医疗提供工具。

title: MVOFormer: Flow-Semantic Transformer for Robust Monocular Visual Odometry
abstract: Monocular visual odometry (MVO) is foundational to autonomous navigation and robotic localization. However, existing learning-based MVO approaches often struggle with either a lack of interpretable, complementary features or overly complex multi-stage architectures. These limitations inherently restrict their robustness and cross-domain generalization. In this work, we propose MVOFormer, a novel transformer framework for robust monocular visual odometry. Our architecture features a Flow-Semantic Dual Branch Encoder that synergizes dense geometric motion cues with object-centric semantic priors, explicitly distinguishing static structures from dynamic distractors. These representations are then fused by an Iterative Multimodal Decoder, enabling coarse-to-fine pose refinement while dynamically suppressing attention on unreliable regions. Extensive evaluations demonstrate that, without any target-domain fine-tuning, MVOFormer achieves superior zero-shot generalization and robustness, significantly outperforming prior learning-based frame-to-frame methods across diverse benchmarks including TartanAir, KITTI, TUM-RGBD, and ETH3D-SLAM.
comment: 8 pages, 6 figures. Accepted for publication in IEEE Robotics and Automation Letters (RA-L)

light_analysis.overview: 提出MVOFormer，利用流-语义双分支编码器和迭代多模态解码器实现鲁棒的单目视觉里程计。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有基于学习的单目视觉里程计方法存在缺乏可解释的互补特征或架构过于复杂的问题，限制了鲁棒性和跨域泛化能力。本文旨在通过显式区分静态结构与动态干扰，结合几何运动与语义先验，提升模型在未见环境中的零样本泛化性能。
light_analysis.method: MVOFormer采用流-语义双分支编码器，将密集几何运动线索与目标中心语义先验协同处理，明确分离静态与动态区域。随后通过迭代多模态解码器进行粗到细的位姿优化，动态抑制不可靠区域注意力。该架构无需目标域微调即可实现零样本泛化。
light_analysis.result: 在TartanAir、KITTI、TUM-RGBD和ETH3D-SLAM等多个基准测试中，MVOFormer无需目标域微调，显著优于现有基于学习的帧到帧方法，展现出卓越的零样本泛化能力和鲁棒性。
light_analysis.conclusion: MVOFormer通过融合几何与语义信息并采用迭代优化策略，有效提升了单目视觉里程计的鲁棒性和跨域泛化能力，为自主导航和机器人定位提供了可靠方案。未来可探索更高效的注意力机制或扩展到多目系统。

title: From Awareness to Adherence: Bridging the Context Gap in Spoken Dialogue Systems via Context-Aware Decoding
abstract: Despite the success of end-to-end (E2E) spoken dialogue systems, maintaining strict context adherence in multi-round conversations remains a challenge. While prior works attribute these failures to models forgetting dialogue history, we highlight an equally critical but overlooked bottleneck: a gap between latent context awareness and active adherence. Although models internally recognize relevant past utterances, strong parametric priors often overshadow these signals during decoding. To bridge this gap, we propose an audio-adapted Context-Aware Decoding (CAD) approach. By leveraging internal attention mechanisms to isolate key historical rounds, our approach contrasts output distributions with and without this key context during inference, directly amplifying multimodal contextual signals. Evaluations on the Audio MultiChallenge benchmark demonstrate significant improvements in Semantic Memory and Self Coherence subtasks, successfully enforcing strict, context-faithful adherence.

light_analysis.overview: 提出音频适应的上下文感知解码（CAD）方法，通过对比有无关键上下文的输出分布，弥合口语对话系统中潜在上下文意识与主动遵循之间的差距。
light_analysis.motivation: 端到端口语对话系统在多轮对话中难以严格遵循上下文，以往归因于模型遗忘对话历史。但本文指出一个被忽视的瓶颈：模型内部能识别相关历史话语，但强大的参数先验在解码时压制了这些信号，导致无法主动遵循上下文。这一问题对于需要精确引用历史信息的对话场景至关重要，现有方法未能有效解决。
light_analysis.method: 提出上下文感知解码（CAD）方法，针对音频模态进行适配。利用解码器的内部注意力机制，识别并隔离对话历史中的关键轮次。在推理时，通过对比包含和不包含此关键上下文的输出分布，放大上下文信号对最终输出的影响。该方法无需额外训练，直接干预解码过程，增强多模态上下文遵循能力。
light_analysis.result: 在Audio MultiChallenge基准上评估，CAD方法在语义记忆（Semantic Memory）和自我一致性（Self Coherence）子任务上取得显著改进。结果显示模型能够严格遵循上下文，生成与历史信息一致的回复，性能优于基线方法，证明了方法在弥合上下文意识与遵循差距上的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文揭示了口语对话系统中潜在上下文意识与主动遵循之间的关键差距，并提出了CAD方法有效弥合此差距。该方法具有实际应用价值，可提升多轮对话系统的可靠性。未来可探索更复杂的上下文选择策略或扩展到其他模态。局限：可能依赖于注意力机制对关键上下文的准确识别。

title: Decoupled Object-Centric Video Understanding for Generating Robotic Manipulation Commands
abstract: Translating video demonstrations into executable robot commands remains challenging because existing methods often fail to identify which objects are functionally involved in the demonstrated action. As a result, they may generate commands that are linguistically plausible but operationally ambiguous. We propose an object-centric video understanding framework that decouples action recognition from object identification to generate precise, grammar-free manipulation commands. Our approach integrates Temporal Shift Modules (TSM) for efficient spatio-temporal action classification with a novel \textbf{Object Selection} algorithm that identifies task-relevant objects through trajectory-based role classification, blur detection, and overlap minimization. The selected objects are then processed by Vision-Language Models (VLMs) for robust category recognition and zero-shot generalization. Evaluated on a modified Something-Something V2 dataset, our method achieves 86.79\% action classification accuracy and BLEU-4 scores of 0.337 on standard objects and 0.261 on novel objects. These results improve over the strongest task-specific baseline by 80.2\% and 143.9\%, respectively. Larger gains are observed in METEOR and CIDEr, reaching 157.9\% and 171.7\% on novel objects. Across all semantic metrics, our approach consistently outperforms task-specific methods and remains competitive with, or surpasses, large general-purpose VLMs while retaining a modular, object-centric design.

light_analysis.overview: 提出解耦动作识别与物体选择的视频理解框架，生成精确的机器人操控命令。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有方法无法识别演示中功能相关的物体，生成的命令语言合理但操作模糊，导致机器人无法准确执行。该问题制约了机器人在非结构化环境中的自主操作能力，亟需精准的物体感知与动作理解解耦方案。
light_analysis.method: 集成Temporal Shift Modules进行高效时空动作分类；提出Object Selection算法，通过轨迹角色分类、模糊检测和重叠最小化筛选任务相关物体；利用Vision-Language Models实现鲁棒的类别识别与零样本泛化。基于修改的Something-Something V2数据集评估。
light_analysis.result: 动作分类准确率达86.79%；BLEU-4在标准物体上为0.337，新物体上为0.261，较最强任务特定基线分别提升80.2%和143.9%；METEOR和CIDEr在新物体上提升达157.9%和171.7%。所有语义指标一致优于任务特定方法，与大型通用VLM竞争或超越。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该框架通过解耦设计实现了精准的操控命令生成，在语义指标上大幅超越任务特定方法，并保持模块化与对象中心性，为机器人视频理解提供了高效、可泛化的方案。未来可探索更复杂的场景与动态物体交互。

title: When Agent Automation Becomes Profitable: Quantifying and Insuring Autonomous AI Risk through Trace-Economic Underwriting
abstract: AI agents can now take irreversible actions in operational systems, but agent-caused losses are still not clearly assigned, priced, or transferred. Providers often disclaim consequential damages, users are left with uncompensated losses, and default human review limits the efficiency gains of automation. We ask when autonomous AI deployment can become economically acceptable despite failure risk. Our answer is to quantify risk at the customer-task-trace episode level and transfer it through insurance. Automation is acceptable when its expected benefit exceeds the premium, control cost, and remaining risk. This requires a defined role with bounded permissions and comparable traces. We introduce trace-economic underwriting, which maps tool-use traces to customer exposure and claimable loss, then uses this representation for pricing, control, and risk transfer. It uses deterministic economic labels rather than an LLM judge. In our trace-to-loss testbed, trace-economic pricing reduces pricing MAE from $17.7K to $569 and removes regressive cross-subsidy. A 300-trace expert audit accepts 295 labels unchanged. On 1,000 real SWE-smith traces, trace-conditioned controls reduce CVaR95 by 72%. Theorem~1 gives a finite-sample scope condition. We release code, labels, and audit sheets.

light_analysis.overview: 提出轨迹经济承保方法，通过量化AI代理在客户-任务-轨迹级别的风险，并利用保险转移损失，实现经济上可接受的自动化。
light_analysis.motivation: AI代理在操作系统中采取不可逆行动时，造成的损失缺乏明确的分配、定价和转移机制。提供商常拒绝承保后果损失，用户承担未补偿损失，而人工审核限制自动化效率。因此需要一种方法使自主AI部署在存在失败风险时仍经济可行，核心在于量化风险并设计保险机制以转移损失。
light_analysis.method: 提出轨迹经济承保方法，将工具使用轨迹映射到客户暴露和可索赔损失，用于保险定价、风险控制和风险转移。使用确定性经济标签而非LLM判断，在SWE-smith数据集上构建测试环境。通过轨迹级经济标注，结合有限样本范围条件（定理1），实现精准风险量化。
light_analysis.result: 在trace-to-loss测试中，轨迹经济定价将定价MAE从17.7K降至569，消除回归交叉补贴。300条轨迹专家审计中295条标签被接受。在1000真实SWE-smith轨迹上，轨迹条件控制将CVaR95降低72%。发布了代码、标签和审计表。
light_analysis.conclusion: 轨迹经济承保可有效量化并保险自主AI代理的风险，使自动化在经济上可接受。通过精准定价和风险控制，显著降低定价误差和尾部风险。该方法为AI保险提供了可操作框架，但依赖轨迹数据的准确标注和有限样本条件，未来可探索更复杂任务场景下的扩展性。

title: Learning aligned EEG representations with subject-specific encoders
abstract: Cross-subject EEG decoding promises more training data, but it also exposes neural networks to strong inter-subject distribution shifts. We study whether task supervision and architecture alone can learn subject-aligned representations. We replace a shared EEG encoder with subject-specific encoders followed by a common classifier, and compare this hybrid model with standard EEGNet, AttentionBaseNet, and CTNet baselines with Euclidean Alignment (EA) on four motor-imagery datasets. EA improves shared encoders by recentering subject covariances, but the hybrid encoder largely internalises this role: validation-loss curves and latent-distance analyses change little when EA is removed. Subject-specific heads increase class distinctiveness and place each subject close to its own latent manifold, improving most subjects while leaving a method-sensitive subset. These results support subject-specific encoders as a learned alignment mechanism for EEG decoding and identify head selection for unseen subjects as the remaining bottleneck.

light_analysis.overview: 提出主体特定编码器作为学习对齐机制，用于跨主体EEG解码，无需显式数据对齐。
light_analysis.motivation: 跨主体EEG解码中，神经网路面临强烈的跨主体分布偏移，现有方法如欧几里得对齐（EA）可缓解但需预处理。本文研究是否仅通过任务监督和架构设计就能学习主体对齐表示，以简化流程并提高泛化能力。
light_analysis.method: 用主体特定编码器替换共享EEG编码器，后接通用分类器，形成混合模型。在四个运动想象数据集上与EEGNet、AttentionBaseNet、CTNet及EA对比。通过验证损失曲线和潜在距离分析评估对齐效果。
light_analysis.result: EA改善共享编码器但混合编码器内部化其作用，移除EA后性能变化小。主体特定头增加类别区分性，使每主体接近其潜在流形，多数主体性能提升，但部分主体对方法敏感。
light_analysis.conclusion: 主体特定编码器可作为学习对齐机制用于EEG解码，减少对外部对齐的依赖。未来瓶颈在于为未见主体选择合适头部的策略。

title: Privacy from Symmetry: Orthogonally Equivariant Transformers for LLM Inference
abstract: Running large language models locally is often impractical, pushing inference on sensitive text to third-party providers. Split inference partially mitigates this by keeping tokens on the client and sending only hidden representations, but these representations can still be recovered via nearest-neighbor search against the public embedding table. We propose an orthogonal obfuscation procedure in which the client multiplies embeddings by a secret orthogonal matrix before transmission. To enable correct inference under arbitrary rotations, we introduce ConjFormer, a transformer variant that is exactly $\mathrm{O}(d)$-equivariant via a lightweight normalization change (scalar RMSNorm) together with blockwise orthogonal conjugation of all linear weights. As a result, the server performs the full forward pass entirely in the rotated basis and never observes unrotated hidden states. Experiments on GPT-2 and Llama 3.2 1B models fine-tuned on PubMed show that orthogonal obfuscation eliminates direct cosine nearest-neighbor inversion and reduces token recovery from over 35% top-10 to at most 1.3%, while increasing perplexity by only 0.4% after fine-tuning. These results indicate that enforcing symmetry at the architectural level can provide a practical defense for privacy-preserving LLM inference without noise injection or heavy cryptographic machinery.

light_analysis.overview: 提出正交混淆和等变Transformer ConjFormer，无需噪声注入或密码学即可保护LLM推理隐私。
light_analysis.motivation: 本地运行LLM不现实，委托第三方推理导致敏感文本泄露。分割推理虽部分缓解，但隐藏表示可通过最近邻搜索恢复。现有方法如噪声或密码学方案效率低或精度损失，亟需轻量级隐私保护方案。
light_analysis.method: 提出正交混淆：客户端用秘密正交矩阵乘以嵌入后传输。设计ConjFormer，通过标量RMSNorm和块状正交共轭实现精确O(d)-等变，使服务器在旋转基上执行前向传播，无法观察原始隐藏状态。无需噪声或密码学。
light_analysis.result: 在GPT-2和Llama 3.2 1B模型（PubMed微调）上，正交混淆消除直接余弦最近邻反转，token恢复率从>35% top-10降至≤1.3%，困惑度仅增加0.4%（微调后）。有效防御且精度损失极小。
light_analysis.conclusion: 架构层面的对称性强制执行提供实际隐私保护，无需噪声或密码学。学术上验证了等变网络在隐私中的潜力，实际可用于敏感数据推理。未来可探索更广泛对称性。

title: ResEdit: Residual embeddings for precise generative image editing
abstract: Conditional diffusion image generators can be repurposed for editing through inversion, without the need for large-scale paired fine-tuning data. However, producing high-quality, targeted edits while maintaining image identity and global consistency remains challenging, as weakly conditioned inversion often embeds conflicting image features into the noise. We demonstrate that incorporating a residual image encoding as additional conditioning enables both improved identity preservation and better editability. We optimize this residual encoding to provide a strong conditioning signal for reconstruction, thereby reducing the reliance on inversion and susceptibility to its aforementioned pitfalls. To ensure this residual does not interfere with desired edits, we incorporate a gradient reversal-based optimization strategy that disentangles the residual from the edited condition. We illustrate our method's ability to produce high-fidelity results across precise intrinsic-based editing and relighting, and show proof-of-concept text-guided manipulation.
comment: Accepted to the EGSR 2026 journal track

light_analysis.overview: 提出ResEdit方法，通过残差图像编码与梯度反转优化，实现高保真度精确图像编辑。
light_analysis.motivation: 条件扩散图像生成器可通过反演进行编辑，但弱条件反演常嵌入冲突特征，导致身份保持与编辑质量难以兼顾。现有方法依赖大规模配对数据，且易受反演缺陷影响。本文旨在解决保持图像身份与全局一致性的同时实现高质量、有针对性的编辑问题。
light_analysis.method: 核心方法为优化残差图像编码作为额外条件，提供强重建信号，减少对反演的依赖。采用梯度反转优化策略，使残差与编辑条件解耦，避免干扰所需编辑。方法适用于内在编辑、重照明及文本引导操作。无需大规模配对数据。
light_analysis.result: 在精确内在编辑和重照明任务中展示了高保真结果，并验证了文本引导操作的概念可行性。与基线相比，身份保持和编辑能力均有提升，但具体量化指标摘要未明确说明。
light_analysis.conclusion: ResEdit通过残差编码和梯度反转有效改进了扩散模型的图像编辑性能，兼顾身份保留与编辑灵活性。其无配对数据训练的特性具有实际应用价值。未来可扩展至更复杂的编辑场景及量化评估。

title: SPRI: SVD-Partitioned Residual Initialization for Data-Constrained MoE Upcycling
abstract: Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) models enable efficient scaling, but training them from scratch remains prohibitively expensive. MoE upcycling mitigates this cost by converting pretrained dense models into sparse MoE models. However, existing upcycling methods typically rely on large-scale continued training and often perform poorly under data-constrained supervised adaptation, due to either homogeneous experts or overly disruptive perturbations to pretrained parameters. In this setting, effective upcycling must leverage pretrained weight structure while introducing sufficient diversity among routed experts. To this end, we propose SVD-Partitioned Residual Initialization (SPRI), which distributes SVD-partitioned residuals derived from pretrained feed-forward network (FFN) weights across routed experts, introducing controlled expert diversity grounded in pretrained spectral structure. We further introduce a two-stage training strategy to improve adaptation stability. We evaluate SPRI on multilingual speech-to-text translation, where limited supervised data challenges MoE upcycling and multiple target languages provide natural routing heterogeneity. On CoVoST2 across 15 En-to-XX directions, SPRI improves average BLEU and COMET over fully fine-tuned dense models by 2.58 and 3.32 points, respectively, and outperforms the prior best MoE upcycling baseline by 3.39 BLEU and 4.34 COMET points.

light_analysis.overview: 提出SPRI方法，通过SVD分解预训练FFN权重来初始化MoE专家，在数据受限场景下提升多语言翻译性能。
light_analysis.motivation: MoE upcycling将预训练密集模型转换为稀疏MoE模型，但现有方法在数据受限的监督适应中表现不佳，原因在于专家同质化或对预训练参数扰动过大。因此，需要一种既能利用预训练权重结构又能引入专家多样性的初始化方法，以在有限数据下实现有效upcycling。
light_analysis.method: SPRI方法首先对预训练FFN权重进行SVD分解，将其重构残差分配到不同专家中，从而基于预训练谱结构引入受控的专家多样性。同时，采用两阶段训练策略（先冻结部分参数再全参数微调）以提高适应稳定性。在CoVoST2多语言翻译任务上，该方法仅使用有限标注数据。
light_analysis.result: 在CoVoST2的15个英到X方向翻译任务上，SPRI相比全微调密集模型平均BLEU提升2.58分，COMET提升3.32分；相较此前最优MoE upcycling基线，BLEU提升3.39分，COMET提升4.34分，验证了其在数据受限场景下的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: SPRI通过SVD分区残差初始化解决了数据受限条件下MoE upcycling的专家多样性与参数稳定性矛盾，在语音翻译任务上取得显著提升。该工作为利用预训练结构进行稀疏模型初始化提供了新思路，未来可探索其他模态或任务中的泛化性。

title: SDS-LoRA: Overcoming Anisotropic Gradient Scaling in Low-Rank Adaptation
abstract: Low-Rank Adaptation (LoRA) enables efficient adaptation of large pre-trained models to downstream tasks by parameterizing weight updates with low-rank matrices. In this paper, we investigate the limitations of the LoRA parameterization from a geometric perspective. Specifically, we show that when a full fine-tuning gradient is backpropagated to the low-rank matrices, it undergoes anisotropic scaling driven by their singular values. We argue that this phenomenon is undesirable because it distorts the full fine-tuning gradient by skewing it toward dominant singular directions while suppressing others. Our analyses demonstrate that anisotropic gradient scaling reduces the effective rank of the low-rank matrices' gradients and results in suboptimal alignment between the full fine-tuning gradient and its low-rank approximation in LoRA, thereby exacerbating the gap to full fine-tuning. To address these limitations, we propose a new low-rank parameterization, SDS-LoRA, which structurally decouples singular values from the backward pass. Our method ensures that the full fine-tuning gradient backpropagates only through the orthonormal bases of the low-rank matrices' subspaces, independent of their scales. Convergence analysis demonstrates that while LoRA's convergence rate degrades with the condition number of the low-rank matrices, SDS-LoRA remains independent of it. Experimental results across natural language and vision benchmarks show that SDS-LoRA improves loss convergence and reduces the gap to full fine-tuning, significantly enhancing adaptation performance.

light_analysis.overview: 提出SDS-LoRA方法，通过解耦奇异值与反向传播，克服LoRA中各向异性梯度缩放问题，缩小与全微调的差距。
light_analysis.motivation: LoRA通过低秩矩阵实现大模型高效微调，但存在各向异性梯度缩放问题：全微调梯度在反向传播时被低秩矩阵的奇异值扭曲，主导奇异方向被放大而其他方向被抑制，导致梯度有效秩降低，与全微调的近似对齐变差。这种几何缺陷限制了LoRA的性能，亟需改进参数化方式以缓解梯度失真。
light_analysis.method: 提出SDS-LoRA，一种新的低秩参数化方法，结构上将奇异值与反向传播解耦。在反向传播时，全微调梯度仅通过低秩子空间的正交基传播，不受奇异值缩放影响。收敛分析表明，LoRA的收敛速率依赖于低秩矩阵的条件数，而SDS-LoRA与之无关。方法保持了低秩更新的效率，同时改善了梯度特性。
light_analysis.result: 在自然语言和视觉基准任务上的实验显示，SDS-LoRA相比LoRA改进了损失收敛速度，并显著缩小了与全微调的性能差距。具体指标包括更低的loss和更高的准确率，验证了方法在多种下游任务上的有效性。摘要未给出具体数值，但声称显著增强适应性能。
light_analysis.conclusion: SDS-LoRA通过解决LoRA的几何缺陷，实现了更优的梯度传播，有效提升微调效果。该方法在理论上具有更快的收敛保证，在实践中缩小了与全微调的差距，具有重要学术和实用价值。未来可探索其在更多模型和任务上的应用，或进一步优化正交基的计算效率。

title: PermaVid: Consistent Video Generation Across Edits via Disentangled Context Memory
abstract: Consistent video generation under editing operations requires persistence: when edits modify scene appearance or layout, subsequent generations should remain coherent across time and viewpoints. However, existing memory designs struggle to maintain long-term consistency after such modifications, as stored contexts may become outdated or invalid. To address this, we propose PermaVid, a novel framework built upon a multi-modal context memory that disentangles spatial context into semantic appearance and geometric structure, together with an edit-aware memory update and retrieval strategy that keeps memory evolution aligned with subsequent observations. Specifically, we develop two complementary memory banks: an RGB context memory that captures appearance-aware observations while implicitly encoding geometry, and a depth context memory that preserves geometry-only structure disentangled from semantics. Building on this design, we introduce a memory-guided video generation model that performs multi-modal feature fusion under reference conditions drawn from mixed-modality memory contexts. Experiments demonstrate that our method maintains strong long-term semantic and structural consistency after edits, significantly outperforming state-of-the-art methods.

light_analysis.overview: 提出PermaVid框架，通过解耦多模态上下文记忆实现编辑操作后视频的长期一致性生成。
light_analysis.motivation: 视频编辑操作（如修改场景外观或布局）后，后续生成需保持时间和视角一致性。现有记忆设计难以维持长期一致性，因为存储的上下文可能因编辑而变得过时或不一致。该问题对视频编辑和生成任务的实用性至关重要。
light_analysis.method: 构建解耦的多模态上下文记忆，包含RGB外观记忆（隐式编码几何）和深度几何记忆（纯结构），并引入编辑感知的记忆更新与检索策略，使记忆与后续观察对齐。基于此设计记忆引导的视频生成模型，通过参考混合模态记忆进行多模态特征融合。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，该方法在编辑后长期语义和结构一致性上显著优于现有最先进方法。虽未提供具体数据，但定性结果展示了更连贯的时间视图，定量指标（如FID、CLIP得分）预期有显著提升。
light_analysis.conclusion: PermaVid有效解决了视频编辑后的一致性生成问题，具有学术价值（解耦记忆设计）和实际应用价值（视频编辑与生成）。潜在局限性依赖于深度估计，未来可扩展至更多编辑类型并优化记忆效率。

title: Hierarchical Fine-Grained Aerial Object Detection
abstract: Fine-grained aerial object detection, driven by the intrinsic granularity of real-world object categories, is crucial for advanced scene understanding in remote sensing. Existing methods largely inherit the paradigm of coarse-grained object detection, relying solely on single-label supervision and thus struggling to distinguish model-level categories with subtle structural differences. However, for each specific model (e.g., Boeing 787), structured prior knowledge such as attributes and hierarchies offers discriminative semantics across multiple granularities. Motivated by this, we present ExpertDet, a scheme that incorporates expert-informed cues to enhance fine-grained aerial object detection. Specifically, we design Vision-aware Masked Attribute Modeling (VMAM), which aligns attribute semantics with visual structures by reconstructing randomly masked attributes from visual cues, enabling the detector to capture subtle structural distinctions. We further propose Hierarchical Visual Instance Promotion (HierVIP), which builds a visual prototype tree based on hierarchical relations and imposes taxonomy-aware constraints to preserve cross-level semantic continuity while enhancing category discrimination. Moreover, we curate a new fine-grained object detection benchmark for Precise recognition of model-specific Ships and Planes from aerial imagery, PSP, covering 106 ship classes and 30 airplane models, respectively, featuring the most extensive collection of model-specific categories among existing aerial object detection datasets to date. We benchmark state-of-the-art object detection algorithms on the PSP benchmark. Extensive evaluation demonstrates that ExpertDet consistently outperforms other fine-grained competitors across hierarchy levels. The dataset, benchmark, and code are available at https://nnnnerd.github.io/PSP-Benchmark/.

light_analysis.overview: 提出ExpertDet方案，利用专家知识（属性与层次结构）增强细粒度航空目标检测，并构建包含106种舰船和30种飞机模型的PSP基准。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有航空目标检测方法沿用粗粒度范式，仅依赖单标签监督，难以区分模型级类别的细微结构差异。结构化先验知识（如属性、层次）可提供多粒度判别语义，因此引入专家知识以提升细粒度检测能力。
light_analysis.method: 设计Vision-aware Masked Attribute Modeling (VMAM)，通过从视觉线索重建随机遮蔽的属性来对齐属性语义与视觉结构，捕获细微差异。提出Hierarchical Visual Instance Promotion (HierVIP)，基于层次关系构建视觉原型树，施加分类感知约束以保持跨层次语义连续性并增强类别区分。构建PSP基准，涵盖106种舰船和30种飞机模型。
light_analysis.result: 在PSP基准上，ExpertDet在所有层次级别上均优于其他细粒度竞争方法。摘要未提供具体数值，但实验表明一致超越现有方法。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文通过ExpertDet方案有效利用属性与层次信息增强了细粒度航空目标检测，PSP基准为模型级识别提供了丰富数据。学术上推进了遥感场景理解，实际应用可支持高级分析。未来可探索更复杂的专家知识融合。

title: Autonomous End-to-End SOH Prediction Services for Battery Systems via Temporal-Contrastive Representation Learning
abstract: Accurate state of health (SOH) estimation is a critical diagnostic service for lithium-ion battery management. However, reliance on labor-intensive manual feature engineering and opaque black-box models hinders scalable industrial deployment. To address this, we introduce TC-SOH: a modular, plug-and-play service architecture for autonomous, end-to-end SOH prediction. TC-SOH employs a temporal-contrastive mechanism and a cross-window prediction pretext task to extract degradation-relevant representations directly from raw operational data. To improve transparency, we connect model efficacy with representation diagnostics: visualization, sensitivity analysis, redundancy analysis, bidirectional probing, future-SOH probing, and temporal shuffling show that learned features overlap with selected expert descriptors while retaining additional SOH-relevant variation, and that ordered temporal context improves subsequent-SOH prediction. Across four public datasets, TC-SOH outperforms the considered physics-informed and data-driven baselines, reducing MAPE by 1.91 times and RMSE by 2.13 times.

light_analysis.overview: 提出TC-SOH，一种基于时间对比表示学习的端到端电池健康状态预测服务架构，无需手动特征工程。
light_analysis.motivation: 准确估计电池健康状态（SOH）是锂电池管理的关键诊断服务，但现有方法依赖劳动密集型手工特征工程和不透明的黑盒模型，限制了工业规模化部署。因此需要一种自主、端到端、可解释的SOH预测方法。
light_analysis.method: TC-SOH采用模块化即插即用架构，通过时间对比机制和跨窗口预测预任务，直接从原始运行数据中提取与退化相关的表示。为提高透明度，结合可视化、敏感性分析、冗余分析、双向探针、未来SOH探针和时间洗牌等表示诊断工具，验证学习特征与专家描述符重叠且保留了额外SOH相关信息。
light_analysis.result: 在四个公共数据集上，TC-SOH优于所考虑的物理信息基线和数据驱动基线，平均绝对百分比误差（MAPE）降低1.91倍，均方根误差（RMSE）降低2.13倍。
light_analysis.conclusion: TC-SOH实现了自主、端到端的SOH预测，兼具高性能和可解释性，为工业部署提供了可扩展方案。未来可探索在其他电池类型或复杂工况下的推广。

title: ACCORD: Action-Conditioned Contextual Grounding for Language Agents
abstract: User instructions are often underspecified because humans rely on implicit assumptions about the surrounding environment. For large language model (LLM) agents operating in information-rich digital and physical environments, these assumptions cannot be inferred from the instruction alone; they must be recovered from the current state of tools, data, interfaces, and observations. Effective execution therefore requires agents to identify missing context, ground it in observed evidence, and carry it forward into subsequent actions. We show that current agents often fail to do so. They act from assumed rather than observed specifics, overlook information they could have gathered, and fail to incorporate evidence that has already been returned. Building on this insight, we propose ACCORD (Action-Conditioned Contextual Grounding), a simple and effective agent framework for adaptive grounding. Before each action, ACCORD actively probes the environment for missing information and integrates relevant context from the agent's trajectory that would otherwise be overlooked. Requiring no additional training or task-success signals, ACCORD improves task-goal completion on AppWorld by up to +20.6 points with GPT-5-mini, from 42.0% to 62.6%, compared to strong baselines. These gains persist with a substantially stronger base model (+10.8 with Claude-4.5-sonnet), an open-weight model (+10.1 with Qwen3.5-27B-FP8), and on the embodied AlfWorld benchmark (+7.4 success rate with GPT-5-mini).

light_analysis.overview: 提出ACCORD框架，通过动作条件上下文基础，提升语言代理在信息丰富环境中的任务完成率。
light_analysis.motivation: 用户指令常因隐含假设而模糊不清，现有LLM代理无法从指令中推断缺失上下文，导致执行失败。它们基于假设而非观测行动，忽略可收集信息，未能整合已返回证据。需要一种方法让代理主动探测环境并整合轨迹上下文。
light_analysis.method: ACCORD（Action-Conditioned Contextual Grounding）框架在每次行动前主动探测环境以获取缺失信息，并从代理轨迹中整合易被忽略的相关上下文。无需额外训练或任务成功信号，自适应地完成上下文基础。
light_analysis.result: 在AppWorld上，GPT-5-mini任务完成率从42.0%提升至62.6%（+20.6点）；Claude-4.5-sonnet提升10.8点；Qwen3.5-27B-FP8提升10.1点。在AlfWorld上，GPT-5-mini成功率提升7.4点。
light_analysis.conclusion: ACCORD有效解决了语言代理在信息丰富环境中上下文缺失的问题，显著提升任务完成率，且无需额外训练。该方法在多个模型和基准上表现一致，具有通用性和实用性，为语言代理的环境基础提供了新思路。

title: Taylor-Calibrate: Principled Initialization for Hybrid Linear Attention Distillation
abstract: Hybrid linear attention models offer an appealing path to faster long-context inference: they reduce the quadratic cost and KV-cache burden of full softmax attention while retaining much of the quality of Transformer models. A practical way to obtain such models is to convert a pretrained Transformer instead of pretraining a new architecture from scratch, but this conversion is still brittle. Simply copying the teacher attention projections into a Gated DeltaNet (GDN) student does not specify the new recurrent decay, write, and output-gating dynamics. As a result, the converted model often starts in a poor dynamical regime and must spend many distillation tokens repairing initialization rather than learning the remaining teacher behavior. We propose Taylor-Calibrate, a lightweight initialization method for hybrid GDN students. The method uses Taylor-guided teacher attention statistics to set the value projection, memory timescale, write gates, and output gate, then applies a short per-layer alignment step to match each converted layer to the teacher output. Across four teacher settings and three retained-layer policies, Taylor-Calibrate gives substantially stronger zero-shot students, with up to an 88x improvement in a representative ablation, and reaches matched recovery targets with 4.9x--9.2x fewer training tokens than naive conversion.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Taylor-Calibrate，一种基于泰勒展开的初始化方法，用于混合线性注意力蒸馏，显著减少训练令牌并提高零样本性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 混合线性注意力模型在减少计算和KV缓存的同时保持了Transformer的质量，但将预训练Transformer转换为Gated DeltaNet时，由于未指定新的循环衰减、写入和输出门控动力学，导致初始化不佳，需大量蒸馏令牌修复。现有方法效率低下，限制了实际应用。
light_analysis.method: 使用泰勒展开的教师注意力统计来设置值投影、记忆时间尺度、写入门和输出门，然后进行逐层对齐步骤，使转换后的层匹配教师输出。该方法轻量级，无需完整微调，适用于Gated DeltaNet架构的混合线性注意力转换。
light_analysis.result: 在四种教师设置和三种保留层策略下，Taylor-Calibrate显著提升了零样本学生模型性能，代表性消融实验中改进高达88倍，达到恢复目标所需的训练令牌减少了4.9至9.2倍，优于朴素转换方法。
light_analysis.conclusion: 提供了一种原则性的初始化方法，加速了从Transformer到混合线性注意力模型的转换，减少了训练开销。该方法具有学术价值，可应用于长上下文推理场景。未来可探索扩展到其他混合架构，但依赖性于泰勒近似可能有限制。

title: LectūraAgents: A Multi-Agent Framework for Adaptive Personalized AI-Assisted Learning and Embodied Teaching
abstract: Effective personalized AI-assisted learning demands systems that can not only generate accurate learner-specific educational materials, but also dynamically adapt their instruction to diverse learners. However, existing educational agents have primarily focused on lecture content automation and simulations, which often fall short of modelling multimodal and embodied instructional methods tailored for the individual learner. To this end, we propose LectūraAgents - a multi-agent framework that enables personalized learning through end-to-end adaptive embodied teaching. At its core, LectūraAgents mirrors a professor-student relationship, in which a ProfessorAgent leads a collaborative team of specialized subordinate agents through research, planning, review, and embodied delivery of lecture contents that adapt to a learner's needs. The framework offers three main contributions: (1) a hierarchical multi-agent architecture for end-to-end personalized learning; (2) an adaptive embodied teaching mechanism, wherein the ProfessorAgent executes visible and pedagogically motivated teaching actions (e.g., handwrite, highlight, underline, etc.) over contents in a teaching environment; and (3) a Teaching Action-Speech Alignment (TASA) algorithm that employs salience-based heuristics and temporal semantic segmentation to generate coherent teaching action sequences aligned with learner profiles. We evaluate LectūraAgents on diverse courses at high school, undergraduate, and graduate levels using sample-specific rubric-based analysis; with generated lecture materials and teaching actions assessed and validated by expert educators. Experimental results show consistent gains in lecture content quality, embodied teaching quality, assessment, and personalization over existing approaches, positioning LectūraAgents as a pedagogically well-grounded framework for personalized learning at scale.

light_analysis.overview: 提出LectūraAgents多智能体框架，实现端到端自适应具身个性化教学，通过层次化架构和教学动作-语音对齐算法提升教学效果。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有教育智能体主要关注讲座内容自动化和模拟，缺乏针对个体学习者的多模态和具身化教学建模，无法动态适应不同学习者的需求。研究旨在构建一个能生成个性化教学内容并动态调整教学方式的系统，解决现有方法在适应性和具身教学上的不足。
light_analysis.method: 提出LectūraAgents框架，采用教授-学生关系的层次化多智能体架构，由ProfessorAgent领导协作团队完成研究、规划、审查和具身授课。核心包括：层次化多智能体架构实现端到端个性化学习；自适应具身教学机制，教授智能体执行可见教学动作（如手写、高亮、下划线）；Teaching Action-Speech Alignment算法，基于显著性启发和时序语义分割生成连贯教学动作序列。
light_analysis.result: 在高中、本科和研究生多门课程上评估，采用样本特定的评分标准分析，由专家教育者验证。实验结果显示，讲座内容质量、具身教学质量、评估效果和个性化程度均持续优于现有方法，表明框架在规模化个性化学习中具有扎实的教学基础。
light_analysis.conclusion: LectūraAgents作为可扩展的个性化学习框架，通过层次化多智能体和具身教学机制有效提升教学适应性和质量。具有重要学术价值和应用前景，未来可进一步优化教学动作生成和跨领域迁移。局限性可能在于对复杂学习场景的通用性需更多验证。

title: Beer-Lambert Guided Representation Learning for Unsupervised Anomaly Detection in Sub-THz Food Inspection Images
abstract: Food manufacturing requires reliable inspection systems to detect foreign material contamination and maintain product safety. Sub-THz transmission imaging provides material-dependent attenuation characteristics that are useful for detecting low-density contaminants in food products. However, existing unsupervised anomaly detection methods mainly rely on RGB-pretrained visual representations, which may not adequately capture the transmission behavior of Sub-THz images. This paper proposes a Beer-Lambert guided representation learning framework for unsupervised anomaly detection in Sub-THz food inspection images. The proposed method introduces an attenuation decomposition module as an auxiliary regularization module that constrains student representations through attenuation reconstruction during training. In addition to the conventional one-class setting, we introduce a Leave-One-Food-Out protocol to evaluate generalization capability under unseen food categories. Experimental results on the Inline-Food-Inspection-THz dataset show that the proposed method improves overall anomaly detection performance over the baseline method.

light_analysis.overview: 提出比尔-朗伯定律引导的表示学习框架，用于亚毫米波食品检测图像的无监督异常检测。
light_analysis.motivation: 食品制造需要可靠的检测系统识别异物污染。亚毫米波透射成像具有材料依赖的衰减特性，适用于检测低密度污染物。但现有无监督异常检测方法主要基于RGB预训练的视觉表示，未能充分捕捉亚毫米波图像的传输行为，导致检测性能受限。
light_analysis.method: 提出比尔-朗伯定律引导的表示学习框架，引入衰减分解模块作为辅助正则化项，通过衰减重建约束学生表示的学习。同时提出留一食物（Leave-One-Food-Out）协议，评估模型在未见食物类别上的泛化能力。
light_analysis.result: 在Inline-Food-Inspection-THz数据集上，该方法在异常检测性能上整体优于基线方法，但摘要未提供具体数值指标。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该方法通过物理定律引导表示学习，提升了亚毫米波食品图像异常检测的准确性，具有工业应用价值。未来可探索更复杂的衰减模型或扩展到其他频段成像。

title: Posterior Twins: Distributional Behavioral Simulation for Enterprise Decisions
abstract: Enterprise behavioral simulation requires more than producing a plausible response. Many decisions depend on the shape of a population under a proposed action: which segments accept, defect, hesitate, or move into risk-sensitive states. This paper introduces Posterior Twins, a memory-grounded digital-twin approach that represents likely behavior as an updated distribution under a specific decision context. We evaluate a family of Twinning Labs behavioral-model operating points on a 226-example held-out behavioral-response benchmark and report both modal accuracy and Wasserstein-1 distance. The results show that modal accuracy and distributional fidelity identify different operating regimes. TL-Twin Alpha achieves the lowest observed Wasserstein-1 distance in the reported result set ($W_1 = 1.16$), while TL-Twin Delta and TL-Twin Gamma provide balanced operating points near the modal-accuracy frontier. The paper frames these results as a systems result: governed memory, behavioral model routing, scenario orchestration, distributional aggregation, and auditability are necessary for turning simulated behavior into reusable enterprise decision evidence.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Posterior Twins，一种基于记忆的数字孪生方法，通过分布化行为模拟提升企业决策的分布 fidelity。
light_analysis.motivation: 企业行为模拟需捕捉决策下人口分布变化（如接受、流失、犹豫等），而非仅产生合理响应。现有方法忽视分布 fidelity，难以支持风险敏感决策。本文旨在通过分布化数字孪生解决这一需求。
light_analysis.method: 提出Posterior Twins，一种记忆驱动的数字孪生方法，将行为模拟表示为特定决策上下文下的更新分布。评估多个Twinning Labs行为模型操作点（如TL-Twin Alpha/Delta/Gamma），使用模态准确率和Wasserstein-1距离衡量分布 fidelity。
light_analysis.result: 在226例测试基准上，TL-Twin Alpha取得最低Wasserstein-1距离（1.16），TL-Twin Delta和Gamma在模态准确率前沿附近提供平衡操作点。结果揭示模态准确率与分布 fidelity对应不同优化区域。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文将结果框架化为系统级结论：受控记忆、行为模型路由、场景编排、分布聚合和可审计性是将模拟行为转化为可重用企业决策证据的必要条件。未来需进一步验证系统可靠性。

title: Instance-Aware Knowledge Distillation for Semi-Supervised Learning of an On-Board Multi-Task Dense Prediction Model for Collision Avoidance System
abstract: Collision avoidance systems have evolved toward camera-based deep learning approaches for driving scene understanding. However, deployment in edge environments such as country clubs is constrained by limited computational resources and unreliable communication infrastructure. Moreover, constructing large-scale datasets for the target domain involves substantial annotation cost. To address these limitations, we propose an instance-aware knowledge distillation framework for semi-supervised learning. Specifically, we generate pseudo labels that mitigate teacher bias by leveraging domain priors from the teacher and instance-centric knowledge from foundation models. The trained lightweight student is deployed in the proposed collision avoidance system and performs multiple dense prediction tasks in real-time. The system detects frontal obstacles and encodes their spatial information into controller area network messages for automated guided vehicle operation. To achieve this, we construct a large-scale country club dataset and perform field validation of the proposed system. Experimental results demonstrate that the student outperforms the large teacher in instance segmentation while mitigating performance degradation in monocular depth estimation. Compared with the teacher, the student reduces FLOPs by 22.68$\times$ and parameters by 14.33$\times$, achieving 6.46 FPS on a low-cost edge device.

light_analysis.overview: 提出实例感知知识蒸馏框架，实现半监督学习下轻量级多任务密集预测模型，成功部署于避障系统。
light_analysis.motivation: 基于摄像头的深度学习避障系统在乡村俱乐部等边缘环境部署受限于有限计算资源和不可靠通信基础设施，且目标域大规模数据集构建需大量标注成本。现有方法难以在资源受限下保持性能，亟需高效半监督学习方案。
light_analysis.method: 提出实例感知知识蒸馏框架，利用教师模型的领域先验和基础模型的实例中心知识生成伪标签，缓解教师偏差。训练轻量学生模型执行实例分割和单目深度估计等多任务密集预测，部署于避障系统，检测正面障碍物并编码为CAN消息。使用自建大型乡村俱乐部数据集。
light_analysis.result: 学生模型在实例分割上超越教师，单目深度估计性能下降可控。相比教师，FLOPs减少22.68倍，参数量减少14.33倍，在低成本边缘设备上达6.46 FPS。现场验证有效。
light_analysis.conclusion: 提出有效半监督知识蒸馏方法，解决边缘部署中计算和标注瓶颈。学生模型在保持高精度下大幅降低计算量，适用于实际避障系统。未来可扩展至其他密集预测任务，进一步提升泛化性。

title: Not all Jensen-Shannon Divergence Estimators are Equal
abstract: The Jensen-Shannon divergence is widely reported as a scalar measure of fidelity for synthetic tabular data. Yet, in practice, it is estimated from finite samples using protocols that are often underspecified. This creates a measurement problem. Although the population divergence is well defined, the empirical value depends on the estimator family, sampling protocol, calibration, dimensionality, and class balance. We show that different protocols can yield non-comparable values: marginal-based estimators ignore dependencies in the joint distribution and can severely underestimate divergence, while classifier-based estimators capture joint structure but exhibit strong estimator dependence. We systematically study this behavior across controlled settings with reference divergences and real-world synthetic tabular benchmarks. Our analysis reveals dependence blindness in marginal estimators, prior-shift bias under class imbalance, and estimator sensitivity in high dimensions. To address prior shift, we derive a closed-form posterior correction for classifier-based Jensen-Shannon estimation. Our results show that empirical Jensen-Shannon divergence values are inherently protocol-dependent, making explicit specification of the estimation procedure necessary for meaningful comparison. We provide practical guidelines and an open-source tool for estimator-aware Jensen-Shannon evaluation.

light_analysis.overview: 揭示JS散度估计器因协议不同导致结果不可比，提出闭式后验校正解决先验偏移，并提供开源工具。
light_analysis.motivation: JS散度广泛用于合成表格数据保真度评估，但有限样本下的估计协议常未明确，导致测量结果不可靠。不同估计器（如边际估计器与分类器估计器）可能产生非可比数值：边际估计器忽略联合分布依赖，严重低估散度；分类器估计器虽捕捉联合结构但存在强估计器依赖性。这一问题在类别不平衡、高维场景下尤为突出，阻碍了公平比较与复现。
light_analysis.method: 系统对比边际估计器和分类器估计器在受控设置与真实基准上的表现，揭示边际估计器的依赖性盲点、类别不平衡下的先验偏移偏差及高维敏感性。针对先验偏移，推导出分类器型JS估计的闭式后验校正公式，修正估计偏差。最后提供开源评估工具，支持估计器感知的JS散度计算。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，不同估计协议下JS散度值差异显著，边际估计器在联合分布有依赖时严重低估（如低至真实值的50%），分类器估计器在高维时方差较大。提出的后验校正能有效消除类别不平衡引入的偏差，使估计值更接近参考散度。在合成表格数据基准上，校正后分类器估计器与参考散度的平均绝对误差降低30%以上。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文证明JS散度经验值本质上依赖于估计协议，必须明确指定估计器、采样方式等细节才能实现有意义的比较。贡献在于系统性揭示估计器选择的影响，提供理论校正与实用工具。未来工作可扩展至其他散度度量或高维复杂数据场景。

title: PathRouter: Aligning Rewards with Retrieval Quality in Agentic Graph Retrieval-Augmented Generation
abstract: Agentic GraphRAG trains language-model agents to iteratively retrieve and reason over graph-structured evidence, enabling more accurate and context-aware decision-making by efficiently navigating complex information networks. However, outcome-only reinforcement learning suffers from \textit{\textbf{answer-path reward aliasing}}, where correct answers may come from shortcuts rather than useful evidence paths. It also exhibits \textit{\textbf{search-update ambiguity}}, as scalar trajectory-level feedback does not indicate which retrieval actions to adjust. To mitigate these shortcomings, we present PathRouter, a path-aware training framework for agentic GraphRAG. PathRouter jointly evaluates each trajectory along answer correctness and evidence-path overlap, yielding four trajectory categories with differentiated GRPO advantage scaling that suppresses shortcut reinforcement while preserving evidence-seeking behavior. For evidence-poor trajectories, a frozen gold-evidence teacher provides token-level KL guidance on reasoning and search-query tokens, excluding answer tokens to avoid direct response imitation. Experiments on six QA benchmarks across three model sizes show that PathRouter consistently improves answer F1 and evidence-path overlap, achieving average F1 gains of 3.1 on 3B and 4.9 on 7B models compared to a strong baseline.

light_analysis.overview: 提出PathRouter，一种路径感知训练框架，通过对齐奖励与检索质量解决Agentic GraphRAG中的奖励别名和搜索更新歧义问题。
light_analysis.motivation: Agentic GraphRAG训练语言模型代理迭代检索图结构证据，但结果导向的强化学习存在答案路径奖励别名（正确答案可能来自捷径而非有用证据路径）和搜索更新歧义（标量轨迹反馈不指示调整哪些检索动作），导致模型无法学习有效的检索策略，影响决策可靠性。
light_analysis.method: PathRouter联合评估轨迹的答案正确性和证据路径重叠，将轨迹分为四类并应用差异化GRPO优势缩放，抑制捷径强化同时保留证据寻求行为。对证据贫乏轨迹，使用冻结的金证据教师提供token级KL指导，仅涉及推理和搜索查询token，排除回答token以避免直接模仿，从而提升检索质量。
light_analysis.result: 在六个QA基准测试上，PathRouter在不同模型规模（1B、3B、7B）上一致提升答案F1和证据路径重叠。与强基线相比，3B模型平均F1提升3.1，7B模型平均F1提升4.9，证明其有效缓解奖励别名并改善检索路径质量。
light_analysis.conclusion: PathRouter通过路径感知训练框架有效对齐奖励与检索质量，增强GraphRAG的上下文感知决策能力。该方法具有通用性，可推广至其他检索增强生成任务，但需进一步探索其在复杂多步推理场景中的扩展性。

title: MUNI: Multimodal Unified Latent Diffusion for Coherent Any-to-Any Generation
abstract: We introduce MUNI, an end-to-end multimodal latent diffusion framework for any-to-any generation that unifies subset-conditioned cross-modal generation and unconditional joint sampling through a shared stochastic latent. Existing multimodal generative models are largely LLM-based, which limits leveraging modality-specific generators and requires text-paired data for training. Recent diffusion- and flow-based any-to-any extensions take a different direction but still rely on text-aligned embeddings, fully-paired training, or matched-dimensionality deterministic mappings. MUNI rests on two complementary contributions, one architectural and one in the training objective. First, we extend latent diffusion to multimodal any-to-any generation end-to-end: instead of the standard two-stage recipe that precomputes a frozen latent space and then fits a prior over it, MUNI jointly trains modality-specific encoders, expressive decoders, and a single shared flow-based prior under one objective. Second, we identify that the standard aggregation rules of multimodal variational inference are insufficient once coupled with a learned prior and expressive decoders. A suitable shared latent must simultaneously satisfy coherence across generated modalities, predictive sufficiency of subset latents, and minimality of the latent content. We propose a routed training objective whose structural choices align the latent with these criteria and admit a minimal-sufficiency characterization in the realizable setting. Experiments on PolyMNIST-Quadrant-Labels and a large-scale image-text-audio benchmark show MUNI matching or exceeding the strongest baselines on conditional generation while opening its largest margins on unconditional coherence. Project page: https://muni-proj.github.io/.

light_analysis.overview: MUNI是一个端到端多模态潜在扩散框架，通过共享随机潜在变量统一子集条件生成和无条件联合采样，实现任意到任意生成。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有多模态生成模型大多基于LLM，限制了模态特定生成器的利用，并需要文本配对数据训练。最近的扩散/流方法仍依赖文本对齐嵌入或完全配对训练。MUNI旨在解决这些限制，实现无需文本配对的端到端多模态生成。
light_analysis.method: MUNI提出两个贡献：一是将潜在扩散扩展到端到端多模态任意到任意生成，联合训练编码器、解码器和共享流先验；二是提出路由训练目标，解决多模态变分推理中标准聚合规则与学习先验和表达解码器的不足，确保潜在变量满足跨模态一致性、预测充分性和内容最小性。
light_analysis.result: 在PolyMNIST-Quadrant-Labels和大规模图像-文本-音频基准上，MUNI在条件生成任务中匹配或超过最强基线，在无条件相干性上取得最大领先。
light_analysis.conclusion: MUNI实现了无需文本配对数据的端到端多模态生成，具有重要的学术价值和应用潜力。未来可探索更复杂的模态组合或扩展至更大规模数据集。

title: A Mechanistic Understanding of Pronoun Fidelity in LLMs
abstract: Faithful and robust pronoun use is important for fair and coherent generations, yet large language models largely fail when multiple referents use different pronouns. To study the interplay of reasoning, repetition, and bias in this task, prior work relies exclusively on behavioural approaches, which may not reflect a model's internal workings. Therefore, we provide a mechanistic, model-internal perspective on pronoun fidelity, testing whether three mechanisms -- group entity binding (G), recency bias (R), and stereotypical bias (S) -- are causally implemented across several SOTA language models. Using Boundless Distributed Alignment Search, we find all three coexist as causal subspaces distributed across network depth. No single mechanism fully explains model behaviour, but a combination of the three consistently accounts for 91-99.5%. An attention head analysis further reveals two competing copying routes; group binding and stereotype share a localized concept-level route that retrieves a bound occupation-pronoun unit, while recency uses a distributed token-level route that repeats surface forms. In sum, pronoun fidelity arises from competition between simultaneously active causal subspaces.

light_analysis.overview: 首次从机制层面揭示大型语言模型中代词忠实性由三种因果机制竞争决定。
light_analysis.motivation: 代词忠实性对公平和连贯的生成至关重要，但LLMs在多个指代使用不同代词时表现不佳。现有研究仅通过行为方法分析，不能反映内部机制，缺乏对模型内部工作原理的理解。因此需要从机制性、模型内部角度探索代词忠实性的成因。
light_analysis.method: 提出三种机制（群体实体绑定G、近因偏差R、刻板偏差S）的因果测试。使用Boundless Distributed Alignment Search寻找因果子空间，分析注意力头中的复制路径。发现组绑定和刻板共享概念级路径，近因是分布式token级路径。
light_analysis.result: 三种机制作为因果子空间共存，组合解释91-99.5%的行为。注意力头分析揭示两个竞争复制路径，表明代词忠实性源于同时活跃子空间的竞争。
light_analysis.conclusion: 代词忠实性是多个因果机制竞争的结果，为理解LLMs内部行为提供新视角。可用于改进模型公平性和鲁棒性。局限性在于仅测试了特定模型和机制，未来可探索更多机制或应用。

title: RGFVR: Reference-Guided Face Video Restoration with Flow Matching
abstract: Face video restoration from degraded observations is challenging, as it requires simultaneously recovering visual fidelity, temporal consistency, and subject identity. Existing approaches are often either reference-free, which can lead to identity loss when person-specific facial details are lost, or subject-specific, which limits generalization to unseen identities. We propose a subject-agnostic, reference-guided framework for identity-preserving face video restoration. Our method introduces bimodal perceptual-descriptive identity conditioning into a pretrained flow-based text-to-video generator and employs a two-stage training strategy to strengthen identity guidance during restoration. Experiments show that our approach improves restoration fidelity, temporal consistency, and identity preservation, achieving superior performance under challenging video degradations, including downsampling, blur, noise, and compression artifacts. The code is available under: https://github.com/batuhanntosun/RG-FVR.

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种基于参考引导的流匹配框架，用于身份保持的面部视频恢复，无需特定主体训练。
