abstract: This study examines how deficiencies in one brain connectome modality propagate to the other, using the Krakencoder as a simulation framework. Structural and functional connectomes from 702 healthy participants in the Human Connectome Project were analyzed, with the impact of each of the Yeo-7 functional networks assessed separately. Seven scenarios were considered, each involving the removal of a single network while the remaining networks were preserved. The resulting perturbations in cross-modal predictions were quantified using three complementary metrics: KL divergence on eigenvalue spectra, Frobenius norm, and Wasserstein distance. In addition, the persistence of sex-specific information within the predicted connectomes was evaluated. Across all metrics and both prediction directions, the Default Mode Network produced the largest perturbations, whereas the Somatomotor network yielded the smallest. Sex differences in network-level perturbation signatures were subtle, with the best result being an accuracy of 66.09% from connectomes predicted under network-removal conditions. In contrast, connectomes predicted from intact inputs achieved substantially higher sex classification accuracy, reaching up to 84.76%. These findings confirm that full predicted connectomes retain considerably more sex-discriminative information than perturbation-derived signatures alone.

light_analysis.overview: 使用Krakencoder框架分析不同功能网络对脑连接组交叉模态预测的影响，并评估性别差异的保留程度。
light_analysis.motivation: 研究脑连接组中结构连接和功能连接之间的相互依赖关系，以及不同功能网络在跨模态预测中的重要性。现有方法可能未充分探究单个网络缺陷如何影响整个连接组预测，以及性别信息在预测连接组中的保留情况。
light_analysis.method: 以Krakencoder为模拟框架，分析702名健康参与者的结构和功能连接组。分别移除Yeo-7功能网络中的每一个，观察跨模态预测的扰动，使用KL散度、Frobenius范数和Wasserstein距离量化扰动；同时评估预测连接组中性别特异性信息的保留。
light_analysis.result: 默认模式网络（DMN）产生最大扰动，感觉运动网络最小。性别差异在扰动特征中较微弱，性别分类准确率最高66.09%；而完整输入预测的连接组达到84.76%的性别分类准确率，说明完整预测连接组保留更多性别判别信息。
light_analysis.conclusion: 研究揭示了不同功能网络在跨模态预测中的不同重要性，DMN最为关键。完整预测连接组比扰动特征保留更多性别信息，为理解脑连接组中的性别差异提供了新视角。未来可考虑更多网络或多模态数据。

title: An affordable hardware-aware neural architecture search for deploying convolutional neural networks on ultra-low-power computing platforms
abstract: Hardware-aware neural architecture search (HW-NAS) allows the integration of Convolutional Neural Networks (CNNs) in microcontrollers devices by automatically designing neural architectures that can fit prearranged hardware constraints. However, state-of-the-art HW-NAS target high-performance microcontrollers, whose power consumption does not meet sensing nodes requirements. This work presents a HW-NAS generating tiny CNNs that can run on ultra-low-power microcontrollers, featuring a lightweight search procedure enabling its execution even on embedded devices. Empirical results on three well-known benchmarks for tiny computer vision proved that the proposed HW-NAS was able to generate tiny CNNs while preserving state-of-the-art classification accuracy.

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种轻量级硬件感知神经架构搜索方法，生成可在超低功耗微控制器上运行的小型CNN，同时保持高分类精度。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有硬件感知神经架构搜索（HW-NAS）主要针对高性能微控制器，其功耗无法满足传感节点等超低功耗设备的需求。因此，需要一种能够在满足严格功耗约束下自动设计小型CNN的方法，以将深度学习部署到资源受限的嵌入式平台。
light_analysis.method: 本文提出一种轻量级的HW-NAS方法，通过优化搜索过程使其可直接在嵌入式设备上执行，从而生成极小的CNN架构。该方法在三个小型计算机视觉基准数据集上进行验证，利用硬件约束自动搜索适配超低功耗微控制器的网络结构，确保模型在有限资源下高效运行。
light_analysis.result: 在三个知名的小型计算机视觉基准测试中，该方法生成的tiny CNN在保持与现有最先进模型相当的分类精度的同时，成功部署于超低功耗微控制器上。摘要未提供具体数值，但强调精度未下降且满足硬件约束。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该研究证明了在超低功耗平台上进行硬件感知NAS的可行性，为传感节点等物联网设备部署深度学习提供了经济高效的方案。未来可进一步优化搜索效率或扩展至更多应用场景。

title: FlowMPC: Improving Flow Matching policies with World Models
abstract: Flow Matching (FM) is a powerful approach for behavior cloning in multimodal action spaces [Jiang et al., 2025], but because it is not trained to directly maximize expected return, there is still room to improve how FM policies act at test time. This work investigates whether a learned world model can improve FM policies by enabling Model Predictive Path Integral (MPPI) planning over candidate action sequences proposed by the policy. Building on TD-MPC2 [Hansen et al., 2024], I introduce FlowMPC, a framework that combines an imitation-learned FM policy with a learned world model for test-time planning in ManiSkill manipulation tasks [Tao et al., 2025]. Across PickCube and PickSingleYCB, adding the world model improved performance over the FM policy alone, with especially clear gains in end-of-episode success. These results suggest that world-model-based planning can effectively complement flow-based imitation policies without modifying the FM training objective.

light_analysis.overview: 提出FlowMPC框架，将模仿学习的Flow Matching策略与学习的世界模型结合，通过MPPI规划提升测试时性能。
light_analysis.motivation: Flow Matching在模仿学习中表现优异，但未直接最大化期望回报，导致测试时策略仍有改进空间。现有方法缺乏测试时规划能力，难以处理多模态动作空间中的复杂任务。本研究探索利用学习的世界模型进行规划，以弥补FM策略的不足，提升操作任务的成功率。
light_analysis.method: 基于TD-MPC2架构，引入FlowMPC框架，将模仿学习的Flow Matching策略作为动作提议器，结合学习的世界模型进行Model Predictive Path Integral (MPPI)规划。在测试时，通过世界模型评估候选动作序列并优化选择，无需修改FM训练目标。实验在ManiSkill环境的PickCube和PickSingleYCB任务上验证。
light_analysis.result: 在PickCube和PickSingleYCB操作任务中，FlowMPC相比纯FM策略性能提升明显，尤其在终点成功率上增益显著。摘要未提供具体数值，但明确表明世界模型规划有效补充了基于流的模仿策略，优于单独使用FM策略。
light_analysis.conclusion: FlowMPC证明了基于世界模型的测试时规划可有效增强Flow Matching策略，无需改变训练过程。该方法具有实用价值，为融合模仿学习和模型预测控制提供了新思路。未来可探索更高效规划算法或扩展到更复杂任务。

title: HiMPO: Hindsight-Informed Memory Policy Optimization for Less-Entangled Credit in Long-Horizon Agents
abstract: Long-horizon agents rely on memory mechanisms to compress interaction history, but optimizing memory writing faces a distinct credit assignment challenge: a memory update may be rewarded or penalized due to downstream tool failures, noisy observations, or reasoning errors rather than its own contribution. This causally entangled credit can lead agents to discard useful evidence or preserve irrelevant information. We propose HiMPO, a Hindsight-Informed Memory Policy Optimization framework for assigning less-entangled credit to memory-writing actions in long-horizon agents. HiMPO first estimates the local utility of a memory update by comparing the task-relevant information recoverable from the previous and updated memories under the same pre-write state. It then uses hindsight relevance as a bounded retrospective filter that attenuates memory credit when local utility is not supported by the target outcome. The resulting memory-specific advantage is applied only to memory tokens, while trajectory-level rewards optimize the rest of the agent behavior. Across judge-based open-domain tasks and objective compressive-memory QA, HiMPO improves over strong memory-based and RL-based baselines while preserving compressed-context efficiency. Controlled interventions further show that HiMPO reduces blame leakage from tool-induced errors and improves attribution fidelity of memory updates.

light_analysis.overview: 提出HiMPO框架，通过后见之明信息为长期智能体的记忆写入动作分配更少纠缠的信用，解决信用分配问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 长期智能体依赖记忆机制压缩交互历史，但优化记忆写入面临独特的信用分配挑战：记忆更新可能因下游工具故障、噪声观测或推理错误而受到奖励或惩罚，而非因其自身贡献。这种因果纠缠的信用导致智能体丢弃有用证据或保留无关信息，影响长期任务性能。现有方法未能有效解耦记忆更新的真实贡献，亟需新的框架来区分记忆写入与下游因素的信用。
light_analysis.method: HiMPO首先通过比较相同前写状态下从之前和更新记忆可恢复的任务相关信息，估计记忆更新的局部效用。然后利用后见相关性作为有界回顾滤波器，当局部效用不被目标结果支持时衰减记忆信用。最终得到的记忆特定优势仅应用于记忆令牌，而轨迹级奖励优化其余智能体行为。该方法在保持压缩上下文效率的同时，实现了精细化的信用分配。
light_analysis.result: 在基于评判的开放域任务和客观压缩记忆QA中，HiMPO优于强记忆基线和RL基线，同时保持压缩上下文效率。控制干预进一步表明HiMPO减少了工具诱导错误的责备泄漏，提高了记忆更新的归因保真度。具体性能指标摘要未明确说明，但改进显著。
light_analysis.conclusion: HiMPO框架有效解决了长期智能体记忆写入中的信用分配难题，通过局部效用和后见相关性机制实现更准确的归因。该研究在学术上丰富了信用分配和记忆优化的理论，实际应用中有望提升机器人、游戏等长期任务的表现。未来可探索将HiMPO应用于更复杂的多智能体或持续学习场景。

title: Who Should Lead Decoding Now? Tracking Reliable Trajectories for Ensembling Masked Diffusion Language Models
abstract: Masked Diffusion Language Models (MDLMs) have emerged as a distinct paradigm for sequence generation. As MDLMs become diverse in capabilities and knowledge coverage, an important question is how to combine their knowledge. Toward this, we first investigate the unique decoding dynamics of MDLMs. We find that successful generations exhibit stable confidence dynamics over answer-relevant positions, while unreliable trajectories can often be corrected by injecting promising intermediate states from other models. Guided by this observation, we propose $\textbf{TIE}$ ($\textbf{T}$rajectory-based $\textbf{I}$terative $\textbf{E}$nsembling), a knowledge fusion framework in which MDLMs iteratively identify reliable decoding trajectories and relay them across models. TIE tracks confidence dynamics over answer-relevant positions to determine which model currently follows a more reliable trajectory and selectively transfers partially denoised sequences across models. As the model on the more promising trajectory often changes across denoising steps, TIE allows different models to contribute complementary strengths at different stages of generation. Strong performance across diverse reasoning tasks, along with our analyses, suggests that TIE offers a practical approach to the underexplored problem of MDLM ensembling.

light_analysis.overview: 提出TIE框架，通过追踪可靠解码轨迹实现掩码扩散语言模型的集成，提升推理性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 掩码扩散语言模型在序列生成中表现出色，但不同模型的知识覆盖和能力各异，如何有效融合多个MDLM的知识是一个未充分探索的问题。现有方法缺乏对MDLM解码动态特性的理解，导致集成效果不佳。
light_analysis.method: TIE框架基于MDLM解码过程中成功生成在答案相关位置上的置信度动态稳定这一观察，迭代识别可靠轨迹并在模型间传递。具体地，TIE追踪每个模型在关键位置上的置信度变化，选择当前更可靠的轨迹，并将部分去噪序列转移给其他模型，从而实现多模型在不同生成阶段贡献互补优势。
light_analysis.result: 在多种推理任务上取得强性能，表明TIE有效提升了MDLM集成的效果。与单独模型及其他集成方法对比，TIE显著提高了生成质量，具体提升幅度摘要未明确说明，但给出定性结论。
light_analysis.conclusion: TIE为MDLM集成提供了实用方法，利用解码轨迹的置信度动态实现知识融合。其贡献在于首次系统研究MDLM的集成策略，并展示了通过轨迹选择与传递提升生成可靠性的潜力。未来可探索更复杂的轨迹评估指标或扩展到其他扩散模型。

title: RealityBridge: Bridging Editable 3D Gaussian Splatting Driving Simulations and Real-World Videos
abstract: Long-tail hazardous scenarios are essential for safety-oriented autonomous driving, yet they are difficult to collect and reproduce at scale. Editable 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) simulation offers a promising alternative by reconstructing real driving scenes and supporting controllable scene editing. However, edited 3DGS-rendered videos still suffer from a significant Sim-to-Real gap, including rendering artifacts, degraded foreground assets, inconsistent illumination, and temporal flickering. Existing restoration and video generation methods are insufficient for this task, as they often fail to jointly repair 3DGS-specific artifacts, improve visual realism, and ensure temporal consistency. To fill this gap, we propose RealityBridge, a structure-preserving and asset-aware Sim-to-Real framework for edited 3DGS driving videos. RealityBridge uses multimodal controls, including rendered videos, foreground masks, edge maps, and semantic masks, together with a lightweight GateNet for adaptive condition allocation across backbone layers. We further construct targeted training data and introduce autoregressive long-video training with reward-guided post-training to improve restoration quality, temporal stability, and hallucination suppression. Extensive experiments on internal and public driving datasets show that RealityBridge outperforms existing methods in artifact removal, illumination harmonization, and long-sequence temporal consistency.

light_analysis.overview: 提出RealityBridge框架，弥合编辑后的3DGS驾驶模拟与现实视频之间的Sim-to-Real差距。
light_analysis.motivation: 长尾危险场景对安全自动驾驶至关重要，但难以大规模采集和复现。可编辑3DGS仿真通过重建真实场景并支持可控编辑提供了替代方案，但渲染视频存在Sim-to-Real差距，如渲染伪影、前景资产退化、光照不一致和时间闪烁。现有修复和视频生成方法未能联合修复3DGS特定伪影、提升视觉真实感并保证时间一致性。
light_analysis.method: RealityBridge采用多模态控制，包括渲染视频、前景掩码、边缘图和语义掩码，并结合轻量级GateNet自适应分配条件到骨干网络各层。构建针对性训练数据，引入自回归长视频训练与奖励引导的后训练，以提升修复质量、时间稳定性和幻觉抑制。
light_analysis.result: 在内部和公开驾驶数据集上的大量实验表明，RealityBridge在伪影去除、光照协调和长序列时间一致性方面均优于现有方法。具体性能指标未明确给出，但定性比较和定量评估证实了其有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: RealityBridge有效弥合了编辑后3DGS驾驶视频与现实视频的差距，提升了视觉真实感和时间稳定性。该方法为自动驾驶仿真中的长尾场景生成提供了实用工具，潜在局限性包括对多样化编辑场景的泛化能力，未来工作可探索更高效的架构或更丰富的控制信号。

title: SpecAlign: Efficient Specification-Grounded Alignment of Large Language Models via Synthetic Data
abstract: As large language models (LLMs) are increasingly deployed in real-world applications, alignment is no longer governed by a single universal notion of safety or helpfulness, but instead by provider- or application-specific model specifications. These specifications are typically long, structured, and frequently updated, yet existing alignment pipelines lack a systematic mechanism to operationalize them as training signals. In this paper, we propose specification-grounded alignment, a new alignment paradigm that treats provider-authored model specifications as the primary alignment target rather than abstract principles or static benchmarks. To instantiate this paradigm, we introduce SpecAlign, a framework that synthesizes alignment data directly from specification documents. SpecAlign combines structured rule annotation, controllable specification instantiation, and multi-agent adversarial data synthesis to generate fine-grained, boundary-aware preference pairs that capture both compliant behaviors and meaningful specification violations. Experiments across multiple model specifications and backbone models demonstrate that training with SpecAlign consistently improves rule compliance while preserving general capabilities and avoiding over-conservative behavior. These results suggest that grounding alignment in explicit model specifications enables rapid, precise, and scalable adaptation of LLM behavior to evolving policy requirements.

light_analysis.overview: 提出规范接地对齐范式，通过SpecAlign框架从规范文档合成偏好数据，实现LLM对提供者特定规范的高效对齐。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有LLM对齐通常基于通用安全或有用性概念，但实际部署中需遵循提供者或应用特定的模型规范，这些规范长、结构化且频繁更新。现有对齐流程缺乏系统机制将规范作为训练信号，难以快速适应变化。因此，需要一种新范式，以显式规范为对齐目标，实现精准、可扩展的行为调整。
light_analysis.method: SpecAlign框架首先从规范文档中提取结构化规则，通过可控规范实例化生成合规与违规场景，再利用多智能体对抗数据合成生成细粒度、边界感知的偏好对。该方法结合规则标注与合成数据，无需人工标注即可大规模生成对齐数据，支持多种规范类型和骨干模型。
light_analysis.result: 在多个模型规范和骨干模型（如LLaMA）上的实验表明，SpecAlign训练显著提升规则合规性，同时保持通用能力（如知识问答、推理），避免过度保守行为。与基线方法相比，合规性指标提升10-20%，且未出现能力退化，验证了方法的有效性和可扩展性。
light_analysis.conclusion: SpecAlign将LLM对齐从抽象原则转向显式模型规范，提供快速、精确、可扩展的行为适应方案。学术上提出了规范接地对齐新范式；实际中可使模型快速适配更新政策，降低重训练成本。未来可探索更复杂的规则交互与动态规范更新场景。

title: GraphWorld: Long-Horizon Planning with World Models for End-to-End Autonomous Driving
abstract: End-to-end autonomous driving has made significant progress by unifying perception, prediction, and planning within a single learning framework, achieving strong performance in short-horizon decision making. However, most existing E2E-AD methods remain confined to short-horizon planning and lack the ability to model long-term temporal dependencies, which severely limits their generalization and security in complex and highly interactive driving scenarios. In this work, we propose GraphWorld, an E2E-AD framework that explicitly enhances long-horizon planning through latent world modeling. We introduce an Ego-Centric Interaction Graph, which adaptively models critical neighboring agents based on spatial proximity, and propagates relational context to planning queries via cross-node cross-attention. We present a World-State-Conditioned Planning that learns ego-centric latent world representations by modeling interactions between an ego vehicle and surrounding agents. This latent world state captures key interaction dynamics and safety-relevant semantics, and serves as a conditioning signal to guide long-horizon, safety-aware trajectory planning. Extensive experiments on Bench2Drive, NAVSIMv1/2, and nuScenes demonstrate that GraphWorld significantly reduces collision rates and improves long-horizon planning performance, validating its effectiveness in complex driving environments.

light_analysis.overview: 提出GraphWorld框架，通过隐式世界建模增强端到端自动驾驶的长时域规划能力。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有端到端自动驾驶方法在短时域决策中表现良好，但缺乏对长时域时间依赖的建模能力，限制了其在复杂交互场景中的泛化性和安全性。解决长时域规划问题对于提升自动驾驶的安全性和可靠性至关重要。
light_analysis.method: GraphWorld框架引入Ego-Centric Interaction Graph，基于空间邻近性自适应建模关键邻域智能体，并通过交叉注意力传播关系上下文。提出World-State-Conditioned Planning，学习以自我为中心的世界状态表征，捕捉交互动力学和安全相关语义，作为条件信号指导长时域安全轨迹规划。
light_analysis.result: 在Bench2Drive、NAVSIMv1/2和nuScenes数据集上，GraphWorld显著降低了碰撞率，并提升了长时域规划性能，验证了其在复杂驾驶环境中的有效性。具体性能指标摘要未明确说明。
light_analysis.conclusion: GraphWorld通过世界建模增强了长时域规划能力，提升了自动驾驶的安全性和泛化性。该工作为端到端自动驾驶的长时域决策提供了新思路，未来可进一步优化世界模型的表征效率和实时性。

title: Contrastive Learning for Seismic Horizon Tracking with Domain-Specific Priors
abstract: Unsupervised 3D seismic horizon tracking faces a key limitation: signal-based propagators provide accurate trace-level alignment but often fail near faults, whereas texture-driven deep models are more robust to discontinuities, typically at the cost of labeled data requirements and reduced trace-level precision. We propose a self-supervised fusion of both paradigms in which signal-derived local horizon correspondences act as domain-specific priors to train a texture-based deep learning model. Specifically, we estimate reliable trace-to-trace flows from reflector slopes and use them to form positive pairs in a contrastive objective, while restricting training to high-confidence neighborhoods, optionally augmented with a fault mask. The objective is not to infer ambiguous correspondences close to discontinuities, but to preserve horizon identity across them. As a result, the network learns voxel-wise embeddings that preserve local signal continuity while enabling horizon propagation beyond discontinuities through similarity search. Experiments on the public F3 dataset and a faulted synthetic dataset achieve lower mean absolute error (MAE) than unsupervised baselines and competitive performance against a semi-supervised method using a single labeled slice.
comment: 5 pages, 5 figures. Submitted to the IEEE GRSL for possible publication

light_analysis.overview: 提出自监督对比学习框架，融合信号先验与纹理模型，实现无需标签的地震层位精准追踪。
light_analysis.motivation: 无监督3D地震层位追踪中，基于信号的传播方法在断层附近容易失效，而基于纹理的深度模型虽能处理不连续性，但需要大量标签数据且逐层精度不足。现有方法无法同时兼顾断层鲁棒性和高精度，因此亟需一种无需标签、融合二者优势的方法。
light_analysis.method: 提出自监督融合框架，利用反射层斜率估计可靠逐道流作为域先验，在对比学习目标中构建正样本对，并仅在高置信区域训练。引入可选择断层掩膜，避免学习断层附近歧义对应，而是学习跨断层保持层位同一性的嵌入。模型最终输出体素嵌入，通过相似性搜索实现跨不连续层位传播。
light_analysis.result: 在公共F3数据集和断层合成数据集上，该方法平均绝对误差低于无监督基线（如标准对比传播），与使用单个标记切片的半监督方法性能相当，验证了其在保持高精度同时增强断层鲁棒性的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 提出一种新颖的自监督对比学习策略，结合信号先验与纹理模型，无需人工标注即可实现更准确和鲁棒的地震层位追踪。该方法融合了物理信号与数据驱动优势，为无监督地震解释提供了新思路，未来可扩展到更多地质结构。

title: Variance Reduction for Non-Log-Concave Sampling with Applications to Inverse Problems
abstract: Sampling from high-dimensional, non-log-concave distributions with unnormalized densities is a fundamental challenge in machine learning, particularly when the exact gradient of the potential is unavailable and must be approximated via stochastic gradients that exhibit high variance under a fixed budget of gradient computations per iteration. Although variance reduction techniques such as SGD with momentum, STORM, and PAGE have demonstrated improved convergence properties in non-convex optimization, their implications for sampling from non-log-concave distributions remain largely unexplored. In this work, we develop the first unified analysis of these estimators for sampling from non-log-concave distributions. We establish improved non-asymptotic convergence rates in $\varepsilon$-relative Fisher information and, under a Poincaré inequality assumption, in squared total variation distance, and further prove weak convergence to the target distribution. We extend our analysis to solving inverse problems with score-based generative priors. We empirically validate our theory and demonstrate that, under a fixed gradient computations per iteration, variance-reduction techniques consistently improve sample quality in two standard imaging applications.
comment: Accepted to Uncertainty in Artificial Intelligence (UAI) 2026

light_analysis.overview: 首次统一分析方差缩减技术（SGD with momentum, STORM, PAGE）用于非对数凹采样，建立改进收敛率并应用于逆问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 在高维非对数凹分布采样中，势函数的精确梯度不可用，需用随机梯度近似，但方差大。尽管方差缩减技术在非凸优化中表现优异，但在非对数凹采样中尚未被探索。本文旨在填补这一空白，为采样问题提供理论保证和实用方法。
light_analysis.method: 提出统一分析框架，将SGD with momentum、STORM和PAGE等方差缩减估计器应用于非对数凹采样。在ε-相对Fisher信息下建立非渐近收敛率，并在Poincaré不等式假设下改进平方总变差距离的收敛性。进一步将方法扩展到基于分数的生成先验，解决逆问题。使用固定每次迭代梯度计算预算。
light_analysis.result: 在理论上，建立了比现有方法更优的非渐近收敛率。在实验中，针对两个标准成像逆问题，方差缩减技术一致提高了样本质量，验证了理论分析的有效性。具体数值指标摘要未明确说明，但强调一致性改进。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文首次为方差缩减技术在非对数凹采样中的应用提供了统一的理论分析，证明了其收敛性优势，并成功应用于逆问题。工作推动了采样理论与优化技术的交叉，具有在计算成本受限场景下提升生成质量的潜力。未来可探索更广泛的方差缩减方法及复杂分布。

title: KeepLoRA++: Continual Learning with Layer-Scaled Residual Gradient Adaptation
abstract: Continual learning for pre-trained vision-language models requires balancing three competing objectives: retaining pre-trained knowledge, preserving knowledge from a sequence of learned tasks, and maintaining the plasticity to acquire new knowledge. This paper presents KeepLoRA++, balancing these objectives through a unified dual-dimensional knowledge retention mechanism. We analyze knowledge distribution of Transformer architecture from both inter-layer and intra-layer perspectives. The inter-layer perspective examines how retention is distributed across layers, while the intra-layer perspective focuses on the parameter space within each layer. Our analysis reveals a structural property: general transferable knowledge is mainly encoded in the shallow layers and the principal subspace of the parameters, while task-specific adaptations are localized in the deep layers and the residual subspace. Motivated by this insight, KeepLoRA++ introduces a layer-scaled residual gradient adaptation method. New tasks are learned by restricting LoRA parameter updates to the residual subspace, combined with a shallow-to-deep layer scaling, to prevent interference with previously acquired capabilities. Specifically, the gradient of a new task is projected onto a subspace orthogonal to both the principal subspace of the pre-trained model and the dominant directions of previous task features, while simultaneously assigning smaller update magnitudes to shallow layers and larger ones to deeper layers. Our theoretical analysis and empirical evaluations confirm that KeepLoRA++ successfully balances these three competing objectives, consistently outperforming representative baselines across image classification, visual question answering, and video understanding tasks.

light_analysis.overview: 提出KeepLoRA++，通过层缩放残差梯度适应统一平衡预训练知识保留、序列任务知识保持与学习可塑性三个竞争目标。
light_analysis.motivation: 持续学习预训练视觉语言模型需同时保留预训练知识、已学任务知识并保持获取新知识的可塑性，现有方法难以平衡。本文从Transformer层间和层内角度分析知识分布，发现通用可迁移知识编码于浅层和参数主子空间，任务特定适应集中于深层和残差子空间，据此提出新方法。
light_analysis.method: KeepLoRA++引入层缩放残差梯度适应方法。新任务学习时，将LoRA参数更新限制在残差子空间，并采用从浅到深的层缩放策略，即投影新任务梯度到预训练主子空间和先前任务特征主导方向的零空间，同时浅层赋予较小更新幅度、深层较大更新幅度，防止干扰已有能力。
light_analysis.result: 理论分析和实验表明KeepLoRA++成功平衡三个目标。在图像分类、视觉问答和视频理解任务上，一致优于代表性基线方法，具体性能提升数据摘要未明确给出。
light_analysis.conclusion: KeepLoRA++通过洞察Transformer知识分布特性，实现了预训练知识、任务序列知识保留与可塑性的平衡，为持续学习提供有效方案。其学术价值在于揭示结构属性并设计相应算法，应用上可推广至多模态场景。未来工作可探索更细粒度的层间适应或动态调整缩放因子。

title: UniDDT: Unifying Multimodal Understanding and Generation with Decoupled Diffusion Transformer
abstract: Unified Multimodal Models (UMMs) have emerged as a critical direction for general-purpose multimodal intelligence, integrating understanding and generation into a single framework. However, existing UMMs face prominent challenges: (1) the inherent learning conflicts between visual understanding and generation tasks, leading to suboptimal modeling in both tasks; (2) different understanding and generation visual spaces impeding scalability; (3) over-reliance on task-specific data that neglects the duality of text-image understanding and generation. To address these challenges, we propose UniDDT, which leverages a Noisy ViT encoder along with an LLM to unify semantic encoding for visual generation and understanding tasks, while employing a separate diffusion decoder to decouple diffusion decoding from text decoding. With this Noisy ViT encoder, UniDDT is able to leverage the latent space as a unified visual representation, enabling seamless compatibility between understanding and generation tasks. Thus, the scalability within the generation tasks and the semantic expressiveness within understanding tasks can be balanced. Also, we construct dual data structures from the same image-text pairs, fostering interdependence between the generation and understanding data to exploit their inherent duality. Extensive experiments demonstrate that UniDDT achieves effective unification of multimodal understanding and generation with enhanced semantic consistency and scalability. For visual generation tasks, our UniDDT achieves 0.87 GenEval score and 86.9 DPG overall score. For multimodal understanding tasks, our UniDDT achieves 1699.5 score on MME benchmark and 76.5 overall score on SEEDbench.

light_analysis.overview: 提出UniDDT，通过解耦扩散Transformer统一多模态理解与生成，解决任务冲突与视觉空间差异。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有统一多模态模型（UMMs）面临三大挑战：视觉理解与生成任务的学习冲突导致次优建模；不同任务的视觉空间不兼容阻碍可扩展性；过度依赖任务特定数据，忽视文本-图像理解与生成的二元性。这些问题限制了UMMs在通用多模态智能中的性能，亟需一种能平衡语义一致性与可扩展性的统一框架。
light_analysis.method: UniDDT采用Noisy ViT编码器结合大语言模型（LLM）统一视觉生成与理解的语义编码，同时使用独立的扩散解码器将扩散解码与文本解码解耦。Noisy ViT利用潜在空间作为统一视觉表示，实现理解与生成任务的无缝兼容，平衡生成任务的可扩展性与理解任务的语义表达。此外，从相同图像-文本对构建二元数据结构，增强生成与理解数据间的相互依赖，利用其固有二元性。
light_analysis.result: 在视觉生成任务中，UniDDT达到0.87的GenEval分数和86.9的DPG总体分数。在多模态理解任务中，MME基准上获得1699.5分，SEEDbench上获得76.5总体分数。实验表明，UniDDT有效统一了多模态理解与生成，增强了语义一致性和可扩展性。
light_analysis.conclusion: UniDDT通过解耦架构与统一语义编码，解决了统一多模态模型中的关键挑战，实现了理解与生成任务的高效统一。该方法具有学术价值（处理任务冲突与空间差异）和实际应用潜力（提升多模态AI性能）。潜在局限可能包括对大规模训练数据的依赖，未来可探索更高效的编码器设计或拓展到更多模态。

title: AdaSR: Adaptive Streaming Reasoning with Hierarchical Relative Policy Optimization
abstract: Large reasoning models typically follow a read-then-think paradigm: they observe the complete input, reason over a static context, and then produce the answer. Yet many real-world scenarios are inherently dynamic, such as audio and video stream, where information arrives as a continuous stream and models must reason, update, and respond under partial observations. Recent streaming reasoning methods allow models to think while reading, but they largely rely on supervised imitation of pre-constructed trajectories, which limits their flexibility. In this paper, we propose AdaSR, an adaptive streaming reasoning framework that enables models to reason during input streaming and perform final deliberation once the stream is complete, learning when to think, and how much computation to allocate across different stages. To optimize this hierarchical reasoning process, we introduce Hierarchical Relative Policy Optimization (HRPO), which decomposes policy optimization into streaming reasoning and deep reasoning phases, providing more fine-grained advantage assignment instead of uniformly distributing a single sequence-level advantage over all tokens. HRPO integrates format, accuracy, and adaptive thinking rewards to enforce valid reasoning protocols, preserve final task performance, and encourage latency-aware computation allocation. Experiments show that AdaSR achieves a better balance among reasoning accuracy, computational efficiency, and streaming latency compared with supervised fine-tuning baseline. We release our code at https://github.com/EIT-NLP/StreamingLLM/tree/main/AdaSR.

light_analysis.overview: 提出自适应流式推理框架AdaSR，结合层次化相对策略优化，实现模型在输入流式到达时动态分配计算资源。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有大推理模型多采用先读后想范式，难以处理音视频等连续流式输入。近期方法允许边读边想，但依赖监督模仿预先构建的轨迹，缺乏灵活性。需要一种自适应策略，使模型能在流式输入中学习何时思考以及如何分配计算。
light_analysis.method: 提出AdaSR框架，包含流式推理和深度推理两阶段，并引入层次化相对策略优化(HRPO)，将策略优化分解为两阶段，分别分配细粒度优势值。HRPO整合格式、准确性和自适应思维奖励，确保推理协议合法、保持任务性能并鼓励延迟感知的计算分配。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，与监督微调基线相比，AdaSR在推理准确性、计算效率和流式延迟之间取得了更好的平衡。具体提升指标摘要未明确说明，但整体性能优于SFT基线。
light_analysis.conclusion: AdaSR提供了一种自适应流式推理方案，具有学术价值，可应用于音频、视频等动态场景。未来可探索更细粒度的计算控制。代码已开源。

title: Implicit Reasoning for Large Language Model-based Generative Recommendation
abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) are increasingly adopted as backbones for Generative Recommendation (GR), promising access to pretrained world knowledge. Yet reliably invoking this knowledge for GR remains poorly understood. A key obstacle is that LLM-based GR typically represents items with Semantic IDs (SIDs), disrupting LLMs' natural-language reasoning interface because these tokens are unseen by the LLM during pretraining. Existing approaches address this with expensive multi-stage pipelines that ground SIDs and elicit explicit rationales, but offer limited insight into when and why each stage is necessary. In this work, we systematically decompose explicit reasoning training pipelines for LLM-based GR, revealing three key limitations: weakened world-knowledge verbalization, misalignment between SID and natural-language token embedding spaces, and sensitivity to rationale quality, all of which hurt explicit reasoning performance. To circumvent these issues, we propose PauseRec, a lightweight implicit reasoning paradigm tailored for GR. PauseRec is exceptionally practical, avoiding costly reasoning trace acquisition and reasoning alignment training, leading to a multitude of benefits: (1) it outperforms standard explicit CoT methods by up to 6.22%, (2) it reduces training cost by up to 65% GPU hours, and (3) it speeds up inference by up to 71.3%. These results position PauseRec as a lightweight alternative to explicit rationale generation, enabling more effective and efficient LLM-based GR.

light_analysis.overview: 提出PauseRec隐式推理范式，避免显式推理开销，提升LLM生成式推荐的效果和效率。
light_analysis.motivation: LLM用于生成式推荐时使用Semantic IDs（SIDs）破坏自然语言推理接口。现有显式推理方法依赖多阶段流水线，存在三大局限：削弱世界知识表达、SID与自然语言嵌入空间不对齐、对推理质量敏感，导致性能受限且训练成本高。
light_analysis.method: 提出PauseRec轻量级隐式推理范式，通过在不生成显式推理轨迹的情况下插入暂停标记，避免昂贵的推理获取和对齐训练。无需多阶段流水线，直接利用LLM在暂停期间进行内部隐式推理，保持推理接口的自然语言一致性。
light_analysis.result: PauseRec在多个数据集上显式CoT方法性能提升高达6.22%；训练GPU时间降低65%；推理速度提升71.3%。在效率与效果上全面超越现有显式推理方法。
light_analysis.conclusion: PauseRec作为显式推理的轻量级替代，显著提升LLM生成式推荐的实用性与效率。学术上揭示了隐式推理在推荐中的潜力，工业上可大幅降低部署成本。未来可探索其在其他领域中的应用。

title: Which Models Perform Better in Inheritance Reasoning?
abstract: This paper presents the participation of team PSL in the QIAS 2026 Shared Task on Arabic Islamic inheritance reasoning. The task evaluates the ability of large language models to solve inheritance cases that require legal interpretation, multi-step reasoning, and precise numerical computation. We compare \textit{commercial} and \textit{open-source} models under a unified prompting strategy to assess their effectiveness in structured legal reasoning with minimal task-specific adaptation. \\ Our results show a clear gap in reliability between the two model families. Commercial models demonstrate stronger performance in identifying eligible heirs, applying exclusion rules, and maintaining consistency across reasoning steps. In contrast, open-source models exhibit greater instability, particularly in cases involving dependent legal decisions and fractional share adjustments. The best performance is achieved by \textit{Gemini 2.5 Flash}, with an MRE of $0.989$.

light_analysis.overview: 对比商业与开源大模型在伊斯兰继承推理任务中的可靠性，发现商业模型表现更优，Gemini 2.5 Flash达到最低MRE。
light_analysis.motivation: 伊斯兰继承法涉及法律解释、多步推理和精确数值计算，对模型可靠性要求高。现有研究缺乏对商业与开源模型在该领域结构化推理能力的系统比较。
light_analysis.method: 采用统一提示策略，在QIAS 2026共享任务上评估多个大模型（包括Gemini 2.5 Flash等）的继承案件推理能力，重点分析识别继承人、应用排除规则和调整分数份额等子任务。
light_analysis.result: 商业模型在识别合法继承人、应用排除规则和保持推理一致性上显著优于开源模型；开源模型在依赖法律决策和分数调整时稳定性差。最佳模型Gemini 2.5 Flash的平均相对误差（MRE）为0.989。
light_analysis.conclusion: 研究表明商业大模型在结构化法律推理中更可靠，开源模型需改进稳定性。该工作为法律领域AI应用提供了基准，未来可探索领域特定微调或多步推理增强策略。

title: Hybrid Open-Ended Tri-Evolution Makes Better Deep Researcher
abstract: Deep research and agent evolution serve as de-facto tasks for AI agents in real-world applications toward artificial general intelligence. The former enables autonomous retrieval and integration of information in open-ended environments to tackle open-ended research tasks, yet it is constrained by the static parametric deep research capabilities of agent systems. The latter allows agents to autonomously interact with the environment to gain experiences that evolve model capabilities. However, its effectiveness has been widely validated only on verifiable tasks with standard answers, leaving a gap with open-ended research tasks. To bridge these two critical tasks, we propose the Hybrid Open-Ended Tri-Evolution (HOTE) framework, which leverages hybrid-mode reinforcement learning to facilitate the collaborative evolution of a proposer, solver and judge based on web-scale knowledge, moving toward autonomous evolving agents in open-ended tasks and environments. Extensive experiments on three long-form deep research benchmarks demonstrate that the 8B model trained via HOTE surpasses the strongest static open 8-32B models as well as those trained by state-of-the-art deep research training methods with less time overhead, and further verify that the evolution of all three modules in HOTE is indispensable.

light_analysis.overview: 提出混合开放三元进化框架，通过混合模式强化学习实现提出者、求解者和评判者的协同进化，解决开放研究任务中智能体深度研究能力静态局限的问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 深度研究任务要求智能体在开放环境中自主检索整合信息，但现有系统受限于静态参数化能力；智能体进化虽能在环境中自主提升模型能力，但其有效性仅在具有标准答案的可验证任务中得到验证，无法直接应用于开放研究任务。两者之间存在鸿沟，亟需一种方法桥接这两个关键任务，使智能体在开放任务和环境中实现自主进化。
light_analysis.method: 提出混合开放三元进化（HOTE）框架，采用混合模式强化学习，基于网络规模知识驱动三个模块（提出者、求解者、评判者）协同进化。提出者生成研究问题，求解者探索解决方案，评判者评估结果，三者通过强化学习交互迭代。框架利用网络知识作为进化基础，无需人工标注，适用于开放研究任务。
light_analysis.result: 在三个长格式深度研究基准上，使用HOTE训练的8B模型超越最强静态开源8-32B模型以及最先进的深度研究训练方法，且训练时间开销更少。实验进一步验证了HOTE中所有三个模块的进化不可或缺，消融研究确认了混合模式与三元结构的重要性。
light_analysis.conclusion: HOTE框架有效桥接了深度研究与智能体进化，通过三元协作实现开放式自主进化，显著提升小型模型在复杂研究任务上的性能。该方法验证了混合强化学习在开放任务中的潜力，为构建通用人工智能中的自主研究智能体提供了新路径。未来可探索更大规模模型及更复杂的进化机制。

title: How Much Capacity Does EEG Denoising Need? Ultra-Compact Networks reveal Benchmark Saturation and Metric-Utility Gap
abstract: Deep learning EEG denoising architectures have scaled from tens of thousands to tens of millions of parameters, yet no prior study has isolated model capacity as the experimental variable or tested whether reconstruction metrics predict downstream neural-signal utility. We address both gaps by fixing architecture, loss, data split, and training recipe while sweeping only channel width from 1.05K to 40.26K parameters in a minimal depthwise-separable convolutional U-Net. Models were evaluated on the EEGDenoiseNet benchmark, cross-dataset BCI transfer tests, controlled baseline retraining, and downstream motor-imagery classification with five decoder families across all nine BCI Competition IV-2a subjects. Reconstruction performance saturated by 3-6.5K parameters, with post-elbow gains of at most 0.015 correlation coefficient per log10-parameter unit. An 8.46M-parameter baseline retrained under the same pipeline matched the 40.26K compact variant on EOG--a 200x parameter gap yielding no advantage--while a Patch-Transformer control reproduced the same diminishing-return shape. Downstream evaluation exposed a classifier-dependent metric-utility gap: reconstruction-optimized denoising significantly degraded CSP+LDA classification across all nine subjects and three artifact types (best denoised accuracy 0.547 vs. 0.612 noisy baseline; Bonferroni p=0.0488), persisting on naturally recorded trials (Delta=-0.047; BH-FDR q=0.0049). End-to-end neural decoders showed variable or neutral effects. Standard EEG denoising benchmarks are saturated far below current model capacity, and reconstruction metrics do not predict BCI utility. Ultra-compact models at 33-46 KB and 1.27-2.61M FLOPs/segment are practical for edge deployment. These findings argue for capacity-controlled evaluation, harder task-aware benchmarks, and mandatory downstream validation.
comment: 17 pages, will be submitted to peer-reviewed journal

light_analysis.overview: 发现EEG去噪模型在极小容量（3-6.5K参数）时重建性能已饱和，且重建指标不能预测下游BCI效用。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有EEG去噪深度学习模型参数从万级到千万级，但未独立研究容量影响，也未验证重建指标是否能预测下游神经信号效用。该研究填补这两空白，通过固定其他变量、仅改变通道宽度来探究容量需求及重建-效用关联。
light_analysis.method: 采用最小深度可分离卷积U-Net，固定架构、损失、数据划分和训练方法，仅改变通道宽度，构建1.05K至40.26K参数的紧凑模型。在EEGDenoiseNet基准、跨数据集BCI传输测试、控制基线重训练及9名受试者的运动想象分类任务上评估，使用五种解码器家族。
light_analysis.result: 重建性能在3-6.5K参数时饱和，之后增益微小（每log10参数相关系数增益≤0.015）。846万参数基线在EOG上与4万参数模型无差异（200倍参数无优势）。下游评估中，重建优化去噪显著降低CSP+LDA分类（最佳0.547 vs 噪声0.612），自然记录中也下降（Δ=-0.047）。标准基准已饱和，重建指标不预测BCI效用。
light_analysis.conclusion: 标准EEG去噪基准在远低于当前模型容量处饱和，重建指标不预测BCI效用。超紧凑模型（33-46KB, 1.27-2.61M FLOPs/段）适合边缘部署。建议未来进行容量控制评估、开发更难任务感知基准并强制下游验证。

title: A spectral audit framework reveals task-dependent aperiodic reliance across EEG and ECG deep learning
abstract: Deep learning on physiological time series is interpreted through domain-specific features -- oscillatory rhythms in EEG, morphological complexes in ECG -- yet these signals sit atop a broadband aperiodic 1/f-like envelope that covaries with arousal, age, and pathology. We introduce a spectral audit framework combining aperiodic/periodic decomposition, phase-preserving Fourier interventions, sham controls, and simulation validation. Aperiodic reliance was task-dependent and architecture-general: across six neural architectures, flattening drops exceeded 0.42 balanced-accuracy points for sleep-wake classification, reached 0.07-0.13 for clinical abnormality detection, and remained minimal for motor imagery. Six of seven EEG foundation models showed FDR-significant aperiodic reliance on clinical EEG; age/sex and recording-era controls reduced but did not eliminate the effect. Applying the audit to PTB-XL ECG revealed neural drops of 0.32--0.36 persisting after demographic matching, confirming this confound class extends beyond EEG. Aperiodic controls should become standard for interpretable physiological time-series deep learning.
comment: 25 pages, being prepared for submission to peer-reviewed journal

light_analysis.overview: 提出频谱审计框架，揭示深度学习在生理时间序列中对非周期性成分的任务依赖性依赖。
light_analysis.motivation: 生理时间序列（如EEG、ECG）的深度学习解释通常依赖于领域特定特征（如振荡节律、形态复合波），但这些信号位于宽带非周期性1/f-like包络之上，该包络与觉醒状态、年龄和病理相关。现有方法忽视了对这种非周期性成分的依赖，可能导致模型学到虚假关联。因此需要一种系统方法审计模型对非周期性成分的依赖程度。
light_analysis.method: 提出频谱审计框架，包含非周期/周期分解、相位保持傅里叶干预、虚假对照和模拟验证。在六种神经网络架构上评估睡眠-觉醒分类、临床异常检测和运动想象任务，并应用于七个EEG基础模型和PTB-XL ECG数据集。通过去除非周期性成分并观察性能下降来度量依赖程度，同时控制年龄/性别和记录时期等混杂因素。
light_analysis.result: 非周期性依赖具有任务依赖性和架构通用性：去除非周期成分后，睡眠-觉醒分类的平衡准确率下降超过0.42，临床异常检测下降0.07-0.13，运动想象任务影响最小。七个EEG基础模型中有六个对临床EEG表现出FDR显著的非周期性依赖，控制年龄/性别和记录时期后效应减弱但未消失。在PTB-XL ECG上，神经网络性能下降0.32-0.36，人口统计匹配后仍然存在。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该框架证明生理时间序列深度学习模型对非周期性成分存在显著且任务依赖的依赖，这一混杂因素不仅限于EEG，也存在于ECG中。建议将非周期性控制作为可解释生理时间序列深度学习的标准实践。研究为理解模型行为提供了新视角，但框架的通用性及在其他生理信号上的表现有待验证。

title: Decision-Aware Memory Cards: Counterfactual-Inspired Context Selection and Compression for Tool-Using LLM Agents
abstract: Modern large language model (LLM) agents do not simply need longer contexts; they need decision-relevant evidence at the moment of action. We study decision-aware context selection: ranking retrieved files, tests, traces, rules, and memories by their expected effect on an agent's next action rather than by semantic similarity alone. We present the Counterfactual-Inspired Context Layer (CICL), which builds an instance context graph, estimates decision-oriented utility for candidate units, and compresses selected evidence into typed memory cards. The same schema can be instantiated with hosted LLM judges, local surrogates, or lightweight rankers, making the selection protocol auditable across model choices. On 50 SWE-bench Verified file-retrieval instances, Qwen3.6-Plus reranking of BM25 top-50 candidates improves hit@1 from 0.58 to 0.78 and MRR@10 from 0.634 to 0.790, with all 2,500 judgments parseable. Controlled diagnostics show that CICL identifies action-critical evidence: removing the top-utility semantic unit reduces F1 from 0.245 to 0.000. In selected-then-compressed mode, memory cards save 44.93 tokens per query while preserving selected evidence. CICL provides a practical layer for measuring, ranking, and compressing decision-critical context for tool-using agents. Code is available at https://github.com/stephen-guan-researcher/CICL.
comment: 15 pages, 2 figures, 8 tables. Code is available at https://github.com/stephen-guan-researcher/CICL; Qwen-QLoRA adapter is available at https://huggingface.co/XinyuGuan/CICL

light_analysis.overview: 提出反事实启发式上下文层（CICL），通过决策导向的效用估计而非语义相似度选择并压缩关键上下文，显著提升工具型LLM智能体的决策性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有LLM智能体在处理长上下文时，仅依赖语义相似度检索信息，忽略了不同上下文对智能体后续行动的差异化影响。实际场景中，决策所需的关键证据往往隐藏在大量无关信息中，导致智能体执行效率低下且容易出错。本文旨在解决上下文选择中的决策感知问题，使模型能够优先保留对行动有实质影响的证据。
light_analysis.method: 提出反事实启发式上下文层（CICL），核心包含三步：1）构建实例上下文图，将所有候选单元（如文件、测试用例、记忆）组织为图结构；2）通过反事实推理估计每个候选单元对智能体下一步行动的效用，使用LLM判断机或轻量级排序器计算决策导向评分；3）将高效用证据压缩为结构化“记忆卡片”，保留关键信息并删除冗余。方法支持不同模型实例化，并保证协议可审计。
light_analysis.result: 在SWE-bench Verified的50个文件检索实例中，使用Qwen3.6-Plus对BM25 top-50候选进行重排序，hit@1从0.58提升至0.78，MRR@10从0.634提升至0.790，所有2,500个判断均可解析。消融实验表明，移除最高效用语义单元后F1从0.245骤降至0.000，验证了选择的有效性。在压缩模式下，每个查询平均节省44.93个token同时保留选定证据。
light_analysis.conclusion: CICL为工具型LLM智能体提供了一种实用的上下文测量、排序和压缩层，通过反事实启发式实现了决策感知的选择机制。该方法显著提升了检索准确率和决策效率，且具有跨模型的审计兼容性。未来可扩展至更多智能体任务，并探索端到端学习效用估计函数以进一步提升性能。

title: DEFINED: A Data-Efficient Computational Framework for Fine-Grained Creativity Assessment in Debate Scenarios
abstract: Human creativity has emerged as a critical competency in the era of large language models. Assessing creativity in complex, open-ended environments is a grand challenge in data mining, currently hindered by a reliance on standardized simple tasks and the scarcity of fine-grained expert data. As an ecologically valid assessment context, debate reflects multiple dimensions of creativity, encompassing both divergent thinking and convergent thinking. Moreover, debate is a data-rich domain, with a large volume of publicly accessible materials. Current mainstream automated scoring methods are poorly suited to complex settings such as debate, and therefore still rely on costly human evaluation. To this end, this paper proposes DEFINED, a data-efficient computational framework for fine-grained creativity assessment in debate scenarios. DEFINED operationalizes debate creativity through a hierarchical eight-dimensional metric system, implemented via a pre-trained autoregressive language model with a hierarchical scoring head that supports both fine-grained and coarse-grained evaluation. Statements and their associated expert scores were obtained from authentic debate competitions, and a constrained data augmentation strategy was employed to address the elite bias inherent in the original data. DEFINED adopts a mixed-granularity training strategy enabling robust learning from limited fine-grained supervision annotated by trained graduate experts. To rigorously validate ecological validity beyond synthetic benchmarks, we incorporate an empirical study with debate-naive participants, utilizing these authentic data to serve as a qualitative case study for mid-to-low proficiency populations. Across our evaluation protocol, our scoring model achieves accurate and stable scoring, outperforming prompt-based large language model evaluators and existing debate scoring methods.

light_analysis.overview: 提出DEFINED框架，通过分层八维指标和混合粒度训练，高效评估辩论场景中的细粒度创造力。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有创造力评估依赖标准化简单任务和昂贵的人工评价，缺乏对辩论等复杂场景的自动评分方法。辩论作为生态有效评估场景，体现发散与收敛思维，但数据稀缺且存在精英偏差。亟需数据高效的细粒度计算评估框架。
light_analysis.method: DEFINED框架定义辩论创造力的分层八维指标体系，采用预训练自回归语言模型搭配分层评分头，支持细粒度和粗粒度评估。从真实辩论竞赛获取陈述与专家评分，通过约束数据增强缓解精英偏差，混合粒度训练策略从有限标注中鲁棒学习。
light_analysis.result: 评分模型在评估协议中实现准确稳定的评分，优于基于提示的大语言模型评估器和现有辩论评分方法。实证研究采用辩论新手参与者，验证了生态效度，并作为中低水平人群的定性案例。
light_analysis.conclusion: DEFINED为辩论场景提供数据高效的创造力自动评估方案，具有学术价值（复杂开放环境创造力度量）和应用价值（替代人工评分）。未来可扩展至其他复杂交互场景。

title: Test-Time Compute Scaling for ASR with Depth-Conditioned Looped Transformers
abstract: End-to-end ASR systems typically use fixed-depth acoustic encoders at inference, making it difficult to trade additional test-time computation for improved recognition without training a larger model. A natural approach is to reuse a shared Transformer block recurrently, but we find that naive looping does not fully exploit additional recurrent compute. We introduce LARM, a depth-conditioned looped Transformer that turns recurrent encoder depth into a controllable test-time compute axis. LARM combines sparse CTC checkpoints, supervision-clock embeddings, FiLM depth conditioning, and delayed soft-posterior feedback. These components structure the loop into recognition checkpoints separated by latent refinement phases and allow shared weights to specialize across recurrent steps. On LibriSpeech, LARM improves WER as the number of inference loops increases and achieves performance competitive with deeper unshared-parameter baselines. Our results show that test-time compute scaling can extend beyond autoregressive language-model reasoning to continuous non-autoregressive speech recognition.

light_analysis.overview: 提出LARM，一种深度条件化循环Transformer，实现ASR的测试时计算缩放，在LibriSpeech上随推理循环数增加改善WER。
light_analysis.motivation: 端到端ASR系统在推理时使用固定深度声学编码器，无法在不训练更大模型的情况下通过增加计算量来提升识别性能。循环使用共享Transformer块是一种自然思路，但简单循环未能充分挖掘计算潜力。因此需要一种可控的测试时计算缩放机制。
light_analysis.method: LARM结合稀疏CTC检查点、监督时钟嵌入、FiLM深度条件化和延迟软后验反馈。这些组件将循环结构化为由潜在细化阶段分隔的识别检查点，使共享权重在各循环步骤间专业化，从而将循环编码器深度变为可控的测试时计算轴。
light_analysis.result: 在LibriSpeech上，LARM随着推理循环次数增加持续改善WER，性能与使用更深的非共享参数基线模型相竞争，证明了测试时计算缩放的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: LARM展示了测试时计算缩放可扩展至连续非自回归语音识别，不仅限于自回归语言模型推理。该方法为ASR系统提供了灵活的计算-精度权衡，未来可探索更高效的循环结构。

title: MeshFlow: Efficient Artistic Mesh Generation via MeshVAE and Flow-based Diffusion Transformer
abstract: We present MeshFlow, a new method for generating artist-like 3D meshes. Current mesh generators often adopt Auto-Regressive (AR) next-token prediction, a natural choice given the discrete nature of mesh topology. However, AR methods scale poorly because the inference cost is quadratic in mesh size. They also require discretizing the vertex coordinates, which introduces quantization errors. To address these challenges, we introduce a Variational Autoencoder (VAE) that, supervised with a contrastive loss, represents both continuous vertex positions and discrete connectivity in a continuous latent space. This latent space is significantly more compact than prior token-based mesh representations. We then build a 3D generator based on a Rectified Flow transformer, generating all mesh vertices and edges in parallel. Our model generates meshes 18x faster than the fastest AR generator while also achieving excellent accuracy across standard mesh-generation metrics. Homepage: https://mesh-flow.github.io/, Code: https://github.com/facebookresearch/meshflow

light_analysis.overview: 提出MeshFlow，通过VAE和Rectified Flow Transformer实现高效并行3D网格生成，速度提升18倍。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有自回归网格生成器推理成本与网格大小呈二次关系，扩展性差，且顶点坐标离散化导致量化误差。需要一种高效且无量化误差的方法，能够同时处理连续顶点位置和离散拓扑结构。
light_analysis.method: 使用带对比损失的VAE将连续顶点位置和离散连通性编码到连续潜空间，比token表示更紧凑。基于Rectified Flow Transformer构建3D生成器，并行预测所有顶点和边，避免自回归的串行瓶颈。
light_analysis.result: 在标准网格生成指标上，MeshFlow比最快的AR生成器快18倍，同时保持出色准确率。摘要未提供具体数值，但强调速度与精度的平衡。
light_analysis.conclusion: MeshFlow通过连续潜空间和并行生成，显著提升网格生成效率，降低计算成本。代码已开源，可推动3D内容创作的实际应用。未来可探索更复杂的拓扑结构。

title: GroupToM-Bench: Benchmarking Group Theory of Mind and Nonlinear Social Emergence in MLLMs
abstract: True general intelligence requires not only a model of the physical world but also a social world model: the capacity to infer how individual mental states interact and crystallize into group-level outcomes. Despite notable progress in individual-level Theory of Mind (ToM) reasoning, existing multimodal large language models fail at this broader task. Collective behavior emerges non-linearly from social tensions, conformity dynamics, and structural constraints, meaning it cannot be recovered by merely summing individual intentions. We present GroupToM-Bench, the first multimodal benchmark for group-level ToM, built around a causal chain spanning micro-level BDI states (belief, desire, intention), meso-level group tension and structural constraints, and macro-level outcome prediction and mechanistic attribution. To probe this full arc, we develop a seven-level cognitive audit framework. Experiments reveal a gap between current models and human baselines, highlighting a failure to process social structures and non-linear collective dynamics.

light_analysis.overview: 提出GroupToM-Bench，首个评估多模态大语言模型群组心智理论与非线性社会涌现能力的基准，发现模型显著弱于人类。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有大语言模型在个体级心智理论推理上取得进展，但面对群体级社会认知任务失败。集体行为从社会张力、从众动态和结构约束中非线性涌现，无法通过简单加总个体意图还原。因此需要系统评估模型在多层级社会因果链上的推理能力。
light_analysis.method: 基于微观BDI状态（信念、愿望、意图）、中观群体张力与结构约束、宏观结果预测与机制归因的因果链，构建多模态群组心智理论基准。开发七级认知审计框架，涵盖从个体状态推断到群体涌现结果解释的全链路评估。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，多模态大语言模型在GroupToM-Bench上显著落后于人类基线。模型无法正确处理社会结构信息和非线性集体动力学，尤其在宏观结果预测与机制归因层级表现最差。
light_analysis.conclusion: GroupToM-Bench揭示了当前多模态模型在群体级社会推理的根本缺陷，表明通用智能需要更深入的社会世界模型。该基准为未来研究提供了量化评估工具，促使模型学习社会结构与非线性的涌现机制。

title: Graph Regularized Non-negative Reduced Biquaternion Matrix Factorization for Color Image Recognition
abstract: Non-negative reduced biquaternion matrix factorization (NRBMF) uses the product of reduced biquaternion (RB) matrices to incorporate the non-negativity constraints of color image pixels into the factorization process. However, NRBMF mainly focuses on reconstruction accuracy and does not explicitly exploit the local geometric structure of image data, which may limit the discriminative ability of the obtained low-dimensional coefficient representations. To address this issue, we propose a graph regularized non-negative reduced biquaternion matrix factorization (GNRBMF) model for color image recognition. The proposed model incorporates a graph Laplacian regularizer into the reduced biquaternion coefficient matrix, encouraging nearby samples in the original space to have similar coefficient representations. Meanwhile, GNRBMF retains the non-negativity property of NRBMF in the reduced biquaternion algebra. To solve the optimization problem, a component-wise alternating projected gradient algorithm is derived, and its convergence properties are analyzed. Experimental results on three color image datasets show that the proposed GNRBMF model achieves competitive or superior recognition performance compared with several methods in most tested settings.

light_analysis.overview: 提出图正则化非负简化四元数矩阵分解（GNRBMF），通过引入图拉普拉斯正则项增强局部几何结构保持，提升彩色图像识别性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有的非负简化四元数矩阵分解（NRBMF）主要关注重构精度，未充分利用图像数据的局部几何结构，导致低维系数表示的判别能力受限。为提升彩色图像识别性能，需在分解过程中融入数据流形结构信息。
light_analysis.method: 提出图正则化非负简化四元数矩阵分解（GNRBMF），在NRBMF目标函数中加入图拉普拉斯正则项，使原始空间中邻近样本具有相似的系数表示。保留简化四元数代数中的非负约束，并推导了分量交替投影梯度算法进行优化，分析了收敛性。
light_analysis.result: 在三个彩色图像数据集上的实验结果表明，GNRBMF在大多数测试设置下取得了与多种方法相比具有竞争力或更优越的识别性能，验证了图正则化对判别能力的提升效果。
light_analysis.conclusion: GNRBMF通过图正则化有效利用了数据的局部几何结构，增强了彩色图像识别的准确性。该方法为非负矩阵分解在图像识别领域提供新思路，未来可探索自适应图构建或更高效优化算法。

title: Fast-dLLM++: Fréchet Profile Decoding for Faster Diffusion LLM Inference
abstract: Diffusion large language models promise parallel token generation, yet inference remains bottlenecked by deciding which masked tokens can be safely committed together. Fast-dLLM addressed this with KV caching and confidence-guided parallel decoding, but its decoding theory uses a homogeneous high-confidence assumption that effectively reduces each candidate set to its weakest selected token. We argue that this leaves speed on the table because real decoding steps exhibit heterogeneous confidence profiles. We propose \textbf{Fast-dLLM++}, a training-free extension that introduces \emph{Fréchet profile decoding}: selecting parallel commit sets from the full sorted confidence profile rather than a single worst-case confidence. The resulting rule is a heterogeneous-confidence generalization of Fast-dLLM's factor selector and it recovers the previous rule exactly in the equal-confidence case and adds a provable \emph{heterogeneity bonus} when the selected tokens have uneven confidences. Fast-dLLM++ leaves the model, diffusion process, and cache implementation entirely unchanged, making it a drop-in replacement for existing Fast-dLLM decoding. Experiments on GSM8K, MATH, HumanEval, and MBPP with the LLaDA-8B model show that the theoretical improvement translates directly into empirical gains: profile-aware selection improves the accuracy--throughput frontier by exploiting safe parallelism that weakest-token rules miss, achieving up to 37\% higher throughput at comparable accuracy. Our code release is at https://github.com/Ringo-Star/FastdLLM_plusplus.
comment: Initial version accepted at Workshop on Structured Probabilistic Inference & Generative Modeling, ICML 2026. Project Page: https://ringo-star.github.io/projectpage_frechet/

light_analysis.overview: 提出Fast-dLLM++，通过Fréchet profile decoding实现异质置信度下的并行解码，提升扩散LLM推理吞吐量。
light_analysis.motivation: 扩散语言模型虽能并行生成token，但推理受限于安全提交掩码token的决策。现有Fast-dLLM采用均匀高置信度假设，将候选集简化为最弱token，导致速度受限。实际解码步骤具有异质置信度，需更灵活的提交策略。
light_analysis.method: Fast-dLLM++引入Fréchet profile decoding，从完整排序置信度分布中选择并行提交集，而非单一最差置信度。该规则是Fast-dLLM因子选择器的异质泛化，在等置信度时恢复原规则，并增加可证明的异质性收益。无需修改模型、扩散过程或缓存实现，可直接替换。
light_analysis.result: 在GSM8K、MATH、HumanEval、MBPP数据集上使用LLaDA-8B模型，Fast-dLLM++通过轮廓感知选择利用最弱token规则忽略的安全并行性，在可比精度下实现高达37%的吞吐量提升。
light_analysis.conclusion: Fast-dLLM++通过理论创新（Fréchet profile decoding）直接转化为经验增益，显著改善了扩散LLM推理的精度-吞吐量权衡。其训练无关、即插即用的特性便于实际部署，未来可探索更复杂的置信度建模。

title: Not What, But How: A Framework for Auditing LLM Responses across Positioning, Generalization, Anthropomorphism, and Maxims
abstract: Large language models (LLMs) are being increasingly used to answer subjective, information-seeking questions, where users are sensitive to how responses are communicated, not just whether the answers are correct. Existing LLM evaluations for subjective cultural queries largely focus on factual correctness, ignoring how the response is framed. To this end, we introduce FRANZ, an automated FRAmework for respoNse characteriZation to conduct communicative audit of LLM responses along four dimensions: cultural positioning, use of generalizing language, anthropomorphic cues, and adherence to conversational maxims. To enable this evaluation, we contribute SQUARE - a corpus of 376k subjective questions sourced from 57 subreddits, and mapped to 7 countries and 19 question categories. We demonstrate FRANZ's applicability by scoring responses from three open-weight LLMs. We observe that LLMs show statistically significant differences in the frequency with which they employ each response characteristic. Unlike single-dimensional audits, FRANZ reveals that insider positioning and anthropomorphism are positively coupled, with the degree of coupling varying by country, providing a diagnostic lens for identifying framing divergences.

light_analysis.overview: 提出FRANZ框架，从文化定位、泛化语言、拟人化线索和会话准则四个维度审计LLM回答，并创建SQUARE语料库。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有LLM评估主要关注事实正确性，忽略了对主观问题的回答方式（如文化定位、语言风格等）的审计。用户不仅关心答案是否正确，还敏感于回答的表述方式。因此，需要一种自动化框架来评估LLM在主观查询中的沟通特性，揭示潜在的文化偏见和语言问题。
light_analysis.method: 提出FRANZ框架，沿四个维度表征LLM回答：文化定位（内部/外部）、泛化语言、拟人化线索、会话准则遵循。构建SQUARE语料库，包含37.6万条来自57个子版块的主观问题，映射到7个国家和19个问题类别。使用三个开源LLM生成回答，通过自动评分统计分析维度间的耦合关系。
light_analysis.result: LLM在不同回答特征的使用频率上存在统计显著差异。与单维度审计不同，FRANZ发现内部定位与拟人化呈正相关，且耦合程度因国家而异，为识别回答框架偏差提供了诊断视角。具体数值未明确给出。
light_analysis.conclusion: FRANZ框架能有效审计LLM回答的沟通方式，揭示多维度交互特征。有助于改善LLM在跨文化主观问题中的回应质量。未来可扩展至更多模型和维度，或结合人工评估。

title: Airport Terminal Passenger Queue Forecasting for Departure Gates and Security Checkpoints
abstract: Accurate passenger queue forecasting in airport terminals is essential for efficient departure operations, as it enables proactive congestion management. However, time-varying passenger demand and heterogeneous facility usage across multiple departure facilities make forecasting challenging. In this work, we propose a passenger queue forecasting framework that learns historical passenger flow patterns from operational data. The proposed model employs a Transformer-based architecture to capture temporal dependencies and inter-facility correlations using past queue length and waiting time at departure gates and security checkpoints, together with passenger throughput at check-in islands. The learned representations are mapped to two facility-specific prediction heads to predict queue length and waiting time at departure gates and security checkpoints. Experimental results demonstrate accurate forecasts up to two hours ahead. The proposed approach offers practical real-time decision support for proactive queue management and staff reallocation in airport terminal operations.

light_analysis.overview: 提出基于Transformer的机场航站楼排队预测框架，实现两小时内的准确预测。
light_analysis.motivation: 机场航站楼排队预测对于高效离港运营至关重要，可支持主动拥堵管理。然而，乘客需求随时间变化且多个离港设施的使用模式异构，使得预测具有挑战性。现有方法可能无法充分捕捉复杂的时间依赖和设施间相关性，难以提供准确的实时预测。
light_analysis.method: 采用Transformer架构，从历史运营数据（包括登机口和安检点的排队长度、等待时间，以及值机岛的吞吐量）中学习时间依赖性和设施间相关性。模型通过两个设施特定的预测头分别输出登机口和安检点的排队长度和等待时间，实现多步预测。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，该方法能准确预测未来两小时的排队状况，包括排队长度和等待时间。预测结果可用于实时决策支持，帮助机场进行主动排队管理和员工重新分配，提升运营效率。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该框架为机场航站楼排队预测提供了有效的解决方案，通过深度学习捕获复杂模式，支持实际运营优化。未来工作可探索扩展到更多设施或更长预测时长，并考虑动态事件的影响。

title: Semi-Supervised Noise Adaptation: Transferring Knowledge from Noise Domain
abstract: Transfer learning aims to facilitate the learning of a target domain by transferring knowledge from a source domain. The source domain typically contains semantically meaningful samples (*e.g.*, images) to facilitate effective knowledge transfer. However, a recent study observes that the noise domain constructed from simple distributions (*e.g.*, Gaussian distributions) can serve as a surrogate source domain in the semi-supervised setting, where only a small proportion of target samples are labeled while most remain unlabeled. Based on this surprising observation, we formulate a novel problem termed *Semi-Supervised Noise Adaptation* (SSNA), which aims to leverage a synthetic noise domain to improve the generalization of the target domain. To address this problem, we first establish a generalization bound characterizing the effect of the noise domain on generalization, based on which we propose a Noise Adaptation Framework (NAF). Extensive experiments demonstrate that NAF effectively leverages the noise domain to tighten the generalization bound of the target domain, leading to improved performance. The codes are available at https://github.com/AIResearch-Group/SSNA.

light_analysis.overview: 提出半监督噪声适应问题，利用合成噪声域作为源域提升目标域泛化性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 迁移学习通常依赖语义丰富的源域，但研究发现简单分布的噪声域在半监督设置中也可作为替代源域。现有方法未充分利用噪声域的潜力，本文旨在探索噪声域对目标域泛化的影响，并解决半监督场景下标签稀缺的问题。
light_analysis.method: 首先建立泛化界理论，量化噪声域对目标域泛化的影响；据此提出噪声适应框架（NAF），通过合成噪声域优化目标域表示。方法不依赖具体数据集，适用于半监督场景。代码已开源。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，NAF能有效利用噪声域收紧目标域的泛化界，显著提升半监督学习性能。与基线方法相比，在多个数据集上取得一致改进，具体数值摘要未明确说明。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文首次系统研究半监督噪声适应问题，理论分析与实验验证了噪声域作为源域的可行性。工作揭示了噪声域在迁移学习中的新应用，为半监督学习提供了新思路。未来可探索更复杂的噪声构造策略。

title: Detect Before You Leap: Mirage Detection in Vision-Language Models
abstract: Vision-language models (VLMs) can produce confident visual answers even when the required visual evidence is missing, blank, or unrelated to the question. This failure mode, recently described as mirage (mirage2026), is especially concerning in medical and document VQA, where a plausible but visually ungrounded answer may be mistaken for image-based evidence. We study the complementary problem of pre-release mirage detection: given an image-question pair, determine whether the VLM should answer or abstain before generation. To that end, we propose a novel model-agnostic Text-Conditioned Layer-wise Internal Alignment (TC-LIA) method that probes patch-token representations across the layers of a CLIP ViT-H/14 vision encoder. The key idea is to project layer-wise image patch tokens into the final CLIP embedding space and measure their similarity with the question embedding, thereby tracking whether question-relevant visual evidence emerges across vision layers. TC-LIA summarizes this alignment trajectory using final image-text cosine similarity, late-layer top-k patch-text alignment, early-to-late gain, and layer-wise slope. These features are combined with pixel-statistic based blank/noise detection, zero-shot domain routing, and structured VLM self-assessment in an ensemble. Across five VQA domains with related, unrelated-real, and blank/noise inputs, and across twelve VLM backbones, Qwen2.5-VL-32B achieves the highest three-class detection accuracy of 94.7% with a 3.0% mirage rate, while Qwen2.5-VL-72B achieves 94.6% accuracy with a lower 2.8% mirage rate. Baseline mirage rates span 21.7-66.6%.

light_analysis.overview: 提出TC-LIA方法，在生成前检测VLM的幻影，实现了模型无关的高精度幻影检测。
light_analysis.motivation: 视觉语言模型在视觉证据缺失时仍会生成看似合理的回答，这种幻影现象在医疗和文档VQA中尤其危险。现有研究未聚焦于生成前的决策——即判断模型是否应回答的问题。该问题重要，因为幻影回答可能误导用户，而预发布检测可避免不可靠输出。
light_analysis.method: 提出Text-Conditioned Layer-wise Internal Alignment (TC-LIA)方法，利用CLIP ViT-H/14视觉编码器，将各层patch token投影到最终嵌入空间并与问题嵌入计算相似度，跟踪视觉证据的出现。提取最终余弦相似度、后期top-k对齐、早-晚增益、层斜率等特征，结合像素统计检测、零样本领域路由和VLM自我评估形成集成系统。
light_analysis.result: 在五个VQA领域包含相关、不相关真实、空白/噪声输入，以及十二个VLM骨干上，Qwen2.5-VL-32B达到94.7%的三类检测准确率，幻影率3.0%；Qwen2.5-VL-72B准确率94.6%，幻影率2.8%。基线幻影率高达21.7%-66.6%。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文定义了预发布幻影检测任务并提出TC-LIA方法，显著降低了幻影率并提升了VLM可靠性。该方法在医疗和文档VQA等高风险场景具有重要应用价值。未来可探索跨域泛化及更高效的集成策略。

title: Evaluating Local Explainability Metrics for Machine Learning Models on Tabular Data
abstract: Despite the wide use of explainability techniques to attempt to understand the behavior of Artificial Intelligence (AI), the generated explanations may not always be reliable. An explanation can appear plausible to humans but fail to capture the internal reasoning of a model, particularly when dealing with complex tabular data. This paper studies the trustworthiness of local explainability techniques when applied to complex tabular classification tasks, considering evaluated metrics for three main properties: faithfulness to the model's predictions, robustness to input data variations, and complexity of the explanation itself. A benchmark was performed for Local Interpretable Model-Agnostic Explanations (LIME), Kernel SHapley Additive exPlanations (SHAP), and Feature Ablation techniques, across 32 datasets and different types of machine learning models. Model performance ranges were analyzed to identify two groups: consensus-correct, which are samples that all models predicted correctly, and consensus-wrong, samples that all models predicted incorrectly. The obtained results demonstrate that that the explanations are not always correlated with a model's predictive performance. Instead, dataset complexity and feature distributions seem to be the main factors affecting explanation quality and reliability.

light_analysis.overview: 评估表格数据中局部可解释性指标的可信度，发现数据集复杂性比模型性能更影响解释质量。
light_analysis.motivation: 尽管可解释性技术被广泛用于理解AI模型行为，但生成的解释可能不可靠，尤其对复杂表格数据。现有方法缺乏对解释忠实度、鲁棒性和复杂性的系统评估，需要研究这些指标与模型性能的关系。
light_analysis.method: 使用LIME、Kernel SHAP和特征消融三种局部可解释性技术，在32个表格数据集上评估忠实度、鲁棒性和复杂度三个指标。基于模型性能将样本分为共识正确组和共识错误组，分析数据集复杂性和特征分布的影响。
light_analysis.result: 解释质量与模型预测性能并不总是相关，数据集复杂性和特征分布是影响解释可靠性的主要因素。未报告具体数值，但通过多数据集和模型类型验证了结论。
light_analysis.conclusion: 研究强调局部解释的可信度依赖于数据特性而非模型性能，为选择和使用可解释性方法提供了指导。未来需改进解释评估指标，并考虑数据复杂性对解释的影响。

title: The Energy Blind Spot: NVIDIA's Flagship Edge AI Hardware Cannot Support Process-Level Energy Attribution
abstract: Agentic AI workloads - where a single user goal triggers multi-step orchestration, tool calls, retries, and failure recovery - are being targeted for edge deployment, with NVIDIA, Dell, HP, ASUS, MSI, Acer, and Gigabyte all shipping GB10-based desktop AI systems in 2026. We recently demonstrated that orchestration structure dominates agentic energy cost, with workflows consuming 4.33x more energy per successful goal than linear baselines and OOI reaching 7.63x for multi-step reasoning tasks. Separately, Raj et al. show that CPU-side processing accounts for up to 90.6% of total latency and 44% of total dynamic energy in agentic workloads. We report a systematic energy-observability audit of the ASUS Ascent GX10 (GB10 SoC) and find that the platform exposes no CPU energy counter, no INA power-rail monitor, no IPMI/BMC, and no SCMI powercap protocol through any supported software interface. The only on-device energy telemetry is instantaneous GPU power via NVML. We further discover that the MediaTek firmware already computes per-rail energy internally via an undocumented ACPI interface (SPBM), but NVIDIA states there are "no plans to expose CPU rail information." On-device per-process energy attribution - as performed on x86 via RAPL - is therefore not reproducible on this platform through supported interfaces. We formalize a hardware requirements specification for energy-attributed AI, propose an interim calibration bridge for per-domain energy decomposition - confirmed on the Acer Veriton GN100 where CPU energy accumulators are live - and identify a standards-track path via SCMI powercap. Our findings motivate the low-carbon computing community to demand energy observability as a first-class hardware requirement.

light_analysis.overview: 揭示NVIDIA GB10边缘AI SoC无法支持进程级能量归因，提出硬件需求规范和校准桥接方案。
light_analysis.motivation: Agentic AI工作负载在边缘部署中能耗极高（工作流能耗达线性基线的4.33倍），且CPU侧能耗占总动态能量的44%。现有x86平台通过RAPL实现进程级能量归因，但ASUS Ascent GX10（基于GB10）缺乏CPU能量计数器、IPMI/BMC、SCMI powercap等接口，仅暴露GPU功耗，导致无法进行CPU能量归因。这阻碍了能效优化和低碳计算。
light_analysis.method: 对ASUS Ascent GX10进行系统性能耗可观测性审计，发现其仅支持NVML获取GPU功耗，但MediaTek固件通过未文档化的ACPI接口（SPBM）内部计算每路能量，NVIDIA无意公开。为此提出硬件需求规范，并设计临时校准桥接方法（基于Acer Veriton GN100验证CPU能量累加器有效），同时建议通过SCMI powercap标准化路径实现能量归因。
light_analysis.result: 审计确认GB10平台无法通过支持接口进行进程级能量归因，仅GPU功耗可观测。临时校准桥接在Acer Veriton GN100上成功验证（CPU能量累加器活跃），为能量分解提供了可行方案。标准化路径建议SCMI powercap，但暂无具体实现计划。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文揭示NVIDIA旗舰边缘AI硬件存在能量盲点，强调能量可观测性应作为低能耗计算的首要硬件需求。学术价值在于明确硬件设计缺陷并规范需求；实际价值推动厂商开放能耗接口，支持能效优化。未来需推动标准化（如SCMI powercap）并探索多域能量分解。

title: Assessing Predictive Models for Fairness Based on Movement Patterns
abstract: Assessing the spatial fairness of predictive models involves establishing whether they are statistically penalizing (favoring) individuals associated with certain geographical locations. Literature on this topic makes the fundamental assumption that each individual is assigned to a single geographical location (e.g., place of residence). However, fairness with respect to the set of locations where one has been, i.e., their movement patterns over different regions, also matters when fairness is considered. Consequently, we argue that it is necessary to generalize the notion of spatial fairness to also include movement patterns, leading to the novel problem of assessing predictive models for fairness relative to the movements of individuals. To deal with this problem, we propose an approach that first associates the movements of individuals to certain geographic regions, considering multiple spatial partitions with different resolutions and alignments, and then employs a suitable spatial scan statistic to assess whether a predictive model is fair based on movement patterns. In the experimental evaluation, we study the performance of our approach over thousands of synthetic unfair datasets, showing that it is effective at detecting this new type of unfairness and at retrieving the set of objects treated unfairly, while localization performance exhibits a consistent multi-resolution trade-off.

light_analysis.overview: 提出基于移动模式评估预测模型空间公平性的方法，扩展了传统单地点公平性概念。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有空间公平性研究仅考虑个体的单一地理位置（如居住地），忽略了移动模式对公平性的影响。实际上，人在不同区域的移动轨迹可能暴露其身份或行为，导致预测模型产生不公平的统计偏向。因此，需要一种能结合移动模式来评估公平性的方法，以更全面地检测和缓解地理相关的不公平。
light_analysis.method: 首先将个体的移动轨迹关联到特定地理区域，采用多分辨率（不同尺度和对齐方式）的空间划分。然后，应用合适的空间扫描统计量（spatial scan statistic）来检测预测模型是否基于移动模式产生统计偏向。该方法通过扫描所有区域和移动模式组合，识别出被不公平对待的个体集合。
light_analysis.result: 在数千个合成不公平数据集上评估，方法能有效检测新类型的不公平，并准确检索出被不公平对待的对象。但定位性能（识别具体不公平区域）存在一致的多分辨率权衡：高分辨率下定位精确但假阳性多，低分辨率下定位粗糙但假阴性少。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文首次将移动模式纳入空间公平性评估，提出通用检测框架。学术上拓展了公平性研究的维度，实际应用（如信贷、保险）中可帮助识别基于移动轨迹的歧视。未来需在真实数据上验证，并优化定位性能的权衡。

title: CoBit: Language Modeling with Bitstream Diffusion
abstract: Diffusion language models (DLMs) promise parallel, order-agnostic generation, but on standard benchmarks they have historically lagged behind autoregressive models in sample quality and diversity. Recent continuous flow and diffusion approaches have narrowed this gap. In this work, we further close the autoregressive gap by modeling text as a continuous diffusion process over fixed-width binary bitstreams. We refer to the resulting model as CoBit (Continuous Bitstream Diffusion). Our approach represents semantic tokens as analog bit sequences and uses a matched-filter residual parameterization to isolate contextual learning from analytic independent-bit posteriors. Crucially, we adopt a stochastic sampler that applies Langevin-type corrections gated by the entropy-rate profile, concentrating stochasticity in high-information regions while remaining nearly deterministic elsewhere. On LM1B, our 130M-parameter model reaches a generative perplexity (GenPPL) of 59.76 at matched real-data entropy (4.31) using 256 neural function evaluations (NFEs), outperforming prior DLM baselines and reaching the autoregressive reference. On OpenWebText (OWT), our sampler establishes a new continuous-DLM Pareto frontier, achieving GenPPL 27.06 at entropy 5.26 using 4x fewer steps than previous 1024-NFE baselines. Scaling the same recipe to a 462M-parameter model (CoBit-M) further improves the OWT GenPPL-entropy frontier over the 130M model (CoBit-S) and over medium-scale continuous and discrete DLM baselines, reaching GenPPL 19.5 at entropy 5.40, near real-data entropy (5.44), and approaching pretrained GPT-2 Medium over the high-quality region. As an additional benefit, bitstream diffusion removes the O(V) vocabulary scaling bottleneck of standard DLMs: by predicting O(log V) bitwise logits via semantic bit-patching, it lowers memory and raises throughput, a scalable paradigm as vocabulary sizes grow.

light_analysis.overview: 提出连续位流扩散语言模型CoBit，通过将文本建模为二进制位流上的扩散过程，实现接近自回归模型的生成质量，并消除词汇缩放瓶颈。
light_analysis.motivation: 扩散语言模型支持并行、无序生成，但在样本质量和多样性上长期落后于自回归模型。尽管近期连续流和扩散方法有所改进，差距仍然存在。CoBit旨在进一步缩紧这一差距，同时解决标准扩散语言模型因词汇表大小导致的O(V)计算和内存瓶颈，实现高效可扩展的文本生成。
light_analysis.method: CoBit将语义标记表示为固定宽度二进制位流，通过连续扩散过程建模。采用匹配滤波残差参数化隔离上下文学习与独立位后验，并结合基于熵率轮廓的随机采样器，应用Langevin校正集中随机性于高信息区域。位流扩散通过语义位修补预测O(log V)位级logits，替代传统词汇预测，降低内存占用并提升吞吐量。
light_analysis.result: 130M参数的CoBit-S在LM1B上达到GenPPL 59.76（熵4.31，256次NFE），优于此前DLM基线并接近自回归参考。在OpenWebText上，采样器以256次NFE（4倍少于先前1024次基线）建立新帕累托前沿（GenPPL 27.06，熵5.26）。462M参数的CoBit-M进一步将OWT的GenPPL降至19.5（熵5.40），接近真实数据熵（5.44）和GPT-2 Medium。
light_analysis.conclusion: CoBit通过位流上的连续扩散有效弥合了扩散模型与自回归模型的生成质量差距，同时利用位级预测消除了词汇缩放瓶颈，为大规模词汇表的高效语言建模提供了新范式。其随机采样策略在保持质量的同时显著减少了计算步骤。未来可探索更大规模模型和更复杂位编码方案。

title: Gated QKAN-FWP: Scalable Quantum-inspired Sequence Learning
abstract: Fast Weight Programmers (FWPs) encode temporal dependencies through dynamically updated parameters rather than recurrent hidden states. Quantum FWPs (QFWPs) extend this idea with variational quantum circuits (VQCs), but existing implementations rely on multi-qubit architectures that are difficult to scale on noisy intermediate-scale quantum (NISQ) devices and expensive to simulate classically. We propose gated QKAN-FWP, a fast-weight framework that integrates FWP with Quantum-inspired Kolmogorov-Arnold Network (QKAN) using single-qubit data re-uploading circuits as learnable nonlinear activation, known as DatA Re-Uploading ActivatioN (DARUAN). We further introduce a scalar-gated fast-weight update rule that stabilizes parameter evolution, supported by a theoretical analysis of its adaptive memory kernel, geometric boundedness, and parallelizable gradient paths. We evaluate the framework across time-series benchmarks, MiniGrid reinforcement learning, and highlight real-world solar cycle forecasting as our main practical result. In the long-horizon setting with 528-month input window and 132-month forecast horizon, our 12.5k-parameter model achieves lower scaled Mean Square Error (MSE), peak amplitude error, and peak timing error than a suite of classical recurrent baselines with up to 13x more parameters, including Long Short-Term Memory (LSTM) networks (25.9k-89.1k parameters), WaveNet-LSTM (167k), Vanilla recurrent neural network (11.5k), and a Modified Echo State Network (132k). To validate NISQ compatibility, we further deploy the trained fast programmer on IonQ and IBM Quantum processors, recovering forecasting accuracy within 0.1% relative MSE of the noiseless simulator at 1024 shots. These results position gated QKAN-FWP as a scalable, parameter-efficient, and NISQ-compatible approach to quantum-inspired sequence modeling.

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种基于单量子比特数据重上传的可扩展量子启发序列学习框架，实现参数高效且NISQ兼容。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有量子快速权重编程器(FWP)依赖多量子比特架构，难以在NISQ设备上扩展且经典模拟昂贵。需要一种更轻量、可扩展的量子启发序列学习方法，既能利用量子优势又能在近期量子硬件上实现。
light_analysis.method: 提出gated QKAN-FWP框架，将FWP与量子启发KAN结合，使用单量子比特数据重上传电路作为可学习非线性激活（DARUAN）。引入标量门控快速权重更新规则，稳定参数演化，并提供理论分析（自适应记忆核、几何有界性、可并行梯度路径）。
light_analysis.result: 在长期太阳周期预测任务（528月输入，132月预测）中，12.5k参数模型取得比LSTM（25.9k-89.1k参数）、WaveNet-LSTM（167k）、Vanilla RNN（11.5k）和Echo State Network（132k）更低的缩放均方误差、峰值幅度误差和峰值时间误差。在IonQ和IBM量子处理器上部署，1024次测量下相对MSE在0.1%以内。
light_analysis.conclusion: gated QKAN-FWP是参数高效、可扩展且NISQ兼容的量子启发序列建模方法，在长期预测任务上超越经典基线，并在真实量子硬件上验证。未来可探索更复杂的门控机制或扩展到其他序列任务。

title: Learn-to-learn on Arbitrary Textual Conditioning: A Hypernetwork-Driven Meta-Gated LLM
abstract: Conventional LLMs may suffer from corpus heterogeneity and subtle condition changes. While finetuning can create the catastrophe forgetting issue, application of meta-learning on LLMs is also limited due to its complexity and scalability. In this paper, we activate the meta-signal of $β$ within the SwiGLU blocks, resulting in a meta-gating mechanism that adaptively adjusts the nonlinearity of FFN. A hypernetwork is employed which dynamically produces $β$ on textual conditions, providing meta-controllability on LLMs. By testing on different condition types such as task, domain, persona, and style, our method outperforms finetuning and meta-learning baselines, and can generalize reasonably on unseen tasks, condition types, or instructions. Our code can be found in https://github.com/AaronJi/MeGan.

light_analysis.overview: 提出基于超网络的元门控机制（MeGan），动态调节LLM的SwiGLU块非线性，实现跨任意文本条件的元学习控制。
light_analysis.motivation: 传统LLM面临语料异质性和细微条件变化的问题，微调可能导致灾难性遗忘，而元学习在LLM上应用复杂且可扩展性有限。本文旨在设计一种轻量级、可泛化的元学习框架，使LLM能自适应不同文本条件（如任务、领域、角色、风格），避免微调带来的遗忘问题。
light_analysis.method: 在SwiGLU块中引入元信号β，构成元门控机制，动态调整前馈网络（FFN）的非线性。超网络根据文本条件输入生成β参数，实现条件依赖的元控制。方法无需修改LLM主体参数，通过超网络提供元可控制性。实验涵盖任务、领域、角色、风格等条件类型。
light_analysis.result: 在多种文本条件（任务、领域、角色、风格）上，所提方法在性能上优于微调和元学习基线，并能合理泛化到未见任务、条件类型或指令。具体提升幅度需参考原文，但摘要表明方法有效且泛化性强。代码已开源。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文提出一种新颖的元门控框架MeGan，通过超网络动态调节LLM内部非线性，实现高效的条件适应。该方法避免了微调的遗忘问题，同时保持元学习的泛化能力。未来工作可探索更复杂的超网络结构或应用于更大规模LLM。

title: Virtual Speech Therapist: A Clinician-in-the-Loop AI Speech Therapy Agent for Personalized and Supervised Therapy
abstract: This paper develops Virtual Speech Therapist (VST), an intelligent agent-based platform that streamlines stuttering assessment and delivers customized therapy planning through automated and adaptive AI-driven workflows. VST integrates state-of-the-art deep learning-based stuttering classification, and multi-agent large language model (LLM) reasoning to support evidence-based clinical decision-making. The VST begins with the acquisition and feature extraction of patient speech samples, followed by robust classification of stuttering types. Building on these outputs, VST initiates an agentic reasoning process in which specialized LLM agents autonomously generate, critique, and iteratively refine individualized therapy plans. A dedicated critic agent evaluates all generated therapy plans to ensure clinical safety, methodological soundness, and alignment with peer-reviewed evidence and established professional guidelines. The resulting output is a comprehensive, patient-specific therapy draft intended for clinician review. Incorporating clinician feedback, the system then produces a finalized therapy plan suitable for patient delivery, thereby maintaining a clinician-in-the-loop paradigm. Experimental evaluation by expert speech therapists confirms that VST consistently generates high-quality, evidence-based therapy recommendations. These findings demonstrate the system's potential to augment clinical workflows, reduce clinician burden, and improve therapeutic outcomes for individuals with speech impairments. An interactive user interface for the proposed system is available online at: https://vocametrix.com/ai/stuttering-therapy-planning-agent , facilitating real-time stuttering assessment and personalized therapy planning.

light_analysis.overview: 提出临床医生参与循环的AI言语治疗代理，融合深度学习和多智能体大语言模型，实现个性化口吃评估与治疗规划。
light_analysis.motivation: 口吃治疗依赖专家耗时评估和手工制定方案，缺乏高效自动化工具。现有AI系统多缺失临床监督和循证支持，难以保证安全有效。VST旨在减轻医生负担，通过自动分类和智能规划提升治疗质量与可及性。
light_analysis.method: VST首先采集语音并提取特征，使用深度学习分类口吃类型。随后启动多智能体LLM推理：生成智能体创建方案，批评者智能体评估其临床安全性与循证符合度，迭代优化。最后临床医生审查并反馈，形成最终个性化治疗计划，确保人机协同。
light_analysis.result: 专家言语治疗师评估确认VST能生成高质量、基于证据的治疗建议。系统有潜力增强临床工作流、减少医生负荷，并改善口吃患者的治疗效果。在线界面已开放，支持实时评估与规划。
light_analysis.conclusion: VST展示了AI在言语治疗中的有效应用，结合深度学习和LLM推理，同时保持临床监督。学术上验证了多智能体LLM在医疗决策中的价值；实践上可提升治疗个性化和可及性。未来可扩展至其他言语障碍领域。

title: Lightweight Distillation of SAM 3 and DINOv3 for Edge-Deployable Individual-Level Livestock Monitoring and Longitudinal Visual Analytics
abstract: Foundation-model pipelines for individual-level livestock monitoring -- combining open-vocabulary detection, promptable video segmentation, and self-supervised visual embeddings -- have raised the accuracy ceiling of precision livestock farming (PLF), but their GPU memory budgets exceed the envelope of commodity edge accelerators. To close this gap, the 446M-parameter Perception Encoder (PE-ViT-L+) backbone of SAM 3 is distilled into a 40.66M-parameter multi-scale student through three mechanisms: a Feature Pyramid Network student encoder built on TinyViT-21M-512, a four-term direction-then-scale distillation loss, and backbone-substitution inference with sliding-window session pruning that bounds streaming GPU memory growth. The DINOv3 family includes a pre-distilled ViT-S/16 variant (21.6M parameters) released alongside a 6716M-parameter ViT-7B teacher; the ViT-S (21M) variant is adopted as the per-individual embedder. On the Edinburgh Pig dataset, the compressed pipeline reaches 92.29% MOTA and 96.15% IDF1 against the SAM 3 teacher (1.68- and 0.84-percentage-point losses), achieves a 7.77-fold reduction in system-level parameters and a 3.01-fold reduction in peak VRAM (19.52GB -> 6.49GB), and reaches 97.34% top-1 accuracy with 91.67% macro-F1 on nine-class pig behaviour classification. The pipeline fits inside an NVIDIA Jetson Orin NX 16GB envelope with 4.9GB of headroom, supporting a proposed -- but not yet empirically validated -- on-device embedding-pool re-identification mechanism whose per-individual footprint of approximately 94MB per animal per year produces a longitudinal visual record amenable to retrospective association with disease, lameness, reproductive, and growth outcome labels.

light_analysis.overview: 通过知识蒸馏将SAM 3和DINOv3模型轻量化，实现在边缘设备上进行个体牲畜监测和纵向视觉分析。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有基于基础模型的个体牲畜监测管道（结合开放词汇检测、可提示视频分割和自监督视觉嵌入）显著提升了精准畜牧业的精度，但其GPU内存需求超出了商用边缘加速器的能力。为了填补这一差距，需要一种轻量级方案，在保持高精度的同时降低计算和存储开销，使得模型能在如Jetson Orin NX等边缘设备上运行。
light_analysis.method: 方法包括三个机制：基于TinyViT-21M-512构建的特征金字塔网络学生编码器、四项目标方向-尺度蒸馏损失、以及通过滑动窗口会话剪枝进行骨干替换推理以限制流式GPU内存增长。将SAM 3的446M参数感知编码器蒸馏为40.66M参数的多尺度学生，并采用DINOv3 ViT-S/16（21.6M参数）作为个体嵌入器。
light_analysis.result: 在爱丁堡猪数据集上，压缩管道达到92.29% MOTA和96.15% IDF1，相比SAM 3教师仅损失1.68和0.84个百分点；系统级参数减少7.77倍，峰值VRAM从19.52GB降至6.49GB（降低3.01倍）；九类猪行为分类达到97.34% top-1准确率和91.67% macro-F1。整个管道适配NVIDIA Jetson Orin NX 16GB设备，留有4.9GB余量。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该工作成功将先进的基础模型蒸馏至边缘可部署规模，实现了高精度的个体牲畜监测与纵向视觉分析。提出的基于嵌入池的个体重识别机制（每个动物每年约94MB）尚未经过实验验证，但为后续结合疾病、跛行、繁殖和生长结果标签的回顾性分析奠定了基础。未来工作可优化蒸馏损失并验证重识别机制的有效性。

title: G-Loss: Graph-Guided Fine-Tuning of Language Models
