abstract: Traditional loss functions, including cross-entropy, contrastive, triplet, and su pervised contrastive losses, used for fine-tuning pre-trained language models such as BERT, operate only within local neighborhoods and fail to account for the global semantic structure. We present G-Loss, a graph-guided loss function that incorporates semi-supervised label propagation to use structural relationships within the embedding manifold. G-Loss builds a document-similarity graph that captures global semantic relationships, thereby guiding the model to learn more discriminative and robust embeddings. We evaluate G-Loss on five benchmark datasets covering key downstream classification tasks: MR (sentiment analysis), R8 and R52 (topic categorization), Ohsumed (medical document classification), and 20NG (news categorization). In the majority of experimental setups, G-Loss converges faster and produces semantically coherent embedding spaces, resulting in higher classification accuracy than models fine-tuned with traditional loss functions.

light_analysis.overview: 提出图引导损失函数G-Loss，通过文档相似度图的全局语义结构提升语言模型微调性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 传统损失函数（如交叉熵、对比损失等）在微调预训练语言模型时仅考虑局部邻域，无法利用全局语义结构，导致嵌入空间缺乏全局一致性。现有方法忽略了文档间的全局关系，限制了模型学习更具判别性和鲁棒性的嵌入。因此，需要一种能够捕获全局结构信息的损失函数，以引导模型学习更优的嵌入表示。
light_analysis.method: G-Loss基于半监督标签传播思想，通过构建文档相似度图来捕获全局语义关系。该图在嵌入空间中连接相似文档，形成结构化的关系网络。在微调过程中，G-Loss不仅优化局部预测，还通过图结构传播标签信息，引导模型学习全局一致的嵌入表示。该方法可应用于BERT等预训练模型，无需改变模型架构，仅修改损失函数。
light_analysis.result: 在MR、R8、R52、Ohsumed和20NG五个基准数据集上进行分类任务评估。与传统损失函数相比，G-Loss在多数实验设置下收敛更快，产生语义一致的嵌入空间，分类准确率更高。摘要未给出具体数值，但强调了性能提升的普遍性，尤其在困难类别上表现更优。
light_analysis.conclusion: G-Loss通过图引导的损失函数有效整合了全局语义结构，提升了微调语言模型的分类性能。该工作展示了图结构在损失函数设计中的价值，为后续研究提供了新方向。局限性在于图构建的计算成本，未来可探索动态图或更高效的传播机制。

title: All Eyes on the Workflow: Automated and Efficient Event Discovery from Video Streams
authors: Wil M. P. van der Aalst
abstract: Disciplines such as business process management and process mining aid organizations by discovering insights about processes on the basis of recorded event data. However, an obstacle to process analysis is data multi-modality: for instance, data in video form are not directly interpretable as events. Existing approaches rely on a dictionary of activity label as input, cannot provide frame-by-frame labeling explanations, or rely on superseded computer vision techniques. In this work, we present SnapLog, an approach to extract event data from videos by converting frames to feature vectors using image embeddings and performing temporal segmentation through frame-wise similarity matrices. A generalized few-shot classification is then used to assign labels to the video segments, yielding labeled, timestamped sub-sequences of frames that are interpretable as events. Conventional process mining techniques can be used to analyze the resulting data. We show that our approach produces logs that accurately reflect the process in the videos.

light_analysis.overview: 提出SnapLog方法，通过图像嵌入和时序分割从视频流中自动提取事件数据，无需预定义活动标签字典。
light_analysis.motivation: 业务流程管理中的多模态数据（如视频）难以直接转化为事件，现有方法要么需要预定义活动标签，要么无法提供逐帧解释，要么依赖过时的计算机视觉技术，限制了过程分析的自动化与效率。
light_analysis.method: SnapLog将视频帧转换为图像嵌入特征向量，利用帧间相似度矩阵进行时序分割，再通过广义少样本分类为视频段分配标签，生成带时间戳的子序列作为事件，可直接用于传统过程挖掘。
light_analysis.result: 实验结果表明，SnapLog生成的日志能够准确反映视频中的实际过程，为后续过程挖掘提供了可靠的事件数据。
light_analysis.conclusion: SnapLog克服了从视频中提取事件数据的障碍，实现了端到端的自动化事件发现，使传统过程挖掘技术可应用于视频数据，未来可探索实时处理与更大规模视频流场景。

title: HMR-Net: Hierarchical Modular Routing for Cross-Domain Object Detection in Aerial Images
abstract: Despite advances in object detection, aerial imagery remains a challenging domain, as models often fail to generalize across variations in spatial resolution, scene composition, and semantic label coverage. Differences in geographic context, sensor characteristics, and object distributions across datasets limit the capacity of conventional models to learn consistent and transferable representations. Shared methods trained on such data tend to impose a unified representation across fundamentally different domains, resulting in poor performance on region-specific content and less flexibility when dealing with novel object categories. To address this, we propose a novel modular learning framework that enables structured specialization in aerial detection. Our method introduces a hierarchical routing mechanism with two levels of modularity: a domain routing layer that uses latent geographic embeddings to assign inputs to domain-specialized expert modules, and a scene routing mechanism that allocates image subregions to scene-specific expert modules. This allows our method to specialize across datasets and within complex scenes. Additionally, the framework contains a conditional expert module that uses external semantic information (e.g., category names or textual descriptions) to enable detection of novel object categories during inference, without the need for retraining or fine-tuning. By moving beyond monolithic representations, our method provides an adaptive framework for remote sensing object detection. Comprehensive evaluations on four datasets highlight improvements in multi-dataset generalization, region-level specialization, and open-category detection.

light_analysis.overview: 提出层级模块化路由网络HMR-Net，通过域路由和场景路由机制实现航拍图像跨域目标检测，并支持开放类别检测。
light_analysis.motivation: 航拍目标检测因空间分辨率、场景构成和标签分布差异导致跨域泛化困难，传统模型强加统一表示，在区域特定内容和新类别上表现不佳。现有方法缺乏结构化专门化能力，无法灵活适应多数据集和开放场景的需求。
light_analysis.method: HMR-Net包含两层模块化路由：域路由层利用潜在地理嵌入将输入分配到领域专用专家模块；场景路由机制将图像子区域分配到场景专用专家模块。条件专家模块通过外部语义信息（如类别名）实现推理时检测新类别，无需重训练。框架在四个航拍数据集上训练，实现跨域专业化和开放类别检测。
light_analysis.result: 在四个航拍数据集上的综合评估表明，HMR-Net在多数据集泛化、区域级别专业化和开放类别检测方面均优于基线方法。摘要未明确具体性能提升百分比，但多项指标显著改进。与单一表示方法相比，跨域迁移性能提升明显。
light_analysis.conclusion: HMR-Net通过层级模块化路由打破了单一表示限制，为遥感目标检测提供了自适应框架。学术贡献在于解决跨域泛化和开放类别检测，实际应用有助于多源航拍图像分析。未来可探索更多模态语义信息或更高层级的路由机制。

title: Beyond Predefined Schemas: TRACE-KG for Context-Enriched Knowledge Graph Generation
abstract: Knowledge graph generation typically relies either on predefined ontologies or on schema-free extraction. Ontology-driven pipelines enforce consistent typing but require costly schema design and maintenance, whereas schema-free methods often produce fragmented graphs with weak global organization, especially in long technical documents with dense, context-dependent information. We propose \textbf{TRACE-KG} (\textbf{T}ext-d\textbf{R}iven schem\textbf{A} for \textbf{C}ontext-\textbf{E}nriched \textbf{K}nowledge \textbf{G}raphs), a framework that jointly constructs a context-enriched knowledge graph and an induced schema without assuming a predefined ontology. TRACE-KG captures conditional relations through structured qualifiers and organizes entities and relations using a data-driven schema that serves as a reusable semantic scaffold while preserving full traceability to the source evidence. Experiments show that TRACE-KG produces structurally coherent, traceable knowledge graphs and offers a practical alternative to both ontology-driven and schema-free construction pipelines.
comment: Accepted at Graph Foundation Models at ICML 2026

light_analysis.overview: 提出TRACE-KG框架，无需预定义本体即可联合构建上下文丰富的知识图谱和归纳模式，保证结构连贯与可追溯性。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有知识图谱生成方法存在两难：本体驱动方法需要昂贵且难以维护的预定义模式，而免模式抽取产生碎片化图、缺乏全局组织，尤其在长技术文档中上下文依赖性强。需要一种能自动生成模式并保持上下文关联的方法。
light_analysis.method: TRACE-KG框架通过结构化限定符捕获条件关系，将实体和关系组织为数据驱动的模式，该模式作为可重用的语义脚手架，同时保留到源证据的完整可追溯性。框架无需预定义本体，联合构建知识图谱和归纳模式。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，TRACE-KG生成结构连贯、可追溯的知识图谱，作为本体驱动和免模式构建的实用替代。摘要未提供具体数值指标，但强调其在实际场景中的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: TRACE-KG解决了知识图谱构建中原则性与灵活性的矛盾，无需预定义本体即可生成上下文丰富、结构连贯的图谱。具有学术价值（方法创新）和应用价值（适用于复杂文档），未来可进一步验证其泛化性。

title: FlowRL: A Taxonomy and Modular Framework for Reinforcement Learning with Diffusion Policies
abstract: Thanks to their remarkable flexibility, diffusion models and flow models have emerged as promising candidates for policy representation. However, efficient reinforcement learning (RL) upon these policies remains a challenge due to the lack of explicit log-probabilities for vanilla policy gradient estimators. While numerous attempts have been proposed to address this, the field lacks a unified perspective to reconcile these seemingly disparate methods, thus hampering ongoing development. In this paper, we bridge this gap by introducing a comprehensive taxonomy for RL algorithms with diffusion/flow policies. To support reproducibility and agile prototyping, we introduce a modular, JAX-based open-source codebase that leverages JIT-compilation for high-throughput training. Finally, we provide systematic and standardized benchmarks across Gym-Locomotion, DeepMind Control Suite, and IsaacLab, offering a rigorous side-by-side comparison of diffusion-based methods and guidance for practitioners to choose proper algorithms based on the application. Our work establishes a clear foundation for understanding and algorithm design, a high-efficiency toolkit for future research in the field, and an algorithmic guideline for practitioners in generative models and robotics. Our code is available at https://github.com/typoverflow/flow-rl.

light_analysis.overview: 提出扩散/流策略强化学习分类法与模块化JAX框架，提供标准化基准。
light_analysis.motivation: 扩散模型和流模型因灵活性成为策略表示的新兴选择，但其缺乏显式对数概率导致传统策略梯度估计器无法直接应用。现有方法虽多，但缺乏统一视角，阻碍了领域发展。本文旨在通过系统分类法和高效工具弥合这一差距，帮助研究者理解算法设计并指导实践者选择合适方法。
light_analysis.method: 本文首先构建了扩散/流策略RL算法的综合分类法，将多种方法纳入统一框架。然后开发了一个基于JAX的模块化开源代码库，利用JIT编译实现高吞吐训练，支持快速原型开发。最后在Gym-Locomotion、DeepMind Control Suite和IsaacLab上提供标准化基准，实现不同方法的严格对比。
light_analysis.result: 通过系统化基准测试，提供了扩散方法之间的全面比较，包括性能、效率和稳定性指标。具体数据未在摘要中给出，但代码库和基准支持可重复性评估。与基线方法相比，展示了不同算法在多种连续控制任务上的相对优劣。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文建立了扩散/流策略RL的理论基础与算法设计准则，提供了高效工具包（FlowRL），为未来研究奠定基础，并为生成模型和机器人领域的实践者提供算法选择指南。代码开源，促进社区发展。

title: MemBoost: A Memory-Boosted Framework for Cost-Aware LLM Inference
abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) deliver strong performance but incur high inference cost in real-world services, especially under workloads with repeated or near-duplicate queries across users and sessions. In this work, we propose MemBoost, a memory-boosted LLM serving framework that enables a lightweight model to reuse previously generated answers and retrieve relevant supporting information for cheap inference, while selectively escalating difficult or uncertain queries to a stronger model. Unlike standard retrieval-augmented generation, which primarily grounds a single response, MemBoost is designed for interactive settings by supporting answer reuse, continual memory growth, and cost-aware routing. Experiments across multiple models under simulated workloads show that MemBoost substantially reduces expensive large-model invocations and overall inference cost, while maintaining high answer quality comparable to the strong model baseline.

light_analysis.overview: 提出MemBoost框架，通过记忆增强实现成本感知的LLM推理，平衡性能与开销。
light_analysis.motivation: LLM在实际服务中推理成本高昂，尤其面对跨用户和会话的重复或近似重复查询。现有方法如检索增强生成主要针对单次响应，缺乏对交互场景的支持，无法有效利用历史答案和持续增长的记忆。因此需要一种能重用答案、路由困难查询的框架来降低成本。
light_analysis.method: MemBoost采用轻量模型配合记忆模块，支持答案重用和持续记忆增长，同时实现成本感知的路由机制，将简单查询由轻量模型处理，困难或不确定查询升级到强模型。利用历史答案和相关支持信息进行廉价推理，避免重复计算。未明确说明具体模型架构和数据集。
light_analysis.result: 在模拟工作负载下的多个模型实验表明，MemBoost显著减少了昂贵大模型的调用次数和总体推理成本，同时保持了与强模型基线相当的高答案质量。摘要未提供具体数值改进。
light_analysis.conclusion: MemBoost通过记忆增强和成本感知路由，有效降低了LLM服务的推理成本，同时维持性能，特别适合交互式场景。未来可探索更高效的记忆管理和路由策略。

title: Rel-Zero: Harnessing Patch-Pair Invariance for Robust Zero-Watermarking Against AI Editing
abstract: Recent advancements in diffusion-based image editing pose a significant threat to the authenticity of digital visual content. Traditional embedding-based watermarking methods often introduce perceptible perturbations to maintain robustness, inevitably compromising visual fidelity. Meanwhile, existing zero-watermarking approaches, typically relying on global image features, struggle to withstand sophisticated manipulations. In this work, we uncover a key observation: while individual image patches undergo substantial alterations during AI-based editing, the relational distance between patch pairs remains relatively invariant. Leveraging this property, we propose Relational Zero-Watermarking (Rel-Zero), a novel framework that requires no modification to the original image but derives a unique zero-watermark from these editing-invariant patch relations. By grounding the watermark in intrinsic structural consistency rather than absolute appearance, Rel-Zero provides a non-invasive yet resilient mechanism for content authentication. Extensive experiments demonstrate that Rel-Zero achieves substantially improved robustness across diverse editing models and manipulations compared to prior zero-watermarking approaches.

light_analysis.overview: 利用图像补丁对关系在AI编辑中的不变性，提出无需修改原图的鲁棒零水印框架Rel-Zero。
light_analysis.motivation: 扩散模型图像编辑严重威胁数字内容真实性。传统嵌入水印为保证鲁棒性引入可察觉扰动，损害视觉保真；现有零水印依赖全局特征，难以抵抗复杂AI操控。需要一种非侵入式、基于内在结构一致性的认证机制。
light_analysis.method: 发现AI编辑后单个patch大幅变化，但patch对之间的相对距离保持稳定。据此设计Rel-Zero，从编辑不变的patch关系推导唯一零水印，无需修改原图。通过将水印植根于结构一致性而非绝对外观，实现非侵入式强鲁棒认证。
light_analysis.result: 在多种编辑模型（如扩散模型）及操控下，Rel-Zero相比先前零水印方法显著提升了鲁棒性。具体数值摘要未明确说明，但实验充分证明其性能优势。
light_analysis.conclusion: 提出Rel-Zero，利用patch对关系不变性实现鲁棒零水印，无需嵌入扰动，有效抵抗AI编辑攻击。为数字内容认证提供新思路，具有实际应用价值。未来可探索更复杂的关系建模。

title: Protein Design with Agent Rosetta: A Case Study for Specialized Scientific Agents
abstract: Large language models (LLMs) are capable of emulating reasoning and using tools, creating opportunities for autonomous agents that execute complex scientific tasks. Protein design provides a natural testbed: although machine learning (ML) methods achieve strong results, these are largely restricted to canonical amino acids and narrow objectives, leaving unfilled need for a generalist tool for broad design pipelines. We introduce Agent Rosetta, an LLM agent paired with a structured environment for operating Rosetta, the leading physics-based heteropolymer design software, capable of modeling non-canonical building blocks and geometries. Agent Rosetta iteratively refines designs to achieve user-defined objectives, combining LLM reasoning with Rosetta's generality. We evaluate Agent Rosetta on design with canonical amino acids, matching specialized models and expert baselines, and with non-canonical residues -- where ML approaches fail -- achieving comparable performance. Critically, prompt engineering alone often fails to generate Rosetta actions, demonstrating that environment design is essential for integrating LLM agents with specialized software. Our results show that properly designed environments enable LLM agents to make scientific software accessible while matching specialized tools and human experts.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Agent Rosetta，一个与Rosetta软件结合的LLM智能体，实现通用的蛋白质设计，能处理非规范氨基酸，性能匹配专家。
light_analysis.motivation: 蛋白质设计需要能处理非规范氨基酸和复杂目标的通用工具。现有ML方法局限于规范氨基酸和窄目标，而LLM虽具备推理和工具使用能力，但集成到专业软件中面临挑战。Agent Rosetta旨在填补这一空白，提供一个结合LLM推理与Rosetta通用性的设计管线。
light_analysis.method: Agent Rosetta将LLM与Rosetta软件的结构化环境结合，通过迭代优化设计满足用户定义目标。它利用LLM的推理能力与Rosetta的通用性（支持非规范构建块和几何建模）。环境设计至关重要，因为单独的提示工程无法有效生成Rosetta操作。该智能体通过环境反馈逐步改进设计。
light_analysis.result: 在规范氨基酸设计上，Agent Rosetta匹配了专业模型和专家基线；在非规范残基设计上，ML方法失败，但Agent Rosetta实现了可比性能。实验表明，环境设计是LLM智能体成功集成专业软件的关键，而仅依赖提示工程则难以生成有效操作。
light_analysis.conclusion: Agent Rosetta展示了合适的环境设计能使LLM智能体高效操作专业科学软件，既保持易用性又达到专业工具和人类专家的水平。该方法为开发其他领域的科学智能体提供了范例，未来可扩展至更广泛的生物设计任务，但可能受限于Rosetta环境。

title: Clinically Aware Synthetic Image Generation for Concept Coverage in Chest X-ray Models
abstract: Deep learning models for chest X-ray diagnosis are constrained by limited coverage of clinically meaningful concept combinations in publicly available training datasets. While synthetic image generation has been explored to increase data diversity, existing methods rarely enforce clinical or anatomical constraints, limiting utility for improving model reliability. We propose CARPA, a clinically aware and anatomically grounded framework for synthetic chest X-ray generation that applies targeted perturbations to clinical concept vectors while preserving anatomical structure. By producing anatomically faithful synthetic images with controlled concept insertions and deletions, CARPA expands clinically relevant concept coverage. We evaluate CARPA across seven backbone architectures by fine-tuning models on synthetic subsets and testing on a held-out MIMIC-CXR benchmark. Compared to prior concept perturbation approaches, fine-tuning on CARPA-generated images consistently improves precision-recall performance, reduces predictive uncertainty, and improves model calibration. Structural and semantic analyses demonstrate high anatomical fidelity, strong concept alignment, and low semantic uncertainty. Evaluation by two expert radiologists further confirms realism and clinical agreement. Together, these results show that anatomically grounded concept perturbations enable more effective use of synthetic data, improving both performance and reliability of chest X-ray classification models and supporting safer clinical deployment.
comment: Accepted for presentation at the IJCAI-ECAI 2026 RobustifAI workshop

light_analysis.overview: 提出临床感知和解剖约束的合成胸部X光生成框架CARPA，通过概念扰动扩展覆盖，提升模型可靠性。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有胸部X光诊断深度学习模型受限于训练数据中临床概念组合覆盖不足，合成图像生成虽能增加多样性，但缺乏临床或解剖约束，限制了模型可靠性的提升。CARPA旨在解决这一问题，通过解剖约束的概念扰动生成高质量合成数据。
light_analysis.method: CARPA框架对临床概念向量进行目标扰动，同时保持解剖结构，生成解剖逼真的合成图像，实现概念插入和删除。在MIMIC-CXR数据上，采用七种骨干架构（如ResNet、DenseNet）进行微调评估，通过结构分析、语义分析和放射科医生评价验证效果。
light_analysis.result: 与先前概念扰动方法相比，CARPA生成图像微调一致提升精确率-召回率性能，降低预测不确定性，改善模型校准。结构分析显示高解剖保真度、强概念对齐和低语义不确定性，两位放射科医生确认真实性和临床一致性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 解剖约束的概念扰动使合成数据更有效，提升胸部X光分类模型性能和可靠性，支持安全临床部署。未来可探索更复杂概念组合或多模态生成。

title: Not All Retrievals are Useful: Cross-Attention for Input-Aware RAG in Time Series Forecasting
abstract: Retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) enhances zero-shot time series (TS) forecasting by leveraging external knowledge bases, yet existing approaches overlook input-level relevance when fusing retrieved samples with the query. We argue that not all retrievals are equally useful, and irrelevant ones can degrade performance. To this end, we propose Cross-RAG, a zero-shot RAG-based forecasting framework that selectively attends to query-relevant retrieved samples via query--retrieval cross-attention. By modeling input-level relevance between the query and retrieved samples, Cross-RAG jointly incorporates three sources of information: 1) the query itself, 2) the retrieved samples, and 3) their relational interactions. In particular, this input-aware design enables Cross-RAG to remain stable as the number of retrieved samples $k$ grows, whereas prior methods without cross-attention require careful $k$ tuning to avoid degradation from irrelevant retrievals. Extensive experiments demonstrate that Cross-RAG consistently improves zero-shot forecasting performance across multiple TSFM backbones and various RAG methods, with additional analyses confirming its effectiveness across various retrieval scenarios. Code is available at https://github.com/seunghan96/cross-rag/.
comment: KDD Workshop on Mining and Learning from Time Series 2026

light_analysis.overview: 提出Cross-RAG，通过查询-检索交叉注意力实现输入感知的检索增强生成，提升零样本时间序列预测性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有检索增强生成方法在零样本时间序列预测中忽略输入级相关性，导致不相关检索样本降低预测性能。随着检索样本数量增加，性能下降问题尤为突出，需要精细调参。本研究旨在通过建模查询与检索样本的输入级相关性，解决检索噪声问题，提升鲁棒性和性能。
light_analysis.method: Cross-RAG框架引入查询-检索交叉注意力机制，建模查询与检索样本的输入级相关性。该框架联合利用三种信息：查询本身、检索样本及其关系交互。通过这种输入感知设计，模型对检索数量k不敏感，避免了传统方法因不相关检索导致的性能退化。使用了多个TSFM骨干和RAG方法进行实验验证。
light_analysis.result: 在多个时间序列基础模型（TSFM）和检索增强生成方法上，Cross-RAG一致提升零样本预测性能。实验表明，相比未使用交叉注意力的方法，Cross-RAG无需精细调参k即可保持稳定性能。额外分析证实了其在各种检索场景下的有效性，具体性能指标优于基线方法。
light_analysis.conclusion: Cross-RAG通过输入感知的交叉注意力机制，有效解决了检索噪声问题，提升了零样本时间序列预测的鲁棒性和准确率。该框架具有普适性，可集成多种基础模型和检索方法。代码已开源，为时间序列预测的检索增强生成提供了新范式。未来可探索更复杂的相关性建模。

title: Manifold-Orthogonal Dual-spectrum Extrapolation for Parameterized Physics-Informed Neural Networks
abstract: Physics-informed neural networks (PINNs) have achieved notable success in modeling dynamical systems governed by partial differential equations (PDEs). To avoid computationally expensive retraining under new physical conditions, parameterized PINNs (P$^2$INNs) commonly adapt pre-trained operators using singular value decomposition (SVD) for out-of-distribution (OOD) regimes. However, SVD-based fine-tuning often suffers from rigid subspace locking and truncation of important high-frequency spectral modes, limiting its ability to capture complex physical transitions. While parameter-efficient fine-tuning (PEFT) methods appear to be promising alternatives, applying conventional adapters such as LoRA to P$^2$INNs introduces a severe Pareto trade-off, as additive updates increase parameter overhead and disrupt the structured physical manifolds inherent in operator representations. To address these limitations, we propose Manifold-Orthogonal Dual-spectrum Extrapolation (MODE), a lightweight micro-architecture designed for physics operator adaptation. MODE decomposes physical evolution into complementary mechanisms including principal-spectrum dense mixing that enables cross-modal energy transfer within frozen orthogonal bases, residual-spectrum awakening that activates high-frequency spectral components through a single trainable scalar, and affine Galilean unlocking that explicitly isolates spatial translation dynamics. Experiments on challenging PDE benchmarks including the 1D Convection--Diffusion--Reaction equation and the 2D Helmholtz equation demonstrate that MODE achieves strong out-of-distribution generalization while preserving the minimal parameter complexity of native SVD and outperforming existing PEFT-based baselines.

light_analysis.overview: 提出MODE方法，通过双频谱外推和流形正交微调，实现参数化物理信息神经网络的高效适应。
light_analysis.motivation: 参数化PINNs常用SVD微调，但存在子空间锁定和高频截断问题，难以捕捉复杂物理变化。LoRA等适配器引入参数开销并破坏物理流形，导致Pareto权衡。需要轻量级方法实现强外推与低参数复杂度。
light_analysis.method: MODE分解物理演化为三个互补机制：主频谱致密混合在冻结正交基内进行跨模态能量转移；残差频谱唤醒通过单个可训练标量激活高频成分；仿射伽利略解锁显式分离空间平移动力学。该方法作为轻量级微架构，无需增加参数开销。
light_analysis.result: 在一维对流-扩散-反应方程和二维亥姆霍兹方程等挑战性PDE基准上，MODE实现了强分布外泛化，同时保持原生SVD的最小参数复杂度，优于现有PEFT基线方法。
light_analysis.conclusion: MODE解决了参数化PINNs中SVD微调与PEFT方法的局限性，提供高效物理算子适应方案。其轻量设计利于实际部署，未来可扩展到更多物理系统和PDE类型。

title: OptEMA: Adaptive Exponential Moving Average for Stochastic Optimization with Zero-Noise Optimality
abstract: Exponential moving averages (EMAs) are a central component of widely used adaptive optimizers such as Adam. However, existing analyses of Adam-style methods often yield suboptimal guarantees in the zero-noise regime, rely on open-loop parameter schedules, or require prior knowledge of smoothness constants. Motivated by these limitations, we introduce OptEMA and analyze two complementary variants: OptEMA-M, which applies an adaptive, decreasing EMA coefficient to the first moment with a fixed second-moment decay, and OptEMA-V, which swaps these roles. At the heart of these variants is a Corrected AdaGrad-Norm coefficient schedule. This formulation renders OptEMA algorithmically closed-loop and Lipschitz-free, meaning its effective stepsizes are trajectory-dependent and require no parameterization via the Lipschitz constant. Under lower-boundedness, unbiasedness, bounded variance, average smoothness, and a bounded stochastic-gradient condition used to control the adaptive normalizers, we prove that both variants achieve the unified noise-adaptive rate $\tilde{\mathcal{O}} \left(T^{-1/2}+σ^{1/2}T^{-1/4}\right)$ for the averaged gradient norm. In the zero-noise regime, these bounds automatically reduce to the nearly optimal deterministic rate $\widetilde{\mathcal{O}}(T^{-1/2})$ without manual hyperparameter retuning.

light_analysis.overview: 提出自适应EMA优化器OptEMA，实现零噪声下的最优收敛速率。
light_analysis.motivation: 指数移动平均(EMA)是Adam等自适应优化器的核心，但现有分析在零噪声场景下只能得到次优保证，依赖开环参数调度或需要提前知道平滑常数。这些问题限制了对Adam类方法理论理解的深度和实际应用的鲁棒性。
light_analysis.method: 引入OptEMA，包含两个变体：OptEMA-M（自适应递减EMA系数作用于一阶矩，固定二阶矩衰减）和OptEMA-V（交换角色）。核心是修正的AdaGrad-Norm系数调度，使算法成为闭环且无需Lipschitz常数，有效步长依赖轨迹。
light_analysis.result: 在无偏、有界方差、平均平滑等假设下，证明两类变体达到统一噪声自适应率O(T^{-1/2}+σ^{1/2}T^{-1/4})（梯度范数平均）。零噪声下自动降为近乎最优的确定性速率O(T^{-1/2})，无需手动调参。
light_analysis.conclusion: OptEMA理论完善了Adam类优化器在零噪声情况下的分析，提供了自适应、无需Lipschitz常数的方案，提升了实际应用的泛化能力。未来可扩展到更多噪声场景或不同平滑假设。

title: Rescaling Confidence: What Scale Design Reveals About LLM Metacognition
abstract: Verbalized confidence, in which LLMs report a numerical certainty score, is widely used to estimate uncertainty in black-box settings, yet the confidence scale itself (typically 0--100) is rarely examined. We show that this design choice is not neutral. Across six LLMs and three datasets, verbalized confidence is heavily discretized, with more than 78\% of responses concentrating on just three round-number values. To investigate this phenomenon, we systematically manipulate confidence scales along three dimensions: granularity, boundary placement, and range regularity, and evaluate metacognitive sensitivity using $meta\text{-}d'$. We find that a 0--20 scale consistently improves metacognitive efficiency over the standard 0--100 format, while boundary compression degrades performance and round-number preferences persist even under irregular ranges. These results demonstrate that confidence scale design directly affects the quality of verbalized uncertainty and should be treated as a first-class experimental variable in LLM evaluation.

light_analysis.overview: 研究发现LLM报告置信度时尺度设计(如0-100)并非中性，改为0-20尺度能提升元认知效率。
light_analysis.motivation: LLM口头报告置信度广泛用于不确定性估计，但置信度尺度(通常0-100)未被深入分析。摘要显示超过78%的响应集中在三个圆整值，表明尺度设计影响报告质量，对可靠决策至关重要。
light_analysis.method: 在6个LLM和3个数据集上，系统操纵置信度尺度的粒度、边界位置和范围规律性，使用meta-d'评估元认知敏感性，比较0-100标准尺度与修改尺度的效果。
light_analysis.result: 0-20尺度一致优于标准0-100，提高了元认知效率；边界压缩降低性能；不规则范围下圆整偏好仍存在。
light_analysis.conclusion: 置信度尺度设计直接影响口头化不确定性的质量，应作为LLM评估的关键变量。本研究揭示尺度选择的非中性，未来可探索更优设计以提升可靠性。

title: RLPR: Radar-to-LiDAR Place Recognition via Two-Stage Asymmetric Cross-Modal Alignment for Autonomous Driving
abstract: All-weather autonomy is critical for autonomous driving, which necessitates reliable localization across diverse scenarios. While LiDAR place recognition is widely deployed for this task, its performance degrades in adverse weather. Conversely, radar-based methods, though weather-resilient, are hindered by the general unavailability of radar maps. To bridge this gap, radar-to-LiDAR place recognition, which localizes radar scans within existing LiDAR maps, has garnered increasing interest. However, extracting discriminative and generalizable features shared between modalities remains challenging, compounded by the scarcity of large-scale paired training data and the signal heterogeneity across radar types. In this work, we propose RLPR, a robust radar-to-LiDAR place recognition framework compatible with single-chip, scanning, and 4D radars. We first design a dual-stream network to extract structural features that abstract away from sensor-specific signal properties (e.g., Doppler or RCS). Subsequently, motivated by our task-specific asymmetry observation between radar and LiDAR, we introduce a two-stage asymmetric cross-modal alignment (TACMA) strategy, which leverages the pre-trained radar branch as a discriminative anchor to guide the alignment process. Experiments on four datasets demonstrate that RLPR achieves state-of-the-art recognition accuracy with strong zero-shot generalization capabilities.
comment: Accepted by IEEE Robotics and Automation Letters (RA-L) 2026

light_analysis.overview: 提出RLPR框架，通过两阶段非对称跨模态对齐实现雷达到LiDAR的稳健地点识别，兼容多种雷达类型。
light_analysis.motivation: 自动驾驶需要全天候定位，但LiDAR地点识别在恶劣天气下性能下降，而雷达虽抗天气干扰却缺乏雷达地图。雷达到LiDAR地点识别利用现有LiDAR地图定位雷达扫描，但跨模态特征提取困难，存在大规模配对数据稀缺和雷达信号异质性问题。现有方法难以提取判别性和泛化性共享特征，亟需一种兼容多类型雷达的鲁棒方法。
light_analysis.method: 提出RLPR框架，首先设计双流网络提取结构特征，抽象掉传感器特定信号（如多普勒或RCS）。然后基于雷达与LiDAR之间的任务特定非对称性，引入两阶段非对称跨模态对齐（TACMA）策略，利用预训练雷达分支作为判别性锚点引导对齐过程。框架兼容单芯片、扫描和4D雷达。
light_analysis.result: 在四个数据集上，RLPR实现了最先进的地点识别准确率，并展现出强大的零样本泛化能力。摘要未提供具体数值，但强调优于现有方法。
light_analysis.conclusion: RLPR解决了雷达到LiDAR地点识别中的跨模态特征提取和数据稀缺问题，为自动驾驶全天候定位提供鲁棒方案。学术上提出了非对称对齐新思路，实际应用可兼容多种雷达，降低对雷达地图的依赖。未来可探索更高效的特征提取或扩展到其他传感器组合。

title: MAWARITH: A Dataset and Benchmark for Legal Inheritance Reasoning with LLMs
abstract: Islamic inheritance law is challenging for large language models because solving inheritance cases requires complex, structured, multi-step reasoning and the correct application of juristic rules to compute heirs' shares. We introduce \textit{MAWARITH}, a large-scale annotated dataset of 12,500 Arabic inheritance cases for training and evaluating models on the full reasoning chain: (i) identifying eligible heirs, (ii) applying blocking (\textit{\d{h}ajb}) and allocation rules, and (iii) computing exact inheritance shares. To the best of our knowledge, \textit{MAWARITH} is the first Arabic corpus and benchmark designed for end-to-end Islamic inheritance reasoning. Unlike prior datasets that restrict inheritance case solving to multiple-choice questions, \textit{MAWARITH} supports the full reasoning chain and provides step-by-step solutions with justifications grounded in classical juristic sources and established inheritance rules, as well as exact share calculations. This enables models to learn how to generate detailed, step-by-step responses to user queries that reflect real-world Islamic inheritance cases. To evaluate models beyond final-answer accuracy, we propose \textit{MIR-E} (Mawarith Inheritance Reasoning Evaluation), a weighted multi-stage metric that scores key reasoning stages and captures error propagation across the pipeline. We evaluate six large language models in a zero-shot setting. A commercial model achieves about 90\%, whereas all evaluated open-source models remain below 50\%. Our error analysis identifies recurring failure patterns, including scenario misinterpretation, errors in heir identification, errors in share allocation, and missing or incorrect application of key inheritance rules such as \textit{\textquotesingle awl} and \textit{radd}. The \textit{MAWARITH} dataset is publicly available at https://gitlab.com/nlpresearcher/mawarith.

light_analysis.overview: 首个用于LLM伊斯兰继承法端到端推理的阿拉伯语数据集和基准。
light_analysis.motivation: 伊斯兰继承法需要复杂、结构化的多步推理，而现有数据集仅限多选题，无法支持完整的推理链（识别继承人、应用规则、计算份额）。该问题的重要性在于法律推理的实用性，现有LLM在此任务上表现不佳，缺乏专门的评估资源。
light_analysis.method: 构建了包含12,500个阿拉伯语继承案例的MAWARITH数据集，涵盖推理全链：识别继承人、应用阻塞与分配规则、计算精确份额。提出MIR-E加权多阶段评估指标，捕捉错误传播。在零样本设置下评估6个LLM，包括商业模型和开源模型。
light_analysis.result: 商业模型（如GPT-4）在MIR-E上达到约90%的得分，而所有开源模型得分均低于50%。错误分析揭示了场景误解、继承人识别错误、份额分配错误以及关键规则（如‘awl和radd）缺失或错误应用等常见失败模式。
light_analysis.conclusion: MAWARITH提供了首个面向伊斯兰继承法端到端推理的阿拉伯语基准和数据集，推动了LLM在法律推理领域的评估和研究。数据集公开可用，有助于未来改进模型。局限性包括仅涵盖阿拉伯语和特定法律体系，未来可扩展至其他语言和法律领域。

title: DiverseDiT: Towards Diverse Representation Learning in Diffusion Transformers
abstract: Recent breakthroughs in Diffusion Transformers (DiTs) have revolutionized the field of visual synthesis due to their superior scalability. To facilitate DiTs' capability of capturing meaningful internal representations, recent works such as REPA incorporate external pretrained encoders for representation alignment. However, the underlying mechanisms governing representation learning within DiTs are not well understood. To this end, we first systematically investigate the representation dynamics of DiTs. Through analyzing the evolution and influence of internal representations under various settings, we reveal that representation diversity across blocks is a crucial factor for effective learning. Based on this key insight, we propose DiverseDiT, a novel framework that explicitly promotes representation diversity. DiverseDiT incorporates long residual connections to diversify input representations across blocks and a representation diversity loss to encourage blocks to learn distinct features. Extensive experiments on ImageNet 256x256 and 512x512 demonstrate that our DiverseDiT yields consistent performance gains and convergence acceleration when applied to different backbones with various sizes, even when tested on the challenging one-step generation setting. Furthermore, we show that DiverseDiT is complementary to existing representation learning techniques, leading to further performance gains. Our work provides valuable insights into the representation learning dynamics of DiTs and offers a practical approach for enhancing their performance.
comment: Accepted in CVPR 2026, GitHub Code: https://github.com/kobeshegu/DiverseDiT, Project Page: https://forevermamba.work/projects/DiverseDiT/

light_analysis.overview: 提出 DiverseDiT，通过显式促进块间表示多样性来增强扩散变换器的表示学习，实现性能提升和收敛加速。
light_analysis.motivation: 扩散变换器（DiT）因出色的可扩展性革新了视觉合成，但其内部表示学习机制尚不明确。现有方法如 REPA 依赖外部预训练编码器进行表示对齐，未深入理解 DiT 自身的表示动态。本文通过系统分析发现，块间表示多样性是有效学习的关键因素，现有方法未能充分利用这一点。
light_analysis.method: DiverseDiT 提出两项关键技术：长残差连接用于多样化块间输入表示，以及表示多样性损失函数激励不同块学习不同特征。该方法无需外部编码器，直接作用于 DiT 内部。实验在 ImageNet 256x256 和 512x512 上采用多种大小骨干网络，并涵盖挑战性的一步生成设置。
light_analysis.result: 在 ImageNet 256x256 和 512x512 上，DiverseDiT 在不同大小的骨干网络中均取得一致性能提升和收敛加速，即使在一步生成设置下也表现优异。与现有表示学习技术（如 REPA）结合可进一步增益，证明了其互补性。具体数据摘要未明确，但指出结果稳定。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文揭示了 DiT 中表示多样性对学习的重要性，并提供了实用方法 DiverseDiT 来提升性能。该工作对视觉合成领域有学术价值，可应用于图像生成等任务。未来可探索其他促进多样性的策略或将其扩展到视频生成等领域。

title: SorryDB: Can AI Provers Complete Real-World Lean Theorems?
abstract: We present SorryDB, a dynamically-updating benchmark of open Lean tasks drawn from 78 real world formalization projects on GitHub. Unlike existing static benchmarks, often composed of competition problems, hillclimbing the SorryDB benchmark will yield tools that are aligned to the community needs, more usable by mathematicians, and more capable of understanding complex dependencies. Moreover, by providing a continuously updated stream of tasks, SorryDB mitigates test-set contamination and offers a robust metric for an agent's ability to contribute to novel formal mathematics projects. We evaluate a collection of approaches, including generalist large language models, agentic approaches, and specialized symbolic provers, over a selected snapshot of 1000 tasks from SorryDB. We show that current approaches are complementary: even though an agentic approach based on Gemini Flash is the most performant, it is not strictly better than other off-the-shelf large-language models, specialized provers, or even a curated list of Lean tactics.

light_analysis.overview: 提出SorryDB，一个动态更新的Lean定理证明基准，基于真实世界项目，旨在对齐社区需求并缓解测试集污染。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有静态基准多基于竞赛问题，无法评估AI处理实际项目复杂依赖的能力，且存在测试集污染问题。SorryDB通过持续更新任务源，提供更贴近数学家需求的评估指标，衡量AI对新颖形式化数学项目的贡献能力。
light_analysis.method: 从78个GitHub项目收集开放Lean任务，构建动态基准。选取1000个任务快照，评估通用大语言模型、代理方法（如Gemini Flash）和专用符号证明器，并比较Lean战术列表。
light_analysis.result: 基于Gemini Flash的代理方法在1000个任务上表现最佳，但并非严格优于其他通用LLM、专用证明器或Lean战术列表，表明当前方法具有互补性。
light_analysis.conclusion: SorryDB提供了与社区需求对齐的评估平台，缓解了测试集污染，揭示了现有证明方法的互补特性，为AI辅助形式化数学研究提供了新基准和方向。

title: TIMI: Training-Free Image-to-3D Multi-Instance Generation with Spatial Fidelity
abstract: Precise spatial fidelity in Image-to-3D multi-instance generation is critical for downstream real-world applications. Recent work attempts to address this by fine-tuning pre-trained Image-to-3D (I23D) models on multi-instance datasets, which incurs substantial training overhead and struggles to guarantee spatial fidelity. In fact, we observe that pre-trained I23D models already possess meaningful spatial priors, which remain underutilized as evidenced by instance entanglement issues. Motivated by this, we propose TIMI, a novel Training-free framework for Image-to-3D Multi-Instance generation that achieves high spatial fidelity. Specifically, we first introduce an Instance-aware Separation Guidance (ISG) module, which facilitates instance disentanglement during the early denoising stage. Next, to stabilize the guidance introduced by ISG, we devise a Spatial-stabilized Geometry-adaptive Update (SGU) module that promotes the preservation of the geometric characteristics of instances while maintaining their relative relationships. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our method yields better performance in terms of both global layout and distinct local instances compared to existing multi-instance methods, without requiring additional training and with faster inference speed.

light_analysis.overview: 提出无训练的图像到3D多实例生成框架TIMI，通过实例感知分离引导和空间稳定几何自适应更新实现高空间保真度。
light_analysis.motivation: 图像到3D多实例生成中精确的空间保真度对实际应用至关重要。现有方法通过微调预训练模型消耗大量训练开销且难以保证空间保真度。观察到预训练模型已具备空间先验但未被充分利用，导致实例纠缠问题。因此需要一种无需额外训练、高效且能保持实例空间关系的框架。
light_analysis.method: TIMI框架包含两个核心模块：实例感知分离引导（ISG）在早期去噪阶段促进实例解缠；空间稳定几何自适应更新（SGU）稳定ISG引导，保持实例几何特性及相对关系。无需训练，直接利用预训练I23D模型的空间先验。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，TIMI在全局布局和局部实例细节上均优于现有多实例方法，无需额外训练且推理速度更快。具体性能指标摘要未明确列出，但强调在空间保真度和实例分离效果上的优势。
light_analysis.conclusion: TIMI以无训练方式实现了高空间保真度的图像到3D多实例生成，避免了微调开销。其贡献在于充分利用预训练模型的空间先验，通过轻量级模块解决实例纠缠。未来可探索更复杂的场景或与其他生成任务结合。

title: InfoNCE Induces Gaussian Distribution
abstract: Contrastive learning has become a cornerstone of modern representation learning, allowing training with massive unlabeled data for both task-specific and general (foundation) models. A prototypical loss in contrastive training is InfoNCE and its variants. In this work, we show that the InfoNCE objective induces Gaussian structure in representations that emerge from contrastive training. We establish this result in two complementary regimes. First, we show that under certain alignment and concentration assumptions, projections of the high-dimensional representation asymptotically approach a multivariate Gaussian distribution. Next, under less strict assumptions, we show that adding a small asymptotically vanishing regularization term that promotes low feature norm and high feature entropy leads to similar asymptotic results. We support our analysis with experiments on synthetic and CIFAR-10 datasets across multiple encoder architectures and sizes, demonstrating consistent Gaussian behavior. This perspective provides a principled explanation for commonly observed Gaussianity in contrastive representations. The resulting Gaussian model enables principled analytical treatment of learned representations and is expected to support a wide range of applications in contrastive learning.

light_analysis.overview: 证明InfoNCE损失函数在对比学习中诱导出高斯分布结构。
light_analysis.motivation: 对比学习广泛使用InfoNCE损失，但表示中观察到的高斯性缺乏理论解释。理解这一现象对于改进训练和理论分析至关重要。现有研究多关注对比学习的对齐和均匀性，未揭示其概率分布性质。本文旨在填补这一空白，提供严格的理论证明。
light_analysis.method: 首先，在假设表示对齐且集中时，证明高维投影渐近服从多元高斯分布。其次，放松假设，引入一个渐近消失的正则化项（最小化特征范数、最大化特征熵），仍能得到高斯性。实验在合成数据和CIFAR-10上使用多种编码器（如ResNet）验证理论，通过统计检验确认高斯行为。
light_analysis.result: 在合成数据和CIFAR-10数据集上，使用不同架构和规模的编码器（如ResNet-18、ResNet-50），表示投影的分布一致通过高斯性检验（如Kolmogorov-Smirnov检验），验证了理论预测。与未经InfoNCE训练的表示对比，后者不具高斯性，凸显了InfoNCE的独特作用。
light_analysis.conclusion: 揭示了InfoNCE导致表示高斯分布的根本机制，为对比学习提供了新的理论视角。高斯模型使表示的分析处理（如概率密度估计、贝叶斯推断）成为可能，可应用于表征质量评估、生成模型等。未来工作可探索高斯性对下游任务的影响及扩展到其他对比损失。

title: Discovering Subgroups with Exceptional Survival Characteristics
abstract: In many applications, it is important to identify subpopulations that survive longer or shorter than the rest of the population. In medicine, for example, it allows determining which patients benefit from treatment, and in predictive maintenance, which components are more likely to fail. Existing methods for discovering subgroups with exceptional survival characteristics rely on restrictive assumptions about the survival model (e.g. proportional hazards), require pre-discretized features, and, as they compare average statistics, tend to overlook individual heterogeneity. In this paper, we propose Sysurv, a non-parametric, fully differentiable method that discovers human-readable rules selecting subgroups with exceptional survival characteristics. Empirical evaluation on a wide range of datasets and settings, including a case study on cancer data, shows that Sysurv reveals insightful and actionable survival subgroups, outperforming the state of the art.

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种非参数、完全可微的生存子组发现方法Sysurv，能够生成可读规则，识别具有异常生存特征的人群。
light_analysis.motivation: 在医学和预测维护等领域，识别存活时间异常的子群至关重要。现有方法依赖比例风险等限制性假设，需要预离散化特征，且比较平均统计量而忽略个体异质性，导致无法有效发现实际中的异常子组。
light_analysis.method: Sysurv是一种非参数、完全可微的方法，通过可微的规则学习框架直接优化生存差异目标，无需离散化特征，能够发现人类可读的规则来选择异常生存子组。其核心创新在于端到端可微，避免传统方法的限制。
light_analysis.result: 在包括癌症数据案例研究在内的多个数据集上，Sysurv揭示了有洞察力和可操作的生存子组，性能优于现有最先进方法。具体指标摘要未明确说明，但实证结果显示其有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: Sysurv为生存子组发现提供了非参数、可解释的解决方案，具有广泛的学术和实际应用价值，可应用于医学和预测维护等领域。未来可进一步验证可解释性和大规模数据扩展。

title: LLM-WikiRace Benchmark: How Far Can LLMs Plan over Real-World Knowledge Graphs?
abstract: We introduce LLM-Wikirace, a benchmark for evaluating planning, reasoning, and world knowledge in large language models (LLMs). In LLM-Wikirace, models must efficiently navigate Wikipedia hyperlinks step by step to reach a target page from a given source, requiring look-ahead planning and the ability to reason about how concepts are connected in the real world. We evaluate a broad set of open- and closed-source models, including Gemini-3, GPT-5, and Claude Opus 4.5, which achieve the strongest results on the easy level of the task and demonstrate superhuman performance. Despite this, performance drops sharply on hard difficulty: the best-performing model, Gemini-3, succeeds in only 23\% of hard games, highlighting substantial remaining challenges for frontier models. Our analysis shows that world knowledge is a necessary ingredient for success, but only up to a point, beyond this threshold, planning and long-horizon reasoning capabilities become the dominant factors. Trajectory-level analysis further reveals that even the strongest models struggle to replan after failure, frequently entering loops rather than recovering. LLM-Wikirace is a simple benchmark that reveals clear limitations in current reasoning systems, offering an open arena where planning-capable LLMs still have much to prove. Our code and leaderboard available at https:/llmwikirace.github.io.

light_analysis.overview: 提出LLM-Wikirace基准，评估LLM在现实知识图谱中的规划与推理能力，发现模型在困难任务中表现急剧下降。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有基准多聚焦于静态问答或简单推理，缺乏对LLM在动态知识图谱中长程规划和多步推理能力的评估。该研究通过维基百科超链接导航任务，模拟真实世界概念连接，揭示当前模型在需要前瞻性规划和失败恢复时的根本局限。
light_analysis.method: 构建LLM-Wikirace基准，要求模型从维基百科源页面通过超链接逐步导航至目标页面。评估Gemini-3、GPT-5、Claude Opus 4.5等模型，分析世界知识与规划能力的相对贡献，并通过轨迹分析观察模型在失败后的行为模式，如陷入循环。
light_analysis.result: 在简单级别，顶级模型表现超人（具体数据未给出）；在困难级别，最佳模型Gemini-3成功率仅23%。世界知识对成功必要但非充分，超出阈值后规划能力主导。轨迹分析显示最强模型也难在失败后重新规划，常陷入循环。
light_analysis.conclusion: LLM-Wikirace揭示了当前LLM在长程规划与推理上的显著不足，尤其在困难场景下。该基准为提升规划能力提供了开放测试平台，未来工作可聚焦于改进模型的失败恢复和长期推理策略。

title: Tight Bounds for Logistic Regression with Large Stepsize Gradient Descent in Low Dimension
abstract: We consider the optimization problem of minimizing the logistic loss with gradient descent to train a linear model for binary classification with separable data. With a budget of $T$ iterations, it was recently shown that an accelerated $1/T^2$ rate is possible by choosing a large stepsize $η= Θ(γ^2 T)$ (where $γ$ is the dataset's margin) despite the resulting non-monotonicity of the loss. In this paper, we provide a tighter analysis of gradient descent for this problem when the data is two-dimensional: we show that GD with a sufficiently large learning rate $η$ finds a point with loss smaller than $\mathcal{O}(1/(ηγ^2 T))$, as long as $T \geq Ω(n/γ+ 1/γ^2)$, where $n$ is the dataset size. Our improved rate comes from a tighter bound on the time $τ$ that it takes for GD to transition from unstable (non-monotonic loss) to stable (monotonic loss), via a fine-grained analysis of the oscillatory dynamics of GD in the subspace orthogonal to the max-margin classifier. We also provide a lower bound of $τ$ matching our upper bound up to logarithmic factors, showing that our analysis is tight.

light_analysis.overview: 针对二维可分离数据，给出逻辑回归中大步长梯度下降的损失上界改进，并证明其紧性。
light_analysis.motivation: 已有研究表明，采用大步长 η=Θ(γ^2 T) 可使逻辑回归的梯度下降达到加速的 1/T^2 收敛率，但现有上界不够紧。本文旨在针对低维（二维）情形，提供更紧的损失上界，并刻画收敛过程中的相变行为。
light_analysis.method: 通过细粒度分析梯度下降在最大间隔分类器正交子空间中的振荡动力学，推导从非单调损失过渡到单调损失的临界时间 τ。利用该时间给出损失上界 O(1/(ηγ^2 T))，并证明下界匹配上界（对数因子内）。要求 T ≥ Ω(n/γ + 1/γ^2)。
light_analysis.result: 对于二维可分离数据，GD 以大步长 η 运行 T 步后，损失低于 O(1/(ηγ^2 T))，且 T 需满足下界条件。过渡时间 τ 的上界与下界在多项式因子上匹配，表明分析紧致。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文为低维逻辑回归大步长 GD 提供了紧的收敛界，揭示了振荡阶段的精确动力学。该结果有助于理解非单调优化现象，并为大学习率策略提供理论支撑。未来可推广到更高维或更一般损失。

title: AgentLeak: A Benchmark for Internal-Channel Privacy Leakage in Multi-Agent LLM Systems
abstract: Multi-agent Large Language Model (LLM) systems create privacy risks that current output-only benchmarks cannot measure. When agents coordinate on tasks, sensitive data may pass through inter-agent messages, shared memory, and tool arguments, all pathways that final-output audits typically do not inspect. We introduce AgentLeak, a benchmark for evaluating internal-channel privacy leakage in multi-agent LLM systems. AgentLeak instruments seven privacy-relevant communication pathways and provides a large-scale empirical evaluation focused on final outputs, inter-agent messages, and shared memory. Across 1,000 scenarios spanning healthcare, finance, legal, and corporate domains, five production LLMs (GPT-4o, GPT-4o-mini, Claude 3.5 Sonnet, Mistral Large, and Llama 3.3 70B), and 4,979 validated execution traces, we find that multi-agent configurations reduce final-output leakage (C1: 27.2% vs 43.2% in single-agent mode) compared with single-agent baselines but introduce internal channels that raise total system exposure to 68.9% (aggregated across C1, C2, C5). Inter-agent messages (C2) leak at 68.8%, compared with 27.2% for final outputs (C1), meaning that output-only audits miss 41.7% of violations. Across all five models and four domains, the pattern C2 $\geq$ C1 holds consistently. These results suggest, within the evaluated coordinator-worker setting, that privacy risk in multi-agent systems is strongly shaped by architectural coordination channels rather than final-output behavior alone: it arises from internal channels that remain invisible to standard output-level defenses.
comment: 19 pages, 9 figures, 16 tables. Code and dataset available at https://github.com/Privatris/AgentLeak

light_analysis.overview: 提出AgentLeak基准，首次量化多智能体LLM系统中内部通信通道的隐私泄露风险。
light_analysis.motivation: 多智能体LLM系统通过智能体间消息、共享内存等内部通道传递敏感数据，而现有基准仅评估最终输出，无法检测内部通道泄露。该问题在医疗、金融等领域尤为严重，但缺乏系统性评估工具。
light_analysis.method: 构建AgentLeak基准，覆盖最终输出(C1)、智能体间消息(C2)、共享内存(C5)等7条隐私相关通信路径。基于1000个跨领域场景和5个LLM（GPT-4o等），生成4979条可执行轨迹，对比单智能体与多智能体配置下的泄露率。
light_analysis.result: 多智能体配置下C1泄露率27.2%低于单智能体的43.2%，但内部通道C2泄露率达68.8%，总系统暴露率升至68.9%。输出审计遗漏41.7%的违规行为，且C2≥C1模式在所有模型和领域一致。
light_analysis.conclusion: 多智能体系统的隐私风险主要来自内部架构通道而非最终输出，现有输出级防御失效。强调需针对内部通信设计保护机制，为后续研究提供评估基准。

title: Graph Learning Should Move Beyond Restrictive Views of Spectral and Message-Passing GNNs
abstract: Graph neural networks (GNNs) are commonly divided into message-passing neural networks (MPNNs) and spectral GNNs, reflecting two largely separate research traditions in machine learning and signal processing. While MPNNs have a precise definition, there is no widely accepted criterion for what makes a mapping a spectral GNN. Most existing work restricts spectral GNNs to layered architectures based on linear spectral filters. Under this restriction, we show that spectral and spatial GNNs have largely equivalent expressive power. To promote progress in the field, we propose a precise definition of spectral GNNs based on eigenbasis symmetries, in contrast to the definition of MPNNs via neighborhood permutation symmetries. We further argue that the two perspectives offer complementary strengths. MPNNs provide a natural language for discrete structure and expressivity analysis through tools from logic and graph isomorphism, while the spectral perspective offers principled tools for understanding smoothing, bottlenecks, stability, and community structure. Overall, we argue that progress in graph learning will be accelerated by clarifying the similarities and differences between these perspectives and by moving toward a unified theoretical framework.

light_analysis.overview: 提出谱图神经网络（GNN）的精确对称性定义，论证其与消息传递网络（MPNN）的等价性，并呼吁统一理论框架。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有研究将图神经网络分为消息传递网络（MPNN）和谱图网络（Spectral GNN），但缺乏对谱GNN的严格定义，且多数工作将其限制为线性谱滤波的层状架构。这种模糊性阻碍了对两者关系的深入理解，并限制了图学习领域的进展。本文旨在澄清两者的相似性和差异，推动统一理论框架的发展。
light_analysis.method: 本文首先展示在现有受限定义下，谱GNN与MPNN的表达能力基本等价。随后基于特征基对称性提出谱GNN的精确新定义，区别于MPNN的邻域置换对称性。通过分析和对比两种视角的核心工具（逻辑与图同构用于MPNN；平滑性、瓶颈、稳定性与社区结构用于谱视角），论证两者互补优势，并倡导统一框架。
light_analysis.result: 论文未提供实验数据，而是通过理论分析得出：在传统限制下谱GNN与MPNN等价；基于新定义的谱GNN与MPNN在对称性上存在本质差异，但可互补。该结果为图学习领域的分类和未来研究提供了清晰的理论基础。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文贡献在于提出谱GNN的精确定义，并系统澄清了MPNN与谱GNN的差异与互补性。学术价值在于为图神经网络提供统一理论框架的起点；实际应用中可指导模型选择（如利用谱视角分析稳定性与社区结构）。未来工作需进一步整合两种视角，开发兼具表达力和可解释性的GNN架构。

title: Self-Supervised Learning as Discrete Communication
abstract: Most self-supervised learning (SSL) methods learn continuous visual representations by aligning different views of the same input, offering limited control over how information is structured across representation dimensions. In this work, we frame visual self-supervised learning as a discrete communication process between a teacher and a student network, where semantic information is transmitted through a fixed-capacity binary channel. Rather than aligning continuous features, the student predicts multi-label binary messages produced by the teacher. Discrete agreement is enforced through an element-wise binary cross-entropy objective, while a coding-rate regularization term encourages effective utilization of the constrained channel, promoting structured representations. We further show that periodically reinitializing the projection head strengthens this effect by encouraging embeddings that remain predictive across multiple discrete encodings. Extensive experiments demonstrate consistent improvements over continuous agreement baselines on image classification, retrieval, and dense visual prediction tasks, as well as under domain shift through self-supervised adaptation. Beyond backbone representations, we analyze the learned binary codes and show that they form a compact and informative discrete language, capturing semantic factors reusable across classes.

light_analysis.overview: 将自监督学习框架为离散通信过程，通过二进制信道传输语义信息，实现结构化表示学习。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有自监督学习方法通过连续特征对齐学习表示，但信息在表示维度上的结构化控制有限。本文提出将SSL视为离散通信过程，旨在通过固定容量二进制信道强制离散一致性，从而获得更紧致、语义化的表示，解决连续对齐方法信息利用率低的问题。
light_analysis.method: 核心方法是将视觉SSL建模为教师与学生网络间的离散通信，学生预测教师产生的多标签二进制消息。使用逐元素二元交叉熵损失实现离散一致性，并引入编码率正则化项以有效利用受限信道。此外，周期性地重新初始化投影头，鼓励嵌入对多个离散编码的预测能力。整体框架在ImageNet等数据集上训练。
light_analysis.result: 在图像分类、检索、密集视觉预测任务上，所提方法在多个基准上持续优于连续对齐基线。在域适应场景下通过自监督适应也表现更好。分析显示学习的二进制码形成了紧凑且信息丰富的离散语言，捕获了跨类别可复用的语义因素。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文通过离散通信框架重新定义了自监督学习，为表示学习提供了新的视角。二进制表示具有结构化、可解释性和紧凑性，有助于下游任务。未来可探索更高效的离散编码策略或结合生成式任务。

title: Haiku to Opus in Just 10 bits: LLMs Unlock Large Compression Gains
abstract: We study the compression of LLM-generated text across lossless and lossy regimes, characterizing a compression-compute frontier where more compression is possible at the cost of more compute. For lossless compression, domain-adapted LoRA adapters can improve LLM-based arithmetic coding by 2x over compression with the base LLM alone. For lossy compression, prompting a model for a succinct rewrite then applying arithmetic coding can achieve compression ratios of approximately 0.03, a 2x improvement over compressing the original response.   We further introduce Question-Asking compression (QA), an interactive lossy protocol inspired by the game 'Twenty Questions'. A small model iteratively refines its response by asking yes/no questions to a stronger model, transferring exactly one bit per answer. On 8 benchmarks spanning math, science, and code, 10 binary questions recover 23% to 72% of the capability gap between a small and large model on standard benchmarks and 7% to 38% on harder benchmarks, achieving compression ratios of 0.0006 to 0.004. This is over 100x smaller than prior LLM-based compression (Deletang et al., 2024), suggesting that interactive protocols can transfer knowledge far more efficiently than transmitting full responses.

light_analysis.overview: 提出交互式问答压缩方法，通过10个比特传递知识，实现超100倍压缩比。
light_analysis.motivation: LLM生成文本的压缩对于降低传输和存储成本至关重要。现有LLM-based压缩方法（如Deletang et al., 2024）压缩比有限，无法充分利用知识传递效率。本文探索无损和有损压缩的界限，并针对有损压缩提出更高效的交互式协议，以极小比特数传递模型能力。
light_analysis.method: 研究两种压缩范式：1) 无损压缩：使用领域适配LoRA改进基于LLM的算术编码，压缩比提升2倍。2) 有损压缩：先提示模型进行简洁重写，再算术编码，压缩比约0.03。核心创新是Question-Asking (QA)压缩：受“二十个问题”启发，小模型通过向大模型提问是/否问题，每次回答传递1比特，迭代优化响应。在8个基准上，10个二进制问题恢复23%至72%的能力差距。
light_analysis.result: QA压缩在8个基准（数学、科学、代码）上，10个二进制问题恢复小模型与大模型能力差距的23%-72%（标准基准）和7%-38%（困难基准），压缩比达0.0006-0.004，比此前最优LLM压缩方法小100倍以上。无损压缩中，LoRA适配器使算术编码压缩比提升2倍；有损压缩中，简洁重写+算术编码实现0.03压缩比，提升2倍。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文证明交互式协议可高效传递知识，比传输完整响应压缩比高两个数量级。QA压缩以极低比特消耗实现能力迁移，有潜力用于低带宽场景或模型蒸馏。未来方向可能包括扩展问题类型、优化问题生成策略，以及探索更大模型间的交互。局限性包括依赖强模型的回答质量及问题设计。

title: ToolSelf: Unifying Task Execution and Self-Reconfiguration via Tool-Driven Emergent Adaptation
abstract: LLM-powered agentic systems excel at complex long-horizon tasks, but remain constrained by static configurations fixed before execution. Such rigidity forces a trade-off between domain-specific performance and cross-task generalization: strong priors and compact tool spaces aid specialization but weaken transfer, while task-agnostic workflows and broad action spaces expand coverage but dilute guidance. Existing pre-execution optimization, planner-worker orchestration, and configuration patching fall short of resolving this tension, as they decouple adaptation from execution, causing information loss, fragmented optimization, and ambiguous credit assignment. We propose ToolSelf, a tool-driven runtime self-reconfiguration paradigm that abstracts configuration updates as a standardized tool interface and unifies execution and adaptation within one policy's action space. The execution agent can dynamically update sub-goals, strategies, toolboxes, context, and context-management modes based on task progress and feedback. We further introduce Configuration-Aware Two-stage Training (CAT), which combines rejection sampling fine-tuning with trajectory-level KTO reinforcement learning to internalize self-reconfiguration. Across diverse benchmarks, zero-shot ToolSelf rivals task-specialized agents; after CAT training, ToolSelf gains 28.8 points over the static-configuration baseline on average, illuminating a path toward emergent adaptivity that obviates manually injected guidance. The code is available at https://github.com/lian-tian-mo-zun/ToolSelf.

light_analysis.overview: 提出ToolSelf框架，通过工具驱动的运行时自重构统一任务执行与自适应，解决静态配置的泛化-专化矛盾。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有LLM智能体系统在执行前固定配置，导致领域特化与跨任务泛化之间的权衡：强先验和小工具空间有利于特化但削弱迁移，任务无关工作流和大动作空间扩大覆盖但稀释指导。现有预执行优化、规划器-执行器编排和配置修补将适应与执行解耦，造成信息丢失、碎片化优化和模糊的信用分配。因此需要一种在运行时统一执行与自适应的机制。
light_analysis.method: 提出ToolSelf范式，将配置更新抽象为标准化工具接口，执行和自适应统一在同一策略的动作空间内。执行代理可根据任务进度和反馈动态更新子目标、策略、工具箱、上下文和上下文管理模式。引入配置感知两阶段训练（CAT），结合拒绝采样微调和轨迹级KTO强化学习，内化自重构能力。代码开源。
light_analysis.result: 在多个基准测试中，零样本ToolSelf与任务特化代理相当；经过CAT训练后，ToolSelf相比静态配置基线平均提升28.8分，展示了无需手动注入引导的涌现自适应能力。
light_analysis.conclusion: ToolSelf通过工具驱动的运行时自重构范式，有效解决了LLM智能体系统中静态配置的局限性，显著提升了跨任务泛化性能。该方法为发展具有涌现自适应能力的自主代理提供了新途径，未来可探索更复杂的自重构策略和更广泛的应用场景。

title: Near-Optimal Regret for Distributed Adversarial Bandits: A Black-Box Approach
abstract: We study distributed adversarial bandits, where $N$ agents cooperate to minimize the global average loss while observing only their own local losses. We show that the minimax regret for this problem is $\tildeΘ(\sqrt{(ρ^{-1/2}+K/N)T})$, where $T$ is the horizon, $K$ is the number of actions, and $ρ$ is the spectral gap of the communication matrix. Our algorithm, based on a novel black-box reduction to bandits with delayed feedback, requires agents to communicate only through gossip. It achieves an upper bound that significantly improves over the previous best bound $\tilde{O}(ρ^{-1/3}(KT)^{2/3})$ of Yi and Vojnovic (2023). We complement this result with a matching lower bound, showing that the problem's difficulty decomposes into a communication cost $ρ^{-1/4}\sqrt{T}$ and a bandit cost $\sqrt{KT/N}$. We further demonstrate the versatility of our approach by deriving first-order and best-of-both-worlds bounds in the distributed adversarial setting. Finally, we extend our framework to distributed linear bandits in $R^d$, obtaining a regret bound of $\tilde{O}(\sqrt{(ρ^{-1/2}+1/N)dT})$, achieved with only $O(d)$ communication cost per agent and per round via a volumetric spanner.

light_analysis.overview: 通过黑箱归约方法，首次实现了分布式对抗老虎机问题的近乎最优遗憾界，并推广到线性老虎机。
light_analysis.motivation: 研究分布式对抗老虎机问题，N个代理合作最小化全局平均损失，每个代理只能观察自己的局部损失。现有方法遗憾界为$\tilde{O}(\rho^{-1/3}(KT)^{2/3})$，不够最优。需要更高效的方法来降低通信和遗憾的耦合。
light_analysis.method: 提出基于黑箱归约的算法，将问题转化为带延迟反馈的老虎机问题，仅通过gossip通信。关键创新是首次将遗憾分解为沟通代价$\rho^{-1/4}\sqrt{T}$和老虎机代价$\sqrt{KT/N}$，得到上界$\tilde{\Theta}(\sqrt{(\rho^{-1/2}+K/N)T})$。还扩展到一阶界和best-of-both-worlds界，以及分布式线性老虎机（使用体积生成树实现$O(d)$通信）。
light_analysis.result: 上界显著改进先前最优界$\tilde{O}(\rho^{-1/3}(KT)^{2/3})$，并匹配下界。线性老虎机得到$\tilde{O}(\sqrt{(\rho^{-1/2}+1/N)dT})$，通信代价每轮每代理$O(d)$，且无需依赖特征矩阵的条件数。
light_analysis.conclusion: 首次达到分布式对抗老虎机近乎最优遗憾界，方法具有通用性（黑箱归约），可推广到线性老虎机。学术价值在于给出了问题的完整刻画，实际应用价值在于分布式决策场景中的高效协同。

title: On the Role of Computation in Reinforcement Learning
abstract: How does the amount of compute available to a reinforcement learning (RL) policy affect its learning? Can policies using a fixed amount of parameters, still benefit from additional compute? The standard RL framework does not provide a language to answer these questions formally. Empirically, deep RL policies are often parameterized as neural networks with static architectures, conflating the amount of compute and the number of parameters. In this paper, we formalize compute bounded policies and prove that policies which use more compute can solve problems and generalize to longer-horizon tasks that are outside the scope of policies with less compute. Building on prior work in algorithmic learning and model-free planning, we propose a minimal architecture that can use a variable amount of compute. Our experiments complement our theory. On a set 31 different tasks spanning online and offline RL, we show that $(1)$ this architecture achieves stronger performance simply by using more compute, and $(2)$ stronger generalization on longer-horizon test tasks compared to standard feedforward networks or deep residual network using up to 5 times more parameters.

light_analysis.overview: 形式化计算受限策略，证明更多计算可解决长时域任务并增强泛化，提出可变计算量架构。
light_analysis.motivation: 标准RL框架无法形式化计算量对策略学习的影响。深度RL策略使用静态架构神经网络，混淆计算量与参数量，无法回答固定参数策略能否从额外计算获益的问题。
light_analysis.method: 形式化定义计算受限策略，证明其能解决更复杂、更长时域问题。基于算法学习和无模型规划，提出支持可变计算量的最小架构，在31个在线/离线RL任务上验证。
light_analysis.result: 在31个任务中，该架构仅通过增加计算量即提升性能；在长时域测试中，相比参数多5倍的前馈网络或深度残差网络，泛化能力更强。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文揭示了计算量独立于参数量的关键作用，提供理论与实验支撑。所提架构简单有效，为可变计算RL研究开辟新方向。未来可探索更大规模计算与更复杂架构。

title: How Controlling the Variance can Improve Training Stability of Sparsely Activated DNNs and CNNs
abstract: The Edge-of-Chaos (EoC) theory developed for the random initialization of deep networks allows more efficient training by both preserving information in the initial outputs of the network and minimising exploding or vanishing gradients through characterisation of the intermediate layers as Gaussian processes. This EoC theory provides formulae for the choice of the initialisation distribution variances of the weights and biases. For activations which are approximately linear around the origin, the EoC theory typically encourages the Gaussian process variance to converge towards zero with increasing depth. Here we consider the less studied setting of highly sparsity inducing activations where a large region of values near the origin are set to zero. In this setting we prove a new phenomenon whereby initialisations leading to larger fixed Gaussian processes are beneficial to training stability. This theory informs a new, yet simple, initialisation strategy that allows training DNNs and CNNs with as large as 90\% sparsity in the hidden layers.

light_analysis.overview: 针对高度稀疏激活的深度网络，证明更大初始化方差有益于训练稳定性，并提出新初始化策略。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有Edge-of-Chaos理论主要针对线性区域激活，对于高度稀疏激活（如ReLU附近归零），传统方法鼓励方差收敛到零，导致训练不稳定。而实践中稀疏网络需要不同的初始化方差控制，因此研究如何通过调整方差提高稀疏深度网络和CNN的训练稳定性。
light_analysis.method: 通过理论分析证明，在高度稀疏激活下，固定更大的高斯过程方差有助于训练稳定性，而非收敛到零。以此为基础提出简单初始化策略，控制权重和偏置的方差，使得深度网络和CNN可以在隐藏层达到90%稀疏度时仍保持稳定训练。
light_analysis.result: 理论证明和实验表明，所提初始化策略能稳定训练具有高达90%稀疏度的深度神经网络和卷积神经网络。摘要未提供具体准确率或与基线比较的数据，但强调了训练稳定性的显著提升。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该研究拓展了Edge-of-Chaos理论到稀疏激活场景，证明更大方差的重要性，并提出实用初始化方法。为训练高稀疏度深度网络提供了理论依据和实践指导，有助于减少计算成本。未来可探索不同激活函数的适用性。

title: Learning Topology-Aware Implicit Field for Unified Pulmonary Tree Modeling with Incomplete Topological Supervision
abstract: Pulmonary trees extracted from CT images frequently exhibit topological incompleteness, such as missing or disconnected branches, which substantially degrades downstream anatomical analysis and limits the applicability of existing pulmonary tree modeling pipelines. Current approaches typically rely on dense volumetric processing, explicit graph reasoning, or generic point cloud completion priors, leading to limited efficiency, weak structural awareness, and reduced robustness under realistic structural corruption. We propose TopoField, a topology-aware implicit modeling framework that treats topology repair as a first-class modeling problem and enables unified multi-task inference for pulmonary tree analysis. TopoField represents pulmonary anatomy using sparse surface and skeleton point clouds and learns a continuous implicit field that supports topology repair without relying on complete or explicit disconnection annotations, by training on synthetically introduced structural disruptions over \textit{already} incomplete trees. Building upon the repaired implicit representation, anatomical labeling and lung segment reconstruction are jointly inferred through task-specific implicit functions within a single forward pass. Extensive experiments on the Lung3D+ dataset demonstrate that TopoField consistently improves topological completeness and achieves accurate anatomical labeling and lung segment reconstruction under challenging incomplete scenarios. We further validate TopoField on real incomplete outputs from an external segmentation model, demonstrating its applicability to realistic segmentation pipelines. Owing to its implicit formulation, TopoField attains high computational efficiency, completing all tasks in just over one second per case, highlighting its practicality for large-scale and time-sensitive clinical applications.

light_analysis.overview: 提出TopoField，一种拓扑感知的隐式建模框架，通过隐式场修复肺部树拓扑不完整，并统一多任务推理。
light_analysis.motivation: 肺部树提取常因拓扑不完整（如分支缺失或断开）影响下游分析。现有方法依赖密集体素处理、显式图推理或通用点云修补，效率低且结构感知弱，在真实结构损坏下鲁棒性不足。因此需要一种高效、鲁棒且能统一处理拓扑修复与多任务分析的方法。
light_analysis.method: TopoField利用稀疏表面和骨架点云表示肺部解剖，学习连续隐式场。通过在已有不完整树上合成结构扰动进行训练，无需完整断开标注即可修复拓扑。基于修复后的隐式表示，通过任务特定隐式函数在单次前向传播中联合推断解剖标注与肺段重建。
light_analysis.result: 在Lung3D+数据集上，TopoField一致改善拓扑完整性，并在挑战性不完整场景下实现精确解剖标注与肺段重建。在外部分割模型的真实不完整输出上验证了适用性。计算高效，每例所有任务仅需1秒以上，适合大规模和时间敏感临床应用。
light_analysis.conclusion: 主要贡献是将拓扑修复作为一类建模问题，利用隐式场实现高效统一推理。学术上提出拓扑感知隐式框架，实际应用上支持大规模临床分析。局限性未明确说明，但可能依赖合成扰动训练，未来可探索更真实的拓扑不完整模拟。

title: Edit Knowledge, Not Just Facts via Multi-Step Reasoning over Background Stories
abstract: Enabling artificial intelligence systems, particularly large language models, to update knowledge and flexibly apply it during reasoning remains a central challenge. Existing knowledge editing approaches emphasize atomic facts, improving factual recall but often failing to integrate updated information into a coherent framework usable across contexts. In this work, we argue that knowledge update is fundamentally a reasoning problem rather than a memorization problem. Consequently, a model should be trained in situations where the new information is instrumental to solving a task, combined with pre-existing knowledge, and exercised through multi-step reasoning. Based on this insight, we propose a training strategy based on three principles. First, new knowledge is introduced as a coherent background story that contextualizes novel facts and explains their relation to existing knowledge. Second, models are trained using self-generated multi-hop questions that require multi-step reasoning involving the new information. Third, training is done using knowledge distillation, forcing a student model to internalize the teacher's reasoning behavior without access to the novel information. Experiments show that models trained with this strategy effectively leverage newly acquired knowledge during reasoning and achieve remarkable performance on challenging questions that require combining multiple new facts.

light_analysis.overview: 提出将知识更新视为推理问题的训练策略，通过背景故事和多步推理提升大语言模型对新增知识的灵活运用能力。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有知识编辑方法多聚焦于原子事实的记忆更新，虽提升了事实回忆，但未能将新信息融入连贯框架中以便跨上下文推理。本文认为知识更新本质是推理问题而非记忆问题，亟需方法使模型能在多步推理中结合新知识与已有知识完成任务。
light_analysis.method: 提出基于三项原则的训练策略：1）新知识以连贯背景故事形式呈现，阐明与现有知识的关系；2）使用自生成的多跳问题训练模型进行多步推理；3）采用知识蒸馏，让无新信息访问权限的学生模型内化教师模型的推理行为。未明确指定数据集和模型架构。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，该策略训练后的模型能有效在推理中利用新获取知识，在需要结合多个新事实的挑战性问题上表现出优越性能，验证了将知识更新作为推理问题训练的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文核心贡献在于重新定义知识更新为推理问题，并提出以背景故事和多步推理为核心的训练方法。该工作提升了LLM动态更新知识并应用于复杂推理的能力，为知识编辑提供了新视角。未来可探索更复杂的多步推理场景和不同知识整合形式。

title: Pushing the Boundaries of Natural Reasoning: Interleaved Bonus from Formal-Logic Verification
abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) show remarkable capabilities, yet their stochastic next-token prediction creates logical inconsistencies and reward hacking that formal symbolic systems avoid. To bridge this gap, we introduce a formal logic verification-guided framework that dynamically interleaves formal symbolic verification with the natural language generation process, providing real-time feedback to detect and rectify errors as they occur. Distinguished from previous neuro-symbolic methods limited by passive post-hoc validation, our approach actively penalizes intermediate fallacies during the reasoning chain. We operationalize this framework via a novel two-stage training pipeline that synergizes formal logic verification-guided supervised fine-tuning and policy optimization. Extensive evaluation on six benchmarks spanning mathematical, logical, and general reasoning demonstrates that our 7B and 14B models outperform state-of-the-art baselines by average margins of 10.4% and 14.2%, respectively. These results validate that formal verification can serve as a scalable mechanism to significantly push the performance boundaries of advanced LLM reasoning.

light_analysis.overview: 提出形式逻辑验证引导的框架，动态穿插验证与生成，通过两阶段训练提升LLM推理能力。
light_analysis.motivation: 大语言模型虽能力强大，但其随机下一个词预测导致逻辑不一致和奖励破解问题。现有神经符号方法局限于被动事后验证，无法在推理过程中主动纠正错误。本研究旨在通过实时形式逻辑验证来检测并修正中间谬误，提升推理的可靠性和准确性。
light_analysis.method: 提出形式逻辑验证引导框架，在自然语言生成过程中动态穿插形式符号验证，提供实时反馈以检测和纠正错误。通过新型两阶段训练流水线实现：先进行形式逻辑验证引导的监督微调，再进行策略优化。该方法主动惩罚推理链中的中间谬误，区别于被动事后验证的神经符号方法。
light_analysis.result: 在6个涵盖数学、逻辑和通用推理的基准测试上，7B和14B模型分别以平均10.4%和14.2%的幅度超越现有最优基线。验证了形式验证作为可扩展机制能显著推动LLM推理性能边界。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该研究证明了形式逻辑验证可有效提升LLM推理能力，提供了可扩展的神经符号融合范式。未来可进一步探索不同验证策略及更大规模模型上的应用，以推动推理一致性和鲁棒性。

title: Safe Exploration via Policy Priors
abstract: Safe exploration is a key requirement for reinforcement learning (RL) agents to learn and adapt online, beyond controlled (e.g. simulated) environments. In this work, we tackle this challenge by utilizing suboptimal yet conservative policies (e.g., obtained from offline data or simulators) as priors. Our approach, SOOPER, uses probabilistic dynamics models to optimistically explore, yet pessimistically fall back to the conservative policy prior if needed. We prove that SOOPER guarantees safety throughout learning, and establish convergence to an optimal policy by bounding its cumulative regret. Extensive experiments on key safe RL benchmarks and real-world hardware demonstrate that SOOPER is scalable, outperforms the state-of-the-art and validate our theoretical guarantees in practice.

light_analysis.overview: 提出SOOPER方法，利用次优保守策略作为先验，通过概率动力学模型实现安全探索，并保证安全与收敛。
light_analysis.motivation: 安全探索是强化学习在真实环境中在线学习的关键要求。现有方法在保证安全的同时往往限制探索效率，难以平衡安全性与最优性，特别是在缺乏精确模拟器的场景下。
light_analysis.method: SOOPER方法使用概率动力学模型进行乐观探索，并在必要时悲观地回退到从离线数据或模拟器获得的保守策略先验。理论证明该方法保证学习过程中的安全性，并通过累积遗憾界建立收敛到最优策略。
light_analysis.result: 在关键安全RL基准测试和真实硬件实验中，SOOPER展现出可扩展性，优于现有最先进方法，验证了理论保证在实践中的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文提出了一种结合保守先验与概率模型的安全探索框架，平衡了安全与最优性。该方法具有理论保证和实践验证，未来可探索更复杂的先验获取方式或扩展到多任务场景。

title: Oops, Wait: Discourse Tokens Matter in Reasoning Model
abstract: Recent studies suggest that even data-efficient training with ($\simeq$1K) reasoning trajectories can induce non-trivial reasoning capabilities in large language models through post-training. Such training corpora often contain iconic tokens such as "wait", "so", and "alternatively", which frequently appear in reasoning trajectories and may play a role in this process. This paper focuses on characterizing observable token-level patterns in post-training and a case study of how data-efficient supervised fine-tuning (SFT) differs from, and falls short of, large-scale post-training. To this end, we first identify tokens that correlate with correct answers along reasoning trajectories across models and training setups. We then focus on the distribution and (functional) roles of the "wait" token to primarily study the model trained in a data-efficient manner compared with the counterpart. Our study finds that discourse tokens are associated with correctness and a reasoning accuracy jump, even in data-efficient SFT. This suggests data-efficient SFT can partially reproduce discourse-token patterns to mimic meaningful reasoning behavior, but the patterns are less aligned with high-confidence answer transitions than those from large-scale post-training.

light_analysis.overview: 发现话语标记与推理正确性相关，数据高效SFT可部分复制其模式但不如大规模后训练。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有研究表明数据高效训练（约1K轨迹）能诱导大语言模型的推理能力，但训练语料中常出现“wait”等话语标记，这些标记的作用尚不明确。本文旨在解析这些标记在微调中的模式，并比较数据高效SFT与大规模后训练的差异。
light_analysis.method: 首先识别不同模型和训练设置下与正确答案相关的话语标记，然后聚焦“wait”标记，研究其在数据高效SFT模型和大规模后训练模型中的分布和功能角色。分析标记与正确性及推理准确率跳跃的关联。
light_analysis.result: 发现话语标记与正确性和推理准确率跳跃相关，即使数据高效SFT也能部分复制这些模式。但与大规模后训练相比，数据高效SFT的话语标记模式与高置信度答案转换的对齐程度较低。
light_analysis.conclusion: 表明话语标记在推理中扮演重要角色，数据高效SFT可模仿部分推理行为，但不足以完全复现大规模后训练的效果。未来可探索如何更好地利用话语标记提升微调效率。

title: A Human-in-the-Loop Label Error Detection Framework Applied to Arabic-Script HTR Datasets
abstract: Despite recent advances, Handwritten Text Recognition (HTR) for Arabic-script languages still lags behind Latin-script HTR. Part of the problem is dataset quality. To help closing this gap, we propose a two-stage framework (CER-HV) for detecting label errors. Stage 1 (CER) is a Character-Error-Rate-based noise detector built on a Convolutional Recurrent Neural Network (CRNN) architecture. Stage 2 (HV) is the Human-In-The-Loop (HITL) Verification of noisy samples detected by the first stage. Applying the CER-HV framework on multiple Arabic-script datasets can identify samples with label errors including transcription, segmentation, orientation, and non-text content errors that can markedly affect HTR performance. These errors were identified by the first stage of the framework with up to 90percent (top-50) precision. We also show that our CRNN achieves state-of-the-art performance across five of the six evaluated datasets, reaching 8.46 percent Character Error Rate (CER) on KHATT (Arabic), 8.22 percent on PHTI (Pashto), 10.59 percent on Ajami, and 10.11% on Muharaf (Arabic), all without any data cleaning. We establish a new baseline of 11.3 percent CER on the PHTD (Persian) dataset. Applying CER-HV improves evaluation CER by up to 1.8 percentage points after dataset cleaning and retraining. Although our experiments focus on documents written in an Arabic-script language, the framework is general and can be applied to other text recognition datasets

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种两阶段标签错误检测框架（CER-HV），结合字符错误率噪声检测和人工验证循环，提升阿拉伯文字符手写识别数据集质量。
light_analysis.motivation: 阿拉伯文字符手写识别（HTR）进展滞后于拉丁语系，部分原因是数据集质量低下。现有方法缺乏系统性的标签错误检测机制，难以识别转录、分割、方向及非文本内容错误，这些错误严重影响HTR性能。因此，需要一种高效且通用的标签错误检测方法来提高数据集质量，从而推动阿拉伯语HTR的发展。
light_analysis.method: 提出CER-HV框架，包含两阶段。第一阶段（CER）基于卷积循环神经网络（CRNN）构建字符错误率噪声检测器，识别潜在标签错误样本。第二阶段（HV）引入人工循环验证（HITL），由人工审核第一阶段检测出的噪声样本。该框架可检测转录、分割、方向及非文本内容错误，并适用于多个阿拉伯文字符数据集。实验在6个数据集上进行，包括KHATT、PHTI、Ajami、Muharaf和PHTD。
light_analysis.result: 第一阶段在top-50样本上达到90%精确率。CRNN在5个数据集上达到最先进性能：KHATT（阿拉伯语）CER 8.46%，PHTI（普什图语）8.22%，Ajami 10.59%，Muharaf（阿拉伯语）10.11%，并在PHTD（波斯语）上建立新基线11.3% CER。应用CER-HV进行数据清理和模型重训练后，评估CER最多提升1.8个百分点。
light_analysis.conclusion: CER-HV框架能有效检测阿拉伯文字符HTR数据集中的标签错误，提升数据集质量和模型性能。该框架具有通用性，可扩展到其他文本识别数据集。未来方向可能包括自动化更多验证环节，或应用于其他语言的手写识别。局限性在于仍依赖人工验证，可能增加标成本。

title: DynaDebate: Breaking Homogeneity in Multi-Agent Debate with Dynamic Path Generation
abstract: Recent years have witnessed the rapid development of Large Language Model-based Multi-Agent Systems (MAS), which excel at collaborative decision-making and complex problem-solving. Researchers have further investigated Multi-Agent Debate (MAD) frameworks, which enhance the reasoning and collaboration capabilities of MAS through information exchange and debate among multiple agents. However, existing approaches often rely on unguided initialization, causing agents to adopt identical reasoning paths that lead to the same errors. As a result, effective debate among agents is hindered, and the final outcome frequently degenerates into simple majority voting. To solve the above problem, we introduce Dynamic Multi-Agent Debate (DynaDebate), which enhances the effectiveness of multi-agent debate through three key mechanisms: (1) Dynamic Path Generation and Allocation, which employs a dedicated Path Generation Agent to generate diverse and logical solution paths with adaptive redundancy; (2) Process-Centric Debate, which shifts the focus from surface-level outcome voting to rigorous step-by-step logic critique to ensure process correctness; (3) A Trigger-Based Verification Agent, which is activated upon disagreement and uses external tools to objectively resolve deadlocks. Experiments show that DynaDebate achieves superior or highly competitive performance across the majority of benchmarks\footnote{The code is at https://github.com/nwpuLee2021/brianstorm.}.

light_analysis.overview: 提出DynaDebate框架，通过动态路径生成和过程中心辩论解决多智能体辩论中的同质性问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有基于大语言模型的多智能体辩论框架中，智能体常因无导向初始化而采用相同的推理路径，导致重复错误，无法有效辩论，最终退化为简单多数投票。这阻碍了多智能体系统的协作推理和复杂问题解决能力，亟需一种能生成多样化推理路径并促进深入辩论的方法。
light_analysis.method: DynaDebate包含三个关键机制： (1) 动态路径生成与分配，使用专门的路径生成智能体生成多样且逻辑合理的解路径，并自适应调整冗余； (2) 过程中心辩论，将焦点从表面结果投票转向严格的逐步逻辑批判，确保过程正确性； (3) 触发式验证智能体，在出现分歧时激活，借助外部工具客观解决僵局。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，DynaDebate在大多数基准测试中取得了优越或极具竞争力的性能。摘要未提供具体数值对比，但指出代码已开源，性能指标优于现有方法。
light_analysis.conclusion: DynaDebate通过动态路径生成和过程级辩论有效提升了多智能体系统的推理和协作能力，为解决同质性问题和提升辩论效果提供了新思路。未来可探索更复杂的路径生成策略或扩展至更多应用场景。

title: Discovering Symmetry Groups with Flow Matching
abstract: Symmetry is fundamental to understanding physical systems and can improve performance and sample efficiency in machine learning. Both pursuits require knowledge of the underlying symmetries in data, yet discovering these symmetries automatically is challenging. We propose LieFlow, a novel framework that reframes symmetry discovery as a distribution learning problem on Lie groups. Instead of searching for the symmetry generators, our approach operates directly in group space, modeling a symmetry distribution over a large hypothesis group $G$. The support of the learned distribution reveals the underlying symmetry group $H \subseteq G$. Unlike previous works, LieFlow can discover both continuous and discrete symmetries within a unified framework, without assuming a fixed Lie algebra basis or a specific distribution over the group elements. Experiments on synthetic 2D and 3D point clouds, ModelNet10 and a real-world MI-Motion dataset show that LieFlow accurately discovers continuous and discrete subgroups, significantly outperforming a state-of-the-art baseline, LieGAN, in identifying discrete symmetries.

light_analysis.overview: 提出LieFlow框架，将对称性发现转化为李群上的分布学习问题，统一发现连续和离散对称性。
light_analysis.motivation: 对称性对理解物理系统和提升机器学习性能至关重要，但自动发现数据中的对称性极具挑战性。现有方法如LieGAN需要固定李代数基或假设特定分布，无法统一处理连续与离散对称性。LieFlow旨在克服这些局限，提供一种无需先验假设的通用对称性发现方法。
light_analysis.method: LieFlow将对称性发现重新定义为在假设群G上学习对称性分布的问题，通过流匹配（Flow Matching）技术建模分布，其支持集直接揭示真实对称性子群H。该方法无需固定李代数基或对群元素分布做特定假设，能够统一发现连续和离散对称性。实验在合成2D/3D点云、ModelNet10和MI-Motion数据集上进行。
light_analysis.result: 在合成2D/3D点云、ModelNet10和MI-Motion数据集上，LieFlow准确发现了连续和离散子群。与最先进的基线LieGAN相比，LieFlow在识别离散对称性方面表现显著更优，具体性能指标摘要未明确说明，但强调了离散对称性发现的优越性。
light_analysis.conclusion: LieFlow提供了一个统一的对称性发现框架，能够自动学习数据中的连续和离散对称群，无需手动指定代数基或分布形式。这为物理系统理解和机器学习中的对称性利用提供了新工具。其局限性可能在于计算复杂度或对大规模数据集的扩展性，未来可探索更高效的流匹配策略。

title: MedAI: Evaluating TxAgent's Therapeutic Agentic Reasoning in the NeurIPS CURE-Bench Competition
abstract: Therapeutic decision-making in clinical medicine constitutes a high-stakes domain in which AI guidance interacts with complex interactions among patient characteristics, disease processes, and pharmacological agents. Tasks such as drug recommendation, treatment planning, and adverse-effect prediction demand robust, multi-step reasoning grounded in reliable biomedical knowledge. Agentic AI methods, exemplified by TxAgent, address these challenges through iterative retrieval-augmented generation (RAG). TxAgent employs a fine-tuned Llama-3.1-8B model that dynamically generates and executes function calls to a unified biomedical tool suite (ToolUniverse), integrating FDA Drug API, OpenTargets, and Monarch resources to ensure access to current therapeutic information. In contrast to general-purpose RAG systems, medical applications impose stringent safety constraints, rendering the accuracy of both the reasoning trace and the sequence of tool invocations critical. These considerations motivate evaluation protocols treating token-level reasoning and tool-usage behaviors as explicit supervision signals. This work presents insights derived from our participation in the CURE-Bench NeurIPS 2025 Challenge, which benchmarks therapeutic-reasoning systems using metrics that assess correctness, tool utilization, and reasoning quality. We analyze how retrieval quality for function (tool) calls influences overall model performance and demonstrate performance gains achieved through improved tool-retrieval strategies. Our work was awarded the Excellence Award in Open Science. Complete information can be found at https://curebench.ai/.

light_analysis.overview: 提出TxAgent，一种基于微调Llama-3.1-8B的代理式AI方法，通过迭代工具检索增强生成实现治疗决策推理，在CURE-Bench竞赛中验证效果并获开放科学奖。
light_analysis.motivation: 临床治疗决策涉及患者特征、疾病过程与药物间的复杂交互，要求稳健的多步推理与可靠医学知识。现有代理式AI方法（如通用RAG）在医疗安全约束下难以保证推理轨迹与工具调用的准确性，亟需针对治疗推理的评估协议与优化策略。
light_analysis.method: TxAgent采用微调Llama-3.1-8B模型，动态生成并执行函数调用，集成统一生物医学工具套件ToolUniverse（含FDA Drug API、OpenTargets、Monarch资源）。通过迭代检索-增强生成（RAG）实现多步推理；参与CURE-Bench挑战，使用正确性、工具利用、推理质量等指标评估系统。
light_analysis.result: 在CURE-Bench NeurIPS 2025挑战中，分析表明工具（函数）调用的检索质量显著影响模型整体性能。通过改进工具检索策略，取得了性能提升，并最终获得开放科学卓越奖（Excellence Award in Open Science）。具体数值摘要未明确说明。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本工作强调了医疗应用中代理式AI对推理轨迹与工具调用准确性的严格要求，展示了通过优化工具检索提升治疗推荐系统性能的可行性。该方法为未来高安全约束下的AI医疗决策系统提供了设计参考与评估范例。

title: Multi-Granular Node Pruning for Causal Circuit Discovery
abstract: Circuit discovery aims to identify minimal subnetworks that are responsible for specific behaviors in large language models (LLMs). Existing approaches primarily rely on iterative edge pruning, which is computationally expensive and limited to coarse-grained units such as attention heads or MLP blocks, overlooking finer structures like individual neurons. We propose a node-level pruning framework for circuit discovery that addresses both scalability and granularity limitations.
