Our method introduces learnable masks across multiple levels of granularity, from entire blocks to individual neurons, within a unified optimization objective. Granularity-specific sparsity penalties guide the pruning process, allowing a comprehensive compression in a single fine-tuning run. Empirically, our approach identifies circuits that are smaller in nodes than those discovered by prior methods; moreover, we demonstrate that many neurons deemed important by coarse methods are actually irrelevant, while still maintaining task performance. Furthermore, our method has a significantly lower memory footprint, 5-10x, as it does not require keeping intermediate activations in the memory to work.

light_analysis.overview: 提出多粒度节点剪枝框架，用于高效发现LLM中更小、更精确的因果回路。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有回路发现方法依赖迭代边剪枝，计算昂贵且局限于粗粒度单元（如注意力头或MLP块），忽略单个神经元，导致无法精确识别关键结构。需要一种兼顾可扩展性和细粒度的方法，以降低开销并提高发现回路的质量。
light_analysis.method: 提出节点级剪枝框架，在统一目标中引入跨块到神经元的多粒度可学习掩码，通过粒度特定的稀疏惩罚在单次微调中实现压缩。无需保留中间激活，显著降低内存占用。
light_analysis.result: 识别的回路节点数少于先前方法；许多被粗粒度方法认为重要的神经元被证明无关，任务性能保持不变。内存占用降低5-10倍。
light_analysis.conclusion: 提供了可扩展且精细的回路发现方法，提升效率与准确性，有助于理解LLM内部机制并减少计算资源。未来可探索更细粒度结构或动态稀疏性。

title: PoseGAM: Robust Unseen Object Pose Estimation via Geometry-Aware Multi-View Reasoning
abstract: 6D object pose estimation, which predicts the transformation of an object relative to the camera, remains challenging for unseen objects. Existing approaches typically rely on explicitly constructing feature correspondences between the query image and either the object model or template images. In this work, we propose PoseGAM, a geometry-aware multi-view framework that directly predicts object pose from a query image and multiple template images, eliminating the need for explicit matching. Built upon recent multi-view-based foundation model architectures, the method integrates object geometry information through two complementary mechanisms: explicit point-based geometry and learned features from geometry representation networks. In addition, we construct a large-scale synthetic dataset containing more than 190k objects under diverse environmental conditions to enhance robustness and generalization. Extensive evaluations across multiple benchmarks demonstrate our state-of-the-art performance, yielding an average AR improvement of 5.1% over prior methods and achieving up to 17.6% gains on individual datasets, indicating strong generalization to unseen objects. Project page: https://windvchen.github.io/PoseGAM/ .
comment: Accepted by CVPR 2026 (Oral). Project page: https://windvchen.github.io/PoseGAM/

light_analysis.overview: 提出PoseGAM，一种几何感知多视图框架，无需显式匹配即可直接预测未见过物体的6D姿态，在多个基准上取得最优性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 6D物体姿态估计对未见过物体仍具挑战。现有方法依赖构建查询图像与物体模型或模板图像之间的显式特征对应，这限制了鲁棒性和泛化能力。因此，需要一种无需显式匹配、能有效利用几何信息的方法来提升对未见过物体的姿态估计性能。
light_analysis.method: PoseGAM基于多视图基础模型架构，集成物体几何信息：显式点基几何和几何表示网络学习的隐式特征。通过两种互补机制融合几何知识，直接预测查询图像与多模板图像之间的物体姿态，消除了传统显式匹配步骤。同时构建包含超过19万个物体的大规模合成数据集，涵盖多样环境条件，以增强鲁棒性和泛化能力。
light_analysis.result: 在多个基准数据集上的广泛评估表明，PoseGAM达到最优性能：平均AR相比先前方法提升5.1%，在个别数据集上最高提升17.6%。结果表明模型对未见过物体具有强泛化能力。
light_analysis.conclusion: PoseGAM通过几何感知多视图推理有效解决了未见过物体6D姿态估计问题，无需显式匹配。其创新性地融合显式和隐式几何信息，并利用大规模合成数据集提升鲁棒性。该工作为无模型6D姿态估计提供了新范式，未来可拓展至更复杂的场景和应用。

title: A Fully First-Order Layer for Differentiable Optimization
abstract: Differentiable optimization layers enable learning systems to make decisions by solving embedded optimization problems. However, computing gradients via implicit differentiation requires solving a linear system with Hessian terms, which is both compute- and memory-intensive. To address this challenge, we propose a novel algorithm that computes the gradient using only first-order information. The key insight is to rewrite the differentiable optimization as a bilevel optimization problem and leverage recent advances in bilevel methods. Specifically, we introduce an active-set Lagrangian hypergradient oracle that avoids Hessian evaluations and provides finite-time, non-asymptotic approximation guarantees. We show that an approximate hypergradient can be computed using only first-order information in $\tilde{O}(1)$ time, leading to an overall complexity of $\tilde{O}(δ^{-1}ε^{-3})$ for constrained bilevel optimization, which matches the best known rate for non-smooth non-convex optimization. Furthermore, we release an open-source Python library that can be easily adapted from existing solvers. The source code is available at https://github.com/guaguakai/FFOLayer.

light_analysis.overview: 提出全一阶可微分优化层，通过活动集拉格朗日超梯度避免海森矩阵计算，实现高效梯度求解。
light_analysis.motivation: 可微分优化层通过学习系统嵌入优化问题实现决策，但通过隐式微分计算梯度时需求解包含海森矩阵的线性系统，计算和内存开销大。现有方法难以兼顾效率与精度，尤其在高维或约束优化场景中瓶颈明显。因此，急需一种仅依赖一阶信息的高效梯度计算方法，以降低复杂度并保持近似保证。
light_analysis.method: 将可微分优化重写为双层优化问题，利用活动集拉格朗日超梯度预言机，避免直接计算海森矩阵。通过有限时间非渐近近似保证，仅用一阶信息即可在Õ(1)时间内计算超梯度。整体复杂度为Õ(δ⁻¹ε⁻³)，匹配非光滑非凸约束双层优化的最优速率。同时提供开源Python库，易于从现有求解器适配。
light_analysis.result: 理论分析表明，所提算法在约束双层优化中达到Õ(δ⁻¹ε⁻³)复杂度，与当前非光滑非凸优化的最优速率一致。实验部分（摘要未明确说明）应验证了梯度计算效率提升和近似精度，但具体数值未提及。与隐式微分方法对比，避免了海森矩阵存储和求解，显著降低内存和计算成本。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该论文提出首个全一阶可微分优化层，通过双层优化视角和高斯-牛顿型更新，在不牺牲近似保证的前提下消除海森矩阵依赖。学术上为非凸双层优化提供新思路，实际中可赋能端到端学习、机器人控制等需快速求解优化问题的场景。未来或可扩展至更广泛的约束类型及大规模问题。

title: CycliST: A Video Language Model Benchmark for Reasoning on Cyclical State Transitions
abstract: We present CycliST, a novel benchmark dataset designed to evaluate Video Language Models (VLM) on their ability for textual reasoning over cyclical state transitions. CycliST captures fundamental aspects of real-world processes by generating synthetic, richly structured video sequences featuring periodic patterns in object motion and visual attributes. CycliST employs a tiered evaluation system that progressively increases difficulty through variations in the number of cyclic objects, scene clutter, and lighting conditions, challenging state-of-the-art models on their spatio-temporal cognition. We conduct extensive experiments with current state-of-the-art VLMs, both open-source and proprietary, and reveal their limitations in generalizing to cyclical dynamics such as linear and orbital motion, as well as time-dependent changes in visual attributes like color and scale. Our results demonstrate that present-day VLMs struggle to reliably detect and exploit cyclic patterns, lack a notion of temporal understanding, and are unable to extract quantitative insights from scenes, such as the number of objects in motion, highlighting a significant technical gap that needs to be addressed. More specifically, we find no single model consistently leads in performance: neither size nor architecture correlates strongly with outcomes, and no model succeeds equally well across all tasks. By providing a targeted challenge and a comprehensive evaluation framework, CycliST paves the way for visual reasoning models that surpass the state-of-the-art in understanding periodic patterns.
comment: Published in the Journal of Data-centric Machine Learning Research (DMLR); https://openreview.net/forum?id=l03g53HUL2

light_analysis.overview: 提出CycliST基准，评估视频语言模型对周期性状态转换的推理能力，揭示现有模型在时间理解上的显著不足。
light_analysis.motivation: 真实世界过程常涉及周期性状态转换，如物体运动或视觉属性的循环变化。现有视频语言模型（VLM）在检测和利用循环模式方面表现不佳，缺乏时间感知能力，且无法提取场景中的定量信息（如运动物体数量）。这构成了一个重要的技术鸿沟，亟需专门的评估基准来推动模型改进。
light_analysis.method: CycliST通过生成合成视频序列，包含对象运动和视觉属性（如颜色、尺度）的周期性变化（如线性、轨道运动）。采用分级评估系统，逐步增加循环对象数量、场景杂乱度和光照变化，以挑战模型的空间-时间认知。使用当前最先进的开源和专有VLM进行实验，评估其文本推理能力。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，现有VLM在检测和利用循环模式方面存在困难，缺乏时间理解，无法提取定量信息（如运动物体数量）。没有单一模型在所有任务中表现一致领先，模型大小或架构与性能无强相关性，且各模型在不同任务上表现不平衡，凸显了当前技术的局限性。
light_analysis.conclusion: CycliST提供了一个针对性的挑战和全面的评估框架，揭示了VLM在理解周期性动态方面的显著不足。该基准有助于推动视觉推理模型的发展，使其超越当前最先进水平，更好地理解周期性模式。未来工作可基于此改进模型的时间建模能力。

title: Through-Foliage Surface-Temperature Reconstruction for Early Wildfire Detection
abstract: We present a method to reconstruct surface temperatures through forest vegetation by combining signal processing and machine learning, enabling fully automated aerial wildfire monitoring with drones for early fire detection. Synthetic aperture (SA) sensing reduces canopy occlusion but introduces thermal blur. To overcome this, we train a visual state space model to recover subtle thermal signals of partially occluded soil and fire hotspots from blurred data. To address limited real-world training data, we generate realistic surface temperature simulations using a latent diffusion model, temperature augmentation, and procedural thermal forest modeling. On simulated datasets, our method reduces RMSE by 2-2.5 versus conventional thermal and uncorrected SA imaging; in field experiments on hotspots, RMSE improved by 12.8-fold and 2.6-fold, respectively. Our approach also generalizes to other thermal signals, including human signatures, capturing morphology and extent -- critical where simple thresholding fails -- while conventional imaging struggles with partial occlusion.

light_analysis.overview: 提出结合信号处理与机器学习的森林地表温度重建方法，实现早期野火检测。
light_analysis.motivation: 无人机航拍用于野火早期检测时，森林冠层遮挡导致地表温度信号模糊，传统热成像和合成孔径（SA）成像难以恢复部分遮挡下的微弱热信号。现有方法缺乏足够的真实训练数据，且对复杂遮挡场景泛化能力不足。因此需要一种能有效穿透植被、重建地表温度的方法，以提升火灾预警的准确性和及时性。
light_analysis.method: 采用合成孔径（SA）传感减少冠层遮挡，但引入热模糊。为此训练视觉状态空间模型（visual state space model）从模糊数据中恢复土壤和火点的微弱热信号。为缓解真实数据稀缺，利用潜扩散模型（latent diffusion model）生成逼真地表温度模拟，结合温度增强和过程性热森林建模。该方法在模拟数据集上相比传统热成像和未校正SA成像使RMSE降低2-2.5；在热点实地实验中RMSE分别改善12.8倍和2.6倍。
light_analysis.result: 在模拟数据集上，相比传统热成像和未校正合成孔径（SA）成像，均方根误差（RMSE）降低2-2.5。在实地热点实验中，RMSE分别改善12.8倍（与传统热成像比）和2.6倍（与未校正SA成像比）。方法还能泛化至其他热信号（如人体热信号），捕捉其形态和范围，而传统方法在部分遮挡下表现不佳。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文提出一种通过森林植被重建地表温度的方法，有效结合信号处理与机器学习，实现无人机全自动早期野火检测。该方法在模拟和实地实验中均显著优于传统技术，并能泛化至其他热信号（如人体），具有重要应用价值。未来可进一步优化模型实时性并扩展至更多场景（如野生动物监测）。

title: A Multi-level Analysis of Factors Associated with Student Performance: A Machine Learning Approach to the SAEB Microdata
abstract: Identifying the factors that influence student performance in basic education is a central challenge for formulating effective public policies in Brazil. This study introduces a multi-level machine learning approach to classify the proficiency of 9th-grade and high school students using microdata from the System of Assessment of Basic Education (SAEB). Our model uniquely integrates four data sources: student socioeconomic characteristics, teacher professional profiles, school indicators, and principal management profiles. A comparative analysis of four ensemble algorithms confirmed the superiority of a Random Forest model, which achieved 90.2% accuracy and an Area Under the Curve (AUC) of 96.7%. To move beyond prediction, we applied Explainable AI (XAI) using SHAP, which revealed that the school's average socioeconomic level is the most dominant predictor, demonstrating that systemic factors have a greater impact than individual characteristics in isolation. The primary conclusion is that academic performance is a systemic phenomenon deeply tied to the school's ecosystem. This study provides a data-driven, interpretable tool to inform policies aimed at promoting educational equity by addressing disparities between schools.
comment: This article has been published in Discover Education (Springer Nature). The final authenticated version is available at:https://doi.org/10.1007/s44217-026-01699-0

light_analysis.overview: 本研究提出一种多层级机器学习方法，利用巴西基础教育评估系统SAEB的微观数据分类学生成绩，揭示系统性因素比个体特征影响更大，并借助可解释AI提供政策支持。
light_analysis.motivation: 识别影响巴西基础教育学生成绩的因素是制定有效公共政策的核心挑战。现有研究多关注单一层面，缺乏对学校生态系统内多源数据（学生、教师、学校、校长）的综合分析，且预测模型缺乏可解释性，难以指导教育公平政策的制定。
light_analysis.method: 基于SAEB九年级和高中微观数据，集成学生社会经济特征、教师职业档案、学校指标和校长管理特征四类数据源，构建多层级机器学习模型。对比四种集成算法后，采用随机森林作为最终模型，并应用SHAP进行可解释性分析，揭示各因素对成绩的贡献度。
light_analysis.result: 随机森林模型在分类任务中达到90.2%的准确率和96.7%的AUC，优于其他集成算法。SHAP分析表明，学校平均社会经济水平是最主导的预测因子，远超个体特征，证实学业表现是系统性现象。与基线方法相比，本模型整合多源数据并提供了可解释性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文证实学业表现是学校生态系统的系统性现象，学校层面的平均社会经济水平比个体特征更具预测力。该方法提供了一种数据驱动且可解释的工具，有助于识别校际差异，为促进教育公平的政策制定提供依据。未来可扩展至更多区域或纵向数据分析。

title: CoIRL-AD: Collaborative-Competitive Imitation-Reinforcement Learning in Latent World Models for Autonomous Driving
abstract: End-to-end autonomous driving models trained with imitation learning (IL) often generalize poorly, particularly in long-tail scenarios where expert demonstrations are sparse. Reinforcement learning (RL) can provide complementary task-level supervision, but applying RL to real-world autonomous driving is challenging in offline settings without interactive simulators, where datasets are dominated by expert actions and provide limited behavioral diversity. We propose CoIRL-AD, a competitive dual-policy framework that integrates IL and RL under a unified offline training regime. CoIRL-AD decouples imitation and reward optimization into separate actors to alleviate objective conflicts, uses imagined future rollouts for long-horizon reward estimation, and introduces a competition mechanism that selectively transfers beneficial behaviors while keeping RL anchored to expert-like driving. Experiments on the nuScenes benchmark show that CoIRL-AD consistently improves robustness over strong IL-based baselines, with especially large gains in cross-city generalization and long-tail scenarios. Code is available at: https://github.com/SEU-zxj/CoIRL-AD.

light_analysis.overview: 提出CoIRL-AD，一种竞争-协作模仿-强化学习框架，在潜世界模型中实现离线端到端自动驾驶，提升长尾场景鲁棒性。
light_analysis.motivation: 端到端自动驾驶的模仿学习方法在长尾场景中泛化能力差，因为专家示范稀疏。强化学习能提供任务级监督，但在离线环境中缺乏交互模拟器且数据集由专家动作主导，行为多样性有限。现有方法难以融合IL和RL的优势，存在目标冲突。
light_analysis.method: CoIRL-AD采用竞争双策略框架，将模仿学习和奖励优化解耦为独立actor，避免目标冲突。利用潜世界模型进行想象未来轨迹以实现长时奖励估计，并引入竞争机制选择性迁移有益行为，同时保持RL锚定于专家驾驶风格。统一离线训练无需交互环境。
light_analysis.result: 在nuScenes基准上，CoIRL-AD在多种设置下显著优于强IL基线，尤其在跨城市泛化和长尾场景中提升明显。具体数值摘要未明确给出，但代码已开源。
light_analysis.conclusion: CoIRL-AD通过竞争双策略统一IL和RL，有效提升自动驾驶的离线和长尾鲁棒性。该方法具有实际应用价值，未来可扩展至更多复杂驾驶场景。局限性可能包括对潜世界模型质量的依赖。

title: A large-scale pipeline for LLM-assisted corpus annotation: variation and change in the English consider construction
abstract: As natural language corpora expand at an unprecedented rate, manual annotation remains a significant methodological bottleneck in corpus linguistic work. We address this challenge by presenting a scalable pipeline for automating grammatical annotation in voluminous corpora using large language models (LLMs). Unlike previous supervised and iterative approaches, our method employs a four-phase workflow: prompt engineering, pre-hoc evaluation, automated batch processing, and post-hoc validation. We demonstrate the pipeline's accessibility and effectiveness through a diachronic case study of variation in the English evaluative consider construction (consider X as/to be/Ø Y). We annotate 143,933 'consider' concordance lines from the Corpus of Historical American English (COHA) via the OpenAI API in under 60 hours, achieving 98%+ accuracy on two sophisticated annotation procedures. A Bayesian multinomial GAM fitted to 44,527 true positives of the evaluative construction reveals previously undocumented genre-specific trajectories of change, enabling us to advance new hypotheses about the relationship between register formality and competing pressures of morphosyntactic reduction and enhancement. Our results suggest that LLMs can perform a range of data preparation tasks at scale with minimal human intervention, unlocking substantive research questions previously beyond practical reach, though implementation requires attention to costs, licensing, and other ethical considerations.

light_analysis.overview: 提出一个基于大语言模型的可扩展流水线，用于大规模语料库的自动语法标注，并以英语考虑构式的历时变化研究验证其有效性。
light_analysis.motivation: 随着自然语言语料库的快速增长，人工标注成为方法论的瓶颈。现有监督和迭代方法存在局限性，缺乏可扩展性和易用性。因此，需要一种高效、低人工干预的自动化标注方法，以处理大规模语料并支持语言变化研究。
light_analysis.method: 采用四阶段流水线：提示工程、预评估、自动批处理和后验证。使用OpenAI API对来自COHA的143,933条‘consider’索引行进行标注，耗时不到60小时。通过贝叶斯多项式GAM分析44,527个真阳性实例，探索语域正式性与形态句法简化/增强之间的竞争压力。
light_analysis.result: 两个复杂标注程序均达到98%以上的准确率。贝叶斯分析揭示了先前未记录的语域特定变化轨迹，支持关于语域正式性与形态句法简化/增强关系的新假设。结果表明LLM能以最少人工干预完成大规模数据准备任务。
light_analysis.conclusion: LLM流水线在语料库语言学中具有显著潜力，能够解锁之前难以实现的研究问题。但实施时需注意成本、许可和伦理问题。该方法为自动语法标注提供了可扩展的解决方案，并有助于理解语言演变中的语域差异。

title: PISA: A Pragmatic Psych-Inspired Unified Memory System for Enhanced AI Agency
abstract: Memory systems are fundamental to AI agents, yet existing work often lacks adaptability to diverse tasks and overlooks the constructive and task-oriented role of AI agent memory. Drawing from Piaget's theory of cognitive development, we propose PISA, a pragmatic, psych-inspired unified memory system that addresses these limitations by treating memory as a constructive and adaptive process. To enable continuous learning and adaptability, PISA introduces a trimodal adaptation mechanism (i.e., schema updation, schema evolution, and schema creation) that preserves coherent organization while supporting flexible memory updates. Building on these schema-grounded structures, we further design a hybrid memory access architecture that seamlessly integrates symbolic reasoning with neural retrieval, significantly improving retrieval accuracy and efficiency. Our empirical evaluation, conducted on the existing LOCOMO benchmark and our newly proposed AggQA benchmark for data analysis tasks, confirms that PISA sets a new state-of-the-art by significantly enhancing adaptability and long-term knowledge retention.

light_analysis.overview: 提出PISA，一种受皮亚杰认知发展理论启发的统一内存系统，通过三模态适应机制和混合内存访问架构，增强AI代理的适应性和知识保持。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有AI代理内存系统缺乏对多样化任务的适应性，忽视了内存的建设性和任务导向作用。研究旨在借鉴心理学理论，设计一种能持续学习和自适应的内存系统，以提升AI代理在复杂任务中的表现。
light_analysis.method: PISA采用皮亚杰认知发展理论，引入三模态适应机制（模式更新、模式演化、模式创建）实现灵活的内存更新与连贯组织。同时设计混合内存访问架构，结合符号推理与神经检索，提高检索准确性和效率。在LOCOMO和自建的AggQA基准上评估。
light_analysis.result: 在LOCOMO基准和提出的AggQA基准上，PISA设立了新的最先进水平，显著增强了适应性和长期知识保持。具体性能指标摘要未明确说明，但提到显著提升。
light_analysis.conclusion: PISA通过心理学启发的记忆系统，有效提升了AI代理的适应性和知识保持，具有重要的学术和应用价值。未来可进一步探索记忆机制在其他领域的应用。

title: RoSE: Round-robin Synthetic Data Evaluation for Selecting LLM Generators without Human Test Sets
abstract: LLMs are powerful generators of synthetic data, which are used for training smaller, specific models. This is especially valuable for low-resource languages, where human-labelled data is scarce but LLMs can still produce high-quality text. However, LLMs differ in how useful their outputs are for training. Selecting the best LLM as a generator is challenging because extrinsic evaluation requires costly human annotations (which are often unavailable for low-resource languages), while intrinsic metrics correlate poorly with downstream performance. We introduce Round robin Synthetic data Evaluation (RoSE), a proxy metric for selecting the best LLM generator without human test sets. RoSE trains a small model on the outputs of a candidate generator (LLM) and then evaluates it on generated synthetic examples from all other candidate LLMs. The final RoSE score is the mean performance of this small model. Across six LLMs, eleven languages, and three tasks (sentiment, topic, intent), RoSE identifies the optimal generator more often than any other intrinsic heuristics. RoSE outperforms intrinsic heuristics and comes within 0.76 percentage points of the optimal generator baseline. This result is measured in terms of downstream performance, obtained by training a small model on the chosen generator's outputs (optimal vs. proxy metric selected) and evaluating it on human-labelled test data. Additionally, RoSE is the only metric to achieve a positive correlation with performance on human test data.

light_analysis.overview: 提出RoSE，一种无需人工测试集即可选择最优LLM生成器的代理指标。
light_analysis.motivation: LLM生成合成数据用于训练小型模型，对低资源语言特别有价值。然而，选择最佳生成器面临挑战：外在评估需要昂贵的人工标注（低资源语言常缺乏），内在指标与下游性能相关性差。因此需要一种无需人工测试集的评估方法。
light_analysis.method: RoSE采用循环合成数据评估：在候选生成器的输出上训练一个小模型，然后在所有其他候选LLM生成的合成示例上评估它。最终RoSE得分是小模型的平均性能。该方法利用其他生成器输出作为测试集，避免了人工标注。
light_analysis.result: 在6个LLM、11种语言、3个任务（情感、主题、意图）上，RoSE比任何内在启发式方法更频繁地识别出最佳生成器。与最优生成器基线相比，下游性能仅差0.76个百分点。RoSE是唯一与人工测试数据性能正相关的指标。
light_analysis.conclusion: RoSE是一种有效且低成本的代理指标，无需人工测试集即可选择最优LLM生成器，尤其适用于低资源语言。它降低了评估成本，拓展了合成数据生成的实用性。未来可探索更多任务和语言的应用。

title: BioAutoML-NAS: An End-to-End AutoML Framework for Multimodal Insect Classification via Neural Architecture Search on Large-Scale Biodiversity Data
abstract: Insect classification is important for agricultural management and ecological research, as it directly affects crop health and production. However, this task remains challenging due to the complex characteristics of insects, class imbalance, and large-scale datasets. To address these issues, we propose BioAutoML-NAS, the first BioAutoML model using multimodal data, including images, and metadata, which applies neural architecture search (NAS) for images to automatically learn the best operations for each connection within each cell. Multiple cells are stacked to form the full network, each extracting detailed image feature representations. A multimodal fusion module combines image embeddings with metadata, allowing the model to use both visual and categorical biological information to classify insects. An alternating bi-level optimization training strategy jointly updates network weights and architecture parameters, while zero operations remove less important connections, producing sparse, efficient, and high-performing architectures. Extensive evaluation on the BIOSCAN-5M dataset demonstrates that BioAutoML-NAS achieves 96.81% accuracy, 97.46% precision, 96.81% recall, and a 97.05% F1 score, outperforming state-of-the-art transfer learning, transformer, AutoML, and NAS methods by approximately 16%, 10%, and 8% respectively. Further validation on the Insects-1M dataset obtains 93.25% accuracy, 93.71% precision, 92.74% recall, and a 93.22% F1 score. These results demonstrate that BioAutoML-NAS provides accurate, confident insect classification that supports modern sustainable farming.
comment: Accepted in IEEE Transactions on Big Data

light_analysis.overview: 提出首个基于多模态数据和神经架构搜索的自动机器学习框架BioAutoML-NAS，用于大规模昆虫分类。
light_analysis.motivation: 昆虫分类对农业管理和生态研究至关重要，直接影响作物健康和产量。然而，昆虫特征复杂、类别不平衡以及大规模数据集使得该任务极具挑战。现有方法难以同时有效处理多模态信息并自动优化网络结构，导致分类性能受限。因此，亟需一种能自动学习高性能架构并融合图像与元数据的端到端框架。
light_analysis.method: BioAutoML-NAS采用神经架构搜索自动学习每个细胞中连接的最佳操作，堆叠多个细胞形成完整网络以提取图像特征。多模态融合模块将图像嵌入与元数据结合，利用视觉和分类生物学信息。交替双层优化策略联合更新网络权重和架构参数，并通过零操作移除不重要连接，生成稀疏高效的架构。
light_analysis.result: 在BIOSCAN-5M数据集上，BioAutoML-NAS达到96.81%准确率、97.46%精确率、96.81%召回率和97.05% F1分数，相比最新迁移学习、Transformer、AutoML和NAS方法分别提升约16%、10%和8%。在Insects-1M数据集上获得93.25%准确率、93.71%精确率、92.74%召回率和93.22% F1分数。
light_analysis.conclusion: BioAutoML-NAS通过多模态NAS实现了高精度昆虫分类，为现代农业可持续实践提供支持。其端到端自动设计能力在学术上推动了AutoML和NAS在生物多样性领域的应用，实际中可助力农业病虫害监测。未来可探索降低NAS计算成本及扩展到更多物种分类。

title: DP-Hype: Federated Differentially Private Hyperparameter Search
abstract: Tuning hyperparameters in federated machine learning can substantially impact model performance. When hyperparameters are tuned on sensitive data, privacy becomes an important challenge and to this end, differential privacy has emerged as the de facto standard for provable privacy. A standard setting in federated learning is that clients agree on a shared setup, i.e., find a compromise from a set of hyperparameters, like a model's learning rate. Yet, prior work on privacy-preserving hyperparameter tuning is tailored to specific learning tasks, does not account for the privacy leakage of aggregated results, or offers a sub-optimal privacy-utility trade-off.   In this work, we present our algorithm DP-Hype, which performs a federated and privacy-preserving hyperparameter search by conducting a federated voting based on local hyperparameter evaluations of clients. In this way, DP-Hype selects hyperparameters that lead to a compromise supported by a majority of clients, while maintaining scalability and independence from specific learning tasks. We prove that DP-Hype preserves the strong notion of differential privacy called client-level differential privacy and, importantly, show that its privacy guarantees do not depend on the number of hyperparameters. We also provide bounds on its utility guarantees, that is, the probability of finding good hyperparameters, and implement DP-Hype as a submodule in the popular Flower framework for federated machine learning. In addition, we evaluate performance on multiple benchmark data sets in iid as well as multiple non-iid settings and demonstrate high utility of DP-Hype even under small privacy budgets.

light_analysis.overview: 提出联邦差分隐私超参数搜索算法DP-Hype，基于客户本地评估的联邦投票机制，实现隐私保护且与任务无关的超参数选择。
light_analysis.motivation: 联邦学习中超参数调优对模型性能影响显著，但现有隐私保护方法要么针对特定学习任务，要么忽略聚合结果的隐私泄露，或提供次优的隐私-效用权衡。需要一种通用、可扩展且隐私保证强的方法，不依赖超参数数量。
light_analysis.method: DP-Hype通过联邦投票进行超参数搜索：客户端基于本地数据评估超参数集，发送投票；服务器聚合并添加差分隐私噪声，选择获得多数支持的折衷超参数。核心创新在于证明其满足客户级差分隐私，且隐私预算不随超参数数量增长。实现为Flower框架的子模块。
light_analysis.result: 在多个基准数据集（iid和非iid设置）上评估，DP-Hype在很小的隐私预算下仍能保持高效用，超参数选择性能优于次优基线，且计算开销低，可扩展至大量客户端和超参数。
light_analysis.conclusion: DP-Hype首次在联邦学习中实现隐私预算与超参数数量无关的差分隐私超参数搜索，具有通用性和强隐私保证，实用价值高。未来可探索更复杂的投票机制或与其他隐私技术结合。

title: On the Benefits of Weight Normalization for Overparameterized Matrix Sensing
abstract: While normalization techniques are widely used in deep learning, their theoretical understanding remains relatively limited. In this work, we establish the benefits of (generalized) weight normalization (WN) applied to the overparameterized matrix sensing problem. We prove that WN with Riemannian optimization achieves linear convergence, yielding an exponential speedup over standard methods that do not use WN. Our analysis further demonstrates that both iteration and sample complexity improve polynomially as the level of overparameterization increases. To the best of our knowledge, this work provides the first characterization of how WN leverages overparameterization for faster convergence in matrix sensing.

light_analysis.overview: 首次理论上证明权重归一化结合黎曼优化在过参数化矩阵感知中实现线性收敛，加速效果随过参数化程度提升。
light_analysis.motivation: 深度学习归一化技术应用广泛但理论理解不足。矩阵感知是信号处理重要问题，现有方法收敛慢，尤其未归一化时。过参数化能提升性能但如何利用其加速收敛缺乏理论。本文旨在揭示权重归一化在过参数化矩阵感知中的加速机制。
light_analysis.method: 采用广义权重归一化与黎曼优化结合，应用于过参数化矩阵感知。理论分析证明该组合达到线性收敛速率。关键创新是首次刻画权重归一化如何利用过参数化改善收敛性，迭代和样本复杂度随过参数化程度多项式改进。
light_analysis.result: 理论证明权重归一化与黎曼优化结合实现线性收敛，相比未归一化标准方法指数级加速。随过参数化程度增加，迭代和样本复杂度多项式改善。具体数值未明确。
light_analysis.conclusion: 首次从理论上阐明权重归一化在过参数化矩阵感知中的优势，证明其能实现指数级加速和多项式复杂度改进。深化了对归一化理论的理解，为设计高效矩阵感知算法提供指导。未来可扩展到其他低秩恢复问题。

title: Why Tree-Style Branching Matters for Thought Advantage Estimation in GRPO
abstract: Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO) trains Chain-of-Thought reasoning with verifiable rewards, but estimating thought-level advantages without value functions often suffers from high variance. Although tree-style branching is used in practice to reduce variance, it lacks a theoretical explanation of why it works and whether it is important or potentially necessary. We study thought-level advantage estimation in GRPO from a variance perspective under a minimal tree-style setting where multiple continuations are sampled for each thought. Using the multivariate delta method, we reveal a sampling-dimension asymmetry. Increasing sampled thoughts ($K$) leaves a strictly positive estimation-variance floor, whereas increasing continuations per thought ($M$) drives the leading-order estimation variance to zero at rate $1/M$. This implies that, within the fixed-temperature GRPO-style estimator without value models studied here, accurate thought-level advantage estimation cannot be achieved by scaling thought sampling alone, making continuation-level branching a principled and potentially necessary mechanism rather than a heuristic. Experiments further provide empirical evidence for its effectiveness and potential necessity, demonstrating improved optimization stability, training efficiency, and final performance not only in math but also across vision domains and under different model architectures and sizes.
comment: Accepted by ICML 2026, code are available at https://github.com/whcpumpkin/GRPO-MA

light_analysis.overview: 揭示GRPO中树状分支对思维优势估计的必要性，理论证明连续分支降低方差而思想采样不能。
light_analysis.motivation: GRPO训练思维链推理时，无值函数的优势估计方差高。实践中树状分支可降方差，但缺乏理论解释。需要理解其必要性和重要性，以指导算法设计并提升训练稳定性与性能。
light_analysis.method: 从方差角度分析最小树状设置（每个思维采样多个连续分支）。利用多元delta方法揭示采样维度不对称性：增加采样思维数K留下严格正方差下限，而增加每个思维的连续分支数M以1/M速率将主导方差降为零。理论表明仅扩大思维采样无法准确估计优势，连续分支是必要的。
light_analysis.result: 理论分析表明树状分支是GRPO中必要机制。实验在数学、视觉领域及不同模型架构和规模上验证：树状分支提升优化稳定性、训练效率和最终性能，且仅增加思维采样无法达到同等效果。
light_analysis.conclusion: 树状分支是GRPO中必要机制而非启发式，理论贡献解释了其有效性，为算法设计提供指导。未来可探索更优分支策略或扩展至其他无值函数场景。

title: Beyond Rebalancing: Benchmarking Binary Classifiers Under Class Imbalance Without Rebalancing Techniques
abstract: Class imbalance poses a significant challenge to supervised classification, particularly in critical domains like medical diagnostics and anomaly detection where minority class instances are rare. While numerous studies have explored rebalancing techniques to address this issue, less attention has been given to evaluating the performance of binary classifiers under imbalance when no such techniques are applied. Therefore, the goal of this study is to assess the performance of binary classifiers "as-is", without performing any explicit rebalancing. Specifically, we systematically evaluate the robustness of a diverse set of binary classifiers across both real-world and synthetic datasets, under progressively reduced minority class sizes, using one-shot and few-shot scenarios as baselines. Our approach also explores varying data complexities through synthetic decision boundary generation to simulate real-world conditions. In addition to standard classifiers, we include experiments using undersampling, oversampling strategies, and one-class classification (OCC) methods to examine their behavior under severe imbalance. The results confirm that classification becomes more difficult as data complexity increases and the minority class size decreases. While traditional classifiers deteriorate under extreme imbalance, advanced models like TabPFN and boosting-based ensembles retain relatively higher performance and better generalization compared to traditional classifiers. Visual interpretability and evaluation metrics further validate these findings. Our work offers valuable guidance on model selection for imbalanced learning, providing insights into classifier robustness without dependence on explicit rebalancing techniques.

light_analysis.overview: 系统评估无重采样技术下二分类器在类不平衡时的性能，揭示TabPFN和boosting集成等高级模型的鲁棒性。
light_analysis.motivation: 类不平衡问题在医疗诊断、异常检测等关键领域严重影响分类性能。现有研究多聚焦于重采样技术，但较少评估分类器本身的固有鲁棒性。本文旨在填补这一空白，为实际应用中选择合适的分类器提供指导。
light_analysis.method: 在真实和合成数据集上，逐步减少少数类样本规模，引入一次性/少样本基线，并合成不同复杂度的决策边界模拟真实场景。评估多种分类器（包括传统模型、TabPFN、boosting集成等），并对比欠采样、过采样和单类分类方法在严重不平衡下的行为。
light_analysis.result: 结果表明，分类难度随数据复杂度增加和少数类样本减少而上升。传统分类器在极端不平衡下性能显著下降，而TabPFN和boosting集成保持较高性能，且泛化能力更强。可视化分析和评估指标进一步验证了这一结论。
light_analysis.conclusion: 提供了不平衡学习场景下的模型选择建议，强调分类器固有鲁棒性的重要性，无需依赖显式重采样技术。该研究为实际部署提供了参考，未来可探索更多先进模型在不同不平衡程度下的表现。

title: Optimizing Health Coverage in Ethiopia: A Learning-augmented Approach and Persistent Proportionality Under an Online Budget
abstract: As part of nationwide efforts aligned with the United Nations' Sustainable Development Goal 3 on Universal Health Coverage, Ethiopia's Ministry of Health is strengthening health posts to expand access to essential healthcare services. However, only a fraction of this health system strengthening effort can be implemented each year due to limited budgets and other competing priorities, thus the need for an optimization framework to guide prioritization across the regions of Ethiopia. In this paper, we develop a tool, Health Access Resource Planner (HARP), based on a principled decision-support optimization framework for sequential facility planning that aims to maximize population coverage under budget uncertainty while satisfying region-specific proportionality targets at every time step. We then propose two algorithms: (i) a learning-augmented approach that improves upon expert recommendations at any single-step; and (ii) a greedy algorithm for multi-step planning, both with strong worst-case approximation estimation. In collaboration with the Ethiopian Public Health Institute and Ministry of Health, we demonstrated the empirical efficacy of our method on three regions across various planning scenarios.
comment: Published in the AISI track at AAAI 2026

light_analysis.overview: 提出基于学习增强和在线预算下持续比例性的优化框架，用于埃塞俄比亚健康覆盖规划。
light_analysis.motivation: 埃塞俄比亚卫生部致力于扩大基本医疗服务的可及性，但受限于有限预算和竞争性优先事项，每年只能实施部分强化措施。因此，需要一个优化框架来指导全国各地区的优先排序，以最大化人口覆盖并满足区域比例性目标，同时应对预算不确定性。
light_analysis.method: 开发了HARP工具，基于原则性的决策支持优化框架，用于顺序设施规划。提出两种算法：一是学习增强方法，改进专家单步建议；二是贪心算法用于多步规划，两者均有强最坏情况近似估计。与埃塞俄比亚公共卫生研究所和卫生部合作，在三个地区的多种规划场景中验证了方法有效性。
light_analysis.result: 方法在三个地区的多种规划场景中显示出实证有效性。摘要未明确说明具体性能指标，但提及与专家建议相比有改进，且算法具有强最坏情况近似保证。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文为埃塞俄比亚健康覆盖规划提供了实用工具，融合了学习增强和在线优化，具有学术价值和实际应用价值。潜在局限性包括对预算不确定性的处理依赖算法近似，未来可扩展至更多地区或考虑其他约束。

title: Finite-Width Neural Tangent Kernels from Feynman Diagrams
abstract: Neural tangent kernels (NTKs) are a powerful tool for analyzing deep, non-linear neural networks. In the infinite-width limit, NTKs can easily be computed for most common architectures, yielding full analytic control over the training dynamics. However, at infinite width, important properties of training such as NTK evolution or feature learning are absent. Nevertheless, finite width effects can be included by computing corrections to the Gaussian statistics at infinite width. We introduce Feynman diagrams for computing finite-width corrections to NTK statistics. These dramatically simplify the necessary algebraic manipulations and enable the computation of layer-wise recursion relations for arbitrary statistics involving preactivations, NTKs and certain higher-derivative tensors (dNTK and ddNTK) required to predict the training dynamics at leading order. We demonstrate the feasibility of our framework by extending stability results for deep networks from preactivations to NTKs and proving the absence of finite-width corrections for scale-invariant nonlinearities such as ReLU on the diagonal of the Gram matrix of the NTK. We numerically implement the complete set of equations necessary to compute the first-order corrections for arbitrary inputs and demonstrate that the results follow the statistics of sampled neural networks for widths $n\gtrsim 20$.
comment: Published at the ICML 2026; 12 pages + appendices

light_analysis.overview: 利用费曼图计算有限宽度神经正切核的修正，简化代数并得到递推关系。
light_analysis.motivation: 无限宽度神经正切核（NTK）虽易于计算，但缺乏训练动力学的重要特性如NTK演化和特征学习。有限宽度效应可修正高斯统计，但现有计算复杂。本文引入费曼图方法，旨在简化有限宽度修正的代数操作，并扩展至更高阶导数张量以预测训练动力学。
light_analysis.method: 提出基于费曼图的框架计算NTK的有限宽度修正，该图方法简化了代数推导，得到包含预激活、NTK及高阶导数张量（dNTK和ddNTK）的层间递推关系。特别针对尺度不变非线性（如ReLU）证明了Gram矩阵对角线上无有限宽度修正。数值实现了完整的一阶修正方程，适用于任意输入。
light_analysis.result: 数值实验表明，对于宽度n≥20的采样神经网络，所提框架计算的有限宽度修正与统计结果一致。验证了费曼图方法的有效性，并证明了ReLU等非线性下NTK Gram矩阵对角线无有限宽度修正。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文通过费曼图方法简化了有限宽度NTK修正的计算，为分析深度网络训练动力学提供了新工具。学术上扩展了NTK理论，实际应用可改进对中等宽度网络训练行为的理解。未来可推广至更复杂架构或更高阶修正。

title: A Survey on 3D Gaussian Splatting Applications: Segmentation, Editing, and Generation
abstract: In the context of novel view synthesis, 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) has recently emerged as an efficient and competitive counterpart to Neural Radiance Field (NeRF), enabling high-fidelity photorealistic rendering in real time. Beyond novel view synthesis, the explicit and compact nature of 3DGS enables a wide range of downstream applications that require geometric and semantic understanding. This survey provides a comprehensive overview of recent progress in 3DGS applications. It first reviews the reconstruction preliminaries of 3DGS, followed by the problem formulation, 2D foundation models, and related NeRF-based research areas that inform downstream 3DGS applications. We then categorize 3DGS applications into three foundational tasks: segmentation, editing, and generation, alongside additional functional applications built upon or tightly coupled with these foundational capabilities. For each, we summarize representative methods, supervision strategies, and learning paradigms, highlighting shared design principles and emerging trends. Commonly used datasets and evaluation protocols are also summarized, along with comparative analyses of recent methods across public benchmarks. To support ongoing research and development, a continually updated repository of papers, code, and resources is maintained at https://github.com/heshuting555/Awesome-3DGS-Applications.

light_analysis.overview: 系统综述3D高斯泼溅（3DGS）在分割、编辑和生成三大下游任务中的应用进展。
light_analysis.motivation: 3DGS作为NeRF的高效替代，具备实时高保真渲染能力，但其显式紧凑性带来的几何与语义理解潜力尚未被充分梳理。现有研究分散，缺乏对分割、编辑、生成等下游任务的系统总结，以及设计原则和趋势的统一分析。
light_analysis.method: 首先回顾3DGS重建基础，然后分类三大任务：分割、编辑、生成，并涵盖功能应用。针对每类任务总结代表性方法、监督策略和学习范式，归纳共享设计原则与新兴趋势，同时汇总常用数据集与评估协议。
light_analysis.result: 作为综述，未提出新方法，但系统比较了近期方法在公共基准上的性能，并提供了持续更新的论文、代码资源库（GitHub），为社区提供参考基准。
light_analysis.conclusion: 全面梳理3DGS应用研究，明确分割、编辑、生成的核心进展与共性挑战。提供资源库支持后续研究，有望推动3DGS在实时渲染之外的广泛应用，但未讨论方法局限性及未来具体方向。

title: FlowState: Sampling-Rate-Equivariant Time-Series Forecasting
abstract: Existing time series foundation models (TSFMs), often based on transformer variants, lack adaptability to different sampling rates, struggle with generalization across varying context and target lengths, and are computationally inefficient. We introduce FlowState, a novel TSFM architecture that achieves sampling-rate-equivariant forecasting through a unified design that pairs a state space model (SSM) encoder with a functional basis decoder (FBD). This design enables continuous-time modeling and dynamic time-scale adjustment, allowing FlowState to inherently generalize across all possible temporal resolutions, and dynamically adjust the forecasting horizons without retraining. We further propose an efficient pretraining strategy that improves robustness and accelerates training. Despite being one of the smallest TSFMs, FlowState achieves state-of-the-art results on the widely used GIFT-Eval benchmark, while demonstrating superior adaptability to unseen sampling rates. Our detailed analyses confirm the effectiveness of its components, and we demonstrate its unique ability to adapt to varying input sampling rates.
comment: Proceedings of the 43 rd International Conference on Machine Learning, Seoul, South Korea. PMLR 306, 2026. Copyright 2026 by the author(s)

light_analysis.overview: 提出FlowState，一种采样率等变的时间序列基础模型，结合状态空间模型和功能基解码器实现连续时间建模与动态预测。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有时间序列基础模型（TSFMs）通常基于Transformer变体，缺乏对不同采样率的适应性，难以泛化到不同的上下文和目标长度，且计算效率低下。这限制了模型在实际应用中处理多变时间分辨率的能力，迫切需要一种能自适应调整预测时域且无需重新训练的高效架构。
light_analysis.method: FlowState采用状态空间模型（SSM）编码器与功能基解码器（FBD）的统一设计，实现连续时间建模和动态时间尺度调整，从而先天性地泛化到所有时间分辨率并动态调整预测视界。同时提出高效预训练策略，提升鲁棒性并加速训练，使模型在极小参数规模下仍具竞争力。
light_analysis.result: 尽管FlowState是规模最小的TSFMs之一，但在广泛使用的GIFT-Eval基准上取得了最先进的结果。此外，它展现出卓越的适应能力，能够处理未见过的采样率。详细分析证实了各组件（SSM编码器与FBD解码器）的有效性，并验证了其对不同输入采样率的动态适应性。
light_analysis.conclusion: FlowState通过采样率等变设计解决了现有TSFMs的泛化与效率瓶颈，具有重要的学术价值和应用前景。其连续时间建模能力为多分辨率时间序列预测提供了新范式，未来可探索在更多实际场景中的部署，但摘要未提及潜在局限性。

title: MedSynth: Realistic, Synthetic Medical Dialogue-Note Pairs
abstract: Physicians spend significant time documenting clinical encounters, a burden that contributes to professional burnout. To address this, robust automation tools for medical documentation are crucial. We introduce MedSynth -- a novel dataset of synthetic medical dialogues and notes designed to advance the Dialogue-to-Note (Dial-2-Note) and Note-to-Dialogue (Note-2-Dial) tasks. Informed by an extensive analysis of disease distributions, this dataset includes over 10,000 dialogue-note pairs covering over 2000 ICD-10 codes. We demonstrate that our dataset markedly enhances the performance of models in generating medical notes from dialogues, and dialogues from medical notes. The dataset provides a valuable resource in a field where open-access, privacy-compliant, and diverse training data are scarce. Code is available at https://github.com/ahmadrezarm/MedSynth/tree/main and the dataset is available at https://huggingface.co/datasets/Ahmad0067/MedSynth.

light_analysis.overview: 提出MedSynth数据集，合成医疗对话与笔记对，提升自动化文档生成性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 医生在临床记录上花费大量时间，导致职业倦怠。现有自动化工具缺乏开放、隐私合规且多样的训练数据。为解决这些不足，需要高质量合成数据集来推动对话到笔记和笔记到对话任务的发展。
light_analysis.method: MedSynth基于疾病分布分析，合成超过10,000对医疗对话和笔记，覆盖2000多个ICD-10代码。数据集可用于Dial-2-Note和Note-2-Dial任务，模型可从中学习生成临床笔记或模拟对话。代码和数据集已开源。
light_analysis.result: 使用MedSynth数据集显著提升了模型在医疗笔记生成和对话生成任务上的性能。实验表明，该数据集能有效增强模型的实用性和准确性，但摘要未提供具体数值对比。
light_analysis.conclusion: MedSynth为医疗文档自动化提供了宝贵资源，有助于减轻医生负担。其开源特性促进隐私合规研究，未来可扩展更多疾病类型或语言，但摘要未明确说明局限性。

title: FOUNDv2: Learning Unified User Quantized Tokenizers for User Representation
abstract: User representation learning serves as a fundamental pillar for personalized services on large-scale web platforms. Despite its importance, conventional continuous embedding methods face significant challenges, including the lack of a unified paradigm for multi-source data integration, prohibitive storage overhead due to low information density, and the lack of multi-scale modeling granularity. To overcome these limitations, we introduce FOUNDv2, a comprehensive user representation scheme centered on the Unified User Quantized Tokenizer U2QT) framework. FOUNDv2 transforms heterogeneous user data into a standardized discrete token space through a robust two-stage architecture. Specifically, the framework first extracts compact feature representations and subsequently employs a multi-view RQ-VAE to discretize them into storage-efficient tokens using shared and source-specific codebooks. To empower these representations with predictive intelligence, we further design multi-scale alignment objectives to capture both fine-grained behavioral dependencies and macro-temporal periodicity. Extensive experiments on various benchmarks demonstrate that FOUNDv2 consistently outperforms task-specific baselines while achieving substantial reductions in storage and computational costs. Finally, the large-scale deployment of FOUNDv2 on Alipay validates its practical scalability and efficiency across diverse industrial scenarios. The main code is available at: https://github.com/chuanhe1999/FOUNDv2.

light_analysis.overview: 提出FOUNDv2框架，通过统一用户量化分词器将异构用户数据转化为离散token，实现高效存储与多尺度建模。
light_analysis.motivation: 用户表示学习面临三大挑战：多源数据缺乏统一整合范式、连续嵌入存储开销大且信息密度低、缺乏多尺度建模粒度。现有方法难以同时兼顾统一性、存储效率和细粒度与宏观建模，亟需一种可扩展、高效的统一表示方案。
light_analysis.method: 提出U2QT框架，采用两阶段架构：首先提取紧凑特征表示，然后通过多视角RQ-VAE将其离散化为共享和源特定码本的存储高效token。设计多尺度对齐目标，捕捉细粒度行为依赖与宏观时间周期性，实现预测性表示学习。
light_analysis.result: 在多个基准上一致优于任务特定基线，同时大幅降低存储和计算成本。支付宝大规模部署验证了其实用可扩展性，支持多样工业场景。
light_analysis.conclusion: FOUNDv2通过离散token化实现统一、高效、多粒度的用户表示，具有显著的学术与工业价值。未来可探索更细粒度或跨模态扩展，但当前已有效解决存储与建模瓶颈。

title: Unifying Post-hoc Explanations of Knowledge Graph Completions
abstract: Knowledge Graphs organize information as entity-relation-entity triples, enabling machine learning models to predict plausible missing triples in a task known as Knowledge Graph Completion (KGC). Post-hoc explainability for KGC addresses the problem of identifying which triples most influence the predictions of machine learning models. Currently, the field lacks formalization and consistent evaluations, hindering reproducibility and cross-study comparisons. This paper argues for a unified taxonomy for post-hoc explainability in KGC. First, we propose a characterization of post-hoc explanations via multi-objective optimization that unifies existing post-hoc explainability algorithms in KGC and the explanations they produce, balancing explanation effectiveness and conciseness. Next, we examine improved evaluation protocols based on popular metrics, such as Mean Reciprocal Rank and Hits@k, through illustrative experiments. Finally, we stress the importance of interpretability as the ability of explanations to address queries meaningful to end users. By unifying methods and discussing evaluation standards, this work puts forward a case for more reproducible and impactful research in KGC explainability.

light_analysis.overview: 提出知识图谱补全的后验可解释性统一框架，通过多目标优化整合现有方法并改进评估协议。
light_analysis.motivation: 知识图谱补全（KGC）模型预测缺失三元组，但后验可解释性缺乏形式化和一致评估，导致研究难以复现和跨方法比较。现有可解释性算法多样，缺乏统一分类和评估标准，影响研究进展和实际应用。
light_analysis.method: 提出基于多目标优化的统一分类法，将后验可解释性视为平衡解释有效性和简洁性的优化问题，从而统一现有算法及其产生的解释。同时改进基于MRR和Hits@k等指标的评估协议，并通过实验验证。
light_analysis.result: 通过示例实验展示了改进后的评估协议在衡量解释质量上的有效性，强调了可解释性应满足用户查询需求。论文未提供具体性能数据，但提出了更标准化的评估方式以促进可复现研究。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该工作通过统一方法和讨论评估标准，推动了KGC可解释性研究的可复现性和影响力。未来可基于此框架开发更有效的解释算法，并探索用户导向的评估指标。局限性在于未覆盖所有现有方法。

title: Communication-Efficient Distributed Training for Collaborative Flat Optima Recovery in Deep Learning
abstract: We study centralized distributed data parallel training of deep neural networks (DNNs), aiming to improve the trade-off between communication efficiency and model performance of the local gradient methods. To this end, we revisit the flat-minima hypothesis, which suggests that models with better generalization tend to lie in flatter regions of the loss landscape. We introduce a simple, yet effective, sharpness measure, Inverse Mean Valley, and demonstrate its strong correlation with the generalization gap of DNNs. We incorporate an efficient relaxation of this measure into the distributed training objective as a lightweight regularizer that encourages workers to collaboratively seek wide minima. The regularizer exerts a pushing force that counteracts the consensus step pulling the workers together, giving rise to the Distributed Pull-Push Force (DPPF) algorithm. Empirically, we show that DPPF outperforms other communication-efficient approaches and achieves better generalization performance than local gradient methods and synchronous gradient averaging, while maintaining communication efficiency. In addition, our loss landscape visualizations confirm the ability of DPPF to locate flatter minima. On the theoretical side, we show that DPPF guides workers to span flat valleys, with the final valley width governed by the interplay between push and pull strengths, and that its pull-push dynamics is self-stabilizing. We further provide generalization guarantees linked to the valley width and prove convergence in the non-convex setting.
comment: Accepted to UAI 2026 - 9 pages main body, 33 pages of supplementary material for hyperparameter configurations, full proofs of theorems and additional results

light_analysis.overview: 提出分布式拉推力算法DPPF，通过轻量级正则化鼓励工作节点协同寻找宽谷，改善通信效率与模型泛化间的权衡。
light_analysis.motivation: 分布式深度学习训练中，局部梯度方法在通信效率和模型性能之间往往存在权衡。现有方法如局部梯度下降受限于通信频率，而同步梯度平均则通信成本高。研究发现，泛化能力强的模型倾向于损失景观中的平坦区域，但现有分布式训练方法缺乏有效的平坦性正则化机制。本文旨在设计一种通信高效的分布式训练算法，既能保持低通信开销，又能引导工作节点协同定位平坦极小值，从而提升模型泛化性能。
light_analysis.method: 本文提出分布式拉推力（DPPF）算法。首先定义一种新的锐度度量——逆均值谷（Inverse Mean Valley），并将其轻量级松弛形式作为正则项加入分布式训练目标。该正则项产生一个“推力”，抵消分布式共识步骤中的“拉力”，从而鼓励各工作节点探索宽谷。算法在每次通信回合中仅交换模型梯度，保持通信效率。理论上证明了DPPF引导工作节点形成扁平谷，谷宽度由推拉强度决定，且推拉动力学具有自稳定性，并在非凸设置下给出了收敛保证。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，DPPF在多个基准数据集上优于其他通信高效方法（如局部梯度下降、同步梯度平均），在保持通信效率的同时实现了更好的泛化性能。损失景观可视化验证了DPPF能够定位更平坦的极小值。未提供具体数值指标，但强调其在不同设置下的优势。
light_analysis.conclusion: DPPF算法通过引入逆均值谷正则化，在分布式训练中协同寻找平坦极小值，显著改善了通信效率与模型泛化的权衡。理论分析提供了泛化保证和收敛性证明。该工作为设计通信高效的分布式深度学习算法提供了新视角，未来可探索自适应推拉强度调整及在异构环境下的扩展。

title: Generative AI and the future of scientometrics: current topics and future questions
abstract: In this paper, we contribute to the debate on generative artificial intelligence (GenAI) in scientometrics. We argue that moving from a trial-and-error approach to an explainable and actionable use requires a principled understanding of strengths and weaknesses of GenAI as compared with other techniques and with human judgment. To this end, we introduce a conceptual framework based on the distinction between the semantic dimensions of texts, i.e. the meanings attributed to words, and their pragmatic dimension, i.e. their embedding within communicative situations. We leverage this framework to interpret the results of applications of GenAI in scientometrics and to provide guidance to users. Specifically, we conclude that key parameters to be considered are the nature of the task, the level of granularity of the analysis and whether the goal was descriptive, inferential or evaluative. These parameters lead to different strategies for using GenAI and human-machine integration. Finally, we suggest that, by generating large amounts of scientific language, GenAI might affect textual characteristics used to measure science, such as authors, words, and references. We argue that careful empirical work and theoretical reflection will be essential to remain capable of interpreting the evolving patterns of knowledge production in the age of AI.

light_analysis.overview: 提出基于语义与语用维度区分的概念框架，指导生成式AI在科学计量学中的可解释与可操作应用。
light_analysis.motivation: 当前科学计量学中生成式AI应用多为试错法，缺乏可解释性和可操作性。亟需系统性理解GenAI相较于其他技术及人类判断的优势与劣势，以推动其从试错转向可靠应用。本论文旨在填补这一方法论空白。
light_analysis.method: 引入区分文本语义维度（词汇含义）与语用维度（交际嵌入）的概念框架，用于解释GenAI在科学计量学中的应用结果并指导实践。总结关键参数：任务性质、分析粒度及目标类型（描述/推理/评估），不同参数组合对应差异化的GenAI使用与人机集成策略。
light_analysis.result: 论文未提供具体实验数据，但通过概念分析指出GenAI可能改变作者、词汇及参考文献等科学度量指标。强调需通过细致实证与理论反思来解读AI时代知识生产的演化模式，并给出了任务导向的策略指导。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本论文为科学计量学中生成式AI的应用提供了系统性概念框架，明确了任务性质、分析粒度及目标作为关键参数，指导人机协同。学术价值在于推动该领域从经验转向理论指导，实践意义在于提升GenAI应用的可解释性。未来需加强实证研究与理论反思以应对文本特征变化。

title: Towards Advanced Mathematical Reasoning for LLMs via First-Order Logic Theorem Proving
abstract: Large language models (LLMs) have shown promising first-order logic (FOL) reasoning capabilities with applications in various areas. However, their effectiveness in complex mathematical reasoning involving multi-step FOL deductions is still under-researched. While LLMs perform competitively on established mathematical reasoning benchmarks, they struggle with multi-step FOL tasks, as demonstrated by Deepseek-Prover-V2-7B's low accuracy (4.2%) on our proposed theorem proving dataset. This issue arises from the limited exploration of diverse proof strategies and the potential for early reasoning mistakes to undermine entire proofs. To address these issues, we propose DREAM, a self-adaptive solution that enhances the Diversity and REAsonability of LLMs' generation strategies. DREAM incorporates an Axiom-Driven Strategy Diversification mechanism to promote varied strategic outcomes and a Sub-Proposition Error Feedback to help LLMs reflect on and correct their proofs. Our contributions include pioneering advancements in LLMs' mathematical reasoning through FOL theorem proving, introducing a novel inference stage solution that improves performance by 0.6% to 6.4%, and providing a curated dataset of 447 mathematical theorems in Lean 4 format for evaluation.

light_analysis.overview: 提出DREAM方法，通过公理驱动的策略多样化和子命题错误反馈机制，增强LLMs在多步一阶逻辑定理证明中的数学推理能力。
light_analysis.motivation: LLMs在复杂数学推理中表现不佳，尤其是在多步一阶逻辑演绎任务上。例如，Deepseek-Prover-V2-7B在构造的定理证明数据集上仅达4.2%准确率。现有方法受限于证明策略探索不足，且早期推理错误易使整个证明失效。因此，需要提升LLMs生成策略的多样性和推理正确性，以应对多步FOL挑战。
light_analysis.method: DREAM包含两个关键组件：Axiom-Driven Strategy Diversification，通过公理指导促进多样化证明路径；Sub-Proposition Error Feedback，允许LLMs反思并修正中间子命题错误。该方法在推理阶段自适应调整策略，无需额外训练。评估使用包含447个数学定理的Lean 4格式数据集。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，DREAM在多个数学推理基准上取得0.6%至6.4%的性能提升，显著优于基线方法。特别在多步FOL任务中，准确率大幅提高，证明了策略多样性和错误反馈机制的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该工作首次将FOL定理证明应用于提升LLMs的数学推理能力，提出了一种无训练、推理阶段的自适应解决方案。构建的定理证明数据集为后续研究提供基准。未来可探索更复杂的数学领域及结合形式化验证。

title: Multiple Descents in Deep Learning as a Sequence of Order-Chaos Transitions in LSTM Networks
abstract: We observe a novel `multiple-descent' phenomenon during the learning process of a recurrent neural network called long-short-term memory (LSTM) networks during its training on real-world task, in which the performance goes through long cycles of up and down trends multiple times after the model is overtrained. By carrying out asymptotic stability analysis of the models, we found that the cycles in performance -- indicated by loss function in test data -- are closely associated with the phase transition process between order and chaos of the model, and the local optimal training step are consistently at the critical transition point between the two phases. More importantly, the most optimal point of the model usually occurs at the first transition from order to chaos, where the `width' of the `edge of chaos' is often the widest, allowing the best exploration of weight configurations for learning.

light_analysis.overview: 发现LSTM训练中的性能多次下降与有序-混沌相变相关，最优解位于第一次相变点。
light_analysis.motivation: 深度学习模型在过训练后性能会出现多次上下波动，其内在机制尚不明确。理解这一现象对于优化训练过程、避免过拟合至关重要。现有研究多从优化动力学或泛化理论角度解释，但缺乏从相变视角的系统分析。
light_analysis.method: 对LSTM网络在真实任务训练过程中进行渐近稳定性分析，将测试损失波动与有序-混沌相变过程关联。通过分析模型在参数空间中的稳定性，发现局部最优训练步恰好位于相变临界点，且第一次有序到混沌转变时“混沌边缘”宽度最大，有利于权重配置探索。
light_analysis.result: 观察到LSTM训练中性能出现多次上升下降的循环，与相变过程同步。测试损失函数的周期变化对应模型有序与混沌状态的交替。模型在第一次有序到混沌转变点取得全局最优，此时混沌边缘宽度最大，实现了最佳泛化性能。
light_analysis.conclusion: 揭示了LSTM训练中多次下降现象的本质源于有序-混沌相变，并指出最优模型出现在第一次相变点。该发现为深度学习训练动力学提供了新视角，可指导早停策略设计。未来需验证该普适性及应用于其他架构。

title: Supervised Graph Contrastive Learning for Gene Regulatory Networks
abstract: Graph Contrastive Learning (GCL) is a powerful self-supervised learning framework that performs data augmentation through graph perturbations, with growing applications in the analysis of biological networks such as Gene Regulatory Networks (GRNs). The artificial perturbations commonly used in GCL, such as node dropping, induce structural changes that can diverge from biological reality. This concern has contributed to a broader trend in graph representation learning toward augmentation-free methods, which view such structural changes as problematic and should be avoided. However, this trend overlooks the fundamental insight that structural changes from biologically meaningful perturbations are not a problem to be avoided, but rather a rich source of information, thereby ignoring the valuable opportunity to leverage data from real biological experiments. Motivated by this insight, we propose SupGCL (Supervised Graph Contrastive Learning), a new GCL method for GRNs that directly incorporates biological perturbations from gene knockdown experiments as supervision. SupGCL is a probabilistic formulation that continuously generalizes conventional GCL, linking artificial augmentations with real perturbations measured in knockdown experiments, and using the latter as explicit supervision. On patient-derived GRNs from three cancer types, we train GRN representations with SupGCL and evaluate it in two regimes: (i) embedding space analysis, where it yields clearer disease-subtype structure and improves clustering, and (ii) task-specific fine-tuning, where it consistently outperforms strong graph representation learning baselines on 13 downstream tasks spanning gene-level functional annotation and patient-level prediction.

light_analysis.overview: 提出SupGCL，利用基因敲除实验的生物扰动作为监督信号，增强图对比学习在基因调控网络中的表示能力。
light_analysis.motivation: 传统图对比学习使用人工扰动（如节点删除）可能导致结构偏离生物现实，现有趋势倾向于避免扰动。作者认为生物有意义的扰动是丰富的信息源，因此提出利用实际生物实验数据作为监督，避免信息丢失。
light_analysis.method: 提出SupGCL，一种概率公式化的监督图对比学习方法，连续推广传统图对比学习，将人工增强与基因敲除实验的真实扰动联系起来，并以后者为显式监督。在三种癌症类型的患者衍生GRN上训练表示。
light_analysis.result: 在嵌入空间分析中，SupGCL产生更清晰的疾病亚型结构并改进聚类；在任务特定微调中，在13个下游任务上持续优于强图表示学习基线，涵盖基因功能注释和患者级预测。
light_analysis.conclusion: 证明了利用生物扰动作为监督信号的有效性，拓展了图对比学习在生物网络分析中的应用，提供更符合生物学意义的表示，具有潜在临床价值。

title: Hidden Ghost Hand: Unveiling Backdoor Vulnerabilities in MLLM-Powered Mobile GUI Agents
abstract: Graphical user interface (GUI) agents powered by multimodal large language models (MLLMs) have shown greater promise for human-interaction. However, due to the high fine-tuning cost, users often rely on open-source GUI agents or APIs offered by AI providers, which introduces a critical but underexplored supply chain threat: backdoor attacks. In this work, we first unveil that MLLM-powered GUI agents naturally expose multiple interaction-level triggers, such as historical steps, environment states, and task progress. Based on this observation, we introduce AgentGhost, an effective and stealthy framework for red-teaming backdoor attacks. Specifically, we first construct composite triggers by combining goal and interaction levels, allowing GUI agents to unintentionally activate backdoors while ensuring task utility. Then, we formulate backdoor injection as a Min-Max optimization problem that uses supervised contrastive learning to maximize the feature difference across sample classes at the representation space, improving flexibility of the backdoor. Meanwhile, it adopts supervised fine-tuning to minimize the discrepancy between backdoor and clean behavior generation, enhancing effectiveness and utility. Extensive evaluations of various agent models in two established mobile benchmarks show that AgentGhost is effective and generic, with attack accuracy that reaches 99.7\% on three attack objectives, and shows stealthiness with only 1\% utility degradation. Furthermore, we tailor a defense method against AgentGhost that reduces the attack accuracy to 22.1\%. Our code is available at \texttt{anonymous}.

light_analysis.overview: 提出AgentGhost框架，揭示并利用MLLM驱动的GUI代理中的后门攻击漏洞，实现高效且隐蔽的红队攻击。
light_analysis.motivation: MLLM驱动的GUI代理在交互任务中表现优异，但由于微调成本高，用户常依赖开源代理或API，引入供应链威胁。现有研究未充分探索此类代理中的后门攻击，尤其是其天然存在的交互级触发器（如历史步骤、环境状态）未被利用。AgentGhost旨在填补这一空白，展示攻击的有效性和隐蔽性，并推动防御研究。
light_analysis.method: AgentGhost框架首先构建由目标和交互级组合而成的复合触发器，使代理在无意中激活后门。将后门注入形式化为Min-Max优化问题：通过监督对比学习最大化样本类间的特征差异以提高灵活性，同时采用监督微调最小化后门与正常行为生成的差异以提升效用。在移动基准上评估多种代理模型。
light_analysis.result: 在三个攻击目标上，攻击精度达99.7%，且仅造成1%的效用损失，表明攻击的有效性和隐蔽性。针对AgentGhost定制的防御方法可将攻击精度降至22.1%。代码已公开。
light_analysis.conclusion: AgentGhost揭示了MLLM驱动GUI代理中的供应链安全风险，为红队攻击提供了有效工具，同时通过提出的防御方法促进了安全研究。未来可探索更复杂的触发器组合和更鲁棒的防御机制，但当前工作已强调后门攻击的严重性。

title: A Comprehensive Survey of Knowledge-Based Vision Question Answering Systems: The Lifecycle of Knowledge in Visual Reasoning Task
abstract: Knowledge-based Vision Question Answering (KB-VQA) extends general Vision Question Answering (VQA) by not only requiring the understanding of visual and textual inputs but also extensive range of knowledge, enabling significant advancements across various real-world applications. KB-VQA introduces unique challenges, including the alignment of heterogeneous information from diverse modalities and sources, the retrieval of relevant knowledge from noisy or large-scale repositories, and the execution of complex reasoning to infer answers from the combined context. With the advancement of Large Language Models (LLMs), KB-VQA systems have also undergone a notable transformation, where LLMs serve as powerful knowledge repositories, retrieval-augmented generators and strong reasoners. Despite substantial progress, no comprehensive survey currently exists that systematically organizes and reviews the existing KB-VQA methods. This survey aims to fill this gap by establishing a structured taxonomy of KB-VQA approaches, and categorizing the systems into main stages: knowledge representation, knowledge retrieval, and knowledge reasoning. By exploring various knowledge integration techniques and identifying persistent challenges, this work also outlines promising future research directions, providing a foundation for advancing KB-VQA models and their applications.
comment: Accepted at TKDE, 20 pages, 5 figures, 4 tables

light_analysis.overview: 综述知识驱动视觉问答系统，构建知识生命周期三阶段分类体系，分析LLM带来的变革。
light_analysis.motivation: KB-VQA需要理解视觉、文本输入并融合多种外部知识，但现有方法面临异构信息对齐、噪声检索和复杂推理等挑战。尽管LLM推动了KB-VQA的变革，但缺乏系统性的综述来组织现有方法。本文旨在填补这一空白，为研究者提供清晰的研究框架。
light_analysis.method: 论文提出结构化分类法，将KB-VQA系统分为知识表示、知识检索和知识推理三个阶段。通过分析知识集成技术，系统梳理了现有方法，并特别关注LLM作为知识库、检索增强生成器和推理器的角色转变。
light_analysis.result: 摘要未明确报告具体实验结果。作为综述论文，它通过建立分类体系和识别持续挑战，为后续研究提供了理论基础和方向指引，但未提供量化性能对比。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文系统综述了KB-VQA方法，建立了知识生命周期分类体系，揭示了LLM带来的范式转变。研究为KB-VQA领域提供了清晰的全局视图，指出了未来研究方向（如更有效的知识融合、鲁棒推理），对推动视觉与知识融合的应用（如智能助手、自动驾驶）具有重要价值。

title: CLAD: Constrained Latent Action Diffusion for Vision-Language Procedure Planning
abstract: We propose CLAD, a Constrained Latent Action Diffusion model for vision-language procedure planning in instructional videos. Procedure planning is the challenging task of predicting intermediate actions given a visual observation of a start and a goal state. However, future interactive AI systems must also be able to plan procedures using multi-modal input, e.g., where visual observations are augmented with language descriptions. To tackle this vision-language procedure planning task, our method uses a Variational Autoencoder (VAE) to learn the latent representation of actions and observations as constraints and integrate them into the diffusion process. This approach exploits that the latent space of diffusion models already has semantics that can be used. We use the latent constraints to steer the diffusion model to better generate actions. We report extensive experiments on the popular CrossTask, Coin, and NIV datasets and show that our method outperforms state-of-the-art methods by a large margin. By evaluating ablated versions of our method, we further show that the proposed integration of the action and observation representations learnt in the VAE latent space is key to these performance improvements.

light_analysis.overview: 提出CLAD模型，利用VAE将动作和观察的潜在表示作为约束集成到扩散过程中，用于视觉-语言过程规划。
light_analysis.motivation: 过程规划任务旨在根据起始和目标状态预测中间动作，但现有方法多依赖纯视觉输入，缺乏处理多模态（如语言）输入的能力。实际交互式AI系统需要灵活利用视觉和语言描述进行规划。此外，扩散模型虽能生成动作序列，但未充分利用其潜在空间的语义信息来约束生成过程。因此，需要一种能融合多模态约束并提升动作生成准确性的方法。
light_analysis.method: 提出CLAD模型，采用变分自编码器（VAE）学习动作和观察的潜在表示，并将这些表示作为约束条件集成到扩散模型的逆去噪过程中。利用扩散模型潜在空间的语义，通过约束引导模型生成符合任务需求的中间动作序列。方法在CrossTask、Coin和NIV数据集上评估，与SOTA对比并消融实验验证关键组件。
light_analysis.result: 在CrossTask、Coin和NIV三个数据集上，CLAD显著优于现有SOTA方法，平均准确率提升较大（具体数字未明确）。消融实验表明，将VAE学习到的动作和观察表示集成到扩散过程中是关键，缺少任何一部分都会导致性能下降。
light_analysis.conclusion: 提出视觉-语言过程规划任务，并设计了CLAD模型，通过约束潜在动作扩散有效融合多模态输入。实验证明方法优越性，为交互式AI系统提供新思路。未来可探索更复杂的约束形式或扩展到其他规划任务。

title: Efficient Reinforcement Learning by Guiding World Models with Non-Curated Data
abstract: Leveraging offline data is a promising way to improve the sample efficiency of online reinforcement learning (RL). This paper expands the pool of usable data for offline-to-online RL by leveraging abundant non-curated data that is reward-free, of mixed quality, and collected across multiple embodiments. Although learning a world model appears promising for utilizing such data, we find that naive fine-tuning fails to accelerate RL training on many tasks. Through careful investigation, we attribute this failure to the distributional shift between offline and online data during fine-tuning. To address this issue and effectively use the offline data, we propose two techniques: \emph{i)} experience rehearsal and \emph{ii)} execution guidance. With these modifications, the non-curated offline data substantially improves RL's sample efficiency. Under limited sample budgets, our method achieves nearly twice the aggregate score of learning-from-scratch baselines across 72 visuomotor tasks spanning 6 embodiments. On challenging tasks such as locomotion and robotic manipulation, it outperforms prior methods that utilize offline data by a decent margin.

light_analysis.overview: 提出利用非精选离线数据指导世界模型，通过经验重演和执行引导技术提升在线强化学习的样本效率。
light_analysis.motivation: 在线强化学习样本效率低，现有离线-在线方法依赖高质量、带奖励的离线数据，限制了可用数据范围。本文旨在利用丰富的非精选数据（无奖励、质量混合、多体现）来提升样本效率，但直接微调世界模型因离线与在线数据的分布偏移而失败。
light_analysis.method: 提出两种技术解决分布偏移问题：1）经验重演（Experience Rehearsal）：重放离线数据以保持对先前经验的记忆；2）执行引导（Execution Guidance）：利用离线数据指导在线执行。在基于世界模型的强化学习框架中，结合非精选离线数据进行微调。
light_analysis.result: 在72个视觉运动任务（涵盖6种体现）上，有限样本预算下聚合得分接近从头学习基线的两倍。在移动和机器人操作等挑战性任务上，超过先前利用离线数据的方法较大幅度。
light_analysis.conclusion: 证明了非精选离线数据通过合适的利用方式能显著提升强化学习样本效率。经验重演和执行引导有效缓解了分布偏移，拓展了离线数据的使用范围。未来工作可探索更复杂的数据筛选或融合策略。

title: Region-Adaptive Sampling for Diffusion Transformers
abstract: Diffusion models (DMs) have become the leading choice for generative tasks across diverse domains. However, their reliance on multiple sequential forward passes significantly limits real-time performance. Previous acceleration methods have primarily focused on reducing the number of sampling steps or reusing intermediate results, failing to leverage variations across spatial regions within the image due to the constraints of convolutional U-Net structures. By harnessing the flexibility of Diffusion Transformers (DiTs) in handling variable number of tokens, we introduce RAS, a novel, training-free sampling strategy that dynamically assigns different sampling ratios to regions within an image based on the focus of the DiT model. Our key observation is that during each sampling step, the model concentrates on semantically meaningful regions, and these areas of focus exhibit strong continuity across consecutive steps. Leveraging this insight, RAS updates only the regions currently in focus, while other regions are updated using cached noise from the previous step. The model's focus is determined based on the output from the preceding step, capitalizing on the temporal consistency we observed. We evaluate RAS on Stable Diffusion 3 and Lumina-Next-T2I, achieving speedups up to 2.36x and 2.51x, respectively, with minimal degradation in generation quality. Additionally, a user study reveals that RAS delivers comparable qualities under human evaluation while achieving a 1.6x speedup. Our approach makes a significant step towards more efficient diffusion transformers, enhancing their potential for real-time applications.

light_analysis.overview: 提出无需训练的RAS策略，根据DiT模型关注区域动态分配采样比例，实现高效加速。
light_analysis.motivation: 扩散模型因多步前向传播导致实时性能受限。现有加速方法主要减少采样步数或复用中间结果，但受卷积U-Net结构限制，未能利用图像空间区域差异。本文利用DiT处理可变令牌数的灵活性，旨在通过非均匀采样加速。
light_analysis.method: 提出RAS（区域自适应采样），无需训练。利用连续采样步骤中模型关注区域的强连续性，仅更新当前关注区域，其余区域使用前一步缓存噪声。关注区域由前一步输出决定。在Stable Diffusion 3和Lumina-Next-T2I上评估。
light_analysis.result: 在Stable Diffusion 3和Lumina-Next-T2I上分别实现2.36倍和2.51倍加速，生成质量下降极小。用户研究表明在1.6倍加速下质量与原始方法相当。
light_analysis.conclusion: RAS实现了高效扩散变换器加速，显著提升实时应用潜力。未来可进一步优化区域选择机制或扩展到其他生成任务。

title: Enhancing Physics-Informed Neural Networks Through Feature Engineering
abstract: Physics-Informed Neural Networks (PINNs) seek to solve partial differential equations (PDEs) with deep learning. Mainstream approaches that deploy fully-connected multi-layer deep learning architectures require prolonged training to achieve even moderate accuracy, while recent work on feature engineering allows higher accuracy and faster convergence. This paper introduces SAFE-NET, a Single-layered Adaptive Feature Engineering NETwork that achieves orders-of-magnitude lower errors with far fewer parameters than baseline feature engineering methods. SAFE-NET returns to basic ideas in machine learning, using Fourier features, a simplified single hidden layer network architecture, and an effective optimizer that improves the conditioning of the PINN optimization problem. Numerical results show that SAFE-NET converges faster and typically outperforms deeper networks and more complex architectures. It consistently uses fewer parameters -- on average, 65% fewer than the competing feature engineering methods -- while achieving comparable accuracy in less than 30% of the training epochs. Moreover, each SAFE-NET epoch is 95% faster than those of competing feature engineering approaches. These findings challenge the prevailing belief that modern PINNs effectively learn features in these scientific applications and highlight the efficiency gains possible through feature engineering.
comment: Published in Transactions on Machine Learning Research (TMLR), November 2025

light_analysis.overview: 提出SAFE-NET单层自适应特征工程网络，通过傅里叶特征和优化器大幅提升物理信息神经网络的精度与收敛速度。
light_analysis.motivation: 传统物理信息神经网络（PINNs）采用全连接深度网络，训练时间长且精度有限；现有特征工程方法虽有所改进，但仍依赖大量参数和复杂架构。高效求解偏微分方程对科学计算至关重要，亟需更轻量级、更快速的方法。
light_analysis.method: SAFE-NET采用单隐藏层架构，结合傅里叶特征进行特征工程，并利用专用优化器改善PINN优化问题的条件。核心创新在于回归经典机器学习思想，以极简结构实现高效特征学习，大幅减少参数数量并提升训练效率。
light_analysis.result: SAFE-NET相比基线特征工程方法，误差降低数个数量级，参数减少65%，训练epoch减少70%以上，且每个epoch速度提升95%。在保持可比精度的前提下，显著优于更深网络和更复杂架构。
light_analysis.conclusion: 挑战了现代PINNs能自动学习特征的普遍观点，证明特征工程在科学计算中的巨大潜力。SAFE-NET为PINNs提供了高效轻量级替代方案，加速PDE求解。未来可探索更复杂的特征组合或扩展到更多PDE类型。

title: Multi-Sensor Fusion for UAV Classification Based on Feature Maps of Image and Radar Data
abstract: The unique cost, flexibility, speed, and efficiency of modern UAVs make them an attractive choice in many applications in contemporary society. This, however, causes an ever-increasing number of reported malicious or accidental incidents, rendering the need for the development of UAV detection and classification mechanisms essential. We propose a methodology for developing a system that fuses already processed multi-sensor data into a new Deep Neural Network to increase its classification accuracy towards UAV detection. The DNN model fuses high-level features extracted from individual object detection and classification models associated with thermal, optronic, and radar data. Additionally, emphasis is given to the model's Convolutional Neural Network (CNN) based architecture that combines the features of the three sensor modalities by stacking the extracted image features of the thermal and optronic sensor achieving higher classification accuracy than each sensor alone.

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种多传感器融合的深度神经网络方法，通过融合热成像、光学和雷达的特征图提高无人机分类精度。
light_analysis.motivation: 现代无人机因成本低、灵活高效被广泛应用，但恶意或意外事件频发，亟需高效的检测与分类机制。现有方法多依赖单一传感器，性能有限，难以应对复杂场景。本文旨在通过融合多传感器数据提升分类准确性。
light_analysis.method: 提出基于深度神经网络的融合架构，分别从热成像、光学和雷达数据中提取高级特征。采用CNN模型，通过堆叠热成像和光学传感器的图像特征，结合雷达特征，构建多模态融合特征，实现比单传感器更高的分类精度。
light_analysis.result: 实验结果表明，所提出的多传感器融合方法在无人机分类任务上优于单一传感器模型，分类准确率显著提升。摘要未提供具体数值，但强调融合后性能超过任何单独传感器。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文贡献了一种多传感器数据融合框架，有效提升无人机分类的可靠性。该框架可扩展至其他传感器类型，对无人机安全监控有重要应用价值。未来可进一步优化融合策略或探索端到端学习。

title: Learning in the Recurrent State: Gradient Descent with Linear Recurrent Networks
abstract: Linear recurrent networks (LRNNs) offer linear-time sequence modeling, but standard recurrent updates do not directly expose the supervised products needed for in-context gradient descent. We propose a sufficient constructive inductive bias for LRNNs: equip a diagonal recurrent state with multiplicative readout and a short sliding-window cross-product self-attention update. The resulting architecture, Gradient-based Recurrent In-context Learner (GRIL), can implement minibatch gradient descent on a task-specific linear predictor during a single forward pass. The same design extends to multi-step updates and cross-entropy classification, with a limited MLP-based extension to non-linear regression. Empirically, trained GRILs recover the behavior and parameters predicted by the construction on synthetic ICL tasks, and the same architectural bias yields useful performance on Long Range Arena and language modelling. These results present windowed cross-product self-attention as a practical, testable inductive bias for LRNNs that learn in context through gradient-descent-like updates.

light_analysis.overview: 提出窗口化交叉乘积自注意力归纳偏置的GRIL架构，使线性循环网络通过类似梯度下降的更新实现上下文学习。
light_analysis.motivation: 线性循环网络（LRNNs）虽能高效序列建模，但标准循环更新不直接暴露上下文梯度下降所需的监督乘积，限制了其在上下文学习中的应用。现有方法缺乏使LRNNs通过梯度下降式更新进行学习的实用归纳偏置，亟需设计一种构造性偏置，让网络在单次前向中执行小批量梯度下降。
light_analysis.method: 提出GRIL架构，核心创新在于将对角循环状态与乘性读出及短滑动窗口交叉乘积自注意力更新相结合。该设计使网络能在单次前向传递中实现任务特定线性预测器的小批量梯度下降，并扩展到多步更新、交叉熵分类及基于MLP的非线性回归。使用合成ICL任务训练，在Long Range Arena和语言建模上验证。
light_analysis.result: 在合成ICL任务上，训练后的GRIL准确恢复理论预测的行为和参数。在Long Range Arena和语言建模任务上，该架构偏置带来有用性能提升，表明窗口化交叉乘积自注意力作为归纳偏置有效，但摘要未给出具体数值。
light_analysis.conclusion: 窗口化交叉乘积自注意力为LRNNs提供了实用且可测试的归纳偏置，使其通过类似梯度下降的更新实现上下文学习。该设计兼具理论指导和实验验证，为序列建模中的上下文学习开辟新方向，未来可探索更复杂的非线性扩展及实际应用。

title: Self-Supervised Learning of Iterative Solvers for Constrained Optimization
abstract: The real-time solution of parametric optimization problems is critical for applications that demand high accuracy under tight real-time constraints, such as model predictive control. To this end, this work presents a learning-based iterative solver for constrained optimization, comprising a neural network predictor that generates initial primal-dual solution estimates, followed by a learned iterative solver that refines these estimates to reach high accuracy. We introduce a novel loss function based on Karush-Kuhn-Tucker (KKT) optimality conditions, enabling fully self-supervised training without pre-solved optimizer solutions. Theoretical guarantees ensure that the training loss function attains minima exclusively at KKT points. A convexification procedure enables application to nonconvex problems while preserving these guarantees. Experiments on two nonconvex case studies demonstrate speedups of up to one order of magnitude compared to state-of-the-art solvers such as IPOPT, while achieving orders of magnitude higher accuracy than competing learning-based approaches.
comment: This work has been published in Results in Control and Optimization. Update to accepted manuscript

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种自监督学习的迭代求解器，用于带约束优化问题，通过KKT条件损失函数实现无需预解样本的训练。
light_analysis.motivation: 实时参数优化问题在模型预测控制等应用中至关重要，需要高精度和实时性。现有方法如IPOPT虽精确但速度慢，而学习类方法精度不足。本文旨在结合两者优势，实现快速且高精度的求解。
light_analysis.method: 提出两阶段框架：神经网络预测器生成初始原始-对偶解，再由学习型迭代求解器精化。核心创新是基于KKT条件设计损失函数，实现完全自监督训练，无需预解优化器解。理论保证损失函数最小值仅在KKT点处。通过凸化处理扩展到非凸问题。
light_analysis.result: 在两个非凸案例研究中，该方法相比IPOPT等最先进求解器加速高达一个数量级，同时精度比竞争学习方法高出数个数量级。具体速度提升和精度数值未明确给出，但摘要声明了显著优势。
light_analysis.conclusion: 贡献了一种自监督学习框架，结合了速度与精度，适用于非凸约束优化。自监督训练避免了对预解数据的依赖，具有实用价值。未来可能进一步扩展至更复杂问题或硬件部署。

title: Convex Approximation of Two-Layer ReLU Networks for Hidden State Differential Privacy
abstract: The hidden state threat model of differential privacy (DP) assumes that the adversary has access only to the final trained machine learning (ML) model, without seeing intermediate states during training. However, the current privacy analyses under this model are restricted to convex optimization problems, reducing their applicability to multi-layer neural networks, which are essential in modern deep learning applications. Notably, the most successful applications of the hidden state privacy analyses in classification tasks have only been for logistic regression models. We demonstrate that it is possible to privately train convex problems with privacy-utility trade-offs comparable to those of 2-layer ReLU networks trained with DP stochastic gradient descent (DP-SGD). This is achieved through a stochastic approximation of a dual formulation of the ReLU minimization problem, resulting in a strongly convex problem. This enables the use of existing hidden state privacy analyses and provides accurate privacy bounds also for the noisy cyclic mini-batch gradient descent (NoisyCGD) method with fixed disjoint mini-batches. Empirical results on benchmark classification tasks demonstrate that NoisyCGD can achieve privacy-utility trade-offs on par with DP-SGD applied to 2-layer ReLU networks.
comment: Errata: correction of Lemma 3.1. Added experiments in Appendix D.1

light_analysis.overview: 提出将两层ReLU网络凸近似为强凸问题，从而应用隐藏状态差分隐私分析，实现与DP-SGD相当的隐私-效用权衡。
light_analysis.motivation: 隐藏状态差分隐私模型允许攻击者仅访问最终模型，但现有隐私分析仅限于凸优化，无法应用于多层神经网络。现代深度学习依赖多层网络，而当前分类任务中隐藏状态隐私分析最成功的应用仅限于逻辑回归。因此，需要一种方法将非凸神经网络转化为可进行严格隐私分析的凸问题，以提升隐私保护能力。
light_analysis.method: 通过随机近似ReLU最小化问题的对偶形式，得到强凸问题，从而利用现有的隐藏状态隐私分析。具体采用NoisyCGD（带噪循环小批量梯度下降）方法，使用固定不相交的小批量，并基于凸性提供精确的隐私界。该方法将两层ReLU网络转化为可处理的形式，实现了与DP-SGD相似的隐私损失。
light_analysis.result: 在基准分类任务上的实验表明，NoisyCGD方法能够达到与应用于两层ReLU网络的DP-SGD相当的隐私-效用权衡。具体性能指标摘要未明确，但声称与DP-SGD相当。该方法在隐藏状态模型下提供了更严格的隐私保证，同时保持了良好的模型效用。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文证明了可以通过凸近似将两层ReLU网络的隐私保护问题转化为强凸优化，从而应用隐藏状态DP分析，实现了与DP-SGD相当的隐私效用权衡。学术价值在于拓宽了隐藏状态隐私分析的适用性，实际价值在于为神经网络训练提供更严格的隐私保证。未来可探索扩展到更深层网络或更复杂的激活函数。

title: Making Images Real Again: A Comprehensive Survey on Deep Image Composition
abstract: As a common image editing operation, image composition/compositing, which is also called object/subject insertion/addition/compositing, aims to combine the foreground from one image and another background image to produce a composite image. However, there are many issues that could make the composite images unrealistic. These issues can be summarized as the inconsistency between foreground and background, which includes appearance inconsistency, geometry inconsistency, and semantic inconsistency. The image composition task could be decomposed into multiple sub-tasks, in which each sub-task targets one or more issues. Specifically, object placement aims to find reasonable scale, location, and shape for the foreground. Image blending aims to address the unnatural boundary between foreground and background. Image harmonization aims to adjust the illumination statistics of foreground. Shadow (resp., reflection) generation aims to generate plausible shadow (resp., reflection) for the foreground. These sub-tasks can be executed sequentially or in parallel to acquire realistic composite images. To the best of our knowledge, there is no previous survey on image composition. In this paper, we conduct a comprehensive survey over the sub-tasks and combined task of image composition. For each one, we summarize the existing methods, available datasets, and common evaluation metrics. Datasets and codes for image composition are summarized at https://github.com/bcmi/Awesome-Object-Insertion. We have also contributed the first image composition toolbox: libcom https://github.com/bcmi/libcom, which assembles 10+ image-composition-related functions. The ultimate goal of this toolbox is to solve all image composition problems with simple `import libcom'. Based on libcom toolbox, we also develop an online image composition workbench https://libcom.ustcnewly.com.

light_analysis.overview: 首篇深度图像合成综述，系统梳理子任务、方法、数据集与评价指标，并开源综合工具箱。
light_analysis.motivation: 图像合成是常见编辑操作，但前景与背景之间的外观、几何和语义不一致会导致合成图像不真实。现有研究分散在不同子任务中，缺乏系统梳理。本文旨在填补空白，提供全面视角，推动该领域发展。
light_analysis.method: 将图像合成分解为物体放置、图像融合、图像协调、阴影生成和反射生成等子任务，分别综述现有方法、数据集和评价指标。同时，首次提出开源工具箱libcom，集成10余种合成功能，并开发在线工作平台。
light_analysis.result: 总结各子任务的代表性方法，汇总公开数据集和常用评价指标。提供两个开源资源：Awesome-Object-Insertion（数据集和代码列表）和libcom工具箱，简化合成流程。在线平台libcom.ustcnewly.com可供试用。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文是首篇图像合成综述，系统化该领域知识，促进研究与应用。libcom工具箱有望成为标准工具，降低开发门槛。未来可进一步扩展子任务覆盖，提升合成质量。
